plumbers.name: Any Hour Services - Electric, Plumbing, Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 1374 130 S, Orem, UT 84058, USA

reviews.author: Jerome
reviews.text: Any Hour Services has been great and dependable. Especially during high stress times. We initially had Carlos come and snake our drains. They couldnt get through which meant our line was broken. He took us through each step to show us what was wrong. He called for a camera technician to come and see. Todd came and was a great help in showing us how the line was broken. He helped us through the process and scheduling to get the line repaired. On the day of work, James Murano came and began his work. He had an amazing crew! He worked with Arturo, Aguado, Jose Corona, Juan Carmona. The main crew who helped on the entire project which unavoidably lasted 3 days was Beto, Levy Herrera, Steve Decol, and Dan. These guys were such an amazing crew. I cannot express the lengths they took to ensure we had a serviceable system. They worked through some unknown issues that made their work take longer. I am extremely grateful for Any Hour Services for helping us in this difficult situation.

reviews.author: Todd Ward
reviews.text: Sherri came out today to snake our kitchen line. She was super friendly and professional. She quickly took care of the issue. I would recommend her to anyone!!

reviews.author: Samantha Richens
reviews.text: Mark was amazing! He explained everything thoroughly and was very respectful of our home. He went above and beyond; double checking specific details to make sure we got the right product that would last and work best for us. He filled up our new water softener with salt. He even fixed a loose handle he came across 😄 Mark was fun to talk with and very personable. By the end he felt like a family friend!

reviews.author: Kevin Bacon
reviews.text: Needed help with a clogged bathroom sink and a smelling kitchen sink. Sherri was amazing. Prompt, friendly, and educational! Went above and beyond to ensure that not only were our sink issues handled, but also helped us schedule our FREE furnace check up. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.author: Siva K
reviews.text:
I recently had a new range hood vent installed by Any Hour Services, and I’m very pleased with the experience. The technicians, Presley B. and Corry T., were professional, knowledgeable, and courteous throughout the process. They arrived on time, walked me through every detail of the installation, and made sure I understood the setup and what to expect.

They completed the work neatly and carefully, taking the time to ensure everything was properly sealed and aligned. While the vent can’t be fully tested until the new hood is installed, the overall workmanship and attention to detail give me full confidence that everything was done right.

I really appreciate the professionalism and quality service from Presley and Corry — I’d definitely recommend Any Hour Services for anyone looking for reliable home installation work.

plumbers.name: ABC Plumbing, Sewer, Heating, Cooling & Electric
plumbers.address: 220 W Campus Dr, Arlington Heights, IL 60004, USA

reviews.author: Misha Pendersen
reviews.text:
Edgar Rodriguez was a phenomenal representative of the company. He was professional, respectful, friendly, and knowledgeable. We also received a free total house inspection for all our plumbing and heating.

Greg Skalski and Pedro Olascoaga installed my new toilet and upgraded the main valve in my powder room. They, too, were professional, courteous, knowledgeable,
and expedient.

I highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Scott Norman
reviews.text: Very professional and courteous. Did an amazing job with my project. He and his colleague came back early the next day and stayed 12 hours to make sure everything worked. Clean up was amazing. Highly recommend David for electrical needs. Super friendly and great attention to detail. 5 stars for ABC Electric. Will use again. If you get their AI system just follow the prompts, they will call you back quickly. Happy customer!

reviews.author: Samall Hazziez
reviews.text:
This is ‘Part 2’ from my August 16th post:  The ‘Actual Install’

If I attempt to communicate my satisfaction with the work, craftsmanship, and professionalism of Esteban and his partner Tyler, it would be an outright ‘INSULT’…!  These guys were (are), simply the best of the ‘BEST’…End-to-End they were focused and meticulous with their work and ‘QUALITY’ checks…WOW, I AM SO PLEASED WITH MY SYSTEM…!

The actual install/equipment removal was a site to see…’It was like Esteban/Tyler, were building a ‘CASTLE’…It was like they were handling ‘PRECIOUS CARGO’…. Layer, upon Layer…The discipline, the order, the patience (with my questions), their attentiveness to keeping the work area safe and clean.  When it came down to the ‘Verification & Validation’ activities for the system (Testing/Quality Checks), they left ‘ABSOLUTELY NO STONE UN-TURNED’…!

It has been a long, long, LOOONNNGGG-TIME, sense I (my family) was on the receiving end of excellent service and a quality assured, quality driven product solution.  I and my family are eternally grateful for what the ABC corporation has/is investing in their team[s].

From the point of my initial consult and problem eval/assessment with Bob and Tony, through the path of installation/solution validation (testing) with Esteban and Tyler, these guys were absolute champions.  Every home/business should (must) have at their fingertips a master HVAC point of contact.  I recommend (without giving it a second thought), the ABC Team.

I’m not ashamed to admit that I am (at times), a selfish man.  Esteban and Tyler had me believing that I had my own dedicated (quasi) service enablement team.  With that said, Bob M., I will be contacting you ASAP, for my next project/my next consult…’CONSIDER IT DONE’

reviews.author: Muminah Muhammad
reviews.text:
We are members of ABC and having a membership has its perks.  Our appointment had to be rescheduled twice due to dire emergencies and scheduling conflicts.

The third appointment ABC scheduled Mr. Darrell Bell, the Drain Technician to come out and inspect our drainage issue.  Mr. Bell was very professional, he introduced himself, listen to our issue and concerns, provided quality service and gave us the best solution going forward.

We were very impressed that he didn’t make a mess and cleaned up very well when the job was completed.

Well as they say, “the third time’s a charm”.  We are very satisfied with Mr. Bell’s service!

~The Muhammad Family

reviews.author: Sara Qawwas
reviews.text:
Jose was a great tech helping me with moving and putting back the radiators in my home for some restoration work being done. He was very attentive to details and worked extra time to make sure it was all done properly.

My 5 star review is mostly for him. Pricing wise I think they over charge quite a bit but I'm happy with the outcome of the work itself!

plumbers.name: Len The Plumber Heating & Air, LLC
plumbers.address: 3610 Commerce Dr #808, Halethorpe, MD 21227, USA

reviews.author: Peter Karis
reviews.text: We had a ruptured water main leaking inside our basement. We called LtP. The plumber came out a few hours later to inspect and hive us a quote. The repair work happened the next day, which was to replace some pipe, add new shutoff valves and a water pressure reducer. Everything is complete, leak free and working properly. Billy, the plumber doing the work, was very nice, respectful and honest. Everything was done professionally and in a timely manner. Excellent work.

reviews.author: Candace Cole
reviews.text:
All staff were extremely courteous, the appointment was scheduled in a timely manner.. our only complaint is the cost.  The plumber arrived then left for an hour to get a pipe, worked for a bit then needed to leave again this time for over an hour for a blade- the total hour and a half of work was much more expensive - I was told since I signed off on the pricing before that’s the cost - be careful that’s were they get you.  All in all the problem was resolved and I learned a lesson.

I asked for a call back to discuss the logistics but never rec’d one.

reviews.author: Samantha Chaffee
reviews.text: FIVE STARS! I am one tough client, I believe in transparency, our two day service resolved both plumbing issues. Len Plumbing Heating & Air sent Jamarl who arrived Monday morning and was kind enough to explain step by step how our two ruptured pipes would be fixed. He provided a thorough estimate. Tuesday a team of two arrived, cleared away the affected area, removed the damaged pipes, repaired the pipe under our deck with copper, and the bathroom a mix between copper and PVC piping, and utrap. IMPORTANT: The bath has never worked better. Not going to lie my lack of knowledge caused some complications however Lens Plumbing was able to calmly explain what was done and the purpose behind the choices. Truly grateful!

reviews.author: Pipe Guerra
reviews.text: Our technician James Long was awesome. He helped us get water back into our new home and gave us quotes and suggestions on what we should do to prevent it from happening. Would def recommend as he was very friendly. I would recommend to everyone.

reviews.author: Ellery Queen
reviews.text: Plumbing tech said Shower/tub diverted & plumbing install would take a day. I can't speak to the plumber’s skill because he didn’t do any plumbing. But he can do demolition. Put a hole in plaster & lathe hallway wall & left. I had put down a deposit & he didn’t do any plumbing. The company didn’t respond back to txt or call me until Monday October 13th txt saying they wanted to get me back on schedule to complete the work. The Tech was here on October 1st, and I haven't seen him since. A master plumber came today (10/15/2025) from another company and installed the diverter and other necessary plumbing features, he arrived at 09:45 AM and was finished at 12:45 PM, and while they were a little pricier than Len, I didn't have to deposit/pay a penny until the job was complete. I'm not even complaining, I'm just saying.

plumbers.name: Hiller Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical
plumbers.address: 915 Murfreesboro Pike, Nashville, TN 37217, USA

reviews.author: Mitchmeeda
reviews.text:
Excellent in every way. We initially called Hiller for an AC problem and got a tech scheduled right away. Then I realized the issue was actually electrical, not the AC unit, so I called Hiller to request an electrician instead. Rescheduling was a piece of cake. The customer service reps, available by phone or text, are polite and effective. They even called back to offer us earlier availability so we could get our AC on faster.

The electrician, Mike, arrived on time and fully prepared. He replaced a fried breaker box that was preventing our AC from getting power. The initial fix was absolutely necessary, but it didn’t solve the problem right away. Mike kept hunting to find the problem, and he fixed it. He also reviewed our entire breaker box and explained that our outdated system poses some safety issues that we should address. We’re going to address that project next week.

The price for Mike’s service was under $400, which is totally reasonable. My house is cool,  and my wife and kids are happy. We’re glad we called the Happy Face Truck.

reviews.author: Ian Bargman
reviews.text: Upstairs R22 AC unit lost gas , need reliable AC so decided to replace the system, job was done in around 5hrs and system works great… Went with a Honeywell Redlink thermostat as system is 2stage heat / cooling .. Hiller team were polite efficient and got the job done …

reviews.author: Andrew Raymond
reviews.text: Gary and his crew did a wonderful job replacing all the old iron pipes in our house.  He explained every question I had. Very courteous and professional. I envisioned a black mess from the pipes, but they left no mess clean as before. Gary stayed afterwards to check on everything and answer my questions before he left. My wife and I are happy with his work.  We will be choosing Hiller again.

reviews.author: Jim Johns
reviews.text: Andrew and Thomas were great. They were prompt, professional, and fixed a challenging drain issue quickly, not long after we first called Hiller for help. We will definitely be using Hiller in the future!

reviews.author: T.G. Frahn
reviews.text:
I am grateful to have hired Hiller. The reason I feel this way is due to the personnel that came out to assess and recommend the project to be done.
I found the explanations realistic and the ease of communication and financing a def plus.

plumbers.name: Len The Plumber Heating & Air, LLC
plumbers.address: 550 Forest Glen Rd, Four Corners, MD 20901, USA

reviews.author: Isbel Alba
reviews.text: Last Saturday, I finally contacted Len the Plumber because my thermostat needed checking. They immediately dispatched a technician, Mr. H. He diligently identified the root of the problem and fixed it. Before leaving, he answered all my questions and explained the options I had for protecting my HVAC system. I'm so glad I can count on this amazing company whenever I need help. They never disappoint.

reviews.author: Nicole McFarland
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Len the Plumber and Sadou Aboubakar. My first time using them as I had an emergency on the weekend. Got my water heater replaced in only 2 days (it could have been 1, but the one I needed wasn’t in stock). The second day it snowed 4 inches and they still came to do all the work, and pushed the hot water heater through 4 inches of snow into the house. Mr. Aboubakar was honest, personable, knowledgeable, and offered me a first responder discount.

reviews.author: DJ Gino Wilson
reviews.text: Aaron, Len The Plumber technician arrived on time and gave my HVAC system a thorough inspection. Aaron demonstrated his superior skills in checking out my HVAC system and even corrected some issues which were left by a different company. Aaron discussed ways to keep the system functioning efficiently and explained that if I added power surge protectors I could prevent damage to the unit’s electrical components. I felt very confident in the expertise demonstrated by Aaron and consider him to be an asset to the Len The Plumber company.

reviews.author: M Cole
reviews.text:
Kemar Lewis, the dispatcher technician, led with professionalism. He explained the solution in detail and he even saved me some money and time by finding an alternate route to access the plumbing pipes without having to tear apart my bathroom
tile. His service, mannerisms, and workmanship were excellent.

reviews.author: Manuella Hancock
reviews.text:
We have had a couple plumbing issues, and both were handled by some great guys at Len the Plumber. Shout out to Manual for replacing our hot water heater promptly and professionally and responding to insurance adjuster calls as well.
We had another water issue - an unknown leak. Yves came out and figured out the problem in about 1 minute. He was so cordial and professional. He fixed the pipe, taking pictures and keeping us in the loop the entire time. He was tidy, quick and the fix looks and works well. We are so happy with his service and we would ask for him by name whenever we need a plumber again.

plumbers.name: Precision Today Plumbing Heating Cooling Electrical
plumbers.address: 640 E St Charles Rd Suite 209B, Carol Stream, IL 60188, USA

reviews.author: Sofia Ascencio
reviews.text: The technician Ray Santiago did an excellent job. He was very kind and polite in explaining the work he would be doing. He took his time repairing the bathroom sink faucets and replacing the old valves. This was our first service with Precision Today, and we are truly satisfied with the work he did. We will definitely contact you again if we need their services in the future, and of course, we highly recommend you. Thank you for your services!

reviews.author: riana trice
reviews.text: We had two separate issues come up and had the pleasure of working with Carlos and Daniel. I have to say we have been having issues with the plumbing and pipes since we moved in around 5 years ago and never have we had such a positive experience. They were knowledgeable. They were quick. They were kind and willing to answer any questions that we had and it was clear that they were professionals. I felt comfortable signing up for the membership, because if these are the type of people that are coming out to help I know it'll a quality service and worth it.  Thanks again for coming out. Super appreciated.

reviews.author: Amrendra Kumar
reviews.text:
I am very disappointed with the recent service and the overall handling of my account. If a technician cannot replace a clearly dirty filter or at least document the issue on the work completion form, how is a customer supposed to trust that the rest of the job was completed properly? The new filters for both the humidifier and furnace were readily available in the home at the time of the visit. When I called the main office, I was told the technician “did not want to be rude” by changing the filter. That explanation is not acceptable. He could have asked my wife, who was present, informed her that the filters needed replacement, or at minimum documented it before obtaining her signature.
In addition, two maintenance visits in 2025 were missed despite our prepaid contract for biannual service. When I brought this to their attention, the initial response was, “You could have called us if we had not called you.” That is not a professional way to handle missed contracted services. We paid in advance with the expectation that your company would track and fulfill the agreed-upon visits. The minimum expected response would have been an apology and a reasonable solution, such as extending the contract by another year or offering a refund for the missed services. This experience raises serious concerns about accountability and customer service.

I am editing this review 45 minutes later to add that the heater is now not blowing hot air; only the fan is running. The furnace was working properly before the technician arrived, and the service document states that everything was functioning fine at the time of inspection. This raises even more concern about the quality and thoroughness of the work performed.

reviews.author: Robin Long
reviews.text:
Bryan Herrera is an awesome electrician with Precision Today. He took out my old Wadsworth fuse box and updated the electrical in my fuse panel. Bryan was very patient with me, gave a thorough explanation of the work, and how long it would take to be completed. He left the area clean and I’m very pleased with the outcome.
More importantly, his manager James Pope in electrical at Precision Today is a man of his word. He resolved my ongoing problem in one day that four people couldn’t do in two months. The installation Dept. blamed the Sales Dept. and vis versa for the mishap. The problem I had with them came after my furnace installation. The inspector deemed that the old Wadsworth panel needed to be updated to better support the new furnace system. They wanted to charge me over $6,000 for this work.
After speaking with James Pope for the first time to explain the problem, he returned my call the same day like he said he would and with a solution. This deserves repeating, he resolved my ongoing problem in one day that four people couldn’t do in two months. The icing on the cake is the work was completely free!!!  Thank you James Pope and  Bryan Herrera in electrical at Precision Today!

reviews.author: Donna Guy
reviews.text: Precision Today installed my water heater last year (2025) . Near the anniversary of the install, I called to have them do the annual inspection & possible drain of the water tank. It was easy to get the appointment. Michael, the technician, was on time. He quickly did a general inspection of my plumbing & any possible issues that may have to be dealt with soon (it's also part of my maintenance plan). He quickly took care of the water tank. He was very courteous & knowledgable.  I have been a customer of Precision Today for several years

plumbers.name: Black Diamond Plumbing & Mechanical Inc.
plumbers.address: 1400 Miller Pkwy, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: Shy Teal
reviews.text:
I’m a proud Diamond Member and officially part of the prestige family! My electrician was hands down the best — knowledgeable, patient, and professional from start to finish. I asked about 101 questions in under a minute, and he still managed to multitask, explain everything clearly, and get the job done right.

He even fixed the light in my kitchen over the sink — someone before me thought it made more sense to put a plug there instead of an actual light switch and outlet combo (don’t ask 😅). But he got it working perfectly!

Now I’ve got lights shining where there were no lights before! My utility room is beautifully lit with new canned lights — oh my God, excellent, très bien!

As a single woman, finding honest, respectful professionals means everything. I felt comfortable, informed, and completely taken care of. Black Diamond is a true one-stop shop — they go the extra mile and make your home shine, literally and figuratively!

reviews.author: Steven
reviews.text: Life savers! And I’m not even a customer. Well, I am now. I had a flat and without hesitation a representative from Black Diamond pulled over and hopped out with a battery operated compressor to help. It ended up being a pretty bad gash in the sidewall and wasn’t holding air. So he went back to the truck and got some rubber cement to help hold the air so I could get to a safer spot to change the tire. It was a busy two way street and he went above and beyond trying to help. And he did! Thank you so much. Praying I don’t having any plumbing issues, but if I do, I know who I’m calling.

reviews.author: J L
reviews.text:
I am so thankful for Black Diamond!

They have single handedly helped me repair and maintain my home with ease and savings since 2019.

Over the years, they have installed my furnace, air conditioner, replaced water shut off valves, garbage disposal, electric doorbell (Brennan was awesome), and most recently my water tank heater (Trevor and Keith were wonderful).

I always get several quotes for big repairs and Black Diamond is always the best!! They are worth every penny.  Honest up front pricing, no surprises, service windows are convenient, always on time, no employee turnover (i have had the same techs) and always knowledgeable and respectful. Their scheduling/customer service team is so kind and literally always answers my calls. Their quality is so good even my HVAC permit inspector raved about them when he came.

It is a god send to have one company offer the best service in all areas, plumbing,HVAC, and electrical and with the most experienced technicians, best schedulers/customer service, and for the best prices.

Thank you!

reviews.author: James Mashinter
reviews.text: I called Black diamond,about having my kitchen drain cleaned. Mario,was the plumbing technician who arrived on time. He looked over the situation,and got to work. He took great care in making sure my issue was resolved to the best of his abilities. I would highly recommend Black diamond,if all of their employees are as committed to excellent work,this is a company worth having a positive experience with.

reviews.author: Evette Rolon
reviews.text: First off I like to share that my family and I are not familiar with well water as we come from Chicago. We are not familiar with how well water works and almost gotten taking for a hell of a ride but thanks to Colten and black diamond they have been a blessing for my family and I. we HIGHLY recommend them especially Colton. Very intelligent, understanding, respectful, honest person. I work from home and the staff respected that and worked around my schedule. Everyone from the customer service department to the staff that came to work on our house were very polite and kind to us. Thank you for everything you have done for us. May God bless you guys.

plumbers.name: Superior Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3991 Royal Dr NW, Kennesaw, GA 30144, USA

reviews.author: Doug Lynn
reviews.text:
Fantastic experience with superior today!
Water heater was leaking it was Saturday and Chelsea answers the phone immediately no holds at superior and was able to get me in same day with the most fantastic tech
Joel came and took out the builder installed water  heater and installed the new one. His work is a work of art . He took a bunch of jumbled pipes and elbows fittings and cleaned them up and re installed everything to perfection. He is talented, experienced and  I was fortunate to have  a dedicated master plumber perform the replacement especially on a Saturday
Thanks to superior plumbing once again for being there !

reviews.author: Andrew King
reviews.text: Superior plumbing was fantastic from start to finish. 1) No issues with required COI. 2) Easy and quick appointment scheduling. 3) Great communication from both the home office and texting about technician arrival.  4) Kyle was a great plumber who fixed our issue quickly, quietly, and thoroughly.  He was very friendly and helpful including great tips to prevent the issue from happening again.

reviews.author: Tom Vadnais
reviews.text:
I've been using Superior Plumbing since I bought my house new more than 35 years ago. They've done everything from rebuilding toilets and replacing faucets to installing a sink with pump in my basement/garage below drain level to replacing the entire drain piping from the house to the sewer. They have always been timely, efficient, and clear about the services they recommend and their prices.

I'm fortunate to have Seth Gregory as my regular plumber. It's great that I've gotten to know him and that he knows what has been done previously. He really does care that the right things are done and done properly. Their office phone is always answered live and all are helpful—even just to answer questions or get advice. True pros. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Dominic Capraro
reviews.text: Went with Superior to install two faucets. Booking was easy and they were able to get me scheduled right away.  They also listened to my directions and arrived precisely on time.  My plumbers--Andrew and Damon--were professional and up front with pricing.  They did a terrific job with the installation and it was completed very quickly.

reviews.author: Justajanine Hagans
reviews.text:
Ronnie was excellent.  He was
Professional and did a great job.  He was kind and knew what he was doing.  Loved that he had everything he needed on the truck and got it all done in one day.  Great service.  Loved that I called yesterday and was able to get an appt and he even got here early.  He took his time and knew what he was doing.  He explained everything in detail.  I’m was happy that I got it fixed right.

plumbers.name: Wilson Plumbing, Heating, Cooling and Electric
plumbers.address: 1501 Commerce Dr, Stow, OH 44224, USA

reviews.author: Daniel Filice
reviews.text:
(Updated) Art Kelly was the service tech for my Healthy Home care plan inspection and he created a great experience. He was personable, thorough and articulate, didn’t try to oversell me and went the extra mile to get me a fair price on my PRV replacement.

Wilson Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electric just earned a lifelong customer thanks to two outstanding technicians who serviced my home today.

Plumber – Hithem Judeh
Hithem replaced my PRV valve and was incredibly thorough and thoughtful throughout the entire visit. He clearly explained what the new water pressure would mean, what to expect going forward, and made sure I understood everything before he left. While he was here, he also noticed a few other small issues around the house, corrected them on the spot, and didn’t charge me for those quick fixes. That level of care and integrity is rare and seriously appreciated.

Electrician – Alan Yeager
Alan was very down-to-earth, efficient, and clearly great at what he does. He replaced my recessed lighting and garage switches quickly and cleanly, and then went the extra mile by installing a few additional fixtures I had purchased but didn’t end up needing for the original project. On top of that, he gave me really helpful insight and recommendations for my outdoor lighting needs.

Based on the service these two provided, I would 100% recommend Wilson Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electric to anyone looking for reliable, professional, and friendly home service.

reviews.author: Amy Norris
reviews.text: Technician Brian Hughes from Wilson just installed a vent on my new furnace so I have heat in my basement! He did an amazing job! He was very thorough and cleaned up afterwards. I am very pleased with the service I received.

reviews.author: Ian Whitesel
reviews.text: Yovel came to look at my furnace, and he did a fantastic job. Very personable and friendly, very knowledgeable. Gave me a fair and honest break down of my set up. He is a credit to his employer!

reviews.author: Khyle Halstead
reviews.text: Cole, Ryan and Chuck all did a fantastic job installing my new High Efficiency Furnace! They kept me in the loop with everything they were doing, were very respectful, clean and walked me through how to operate my new thermostat and some cool features that come with it. They displayed great craftsmanship, efficiency and professionalism. I am very happy with the work they did and will definitely be calling them again when it’s time to do the AC.

reviews.author: Justin McLoughlin
reviews.text: I signed up for a preventative maintenance check and just had my first preventative appt.  It was great.  Definitely puts my mind at ease to know what's coming and how my systems are doing.  Great work by Jacob Sidoti to walk me through it.

plumbers.name: Jennings Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric
plumbers.address: 2279 Romig Rd, Akron, OH 44320, USA

reviews.author: Lauren McIntyre
reviews.text: We called Jennings because we tried to replace some porch lights and found a major electrical mess due to the previous homeowners. Josh came out to assess the situation and gave us an accurate price to re-install one of the electrical boxes, both of our new lights, and caulk it up so the same issues don’t happen again. He even had the correct screws for the light fixtures - which Amazon didn’t think we needed 😒 (and would have stopped us if we had tried to install them ourselves). It looks so much better and we feel better knowing it’s installed correctly. Thanks!

reviews.author: k bloom
reviews.text:
I was hesitant to call any company after questionable work from another company in the past, but read the positive reviews for Jennings. They are locally owned which is a bonus for me. From the outset, Matt was professional, personable and willing to show and explain everything he was doing for my boiler cleaning. I knew it was time for replacement, a topic I brought up, not him. He came in well under what I was envisioned the final bill would be. It was actually a relief to sign up to get my new boiler installed! I will definitely recommend Jennings to everyone I know. I will also be a customer for life! I wasn't aware they provided more services than just HVAC, but I'm very glad I made the call. No pressure, no hidden gimmicks, just great service and they keep you informed for every appointment. Do yourself a favor and look no further than Jennings!

*Adding photos to show what I started with and what I now have. I have to add Sean and Nick (I'm so sorry to the other tech whose name I forgot) were absolutely outstanding! The difference is amazing in my house. My cat definitely approves and found a preferred spot with the radiant floor heating. I will definitely use your services again!! Thank you so very much!

reviews.author: George Jensen
reviews.text: Everything that Jennings does seems to just be right on the money, including Steve, the technician that came to inspect and estimate for a new furnace for us. Now that the installation is complete I have to add how impressed I am with Tyler, Frank and Andy on their work. I am a retired Technician so I know a professional job when I see one! I am getting another estimate this week from Jennings for an upgraded main electrical panel.

reviews.author: Kayla Stephan
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Drew from Jennings Home Services. He was friendly, professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain everything clearly before getting started. The work was done efficiently and with great attention to detail, and he made sure everything was cleaned and working perfectly before he left. It’s clear he takes pride in his work and cares about providing excellent service. I would highly recommend Drew and Jennings Home Services to anyone in need of reliable plumbing services.

reviews.author: RIck Weber
reviews.text: Bobby and his coworker (don’t remember his name) were just great.   They were very courteous and knowledgeable.  They quickly analyzed the situation.  I would not hesitate to use this company again.  This was my first time using Jennings but now have very good impression of this company.

plumbers.name: ARS / Rescue Rooter
plumbers.address: 4071 Powell Ave, Nashville, TN 37204, USA

reviews.author: Stacy Rihel
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about the service we received from ARS.  Our water tank basically blew out and we had water all over the garage.  We called several places for a quote on a Sunday.  Not only was their quote free of charge (even if we decided not to go with them), they responded immediately.  They had a technician, who was authorized to give full quotes on extra large tanks, out to our house within just a few hours.  The office also called twice to give us updates on his arrival.

The service technician,  Jerad, was so very nice and very professional.   He was knowledgeable about the entire process and answered every single question we had.  Even when we had to ask more after he left.  Jerad made the process so easy.  The quotes were very reasonably priced.

Casey, the installation technician came with the new unit the very next day!!  Customer service called to confirm his arrival time and kept me informed.   Casey arrived on time and was super personable.   He was polite,  funny, and professional.   He made the installation look easy!  He even cleaned up the water from the old tanks mess!

I would hire this company again without question!
5 stars to Customer service (thanks ladies)!
5 stars to Jerad and 5 stars to Casey!

As for the Essency tank, 5 stars on looks! It is very esthetically pleasing.   But right now, that is all I can say since it is brand new.  I will review the tank on its own after a few months.

Thank you, team ARS, for such a wonderful experience.   You made spending money not hurt so bad.. lol!

reviews.author: Mike Fischer
reviews.text: William came out to our home yesterday and installed two brand new toilets. He was very knowledgeable and explained what he would be doing to complete the installation. He,  along with the customer service staff were extremely professional, and very easy to communicate with. I recommend ARS, and I would definitely recommend William to do whatever work that you need done.

reviews.author: Mr. & Mrs. McConnell
reviews.text:
Bishnu, Carlos, Ivan, and Ian did a fantastic job installing our new HVAC system and removing all the old!
We have been loving it ever since, has made a HUGE difference in the comfort of our home!

reviews.author: Kelli Shannon
reviews.text: Our HVAC technician Derek was fantastic. He was very knowledgeable, thorough, and clearly takes pride in his work. He went the extra mile to make sure everything was checked and explained things in a way we could understand. On top of that, he was kind and pleasant to deal with during what is usually a stressful situation. Truly appreciate the great service from Derek!

reviews.author: Amanda Dardy
reviews.text:
Derek was super friendly! He was thorough in his assessment of my HVAC system during the maintenance check, and clearly explained the areas of concern. Derek did not try to just sell me a quick, expensive solution but rather provided several options for me to consider, with no pressure.
I would highly recommend ARS to other customers!

plumbers.name: S and J Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 1156 W Shure Dr Suite 130, Arlington Heights, IL 60004, USA

reviews.author: John Yousif
reviews.text:
I recently hired this plumbing service for a leaking pipe under my kitchen sink, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. From the first phone call, Justine was professional, friendly, and quick to schedule an appointment. She made the whole process smooth and stress-free.
When Brandon arrived, he was right on time, explained the issue clearly, and provided a fair estimate before starting the work. He was knowledgeable, efficient, and made sure everything was fixed properly. What really impressed me was how clean and organized he kept the workspace — no mess left behind.
The repair was completed faster than expected, and the pricing was transparent with no hidden fees. It’s such a relief to find a reliable team you can trust.
I will definitely use their services again and highly recommend Brandon and Justine to anyone looking for honest, high-quality plumbing work

reviews.author: Tammy Motin
reviews.text:
I called S&J Plumbing as I had a great experience with them in the past.  Plumbing issues can be so stressful, and Art, the technician that came to our home today, was so patient and thorough in every area, from diagnosis, to a repair that took several hours, coordinating a *second team for another issue, and in offering multiple recommendations to make sure the problem with our lines wouldn’t happen again.

Art told me that he really enjoys his work, and it is very satisfying when he can help resolve issues for customers, and that truly showed today.  I am never at a loss for words, but I can’t begin to tell you what a great job he did today, and today involved a lot of hard work.

In addition, *Mike N and Justin arrived a few hours into the job to replace a key piece of cast iron that sits between the toilet and the main line.  I had no idea how many aspects there were to that piece of the job, and Mike and Justin also exceeded my expectation in every way.

Mike and Justin were equally friendly and knowledgeable, and told me they also really enjoy their work and find it very rewarding to help solve customer’s plumbing issues.

These gentlemen didn’t miss any details and at the end, didn’t rush out, but thoroughly cleaned the job site, and put everything away for me.  It is very obvious these three gentlemen take great pride in their work and in their company.
I highly recommend this company.

The picture that I included in my review is “after”.  Had I been able to take a picture of the “before” you would have seen piles of sopping wet towels trying to stop a flooded floor from causing additional damage.

reviews.author: Eleanor Park
reviews.text: Nick Y and Nick L did a massive 2 day job in my crawl space with excellence, professionalism, and great craft. They explained everything as they worked, left my place very clean during and after, answered all my questions and concerns. I feel like my home is safe for years to come.

reviews.author: BOB SMITH
reviews.text: I called S&J Plumbing to repair a leak that developed behind the wall in our bathroom. Joe was able to get me on the schedule and sent Mark Lindeman out a few hours later. Mark was very nice, very knowledgeable, talented and informative. He noticed our tankless water heater and knew the unit and started telling us about it and how it needs to be maintained (I had no idea) and suggested other items he noticed that could be issues in the future. He wasn’t being a pushy salesman - just an experienced advisor. He did an excellent job with the repair and he was a pleasure to speak with. I definitely recommend S&J Plumbing and, in particular, Mark Lindeman. Thank you for fitting us into todays schedule.

reviews.author: Georgia McGuire
reviews.text: Had to have all our galvanized pipes replaced with copper pipes. Starting with Nick who came out to check out the problem and give us an estimate to Dennis and Robbie who came to our home and did a phenomenal job. Both Dennis and Robbie  were pleasant, professional and courteous. Answered all our questions and gave us a tour of what they did and what they were going to do. I felt comfortable with both of them and their knowledge of our problem was exceptional. The clean up afterwards was wonderful and I would recommend SandJ for any plumbing problems you have or may encounter in the future. They are definitely our go to plumbers for any future problems. All three men were great representatives of the company.

plumbers.name: Advantage Plumbing, Heating & Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 992 St Charles St, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Matthew Kooperman
reviews.text: I’m a new homeowner and six months into homeownership the thermostat and sensor on the old 9 year old water tank died. I called Four Seasons and they were out within 2 hours to evaluate my situation and make recommendations. I could either repair the old water tank which would be the band-aid approach with no guarantees something else wouldn’t go wrong or I could opt to replace with an entirely new water tank. I went with the second option and 24 hours later one of Four Seasons’ affiliated companies Advantage Plumbing was back at my house removing the old tank and installing a new tank that will hopefully last for as long as I own the home. I appreciate that Four Seasons was there for me when I needed help in an emergency and the level of communication from the service technician who came out to evaluate my situation was great. He didn’t try and upsell and he was honest and straightforward about my options. The service was really excellent. The install job 24 hours later went smoothly. I was relieved to have hot water again!  I ended up having a question about the billing invoice that customer service was unable to answer and I requested a callback from a manager and the manager called back which helped and I appreciated. Thank you. Five star experience. I definitely recommend Four Seasons and Advantage Plumbing.

reviews.author: Keshara Tyson
reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with Four Seasons, and I truly appreciate their outstanding customer service. From start to finish, the team was professional, responsive, and reassuring during a stressful situation. They took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure I felt informed and supported throughout the process.

I especially want to recognize Madani, my technician, who did an amazing job. He was knowledgeable, respectful, punctual, and very thorough in his work. Madani went above and beyond to ensure everything was done correctly and took the time to answer my questions with patience and professionalism. His positive attitude and expertise made a big difference.

I highly recommend Four Seasons to anyone looking for reliable, high-quality service. Thank you again for a great experience!

reviews.author: Patricia Davis
reviews.text:
Excellent service from the salesperson Mr. Williams who came out to my home. The next day followed by the two technicians came out to install my furnace. Excellent performance all across-the-board they get a 10 out of 10. Thank you so much for having qualified technicians who come out to my home to guarantee safety and make sure that I am safe in my home after they leave by doing qualified work!!
Thank you Four Seasons your Company and your Services are the BEST ( 10 ) all across the board!!

reviews.author: KJ Johnson
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Four Seasons 😊. I required prompt service and they were able to accommodate me for the same day to tend to my furnace service. As the temperature has been so cold, this worked out greatly. Alex fixed my issue quickly and is very knowledgeable in his trade. Appreciate the great customer service from Alex and from the teammates at the office. I highly recommend all to use their services!

reviews.author: David Montee
reviews.text: Excellent work replacing my full HVAC system with new furnace, air conditioner, humidifier and UV lamp.  Install was done and looks very professional.  My installer Kasper was polite and did exceptional work.  Thank you!  New system is operating perfectly and exceeds my expectations.  Thank you Four Seasons

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 516 N Charles St Ste 407, Baltimore, MD 21201, USA

reviews.author: Paul Boykin
reviews.text: Vincent is very professional, knowledgeable and patient. He took the time to explain everything he was doing to repair my mother's drain and assured her he would come back if she had an issue

reviews.author: Chris Litz
reviews.text: Had an emergency hot water heater replacement done today, It's Saturday and they were here within about an hour after I called, excellent. Paul the technician did a great job. He was very friendly and explained everything that needed done, with cost upfront. He had me up and running again in just a few hours and cleaned everything up, very professional. Thanks Paul.

reviews.author: Raymond Keys
reviews.text:
Netch was very knowledgeable and may it simple for me. He was also quick with replacement my faucet and clean up everything without  me having to ask or worry. I’m overall happy with the results and yeah I would use him again. But no time soon.

Very Respectfully,
Ray

reviews.author: Sonia McCleary
reviews.text: Zauza Dochung was the technician that came out and fixed the reported link. He showed up with a smile and a good since of humor. He assessed the issue and was able to fix it without an issue. He was very patient and able to walk me through the issue and the way he was going to fix it. Thank you Mr. Dochung for getting the job done and for your hard work.

reviews.author: Sergei Ponomarev
reviews.text: Israel did a great job unclogging our kitchen sink drain. He was courteous, clean and friendly and did a superb job (the clog was 50 feet away). We would definitely recommend him as a professional to those in need of plumbing related services.

plumbers.name: J&J Plumbing, Heating, Cooling, & Electric
plumbers.address: 61 Seiberling St, Akron, OH 44305, USA

reviews.author: Adrianne
reviews.text:
I had an emergency situation when I noticed one of my dogs kept going to the same spot outside. When I walked over, I could hear water running before I even saw anything. I went into the basement and found water spewing everywhere from a split pipe connected to our outdoor spigot. I immediately shut off the main water valve and called J & J Plumbing Heating Cooling & Electric.

They were able to dispatch David C. to my home in LaGrange, Ohio the same day within a few hours. David was extremely professional, friendly, and patient. He explained everything in detail as he assessed the situation and showed me where the pipe had split in multiple places, even though we had turned off the shutoff and removed the hose well before winter.

He didn’t have PEX on his truck that day, so he safely capped the PVC pipe so we could turn our water back on and scheduled a return visit to complete the permanent repair. When he came back, David replaced the damaged section with PEX to allow for better expansion if freezing occurs, installed a much better shutoff valve, and even relocated the pipe farther inside the house to reduce the risk of this happening again. He confirmed there were no leaks and waited to make sure everything was working properly, which gave me real peace of mind.

He wore boot covers every time he entered the house, kept the area clean, and was very respectful of our home. Pricing was explained upfront with full transparency. While they may be slightly higher than some, the quick response, professionalism, and quality of work absolutely made it worth it.

I would definitely call J & J again and highly recommend David C. and their team.

reviews.author: Angela Stacey
reviews.text: We needed to have a drain for a wet bar installed. Service was easy to schedule with a low lead time. David C and Jack B did a wonderful job installing the drain and cleaning up. They were also very friendly and kind. We will definitely use J & J Plumbing in the future if we need any more work done.

reviews.author: camryn manley
reviews.text: 100/10 recommend, I had new light fixtures put it, our electrician,  Braeden, did an amazing job, very efficient and polite. I also got a couple pipes fixed, the plumber, Dawson, was so kind to talk/explain what he’s going to do, never had a problem since. I would pick this business over any other any day!

reviews.author: Erin Shehadi
reviews.text:
We’ve had a great experience with J&J Heating, Cooling & Electric and their annual service subscription. It’s such a relief having a true one-stop shop for our home’s HVAC, electrical, plumbing and general service needs.

Most recently, we had a full electrical system inspection, and it was incredibly detailed and thorough. Scott W. took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure nothing was overlooked. He also installed a chandelier in our foyer, and it looks amazing:  professional, precise, and done right the first time.

We’ve also had our furnace and well serviced through J&J, and every visit has been just as smooth and professional. The team is reliable, knowledgeable, and respectful of our home.

Highly recommend J&J if you’re looking for dependable service and peace of mind knowing everything is handled by one trusted company!

reviews.author: Tracy Piccorelli
reviews.text: Justin was honest, kind and patient (explained everything I asked about, which was alot).  New water heater installed quickly and efficiently. Highly recommend J&J.

plumbers.name: Schuler Service, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1314 Tilghman St, Allentown, PA 18102, USA

reviews.author: Stacey Silliman
reviews.text: Kevin and Cayden looked at my sump pump and Kevin did suggest a new one since mine was not functioning. I expected as much and he and Cayden had it installed quickly and professionally. I love Schuler Service. Always professional and helpful and I am a repeat customer and always will be. Also thanks to the kind receptionists too for being so nice and decent when booking. Everyone has great customer service skills which means a lot to me. Five stars. I would give them 100 stars if I could!

reviews.author: D F
reviews.text:
If you live in Macungie Borough like me, you may enjoy “great” water pressure … but be careful, because you could unknowingly have *100 psi* running through your pipes, like I did!  At least, before Chuck Bell from Schuler installed a PRV (pressure reducing valve) to bring it down to a safe level.

It’s never fun to spend money on something you didn’t know you needed (and isn’t in budget).  But Chuck eased that blow by being patient (VERY patient) with my uncertainty and million questions.  Even when I asked the same thing multiple times, he was never impatient nor did he get offended - he stayed calm and kind.

Chick went out of his way to help set my mind at ease about the project and expenditure.  He went above and beyond: checking the pressure setting on my expansion tank (and matching it to the house pressure, as it should have been); measuring the temperature of my hot water; (and increasing the temperature on my heater to an appropriate level); and checking my toilet tank to make sure there wasn’t a leak.

I can’t forget everyone I spoke with on the phone at the Schuler Service office - they were all SO NICE!  I never felt like I was being a pest (these days, some places make you feel like … unless something has exploded or someone needs open heart surgery, you are wasting their time, so they can’t get you off the phone fast enough).  Everyone I spoke with at Schuler was warm and friendly, yet professional.  Thank you!

This review is too long and I doubt anyone has read it all, so I’ll stop now.  Do not hesitate to call Schuler; ask for Chuck Bell!

reviews.author: S. Miller
reviews.text: Excellent services. Appointments were easy to made and they arrived within specified time. Jason Price was the team member who fixed  my shower faucets and kitchen. He took the time to assess, provided explanations of plausible options with their pros and cons, and took the time to teach me how to best care for the plumbing integrity. He was tidy, professional, friendly, and attentive to his work. I trust Schuler for over 3 years now, and that trust has not changed. Thank you very much, Jason, for an excellent work. We appreciate you!

reviews.author: John Edmonds
reviews.text: I would like to thank both Jim and Noah for the timely and quality workmanship performed on the waterline work done at my home. Professional from the get go, I would give these guys a 10+ if possible.Schuler Service is the go to place for all your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: greg
reviews.text: I called Schuler, not in an emergency, but in need to address an issue with water pressure and air in the pipes.   They scheduled promptly for the next day.   The technician who arrived was very friendly, professional, courteous, but most importantly, knowledgeable!   After throughly diagnosing the plumbing, and explaining that there were several issues at play, Chuck outlined everything and made clear what options we had and the potential risk/reward of each.   After a decision was made, and a few phone calls later, parts were delivered and the work was completed.     The service was excellent and in the future I will not hesitate to call Shuler and ask for Chuck when plumbing issues arise.

plumbers.name: WyattWorks Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1372 Lloyd Rd, Wickliffe, OH 44092, USA

reviews.author: Brian Rolinc
reviews.text: Whole team from calling, scheduling, service, to follow up is always so pleasant and helpful. Xander was my tech this time and he was patient and insightful in explaining everything that was going on and answering questions, in a way that made me feel like I was an expert by the time he left. What I liked best was that after Xander unclogged the drain, he was meticulous in double in triple checking for no new drips or leaks, and ensuring that the clog really was clear and not just temporarily before backing up again.

reviews.author: Nikole Wakeling
reviews.text:
Alex was knowledgeable, efficient, and truly focused on solving my problem while helping me save money. I really appreciated that there was no pressure to complete repairs that weren’t actually needed.

They have definitely become my go-to for plumbing and electrical issues for both myself and my clients. As a realtor, recommending quality professionals is essential in my business, and I feel confident referring them knowing my clients will be well taken care of.

reviews.author: Jim Piscioneri
reviews.text:
Alex and his co-worker did an excellent job of explaining the various options available to us. We had a clogged kitchen sink drain and needed to replace an old secondary shutoff valve.
All work was done in a timely manner and the guys were very pleasant to communicate with. We are very pleased with the entire experience. The communications via text were OUTSTANDING ! Thank you WyattWorks Plumbing !  We have a new plumber to contact for our needs !

reviews.author: Mike Brady
reviews.text: I scheduled an appointment with them because my mother's basement was flooded with sever water. I made an appointment in the morning and they promised to have someone that morning. They latered called and they said they would not come out for another 4 days. I knew a family member of there's so I went out on a limb. I got my mother to go with them instead of someone else. I really advocated for them. And they let me down! Unfortunately, I can't see a way to hold them accountable at this moment.

reviews.author: Linda Weitzel
reviews.text: Jesse and Indrek answered all our questions and were very very knowledgeable,  efficient and friendly! They explained what to expect and went out of their way to accommodate our needs. We will definitely have WyattWorks help us in the future!  I also appreciate the follow up calls from James regarding the service performed.

plumbers.name: Hiller Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical
plumbers.address: 1891 Slaughter Rd, Madison, AL 35758, USA

reviews.author: Richard Drewyor
reviews.text: JR and his team replaced our 40-year-old HVAC ductwork system in the crawl space. It took them about 6 hours to complete the job. They did an excellent job. Everything is working well now with good air flow and better temperature control. When they finish the job he explained everything that was done. We are happy with the work. We highly recommend him and his team for this work.

reviews.author: Kelion '___'
reviews.text: Hiller took our call at 9pm when we were having issues with our AC and had a technician out next day. They send a notification when the technician is on the way and you can track the time before arrival. They were here during the time slot alloted and didn't run over. Sloan was a great help and got everything squared away quickly. Will be recommending them to friends and family.

reviews.author: Genesis Brooks Viverette
reviews.text: Hiller, Inc. is an amazing company and I am always impressed with the professionalism that is given regarding every service. Technician Robert Mertz came out to check the heater on January 19th and he was knowledgeable and professional. He did a heat wellness check and no issues were found. My favorite thing about Hiller is the promptness in arrival time. They are always on time to complete the job given. I recommend Hiller, Inc to anyone.

reviews.author: stephany sinai
reviews.text: Clark did an outstanding job at installing my google nest camera. He was professional and troubleshooted some issues until the work was complete. I truly appreciate him going above and beyond.

reviews.author: Michael Grieco
reviews.text: Great company! Highly recommend. Had some modem issues after rebooting to pick up the new generator cable for the Kohler app and Roy and his team got everything working, great job guys!

plumbers.name: Hi-Tech Plumbing & Leak Detect
plumbers.address: 3712 E 2nd St, Edmond, OK 73034, USA

reviews.author: Chris
reviews.text:
The boys did excellent. Great communication, interacted very well, very knowledgeable about the job that they were performing for the customer. They let me know every step that they were doing and I would recommend them again and again - great job team- keep up the good work. Remember team, customer service and respect is the number one goal in business.

Thank you , so much team look forward to hearing from you real soon on our next step. Tattoos were awesome....
C. Smith Family,

reviews.author: Joshua Rutherford
reviews.text: Overall I had a good experience. The company had issue with the answering service getting the call out, so I had to wait a while longer than expected, but once they received it they were at my home within 30 minutes. The technician Amanda Sheppard was very professional, courteous and knowledgeable. What we found wasn't a simple fix, so I had to get multiple quotes. They were a little on the higher side as far as cost, but the warranty they offer was pretty good. If you needed a quick repair than I would definitely call them first, but if you need a major overhaul than it's always best to shop around.

reviews.author: Mark S
reviews.text:
Air Comfort Solutions manages this company. They blackmail you into giving them 5 star reviews because their technicians get 25$ if you do.

I’d give them 0 stars if I could. This company is the single worst thing to ever happen to me. They refused to attempt to clear a drain for me and instead sold me a 10,000$ service as a cheaper option than digging up my floor. they preyed on my fear and ignorance and their “solution” flooded my utility room and garage and doesn’t work even after they “fixed” it by replacing a part in the pump they used to bypass my floor drain. Another plumbing company cleared my drain for 230 dollars in less than an hour.

Never under any circumstances use this company for your plumbing needs. They are poorly managed and have poor ethical practices. Not to mention they’re extremely over priced even if you do happen to get lucky and not have them break or ruin something in your home.

reviews.author: Capt Dave
reviews.text: Levi and Dalton were very professional and friendly.  They quickly diagnosed the potential problem and solved it in no time.  They were protective of our property and cleaned up very well after the job was done. They asked if we had any questions about the job and solution and encouraged to call again if we had any other plumbing needs. Great representative of the company.  Oh, the price was very good!

reviews.author: Anani Mouse
reviews.text:
Overcharging for simple repairs.  A gasket had come off PVC pipe under sink. Part cost less than $10, took different plumber 5 minutes to complete repair. Hi Tech/Air Comfort wanted to charge me $1100 and rebuild my sink drain that was installed last year. No thank you.
Their plumbers work on commission and they charge $800 an hour regardless of what the problem is. It’s like paying a plastic surgeon to remove a splinter.
For large elaborate repairs, I think they do great work, but for simple stuff, I’ll go elsewhere.

No one from your staff has reached out to me to discuss my complaint about your overcharging policies. You need to do better - be transparent, if you are going to charge a base rate of $800 an hour for ANY repair you need to have that on your website.

plumbers.name: Lifeline Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 296 Williams Pl, East Dundee, IL 60118, USA

reviews.author: Victor Haddock
reviews.text: Great turnaround. Hot water wet out yesterday evening. Less than 24 hours later we have a new water heater. Melissa in the back office was great giving us timing expectation. Kyle explained what happened to the old heater and what he did with the new one and why. They covered the floor ensuring where they walked was clean.

reviews.author: Paula Weisserth
reviews.text: The work was performed  on time, correctly and on budget. Not only did we need to replace the old and discharge pipe - We also had a leaking faucet outside that required creating an access panel inside. Erick is a great Technician! Not only was he knowledgeable, helpful, and well prepared- He was extremely polite and friendly! he cleaned up after he finished and even pointed out a few other Items we may want to update in the future for our rental property. I would highly recommend this company!

reviews.author: Vilia Drazdys
reviews.text: Miguel, our technician, was absolutely great. He was professional, knowledgeable and very courteous. He immediately assessed the issue with our sewer line and proposed a solution. He explained everything well (without talking down to us) and gave us the cost up front. He was very careful of our home and made sure all surfaces were protected before starting work.  When finished, Miguel cleaned everything and tested all drains several times to ensure everything was reconnected properly and that nothing leaked.

reviews.author: Ayomide Omole
reviews.text: I had a great experience with D’Andre , he came to fix my heat. He was extremely pleasant, professional, and respectful from start to finish. He arrived on time, explained everything clearly, and made sure the issue was fully resolved before leaving. You could tell he genuinely cared about doing a good job and making sure I was comfortable. Excellent customer service, great attitude, and very knowledgeable. I truly appreciate the quality of his work and would absolutely recommend him to anyone needing heating services.

reviews.author: John Kent
reviews.text: OK Art, we really appreciate your prompt response and coming over to diagnose the sewer line collapse. Also getting started tomorrow is fantastic. We really need your help with this one and you’re coming through.

plumbers.name: Maitz Home Services
plumbers.address: 3320 Hamilton Blvd, Allentown, PA 18103, USA

reviews.author: Dawn Ranzan
reviews.text: Brandon was wonderful! Arrived as scheduled, super friendly and respectful. Assessed the issue, gave me the price and fixed my broken pipe. He fixed the pipe in my crawl space efficiently and there was no surprise charges when completed. So pleased with Maitz and specifically Brandon. They've earned a new customer.

reviews.author: Rhonda Vasconcellos
reviews.text: This company I highly recommend to anyone who is looking to replace there furance or any type of plumbing or electrical work done.   Anthony who is in charge of finance aspect works with you and your family and the technician Jerry and Chris are not just good at their job but they also clean up behind themselves.  Very very professional and highly recommend.

reviews.author: Melissa Helmstetter
reviews.text:
My experience with Maitz was nothing short of outstanding. I contacted them with my emergency, and to my absolute relief, a technician was dispatched and arrived at my home within the hour. This remarkably swift response was incredibly reassuring and immediately diffused a great deal of the stress associated with the incident.

Upon arrival, the team from Maitz demonstrated exceptional professionalism and efficiency. They quickly and accurately assessed the issue with my faulty water heater. Their communication was impeccable; they clearly and concisely explained the necessary repairs and the recommended course of action, ensuring I understood every detail without overwhelming me.

They proceeded with the work directly, tackling the replacement of my old unit with impressive speed and skill. Beyond their technical expertise, I was particularly impressed by their friendly and approachable demeanor. They patiently answered every single question I had throughout the process, providing thorough explanations and ensuring my complete peace of mind.

The entire service, from the initial urgent call to the successful completion of the water heater replacement, was handled with unparalleled professionalism and genuine care. I wholeheartedly recommend Maitz for their outstanding responsiveness, expertise, and commitment to excellent customer service.

Melissa Helmstetter

reviews.author: M. Fredric Rieders
reviews.text:
Maitz Home Services and Brandon were outstanding in there service and performance. We had an intermittent well pump problem and Brandon was able to quickly diagnose it and gave us a proposal for a complete solution. It was also very reassuring to see how thoroughly he checked all the systems and demonstrated that they were functioning properly with the exception of a  component in the filtering side. He was very knowledgeable very professional and thorough in his examination of the system and explained everything to me clearly. I woul⅘d highly recommend Brandon and Maitz Home Services. They also have excellent service Representatives via text, email and phone who checked on progress. Natasha was a very professional support rep as wel.l  She called me after the visit and made sure everything was done properly and professionally.
Kudos to the Maitz Home Service team, we will use them again and they also do electrical and plumbing which we will call on them for.

reviews.author: Bryan Lokez
reviews.text: We were in need  of  new water heater. Lyle came out installed a new one for us the same day. 2 years ago Lyle installed a water softener filtration system for us. Lyle's work that he does is very precise amd honest. We're very pleased with his service.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 5126 N Ravenswood Ave, Chicago, IL 60640, USA

reviews.author: Michelle Tyler
reviews.text: I had a great experience working with Clayton G. From the start, he really listened and understood what I was hoping to accomplish, and did everything possible to make sure the work aligned with my goals. He explained the process clearly, was respectful of my time and property, and paid attention to every detail. Super friendly and easy to work with — I never felt like the initial plan was being altered or going in a direction that would cost more than I agreed to. The finished result is exactly what I needed. I would absolutely use him again and highly recommend to anyone looking for a reliable and thoughtful plumber.

reviews.author: Robert Koehler
reviews.text: Emmanuel, Gio, and Greg were a great team. Handled the job with complete professionalism and left confident the money was well spent with the right people.  Fixed the sewer line using the best method and technology. Good interpersonal skills. Thank you.

reviews.author: Jose Flores
reviews.text: Christian and Julian stopped by for maintenance, my wife and I had been complaining about a running toilet for a few weeks. Christian changed out our flapper, and even tightened down the toilet bolts while he was at it, at no extra charge! I love having a plumbing company that doesn’t try to upsell on everything possible. Thank you Christian and Julian!

reviews.author: Susan Bledsoe
reviews.text:
My technician Andreas Pastos showed up on time. He was friendly and personable. He thought he was there to do a sewage line clearance but I really needed a toilet unplugged. I had tried to plunge the toilet myself but due to a recent hip surgery was unable to do it without increasing my pain exponentially.  Andreas used my plunger, gave me a lesson and how to use less energy to get the line clear and took care of my plumbing issue quickly and efficiently.  On top of that he was a great neighbor and would accept no money. He would not even let me give him money to buy him breakfast.  Who dies that any more?  I am so grateful.   This company will definitely be on my go-to list.

I also love their security. They text me a picture of the guy who was going to show up at my door and let me know exactly when he was coming.  First class.

reviews.author: Seth Maybury
reviews.text: Super helpfull.   They called back on a Sunday late afternoon and came out that evening.   3 plumbers came to the house on Monday to finish the job.   Joe, George and Anthony.   Highly recommend them.   No one wants to have Sewage backing up, they treated it like an emergency and kept at it.    Thank you.  Highly recommended..  (and the price was 100% fair).

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing of Nashville
plumbers.address: 207 Century Ct, Franklin, TN 37064, USA

reviews.author: Ben Watts
reviews.text: Jessy and Jeremy are truly outstanding plumbers who exceeded every expectation. They arrived on time, were professional and friendly, and immediately made me feel confident in their expertise. They carefully explained the issue, diagnosed it thoroughly, and fixed it flawlessly without cutting corners. Their attention to detail and commitment to quality really stood out. They worked efficiently while still taking the time to answer my questions with patience and clarity. Best of all, they left everything spotless when the job was done. If you want reliable, skilled, and genuinely great professionals, Jessy and Jeremy are the ones to call.

reviews.author: Tracy Evers
reviews.text: We have used this company for years.  They have not let us down. Our most recent work had a minor issue that kept the solution from working and they showed up pronto and made the simple fix and bingo. Awesome.  They are really, really great.

reviews.author: Vicky Seapker
reviews.text: I NEVER give 5 stars because I don't believe "perfect" exists, but I had a bathroom remodel done and had to outsource plumbing to get the results I wanted. We'll start with Scott... friendly, fun, light hearted and filled with corny jokes. Scott accessed what my project and was very confident it could be done and let me know it was a 3 step process. An appointment was then made to have the work done. Zach and Tyler showed up promptly, handled their business and told me to call when I was ready for the second visit. The remodel was complete and it was time to call the plumbers in to install the toilet and sink. I called and  my appointment was set up for the next day. Zach and Tyler showed up promptly handled their business and told me there was no need for a third visit. I was in agreement. Upon installing my toilet Zach noticed there was a clog in my system. He then called the company to see if a technician could be sent out to address the clog issue. They were able to come out later that day. Meanwhile it was lunch time and I recommend a restaurant and told them what I usually ordered from the menu. After lunch they returned and finished up. During the lunch hour I went to the grocery store and returned just as they were packing to leave. I was putting my groceries away in the refrigerator and saw a to go plate with writing on it. Zack left me the lunch I had mentioned to him with a thank you. Such a sweet gesture. Joe M was the technician who came to ease my (p)drain. He worked diligently in the cold until he cleared my (p)drain. This was a long post to say my experience with Benjamin Franklin was a good one. From the initial assessment, to the plumbers and the technician... all were respectful, knowledgeable, and caring. I will recommend them to anyone who approaches me with plumbing issues. Thank you Benjamin Franklin for a stress free experience.

reviews.author: Gyuzel Fedorov (Gyuzel Fedorov)
reviews.text:
Our tankless water heater under guarantee. I’m cover heater in my blanket. After my water comes out warm not hot. Technician come to my house, take off blanket and water start coming hot. They charge for it $99
It’s ridiculous. Be careful. Looks like scam. We finished build another house and I want buy another heater from this company. Now of course I’m not buying anything from this company

reviews.author: S. K.
reviews.text: Ryan communicated when he was en rout and showed up on time. I explained my issue and he immediately understood the situation. Offered a great solution and executed the work in a professional and timely manner. Would highly recommend.

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing of Denver
plumbers.address: 1020 W 124th Ave #700, Westminster, CO 80234, USA

reviews.author: Jeff Vaughn
reviews.text: Had an emergency with our water heater springing a major leak. All three service technicians (Christian, Tony, & Dylan) did a great job! Super fast response, very friendly, and professional.  My wife really appreciateed the use of shoe covers as they entered the house and the care they took to keep everything as clean as possible. Great higher grade products, service, warranty,  and very competitive pricing as confirmed by our son who is also in the same industry but outside of our area.

reviews.author: Jeanne Lafoe
reviews.text:
Both Ilija and Dylan were great!  Ilija first came as we did not have hot water.  He handled that problem efficiently and then checked all 4 bathrooms, kitchen and laundry room.  Ilija identified quite a number of items that needed replacement and since our home is older it was very good to be made aware of those issues.  Dylan then came a couple of days later and fixed all of the problems in one day!  He worked all day and did an excellent job while treating our home with respect and went above and beyond to help us.
Excellent company and Ilija and Dylan both super!!

reviews.author: Michael Hayenga
reviews.text: Alex and Joel both did a nice job. They were available when I needed them and arrived on time. The work was done professionally and the cost was very reasonable. I'd use them again.

reviews.author: Bill Selby
reviews.text: The hot water tank was installed in an extremely tight space. They navigated the puzzle with out a problem. Work was well done and complete

reviews.author: Trent Hickes
reviews.text:
Christian from Benjamin Franklin Plumbing was absolutely outstanding. He fixed both our garbage disposal and toilet today with professionalism, efficiency, and a great attitude. He arrived on time, clearly explained what was going on, and walked us through our options without any pressure.

Christian worked quickly but thoroughly, left everything clean, and made sure everything was working perfectly before he left. It’s rare to find someone who combines technical skill with such excellent customer service.

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Huntsville
plumbers.address: 1330 Fletcher St NW, Huntsville, AL 35801, USA

reviews.author: sharon Brown
reviews.text:
Professional! Courteous! Timely! And very reasonable price. My cousin recommended us to you and we are very pleased. Myron was amazing! I don't remember the person that I spoke with over the phone but she was awesome, too!
Thank you!

reviews.author: Emily Davis
reviews.text: My experience with Mr. Rooter was nice. 1st let me start off with that I appreciate Mr. Rooter coming out on a Saturday moring. There were two men one was Mike and the other was Michael. They were both extremely polite and happy to help us with our plumbing needs. The only thing I did not like would be that they called at 8:30 in the moring. When I had made the appointment the receptionist said they would call 45 minutes before coming over, once I had answered the phone they said they would be over in 10-15mins and I kid you not. They immediately showed up two minutes later. Which I am impressed but I had no reaction time to even brush my own teeth. I wish this company would have a schedule instead of just showing up. I am extremely lucky they did come because I know where some plumbing places don't show up for hours or even cancles your appointments. But they did a wonderful job. But an hour later when. I went down stairs to check our bathroom shower the shower handle started to leak immediately after. 😅  I turned it on and off to see if it was still leaking big mistake the water would not turn off. I had to shut it off myself. I called them at 10:50am for them to come back and they came back 2 hours later. In total. The whole job had costed us 875$. I would recommend Mr. Rooter but I would change a few things. But at least they have a 90 day warranty.

reviews.author: Ron Lewis
reviews.text: Michael did a great job. I had a water leak (9,000 gallons on last bill!) and pointed to a squishy place in the yard. He dug there but there was nothing. My bad. Must have been the rain. Then he did it correctly. Step by step eliminating the line from the street to the house, isolating the hot side. Then hot in vs hot out and identified the problem methodically and smartly. It was the blowoff valve. In my defense, my builder put the blow off line and heat pump condensation line together and I thought the water coming out was from condensation. In any case, Michael quickly replaced it. Did good, honest work without trying to upsell anything. I would recommend him and Mr. Rooter, whom we've used for years.

reviews.author: Kevin Nishimuta
reviews.text: Had an emergency septic system backup while we had visitors late on a Friday evening.  Mr.  Rooter was there within an hour and emptied the tank and was able to fix the plugged line.  Great job; reasonable price; professional technician!

reviews.author: Karen Thompsen
