reviews.text: We had a water heater that was starting to leak, and the tech came to our house quickly. He replaced our 2 old 50 gallon water heaters with 1 80 gallon heater. The installation was well done. and the old equipment and pipes were neatly removed. Very courteous and professional with good quality work.

plumbers.name: Mendel Plumbing, Heating & Electric
plumbers.address: 3N640 N 17th St, St. Charles, IL 60174, USA

reviews.author: Chris Synal
reviews.text:
Mendel came out when the original home filter casing finally broke and started pouring out water. No other service company was willing to come or care for concern.

Within 25 minutes the technician showed up after I shut of the main to the house.  After a an unsuccessful install of the replacement the new housing was faulty also.  After listening and spending beyond the time to care and explain some future issues that might occur in other areas while he waiting couple of hrs for a new housing to arrive we finally have water (note was not the technician fault to wait to hrs it was the gentleman delivering the canister)

Thank you and look forward to working with Mendel in the future.

Attached is some before and after shot.

reviews.author: Brandon Gentile
reviews.text: Tonight I came home and heard running water.  I called Mendel to the first time and my experience couldn't have been more awesome!!  Jenna took my call and was so professional!  I was all worked up when I called and after she reassured me that a tech would be dispatched, I hung up with her feeling a little more at ease!  Jared was the technician that came out and he was just absolutely great from the second he walked in my door.  He quickly assessed the issue and gave me several options!  He showed me several pictures of the issue(I wasn't getting in the crawl space).  He explained every option and weighed the pros and cons of each option with me.  Once I decided, he had everything needed in his van and he got right to work.  Had the repair done in a fair amount of time and showed me pictures of all the work he did after.  I have future plumbing work that I will need and I will be asking for Jared to come do the work!  10/10 Recommend!

reviews.author: Ed Dziewior
reviews.text: Unfortunately woke up on Saturday morning to find our pipes had frozen due to the weather. Called for service and was assured that a technician would be arriving later this morning. Received a text with the technicians' name and estimate  time of arrival. Dave was the technician that arrived and promptly evaluated the situation we were having. He gave us an estimate for the repair and mentioned that if unseen issues appeared we would have to reevaluate the repair cost. This was acceptable to my wife and I. His inspection did not turn up any water leakage. He isolated the area that he felt was the area of concern. He went his truck to get a piece of equipment that would place a electrical charge to the copper pipe to try to heat the pipe and breakup the ice blockage. He was successful in removing the blockage. No damage to the drywall, no split pipe, and running water again throughout the house. Thank you Dave for your experience and dedication in resolving our issue. He has a pleasant personality, listens to your concerns, and does his job professionally and with efficiency which is reassuring.

reviews.author: Andrew Nickel
reviews.text:
My 78 year old mother, who lives alone, has used Mendel for years.  Recently moved and had them come inspect the furnace.  Technician said it was fine and just needed servicing.  A couple months later, the furnace seemed loud, so she had another tech come out.  This guy said the furnace (less than 10 years old) had deadly problems.  Actually turned the unit off and said he did not want to be in the house with the unit on.  Said needed full replacement right away.  A sales person came out later that day and quoted $25,000+ for new furnace and install.  Said they could come out the very next day, take her money, and put in the new one.  Rush, rush.

She had another company come out the next day and they said the humidifier needed a new part, but otherwise the furnace was perfectly fine.

Draw your own conclusions.

reviews.author: Kenneth Weber
reviews.text: They sent Paul out on very short notice. He solved our problems quicker than expected was super friendly and gave us great information and technical advice for how to avoid problems in the future. Will absolutely call them the next time we need a plumber.  And definitely I would request Paul if he is available he was OUTSTANDING!

plumbers.name: Hull Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 2600 W Main St, Oklahoma City, OK 73107, USA

reviews.author: Brandy Kemp
reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with Jerred when he repaired my sewer line. From start to finish, he was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly thorough. He took the time to explain the issue clearly, walked me through the repair process, and made sure I understood every step.

The quality of his work was outstanding — the repair was done quickly, cleanly, and with great attention to detail. It’s clear that Jerred truly cares about doing the job right. He was respectful, punctual, and easy to communicate with throughout the entire project.

If you need sewer line repair or any plumbing work, I highly recommend Hull Plumbing. Reliable service, fair pricing, and exceptional workmanship!

reviews.author: Sandy Kirkpatrick
reviews.text:
We have used Hull for our past 3 plumbing issues and I have had exceptional service Cecil, Nial, and most recently Aaron. All 3 showed extreme professionalism and knowledge of the work needed.

We just underwent a major job with Aaron. A gas line replacement. From start to finish he was professional, kind, knowledgeable, and actually took the effort to explain what the plan was in a way I understood. Any gas line issue is stressful, Aaron remained calm and in control. Couldn't recommend Hull more.

reviews.author: John Whistler
reviews.text: Definitely will use Hull Plumbing again if I need it.  We had a frustrating situation with the bathrooms in our new house.  Aaron showed up within an hour, gave us an honest and fair estimate, and started work right away.  His knowledge and professionalism was outstanding.  Within a couple of hours he had all of the problems fixed and looking good.  The amount of stress and frustration he took off of our family today was tremendous.  Thank you Aaron and Hull Plumbing!

reviews.author: Brian Eberle
reviews.text: Great and Professional service. Our Plumber Aaron was timely, Professional and addressed all of our concerns. New hot water heater in less than 3 hours.

reviews.author: Dexter Murphy
reviews.text: I decided to use Hull Plumbing after reviewing and speaking with many plumbing companies. I had a slab leak and determined that Hull Plumbing was the place to give my business. I am very pleased that I did. My wife and I satisfied with the quality repairs. Malcom was the plumber and he did an excellent job. He was courteous, respectful, and mindful of our home and our desires. He is our go to guy now for our plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Atlantis Plumbing
plumbers.address: 691 John Wesley Dobbs Ave NE UNIT W, Atlanta, GA 30312, USA

reviews.author: Adrienne
reviews.text: If you're looking for a plumber, look no further than Atlantis Plumbing! Brandon did an amazing job! He was also very nice and left everything very clean. We are new to Atlanta and I found this company on Google reviews. You always take a chance with someone new, but from the first inquiry speaking with Cristiana until we squared away what needed to be done, everyone I spoke to was so nice and so helpful! Thank you Robbie, Carol, Alex, Cory and Ivy!

reviews.author: Jessie
reviews.text: Our toilet flooded at Prestige Jewelers a couple days ago. We contacted Cody with Garrett Mechanical yesterday, and he came out first thing this morning…on a Saturday and on Valentine’s Day!! He and his partner quickly found the clogged pipe, replaced the toilet, and had everything handled efficiently and professionally. Great communication, no stress, and the whole process was smooth from start to finish. Thanks to Cody, we can keep our diamonds sparkling and our floors dry. Highly recommend Garrett Mechanical!

reviews.author: denise haeseler
reviews.text: We’ve used Atlantis for years and highly recommend them. So when we knew we had a fairly big job - replace a leaking main pipe outside from meter to home, we had great confidence in Atlantis. Thank you to Bryan and his crew! They were very timely, and most importantly you can be assured that they will do a great job. Very reliable.

reviews.author: nichelle joyner
reviews.text: Dylan was exceptionally great with customer service and helping out with a sewer line that was damaged in my yard. He was knowledgeable and friendly as well as helpful in managing costs and best case scenarios decisions for the project in my home. I highly recommend him and his team for any plumbing needs!!

reviews.author: Ron Russell
reviews.text: This company is the very best.  I had a water leak that a leak detector could not find.  Therefore,  I had to replace a 1,500 foot water line to correct the leak!  Atlantis Plumbing came out quickly and ran the new line.  The men worked tirelessly to get me hooked up again, working until 9:30 PM one night and until 2:30 AM the following morning (wearing head lamps) to restore my service.  I had wonderful responses and services from the telephone contacts (Kayla and Carol), the plumbers, Bryan, Jamaka, and Dale.  Everybody was kind, respectful, on time, and did all services with SMILES.....even at 2 AM in the morning.  This was a very tough job, and everyone came to my rescue.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 5125 MacArthur Blvd NW Ste 13, Washington, DC 20016, USA

reviews.author: Joan Knight
reviews.text: My mother experienced sudden flooding in her lower level bathroom. We were able to shut off the main water valve. We contacted Roto-Rooter and within an hour, Oleg B, field supervisor was on  site To inspect the issue. He was able to quickly make an assessment, contact a plumber, who arrived within the hour. In the meantime, he was reassuring professional, and answered all of our questions and filing a claim with our insurance company for the remediation as it was determined, the backup was from the main water/sewer line. Both Oleg and the Plumber were very professional, courteous and knowledgeable. Within a couple of hours, the initial job was complete completed, and water was restored. Oleg also said he would work with us providing pertinent and technical information to the insurance company claim. He provided his contact information and followed up with us through out the afternoon and evening.

reviews.author: Mwende Simms
reviews.text: The plumber, Aung, came out for an emergency repair and was able to get a temporary fix completed while awaiting a needed part. He came back the following morning to complete the repair. He identified an issue with the outside pipe and quickly fixed that as well. Both times he came out he clearly communicated the issues, needed repairs, and cost and completed them swiftly. I don't often choose to go with franchise companies because their quality of work may vary and costs may be inflated, however I was extremely pleased with the responsiveness, affordability, and quality of the work that was completed. I would not hesitate from contacting the Roto Rooter again for any plumbing needs based on our experience.

reviews.author: Denise Thomson
reviews.text:
Jerry was great. He gave us excellent customer service and made sure everything was done right.

Marc and Tyrell were both awesome. They spent so much time triaging and trying to confirm where the problem stemmed from.

One thing I learned about Roto-Rooter is that they will over charge you for everything. It stinks because most of the time plumbing issues don't lend themselves to price shopping.

reviews.author: bianca washington
reviews.text: Viente was absolutely wonderful! From the moment he arrived, his patience and professionalism were evident, making the entire process seamless and stress-free. He took the time to explain every step of the plumbing repairs he was undertaking, ensuring I understood the issues and the solutions. I was thoroughly impressed with the quality of his work; he not only fixed the clog but also provided valuable advice on how to maintain the system moving forward. His attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction truly set him apart. Without a doubt, he is one of the best plumbers we have ever had.

reviews.author: Antwon Cooper
reviews.text: My experience with Roto‑Rooter was extremely disappointing. I expected a professional, efficient service, but instead I encountered poor communication and a lack of follow‑through. Despite multiple assurances, no work was completed, and I was left with the same unresolved issue and no clear guidance on next steps. The technician, Israel, repeatedly came up with excuses not to perform the job. He claimed my bathroom space was too small, his equipment was too large, and then quoted an outrageous price that didn’t match the situation. On top of that, he tried to convince me that the storm drain in the street was actually my plumbing line and that I needed to call DC Water to fix the issue — something that was completely inaccurate and unhelpful. What made the situation even more frustrating was the lack of accountability afterward. Follow‑up support was minimal, and I felt dismissed rather than assisted. Based on my experience, I cannot recommend Roto‑Rooter and would encourage others to explore more reliable options.

plumbers.name: Heritage Home Service
plumbers.address: 109 Washington St, Auburn, MA 01501, USA

reviews.author: Chris DiRado
reviews.text: The workers are excellent. Nathan who came to the house first to assess our broken furnace was excellent, fast, very personable and helpful. Trevor and Thomas the installers were excellent as well, professional and helpful.  The electrician was friendly. The girls who answered the phones were all polite and caring. All the folks who do the actual work were great. They get 5 stars!  But there is room for improvement in the area of corporate customer communication and follow ups. i.e. after waiting all day with no heat before the big storm, we called them to find out why they did not arrive;  turns out they rescheduled our service date / time and did not notify us. There are other examples. After keeping up our phone calls to them we got a new furnace installed the next day. Again the actual workers are rock stars and were excellent and all deserve a raise!

reviews.author: Christine Doucette
reviews.text: I cannot thank Steve and Chris from Heritage Plumbing enough for getting my water running and drains flowing again! Following a recent cold snap, one of my pipes froze, rendering my laundry room inoperable. When they arrived, they quickly recognized that the pipe was likely not going to be the most challenging part of the operation— It was the 8 inch wide space they would have to squeeze through in order to access it! I was fully braced for them to tell me it was just not going to be possible, but that is not what happened. They shed phones and equipment, took a deep breath, and squeezed in there to assess the situation. In no time they had the water flowing again! The second job was to repair two drains in my bathroom that were continuously clogging. They diagnosed the issues and repaired them both quickly, and my bathroom now smells like it’s brand new with those good, clean pipes! If you have plumbing issues that you have been avoiding, or you’re just not happy with the service you’ve been receiving from your plumber, I cannot recommend Steve and Chris from Heritage enough!!! They are prompt, friendly, respectful, professional, and great at what they do! Thank you for a job incredibly well done!

reviews.author: Melissa Ferguson
reviews.text: Travis and Davi came to my house today and repaired some pipes in my basement. They did a great job and were  done in about 30 minutes. I am very pleased with their work. They were very polite and friendly.

reviews.author: Kevin Lynch
reviews.text:
I recently had my hot water heater replaced, and the technician Travis did an excellent job from start to finish. He was professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable. He clearly explained the scope of work, walked me through the replacement process, and made sure I understood how the new system operates before leaving.

The installation was clean and well-executed. All connections were neatly done, the workspace was left spotless, and everything was tested thoroughly to ensure proper operation. You can tell he takes pride in his workmanship.

The entire experience was smooth and stress-free.

I would absolutely recommend Travis and Heritage to anyone needing plumbing or water heater services.

reviews.author: Taraneh Rafieymehr Pettinato
reviews.text:
Jordan was efficient, professional and very thorough with checking his work before leaving! He did two projects, including replacing an old leaking gate valve with two new ball valves for my main shutoff (see photo). This will be so much easier if I need to shut off the water in the future.

Heritage in general was very responsive to my weekend request (more responsive than other local companies/plumbers) and came highly recommended.

I would definitely use Heritage again and would request Jordan if available!

plumbers.name: Western Heating, Air & Plumbing
plumbers.address: 235 S Mountain Lands Dr, Orem, UT 84058, USA

reviews.author: Jason D
reviews.text:
This company has gone down hill and might be rock bottom. On the last visit which was a furnace tune-up, they did the work (not sure how well) and presented my wife with thousands of dollars of recommended repairs and upgrades. The list was ridiculous and included things that only they could have caused (like crimped wiring inside the unit when it wasn’t mentioned when they came in March nor any of the other times they came and they’re the only ones to access that compartment in the last eight years). My wife called me and we declined the additional services and the technician left.

When I returned home after about a week, I found an absolute mess: the furnace room door was off its hinges, there was a furnace filter propped next to the furnace, and general disarray in the space. I went to work trying to clean things up and discovered that the problems were even worse than I expected. Not only was the door of its hinges, it had actually been broken. The technician didn’t even mention it, let alone offer to fix it. The furnace filter that was propped by the furnace was mangled and torn and plastic packaging (like from a new filter) was stuffed inside it. We figured out that the one leaning there was the new filter I had installed about 6 weeks before (and did not need to be changed) and the plastic was from the spare I keep on hand. It’s a tight squeeze to get the filter in and out and requires care not to damage it. Clearly the technician wasn’t careful and simply ripped it out of its housing. Again, no mention of this from the technician and no offer to replace what he ruined.

Upon further inspection, I found that one of the seals around the PVC pipe that delivers air to the unit was not in place. I went back and looked at the pictures from the previous service (in March) and it was properly seated, which makes me question whether the technician knew what he was doing or cared at all to do the job right. I’ve canceled my service contract with Western Heating and will never utilize their services again. I’d caution you against using them as well.

reviews.author: Linda Peterson
reviews.text: Seth Harward came to my home on  February 19, 2026 to clean the drains in my two bathrooms sinks. the tub drain in one bathroom and the shower drain in the second bathroom.  I was impressed with the communication given to me by the company. They reminded me that he would be coming between noon and 4. Later I received a communiation asking if he could come earlier at 10:30 am. Seth arrived and went immedicately to work while I asked a few questions. He showed me what he had cleaned out of the drains. He was neat and clean and he left the work area neat and clean.  Linda Peterson

reviews.author: Maria Schindler
reviews.text:
I originally called to get a quote to have the coils and panel of my furnace cleaned. The person who answered the phone told me they had a special going where they can do a tuneup for $69.00 and that included cleaning the coils. I asked if she was sure that cleaning the coils was part of this special. She put me on hold to double check and came back and said it was part of the special. When the technician came he told me he was scheduled to do a tuneup. I mentioned the cleaning of the coils and he told me that that wasn’t included with a tuneup.  Somehow a miscommunication with the scheduler.
We ended up with just having the coils cleaned. The cost was $520.00 which seemed a bit steep. However Ethan the technician was great. Showed and explained what he had to do to clean the coils. Was very efficient. Work space was clean after he finished. He did a great job. Very pleasant and respectful. Ethan deserves a 5 star rating. 3 stars because of the miss communication between scheduler and supervisor.

reviews.author: Barbara Lovell
reviews.text:
I’ve been on Western Heating & Air’s maintenance plan for a while, and I really appreciate how thorough their whole-home inspections are. They check and service everything in my furnace room and give clear, reasonable recommendations whenever something might be out of code.

Dillon was outstanding. He was extremely knowledgeable and took the time to explain everything he saw and everything he was doing. I felt completely comfortable having him in my home, and his professionalism and clarity gave me total confidence in the work. I’ll definitely be requesting Dillon for future service appointments. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Bobbi Metz
reviews.text: I would like to thank Dillon when he came out to do our water heater flush that he noticed that the duct work was too low and it could cause carbon monoxide leakage so he fixed the venting so now we can walk completely underneath it and not hit our head anymore. He was totally awesome.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup

plumbers.address: 1017 Energy Dr, Abilene, TX 79602, USA

reviews.author: Scott Simpson
reviews.text:
I know enough about plumbing systems to know what questions to ask about some problems I was having. Two of the three issues I identified had to do with the 3” waste pipe under the house slab. I had already used an auger to clear a serious root intrusion and as my waste main is 60 years old, I was prepared for the worst. I would have given Midway the go-ahead for some seriously expensive work if their plumber told me it was necessary.
The Midway plumber scoped the 3” main from the city connecting point to the house vent pipe and explained everything we were seeing in a way I could clearly understand. He checked the work I had already done, carefully talked me out of doing either expensive project I had enquired about, and gave me some tips for improving the remaining flushing problem that was being caused by the 1.28GPM toilet.
The third project had to do with the incoming water supply. What I thought would improve the incoming water pressure and get a jump on a potential problem was diagnosed as a case of “If it ain’t broke, don’t fix it… and it ain’t broke.” I was wrong; he was right. He could have just done the work I requested and I wouldn’t have given it a second thought. Instead, he again clearly explained the issue and convinced me not to have the requested work done.
Summary: The Midway plumber was professional, courteous, knowledgeable, and honest. I now understand how they maintain such a high customer review rating.

reviews.author: Grady Martin
reviews.text:
Todd, my Technician was great! He took the time to help me understand all that would need to be done. Very kind, polite and professional. He unclogged the washer line in my garage and did not leave til he knew I was very satisfied.
I was a little surprised with cost but was the first time having it done, and had to have it done, and Todd didn't pressure me at all about the cost.

reviews.author: Dan Flatt
reviews.text: I paid so little because I was not going to pay the $3400.00 to power wash a single line in the house then asked cost to replace 20’ of 2” pvc under a house with lots of space and no digging just remove cast iron and replace with pvc. Somehow the price was the same. I will never call them again. This is something I could do in about 45 minutes easily.

reviews.author: Joel Brown
reviews.text: The Midway Plumbing staff was impressive from start to finish. Absolute best Customer Service, from Renee who took my initial request for service and kept me updated every step of the way to Alex the technician. Alex expert knowledge and ability to explain the entire process and answer every question and more importantly his ability to support his comments with written data.  His knowledge is only surpassed by his ability to install equipment in a timely manner.   Truly Awesome and Professional Team!

reviews.author: Diahnn
reviews.text: Called in the morning and they had someone at my house within 3 hours. Alex was amazing! Explains everything! I was so impressed with his service i asked for quotes on my water heater. Called 5 different plumbing companies and extremely grateful I chose Midway! New to town, and now i know what plumbing company i am calling from now on! Thank you for being awesome, Alex!

plumbers.name: Hoffmann Brothers
plumbers.address: 45 Willow St, Nashville, TN 37210, USA

reviews.author: Hal Roseman
reviews.text:
After five days without electricity and temperatures hovering around 15 degrees, we finally got our power restored — and it’s entirely thanks to Hoffmann Brothers, especially their electrician, Justin.

Our electric mast had literally been pulled away from the house after tree limbs dragged down the service line. Two other well-known Nashville electrical companies came out, but wouldn’t touch anything until NES disconnected the hot line — which meant more waiting… in freezing weather.

Justin, however, didn’t stop without finding a solution. He secured emergency authorization, safely disconnected the line, rebuilt the mast and meter connection, and coordinated everything so NES could immediately reconnect our service. Within 24 hours, we finally had power back.

And the workmanship? Outstanding. He didn’t just patch things up — he rebuilt it correctly:
• replaced the entire mast system
• fixed the previous builder’s makeshift nail mounting with bolting screws
• secured and supported the conduit properly
• caulked the board holding the conduit
• cleaned the entire area
• hauled away debris and old materials

Even more impressive, during a historic weather outage — when many companies add “emergency” surcharges — their pricing was fair and honest, coming in almost a third lower than another major bid.

Skill, integrity, and professionalism when we needed it most. If you ever need electrical work done right, I can’t recommend Hoffmann Brothers and Justin highly enough. They truly showed up for us.

Grateful doesn’t even begin to cover it. 🙏⚡️

reviews.author: Andrew Rickard
reviews.text:
Chance was probably the best technician I've ever had.  He was prompt, polite, efficient, well spoken, and made us feel very comfortable with the entire process. There was literally no friction and I am extremely happy with the results.

He replaced our 16-year-old gas water heater by inspecting, Recommending the replacement, and having the new heater here at my house and install installed within four or five hours.

To make room for him, I took our mountain bikes off of the wall, and without asking, he put them back for me. That says a lot, and lets me know that his attention to detail and his Quality and Work ethic is top-notch.

Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Tonya Miller
reviews.text: What an absolute wonderful experience. I was sent a man named Jacob, and it couldn't have gone better! Skills mixed with kindness is what a homeowner appreciates.  Jacob certainly had that and more. The automated system was suspicious,  however, walking through the process and allowing them to come to your home is effortless.  Once they arrive, the job is accessed and a cost is given. You have the option of accepting the bid or declining.  Very happy I agreed,  mine was an unusual custom job that was finished flawlessly by Jacob. I will certainly have their team back again!

reviews.author: Brittany Truman
reviews.text: The team members Hoffman Brothers sends out to my home have all been highly professional, curteous and good explainers. They treated myself, home and property with respect. They answered all my questions thoroughly, provided detailed pictures of the work completed and explained it in detail. They cleaned up after themselves. From the initial quote to the end result, the whole process was smooth. I liked how they gave me different options to choose from... just repair the worst items, mid level and full restoration. They never pushed a higher option on me. They simply laid the plans out and let me choose my comfort level. I have used other companies for HVAC needs and none of them provided the level of customer service Hoffman Brothers did. I fully intend to use them for all my future needs.

We were blessed to have Eric show up early and his cohort show up to help out as well.

Extremely professional. Do not hesitate to call and ask for Roberto. He came in and fixed everything within the hour they originally quoted me. I will gladly work with them in the future if I ever need their help again. He also did the complementary check of my water heater and pressure.

reviews.text:
EXTREMELY SATISFIED WITH MY WATER SOFTENER SYSTEM

On 10/6/25, Mallick Plumbing & Heating, Inc. installed our new water softener, and we couldn’t be happier with the entire experience. From start to finish, their team was professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable. They took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure the installation was done cleanly and efficiently.

Our plumber, Frederick Mason, was absolutely excellent. He was professional, courteous, and clearly takes pride in his work. He answered all of our questions, made sure everything was set up perfectly, and left the area spotless when he was finished.

The results have been amazing. My wife absolutely loves the difference in our water; she immediately noticed how much better it smells and tastes. Even better, she says her hair feels noticeably softer, and both of us have seen a big improvement in how soft and smooth our skin feels. It’s honestly been a game-changer for our home.

Now, five months later, we are still extremely satisfied with our purchase. The system has been working flawlessly, and it has truly been money well spent. If you’re considering a water softener, I highly recommend Mallick Plumbing & Heating, Inc. Outstanding service, quality work, and real results. Five stars all the way!

A. Jones

reviews.author: Sarah
reviews.text: Wow what amazing service! We had a group of guys from Roto Rooter come out. Brandon was quick and efficient digging the area. George was quick and efficient with jetting the line. Matt did an amazing job bouncing around helping everyone. Mike was also great taking his time to make sure all the fittings were tight and in the proper space. They were all super respectful of the property even putting on booties to enter the house. Everyone was in great spirits and took the time to break everything down and explain certain terminology.

reviews.author: Casey Sager
reviews.text: We have used Roto-Rooter for several years now and we always appreciate the fast and friendly service we receive. Our tech Leonard was friendly and let us know all the work done and explained everything in an easy to understand manner.

reviews.author: April Trupes
reviews.text:
Cy came to my mom’s house. She had been experiencing repeated flooding in her basement. Upon mopping the floor the water mixed with cat litter and she was dumping the water down her laundry tub drain. Long story short she managed to not only clog up her drain she couldn’t wash clothes or use her kitchen sink.
When 2 plumbers failed to show we called roto-rooters. Cy showed up on time did a full inspection. He than walked me through everything he was going to do and took the time to explain it to me. He ended up replacing the sump pump, injector pump, routed out the sink pipes and the floor drain. He was very professional and knowledgeable. He made me feel at ease and very trustworthy. He was quick and efficient and after he completed the job he walked me through it and explained what he had done. And the best part of it all was it only took a couple hours and he gave us a discount on price. Thank you Cy!! We appreciate you, your honesty and your hard work.

reviews.author: Gloria Kouba
reviews.text: Team number 5281. I give these guys 5 stars!!! They went way beyond what I could I expected. If I need work done in the future I will for sure request them. As you can see they even cut the old floor out and put in new supports to even it out before putting in the water heater.

reviews.author: 87th St Rehab Clinic
reviews.text:
Technian came very quick and exhausted all he resources until her was able to successfully fix the issue very honest and etic job
We are glad we choose you company and the issue was fixed in a very short and professional way

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1691 Town Center St Ste 104, Aurora, IL 60504, USA

reviews.author: nancy anderson
reviews.text:
Our old (and only) toilet had not been working right for a couple months (partial flushes, tank running, etc). It finally got completely stopped up and started overflowing and we couldn't plunge it out! Roto- Rooter to the rescue!

Our Technician, Marc, was great! He arrived within 3-4 hours of my call, diagnosed the problem quickly, and gave me possible solutions and estimates for the work before starting.

Marc augered toilet and replaced some old parts in a timely fashion. He got our old potty working better than it had before. Plus, he left the bathroom clean and tidy too -- Hooray!

It was expensive but worth it for the quick, friendly service.

reviews.author: Chuck Damore
reviews.text: We had a catastrophic failure of the cast iron sewer pipe exiting the house on a late Friday night.  None of the toilets or sinks would drain.  The salesperson from Roto Rooter came quickly after I phoned them on Saturday to assess the problem and give me a repair price.  The issue was a broken cast iron sewer line exiting the house at the foundation.  It sheared in two pieces and became clogged.  Monday morning, Roto Rooter arrived on site.  They needed to dig an 8 foot deep X 4 foot wide X 8 foot long hole under the porch to access the failed cast iron pipe.  They had to cut out concrete stoop as well.  They removed the failed pipe and replaced it with a new PVC pipe.  They pulled all permits and arranged for a city inspection.  We were able to use our water Monday afternoon.  Tuesday morning, they filled in the hole and cleaned up.  The cleanup was fantastic.  If you didn't know what happened the day before, you would have never known they were there.  It was a big job that required a large backhoe and many service techs to make the repair.  The supervisor Brandon M. did a fantastic job along with the sales associate Kyle and the rest of the crew.  The finished site was professionally cleaned.  My neighbors commented on how well the guys cleaned up.

reviews.author: Day
reviews.text:
We had a great experience with Roto-Rooter thanks to Leonard and Levi. Leonard was the plumber who completed the work, and he was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and thorough. He took the time to make sure everything was done right and left the area clean afterward.

Levi, the supervisor, was also fantastic — he clearly explained what was going on, walked us through the issue, and helped us understand the best options to resolve it. Having someone explain things in a straightforward way really made the whole situation less stressful.

Overall, excellent service, great communication, and a team that truly cares about helping their customers. I would definitely recommend them and wouldn’t hesitate to call again if needed.

reviews.author: Diana Caputo
reviews.text: I had water and sewage backup comimg from my shower. Mitchell was great. He came to my house twice. Both times in a timely manner, super friendly and respectful. He explained the whole process. He spent a lot of time getting to the root of the problem and didn't leave until he made sure everything was good. He was able to get my house running again until repairs can be done. I would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Brent VanLanduyt
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Roto-Rooter. Nertil came out to fix the water supply stop valves under the sink, and from start to finish the service was top-notch. The work was done efficiently, professionally, and he answered all my questions before leaving.  I would highly recommend.

plumbers.name: TopTec Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electrical
plumbers.address: 510 North Ave, Libertyville, IL 60048, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Hall
reviews.text: We had Top Tec install a hot water heater, furnace and central air conditioning system in our home.  Our hot water heater was out and found Top Tec in the Lake County yellow pages.  They came out and assessed our hot water heater, and the next day they installed a new hot water heater.  Approximately 3 weeks later we had a furnace issue and Moe came to our home on a Friday evening and did a thorough check on the furnace, which continued our journey with Top Tech.  Moe was great and explained perfectly what was wrong with the fan and why it was not pulling enough air out causing the furnace to shut itself off and after an hour or so it would reboot itself and run again but never reach temperature.  Moe did a quote on a replacement part and called Robert, the service manager to do a quote for a furnace.  We promptly received the quotes and after looking over all quotes decided to have Robert do a total replacement quote to see all options.  After a few phone calls on Saturday and Sunday with Robert, we decided to do a total furnace and central air replacement.  Robert was great to work with and understood that this process is stressful for a homeowner to spend a non-budgeted large sum of money.  Top Tec was here on Monday at 8 am with a crew and completed everything in about 6 hours.  All of the technicians were very professional and knowledgeable and willing to explain the product and service to our understanding.  The technicians that replaced our hot water heater were:  Sam and Brian.  The furnace and central air technicians were:  Tony, Buzz, Bayra, Hero and Jim.  The office staff was also very professional and possessed excellent inter-personal communication skills.  Office staff included:  Eli, Jennifer, and Robert, Service Manager.  Eli is the first person to answer your call.  Jennifer did all the warranty paperwork with the manufacturer, so we had no paperwork to fill out on our own.  Jennifer did an excellent job at keeping us informed through email with all completed paperwork on all the jobs.  We will continue to use Top Tec for our home needs.

reviews.author: Ryan Taubman
reviews.text:
Wonderful thorough job!
Tony, Bayar, Jim, and Koss came to replace my full HVAC setup and from start to finish they handled everything without me having to lift a finger.
They brought floor mats and even swept up around the new units when they were finished!
Very highly recommend working with them everything turned out perfectly and was completely stress free!

reviews.author: Molly Klos
reviews.text: Gerry and Cesar installed a new water heater in my house today and did amazing work. They were kind and made me feel very comfortable and safe. They did quality work efficiently! Top Tec continues to impress me with the quality of work and the quality of people they hire! Thank you so much!

reviews.author: J_B Shad

reviews.text: Omg! My plumber Jason was so professional, compassionate, and respectful! He made sure everything was clean while doing a quick and thorough service.. I praise God for Hunter Super Tech. They are people of their word with great integrity. Definitely keeping them in my back pocket.

reviews.author: Gayle Selby
reviews.text: Ishmael did a super job! He was very professional, knowledgeable and explained everything clearly to me. He didn’t make me feel rushed or pressured. He provided great customer service. Very pleased!

plumbers.name: Plumbing Care Inc
plumbers.address: 2415 San Ramon Valley Blvd UNIT 312, San Ramon, CA 94583, USA

reviews.author: Kristina Marin
reviews.text: Pablo was our technician & he found problematic areas on the hot & cold water valves under the sink as well as toilet wall valve. The valves were stiff & difficult to turn & showing rust & corrosion.   Also Pablo showed me a crack in the old original pipe connecting the pea trap that could start leaking, so he changed it to a new plastic PVC pipe.  Pablo is very conscientious, honest, knowledgeable, & communicated his professional opinion & experience whenever any problems arose or plans needed to change.  Thank you Pablo for a job well done!

reviews.author: Ridhima Singh
reviews.text:
We had an excellent experience with this plumber. From start to finish, he was professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable. He quickly diagnosed the issue, explained the problem clearly, and completed the repair efficiently and neatly.

What really stood out was his attention to detail and the pride he takes in his work. He left everything clean and made sure everything was functioning perfectly before leaving.

It’s hard to find reliable, honest service these days, and this was truly a 5-star experience. Highly recommend to anyone needing plumbing work done right the first time.

reviews.author: Arnab “Ari” Sinha
reviews.text: Alex (Alejandro) was amazing to work with. He was patient, answered all of our questions, and did a thorough, high-quality job installing our first tankless water heater. The pricing was fair, and the overall experience exceeded our expectations. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Sanjay Anavekar
reviews.text:
Mitko did a wonderful job installing new Navien NPE240A2
water heater. He made sure everything works as expected and did a detailed walk-through post installation.

Martin the owner, has built a very professional team of plumbers over the years. I highly recommend them as they always deliver good quality service.

reviews.author: Alex Kalpin
reviews.text:
Hristo Ivanov from Plumbing Care INC is absolutely outstanding. From start to finish, he was professional, punctual, and incredibly knowledgeable. He took the time to explain the issue clearly, offered practical solutions, and completed the job efficiently with great attention to detail.

What really sets Hristo apart is his honesty and workmanship — no shortcuts, no upselling, just quality work done right the first time. Everything was left clean and working perfectly.

If you’re looking for a reliable, skilled plumber you can actually trust, Hristo is the one. Highly recommended!

plumbers.name: Upfront Plumbing Drains Heating and Air
plumbers.address: 8496 Harrison St STE 102, Sandy, UT 84047, USA

reviews.author: Keri
reviews.text: We called Upfront to install a microwave that vented to the outside.   They came first to see if what we were asking was feasible.  With a green light,  we went ahead and purchased a microwave that had convertible venting.  Then Jose and his assistant showed up the next day and installed our microwave.  They were professional and completed the job in a timely manner.  They answered questions I had about installation. They cleaned up afterwards and then showed me the work they had completed.  We felt that the price was great considering they would need to drill through stucco.  They also hauled away our old microwave.

reviews.author: Mariah Morris
reviews.text: I've worked with Mason a couple times and he's been amazing. This time, we had mold and had to completely demo our bathroom to remediate. Mason came and was very thorough when looking at everything which was really nice because he understood everything that needed to be done to help avoid any surprises that he could. He even offered 2 different options based on my budget and what needed done, and made sure I was aware of what each entailed and potential consequences and benefits for each option. I've really respected and appreciated the full disclosure and time he's taken with me each time he looks over everything and goes over options and estimates. Two other employees came and did the work to replace my main drain stack and some other piping. They even noticed that my ABS had a recall on it, which I had no idea about. They've all done great work, been very respectful, friendly, and kept me engaged throughout the whole process so nothing came as a surprise. I've had other companies try to tell me I need products that I don't really need and Upfront has never done that. The office employees are also very nice and it's super easy to schedule appointments and make payments, they'll even text you a link for you to pay. I feel like Upfront is very trustworthy and would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Bryan A
reviews.text:
I had a really good experience getting my furnace replaced by Upfront! Their estimate was fair, and they were extremely responsive, and they accommodated the replacement within 3 days.

My furnace was condemned on Friday morning. With temperatures beginning to drop next week and it being Christmas week, I scrambled to get my warranty company to take the job but their contractor was unresponsive during the weekend. Jakob coordinated with me throughout Saturday on getting the furnace replaced Monday. On Monday Justin and Austin finished the furnace replacement in less than 4 hours. Everything looks great and we don't have to worry about using space heaters to survive the cold that's coming. Thank you for doing a great job, being responsive, and working diligently to resolve a habitability issue quickly!

reviews.author: Tonia Eidson
reviews.text: Mark came out to give us a price to replace a 14 year old water heater for my in-laws after we woke up with no hot water. My husband and I come from the industry, but are from out of state and the company I would normally use was booked so I looked around for other local companies with good reviews and Upfront seemed like a great place. We were not disappointed! Mark was able to get the water heater temporarily fixed so that we would have hot water over night and then came back the following morning to replace it. He did an amazing job on the install! Everything was done to code and looks great! You can tell Mark really cares about his customers and takes pride in his work. The price was better than we expected! If you are looking for a local company that does great work at a decent price, these guys are great! Ask for Mark!

reviews.author: Austin Heywood
reviews.text: This is the best run company in utah - fair Price fantastic employees amazing management took such good care of my mom’s place and she’s 88 years old. I would use them all day and twice on Sunday. Thanks Ryan for your team.

plumbers.name: Mr. Central
plumbers.address: 1926 Richland Ave E, Aiken, SC 29801, USA

reviews.author: Andrea So
reviews.text: I had an excellent customer experience with Mr. Central. With regard to scheduling, they booked my appointment and our technician, Oscar arrived within two hours of my call for service. He did a great job diagnosing and fixing the issue with our tankless water heater. He explained everything that was causing the problem and gave me multiple options (including cost free options) for how to address it. The service fee for the visit was reasonable and transparent. I am very happy with this company and would schedule with them again.

reviews.author: Jessica Coleman
reviews.text:
Jeremy was thorough, he took his time and he answered all my questions. He went out of his way to find out answers to some questions I had that he wasn't sure of related to payment. He explained the process of what they would do and made me feel confident with choosing then to get the job done right the first time.
Jeremy and Nik did an incredible job with installing our new water heater and gas lines for fireplace. The neatly mounted the water heater and safely removed the old water heater tank. They were very clean making sure to put booties on every time they entered the home. They cleaned up the yard very well after digging for the gas lines. We are extremely pleased with the work they did and the professionalism. We will be using them again in the future!

reviews.author: Lawretta Cameron
reviews.text:
Felix did an amazing job on our HVAC system! He was professional, knowledgeable, and explained everything in a way that was easy to understand. He showed up on time, worked efficiently, and made sure everything was running perfectly before he left.

What I appreciated most was his honesty and attention to detail — no upselling, just real solutions. You can tell he takes pride in his work and truly cares about his customers.

If you’re looking for someone reliable and trustworthy for your heating and air needs, I highly recommend Felix and the Mr Central team!

Thank you so much! From the Simpkins family!

reviews.author: David MacIntyre
reviews.text: Nick and Mark came to do my yearly plumbing review and look at a leaky toilet. The toilet needed to be overhalled and after discussing three options I decided to go with a new toilet and they were able to do it while they were here. They did a fantastic job and were very careful with my house and very considerate about wearing shoe covers and were great at asking questions and giving me information. I highly recommend this company and the folks that work for Mr. Central.

reviews.author: CeeCee P.
reviews.text: Jeremy Butler was my technician. He was so professional and efficient. I appreciate him taking time to explain what was wrong and going into detail on how he fixed it. I felt very comfortable giving him space and letting him work. Thank you for the awesome experience and we will be in touch. If you’re in Aiken I highly recommend them.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing and Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1435 Paramount Dr, Huntsville, AL 35806, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Lee
reviews.text:
Honestly, I’d give 10 stars.
I had been without water since yesterday, and at first, I brushed it off, thinking the nearby construction was the cause. But when the faucets were still dry this morning, worry started to creep in. After calling the water utility and hearing that the problem was on our end, I spent a long time searching for the leak—finally finding water seeping out near the meter.
I reached out to Roto-Rooter, and that’s when Riley arrived. He stepped out of the truck with a warm, genuine smile that immediately eased my stress. In the freezing cold, he knelt down and dug through the ground with his hands, determined to find the source of the problem. He went out of his way to get rust‑resistant parts so the repair would last, and he worked with such care and integrity that it honestly moved me.
He didn’t leave until everything was fully restored, checking and rechecking to make sure the water was flowing properly again. He even gave us a discount—something he didn’t have to do but did anyway. Before he left, he wished us a blessed day, and it felt sincere.
Thanks to Riley, we finally have water again. After a stressful, uncomfortable day, his kindness and professionalism turned everything around. If five stars is the limit, then he deserves double.

reviews.author: verna rizvi
reviews.text: Great service! When I called Roto Rooter I was told they had someone close by and they would contact him and send him over.   Cole arrived quickly and went right to work figuring out what was causing the backup in my sink. He did a great job getting to the cause of my problem and cleaning out the pipes. Very pleased with the professionalism shown by the service man Cole and the quality of his work.

reviews.author: D.T.
reviews.text: Had a great experience with Roto Rooter today. Technician Markues Montalvo was friendly, knowledgeable, and right on time. He was honest about the situation, very thorough with the inspection, and explained everything clearly. I really appreciated that there was no charge just to come out and inspect. It’s hard to find service like this anymore — highly recommend!

reviews.author: Emily Pauli
reviews.text: Roto Rooter did an excellent job!  They were professional and took time to explain their findings and recommendations. The were timely, worked efficiently, and cleaned up when finished.   I’ve used them in the past and will do so again if needed.

reviews.author: Kristie Scheuer
reviews.text: Roto Rooter responded to our request for service, septic tank service, in a very timely and professional manner.  We called on Friday night and the service was performed on a Saturday which was extremely helpful for our situation.  The technician, Aye, was very knowledgeable, efficient and personable. I would definitely use Roto Rooter again for my plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Andersen Plumbing, Heating and AC Repair
plumbers.address: 700 Terry Ave, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Anthony DiAngelo
reviews.text:
Highly recommend Joe and the Anderson team. Joe replaced our sump pump and was outstanding to work with. He took the time to educate us, clearly laid out all of our options, and explained the trade-offs so we could make an informed decision—no pressure, just solid guidance. The quality of the work was excellent.

We’ve had Anderson out to our house multiple times over the past few months for different issues, and each experience has been consistently superb. Professional, knowledgeable, and reliable service every time. We wouldn’t hesitate to call Joe or Anderson again.

reviews.author: Mariah Wright
reviews.text: Nate & Zach were great! They were on time, very polite and very knowledgeable. Immediately was able to identify the issue and provide a solution. Walked me through everything in a way I understood. Great service all around! “Im just a girl” lol and I was able to explain the issue no problem to my husband as well. 10/10!!

reviews.author: Jeanette Hoffman
reviews.text: Jon and Cesar came out to diagnose a noise I heard coming from the furnace. They arrived quickly, were polite and professional and did a thorough inspection of the entire furnace. They were able to figure out the issue and discussed with me the other things they saw that looked like they should be addressed to keep the furnace running smoothly. They offered me different options on what to repair urgently and what should be addressed but could wait a bit longer. They were not pushy at all and explained everything thoroughly while showing me pictures of what they were seeing. I continue to use Anderson because every time I’ve needed them this is the same reliable and professional service I receive.

reviews.author: Max
reviews.text:
I recently had a bathtub faucet installed by Andersen, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. Evan and Michelle were professional, courteous, and clearly knew what they were doing. They took the time to make sure everything was installed properly and working perfectly before they left.

Their workmanship was clean and precise, and they made sure the area was spotless when the job was finished. It’s clear they take pride in the quality of their work. I would definitely recommend this company to anyone looking for reliable and professional plumbing services.

reviews.author: Andre Porche
reviews.text:
We had an outstanding experience working with Joe Harkins. From the moment he arrived, he demonstrated a high level of professionalism, knowledge, and attention to detail. He took the time to thoroughly assess our home and carefully identify the source of the leak, explaining each step of the process in a clear and reassuring manner.
Joe truly went above and beyond to ensure we felt confident that the issue was properly diagnosed and that our system was secure. His expertise and patience gave us peace of mind during what could have been a very stressful situation.
In addition, he provided thoughtful recommendations for trusted services that could assist with the necessary repairs. That extra level of guidance showed that he genuinely cares about his clients and the long-term well-being of their homes.
We highly recommend Joe Harkins to anyone in need of a knowledgeable, dependable, and customer-focused professional.

plumbers.name: Plumb Crazy Plumbing
plumbers.address: 308 W Britton Rd, Oklahoma City, OK 73114, USA

reviews.author: Dale C Courtney JR
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Plumb Crazy Plumbing. The technician, Tim, was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. He arrived on time, quickly diagnosed the issue, and completed the work without any unnecessary delays. Everything was explained clearly, and the quality of his work was excellent. It’s clear he takes pride in what he does. I really appreciated how smooth and stress-free the whole process was. I would absolutely recommend Plumb Crazy Plumbing and would be happy to have Tim back for any future work!

reviews.author: Ramona Campos
reviews.text: Happy with service from this company. Able to schedule estimate online and got a confirmation of appt within the hour. Day of appointment, I received a text 30 minutes prior to arrive and arrived within the requested time frame. Jesse did a great job of explaining the process, giving me the quote and told me it was good for 30 days. After speaking to my daughter, we decided to rescheduled for actual appointment. Again online and quick response from company to confirm. The same tech Jesse came out and quickly completed the job within the hour. Fair pricing, within what I was expecting for pay for the job. (Single Bibb Replacement- should cost anywhere from $300-400; paid $375 for service). Overall, very pleased with service and will call again for any future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Dina
reviews.text: I had a pipe burst under my house when temperatures dropped below zero, and Plumb Crazy was amazing. They sent a plumber within two hours, and he was wonderful, efficient, thorough, and clearly knew what he was doing. There was no dragging out the job or padding the bill, which I truly appreciated. Great service, honest pricing, and fast response. I will 100% use them again and recommend them to anyone needing a plumber.

reviews.author: Miranda Mohi
reviews.text: We have used Plumb Crazy the last 20 years, since 2006. We have had some big and small jobs to complete and they do a great job for a fair price. They are always polite and prompt, and I feel they communicate with us well about appointments! Thank you!

reviews.author: Michael Stephanic
reviews.text:
ABSOLUTELY FANTASTIC

The late January winter storm Fern wreaked havoc on plumbing in and around Oklahoma. Even while leaving our hot and cold water faucets dribble to prevent freezing, we ended up with a cracked hot water pipe underneath the house. I called Plumb Crazy Plumbing, figuring I wouldn’t get a tech out for days in this weather and with so many others dealing with broken pipes. Instead, Plumb Crazy had a technician at our house within the hour.

My tech, Kevin arrived with his assistant and they checked out the damage, gave me a quote, and had the problem fixed in less than an hour. They were extremely friendly, polite, professional and well-trained. The price was great. The service was prompt and efficient. The warranty was very reasonable and totally unexpected. And the follow-up from Plumb Crazy was above and beyond what I’ve had from other plumbers. I highly recommend Plumb Crazy Plumbing for all your plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Wizard Plumbing and Drain
plumbers.address: 2300 Palm Ave, San Mateo, CA 94403, USA

reviews.author: Mani Hashemi
reviews.text:
Exceptional service and an exceptional team!!!
I lost hot water pressure and right away I knew something was wrong with my water heater. Since it was Sunday I had to email a few places and one of them was Wizard plumbing. Monday morning I got a few responses but Wizard plumbing was the quickest of them all and could dispatch someone urgently. Kevin arrived and identified that the water heater was leaking and needed to be replaced, after answering my many questions and making calls around to find the model I wanted. Shortly after Dino arrived and the pair not only replaced the water heater but also fabricated a custom pan to adhere to the current drain that was in place. They also replaced the leaky hot water valve as well as an automatic shut off valve. Throughout the whole time, they were curious, attentive, and thorough. They got the job done wonderfully and quickly within a few hours; this was exceptionally important as we have little kids. As they say, you get what you pay for and with Wizard plumbing, you get every Penny's worth. Don't just look for the cheapest but look for quality and Dino and Kevin are a great example of why that is the case. Thank you very much. A rockstar team for sure.

reviews.author: P. O. Benito
reviews.text: Made an appointment three days prior, they took down all of my information and asked me a bunch of questions. The morning of the appointment, I get a text message saying they do not service my area and have to cancel. Why didn’t you tell me that three days ago when I made the appointment and gave you my address? Waste of time.

reviews.author: Todd S.
reviews.text: I’ve lived in a house that was built in 1947 for 10 years. So I’ve had more than a few plumbers come through for various issues during that time. A termite inspector found a leak, so I panic-called the first result on Yelp (I don’t usually do that). Wizard Plumbing came through, assessed the situation, and gave me a number of options, each with associated costs. Not one to mess around with plumbing, I went with the most extensive & labor intensive option (and I’m glad I did; see pix). Out of all the plumbers I’ve done business with over the years, Wizard Plumbing proved to be — by far — the most honest, fair, competent, experienced and thorough. In fact, if I made a Venn diagram with all of those attributes for each of the plumbers I’ve done business with, Wizard would be the only one that made a perfect circle. They’ve definitely made a customer for life.

reviews.author: Lawrence Lam
reviews.text: Ammar from Wizard plumbing came out same day to fix me emergency. I would not have been able to open my business the next day without his help. He had to perform a major hydrojetter procedure on my plumbing. Everything works great now. I will call Wizard Plumbing again if needed.

reviews.author: Venu
reviews.text: Todd and Kyle came out today and the whole experience was fantastic. The dispatch was super responsive to start. I had a 75 gallon water heater that flooded my utility room. They sent out the two techs within hours of opening of business hours. Our situation was a bit special. Water heater two stories down and in a weird framed in closet the tank did not fit out of. They moved the washer and sink for me and left to do another job while I sawed apart the frame. That was on me for obvious reasons. I had to move electrical wiring too. The 75 gallon did not fit through the frame. Once I was complete I called and they were back in an hour. The entire new 50 gallon water heater was installed by end of business and less than 24 hours after the first discovery. It fit better. Operated better. Both techs were courteous, professional, knew exactly what they were doing as they were specific to water heaters. I will definitely call them again in any emergency. The other company called me to schedule the estimate when wizard was almost done….

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1137 W Webster Ave, Chicago, IL 60614, USA

reviews.author: Andrea Monllau
reviews.text:
What a great and fast job they did! We have a bursted pipe and called them. In less than 1 hour Javier and Jimmy showed up and were able to quickly repair the pipe.

They kept us informed of pricing and steps throughout the whole process.

Javier was really good at identifying where the burst was and only had to do a small whole in the wall.

10/10!! From call to fixed less than 3h

reviews.author: Lauren Ortega Falconer
reviews.text: Dex always comes through for us in an emergency! We have had several plumbing issues in our condo in the last 12 months, and Dex has been great. He's always responsive and persistent, even coming back a few times free of charge to tinker with his solutions to chronic issues we're dealing with. He's been trustworthy and friendly, and I would definitely recommend him to anyone.

reviews.author: Claire Anderson
reviews.text: This team was outstanding. Within 10 minutes of me calling they had three guys in the house working to fix my pipes. Ended up having 6 burst pipes during the Omar vortex that were really complex to fix and Dex and his team were fast and kept me updated the whole time. I have two small children at home and need water to properly care for them and he promised me no matter what he was getting me water by the end of the night. And they did for a good cost. I cannot say enough for how amazing this company is and the men who work for it are. So great fun to have found them

reviews.author: Rhianna Kern
reviews.text:
Dex and the crew literally saved our night (and our hardwood floors!) We got home from work and the kitchen sink was backing up with gross water and quickly started overflowing onto the floor. Between bailing out drainage water and panicking, Rescue Plumbing answered the phone in 2 rings and said we can help you right now.

Not only did Dex and his team show up AFTER HOURS in the SNOW, they were warm, kind and jumped right into action to save my kitchen. They knew exactly what to do, explained it all to me, told me the costs right up front and stuck to it. Within 30 minutes they fixed our building’s drainage issue, cleaned up the kitchen neat as a pin and were out the door with a quick joke.

I hope I don’t need to see them again but also if I need a plumber, they’re saved in my phone and getting every recommendation. 4 seasons and ABC told me I’d have to wait til tomorrow afternoon at the earliest and I think my floors would have been ruined from overflowing sink water if I didn’t have Rescue Plumbing. Thank you Dex and team!!!

reviews.author: Charles Hastings
reviews.text: Javier was fantastic, honest, and efficient! I got several quotes from other companies and this was by far the most cost effective. Not only did they provide a fair and up front quote, but they were friendly, and responsive. I will definitely be calling them again for any future plumbing needs!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 24W500 Maple Ave # 209, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Fresh
reviews.text: Erlin was fantastic!  He actually took the time required to diagnose the issue (where previous plumbers did not) and address the true problem.  He was professional, respectful, and effectively communicated the details surrounding the problem and provided tips for future plumbing health.  I highly recommend Erlin and will definitely be using him again in the future!

reviews.author: Joseph Morisco
reviews.text:
I scheduled a plumber to come out and had a few questions after booking the appointment. I called back simply to understand what the technician planned to do since I had already had the line rodded a few months ago and didn’t want to just repeat the same service without understanding the approach.

Unfortunately, whoever answered the phone was extremely dismissive. She repeatedly cut me off while I was speaking and had a noticeable attitude. I wasn’t trying to be difficult — I was just asking basic questions about the service.

Instead of listening, she kept saying they couldn’t tell me anything over the phone and wouldn’t even let me finish my sentences. Because of that interaction, I immediately canceled my appointment.

Good customer service starts with listening to the customer. Losing business simply because someone won’t take a moment to hear a question is disappointing.

reviews.author: Burst Flames Entertainment
reviews.text: Kemal with Roto-Rooter was great! He explained everything that was recommended to be serviced and didn't try to upsale me on a service that wasn't needed. I highly recommend Kemal and I'll definitely be reaching out to him again when I need any plumbing service.

reviews.author: Charia Johnson
reviews.text: Roto rooter is a scam... they dont do any work... Im the president of a condo association... called them for a boiler issue the man didnt do a thing... looked at the hot water heater and told me it was old and probably out of warranty and it would be 15k to replace... I even asked like you didnt even look at it.. you arent telling me whats broken just that it old and broke... well I can see that... he made a call to the company about warranty... wrote his paper for the 75 dollar fee and left... did nothing for 75 bucks Nothing

reviews.author: Andrea Gomez
reviews.text: First service a few months ago left me happy, issue got taken care of right away. Appt was made and tech was there within the estimated time frame. The work was done quick and efficiently. Recently i had some plumbing issues and immediately thought to call them. Scheduled an appointment same day within the hour, the tech was dispatched- i waited 2 1/2 hours before calling for an update and being told there is issues with travel and they cant make it in, thats fine, i reschedule for next day, wait over an hour and a half before calling for an update, was told to hold on a bit more. An hour later they call to reschedule that the tech cannot come, made for next day in the AM this time instead of PM. Got a call this morning at 7am-(3 hours before my appointment time) to ask if my appointment can be moved up, the tech can be there in the next 30 minutes, i agree, wait, over an hour later, nothing- i call for an update, am told the technician is supposed to be on the way still but nothing. I cancelled the appointment. Ive had to rearange my schedule for 3 days now and ive been able to try things at home to help my plumbing issues. Crying in the club- send help

plumbers.name: Brian B. Quick Plumbing
plumbers.address: 10739 Tucker St Suite 100-B, Beltsville, MD 20705, USA

reviews.author: Kia Banks
reviews.text:
I ordered a new washer and dryer but couldn’t have them installed because the existing shut-off valves were corroded. Pierre came out to assess the situation and provided several options with clear pricing. He arrived on time, was professional, and extremely knowledgeable. He took the time to explain everything in detail—what he was doing, the updated plumbing codes, why larger commercial companies often charge much more, and why emergency services are usually scheduled on weekends.

By the time he left, I felt completely confident in the work and the service provided. Pierre installed new shut-off valves so the water to the entire home no longer needs to be turned off, and he properly secured the drainage pipe to the wall, including fixing issues hidden behind the drywall that hadn’t been secured by the previous homeowner.

He was also able to install both my washer and dryer, and they are running perfectly. He even followed up the next day to make sure everything was working smoothly. Sorry it took me so long to write this review—but the service was absolutely worth it.

reviews.author: Damien Begley
reviews.text: We could not be happier or more impressed with Brian B Quick and in particular their technician/plumber Jimmy Stewart. We were in a real jam on a Saturday. We called Brian B. Quick and much to our amazement they were able to provide service that day. When their technician Jimmy arrived, he gave us the news as to what needed to be done, and an estimate. He wasnt able to get to us until around 3 p.m. because he was at another job. As it turned out he had to a larger job and the thoughts were he would have to come back the following week especially because it was Labor Day weekend. But no he said I can start now. We followed him over to the home depot picked out the shower hardware with his guidance and he went to work not finishing until around 9:00. He had to work in really tight quarters to do the job and minimize later repairs. He was able to do it and while it would have been perfectly understandable for him to call it a day at any point and return later to finish the job; he stuck to it doing a fantastic job, demonstrating the work showing us all the details and providing follow up information should we need it. Could not be more pleased or impressed with the experience.

reviews.author: Gloria C
reviews.text: This is our second time calling on Brian B. Quick Plumbing for repairs in our home. In both instances, the service far exceeded expectations - prompt, courteous, professional, experienced, efficient. Today, Dan was the technician sent to our home to install a faucet in our backyard. Everything about the experience was exceptional. Dan quickly assessed the layout and condition of our piping, and offered several recommendations for installation. A very reasonable price estimate was provided, to which we agreed in the same visit. After a quick trip to obtain the needed supplies, Dan returned and completed the work in very short order.  Dan explained exactly what he did and the steps we should take to maintain the faucet in cold weather. We are very satisfied with the service and results we have received from Brian B. Quick Plumbing and will continue to call on them for any future needs.

reviews.author: Dina Nawas
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Dion from Brian B Quick Plumbing. His communication was excellent—he gave a 40-minute heads-up before arriving and provided clear, regular text updates throughout the job since I wasn’t onsite. He quickly diagnosed an issue with the garbage disposal, clearly walked me through my options, and was very honest—after unjamming it, he did not push an unnecessary drain cleaning. He even sent a video confirming everything was fixed. Dion also investigated a suspected leak affecting the unit below, coordinated thoughtfully with all parties, and once he confirmed the issue was isolated to the lower unit, he promptly sourced materials and completed the repair. Professional, transparent, and thorough. I highly recommend Brian B Quick Plumbing—and especially Dion.

reviews.author: Charmeda McCready
reviews.text:
This company was great. My tech Patrick came in and knocked it out in less than 30 minutes. Professional, polite, and knowledgeable. It’s hard to find qualified, trustworthy, experienced people. I’m grateful and thankful for the help.

My drain was blocked and now it works! I also appreciate not being taken advantage of as a female!

Thank you. I highly recommend this company and technician.

plumbers.name: Busy Bee Plumbing, Heating, & Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 40 Burton Hills Blvd #200, Nashville, TN 37215, USA

reviews.author: Sierra Rodgers
reviews.text: I cannot say recommend enough! I had a pipe burst inside a wall in my house and water was flooding the floor. I called a couple of places and the earliest either one could see me was the next day in the afternoon. I called Busy Bee and immediately talked to a real person (means more than you think) and someone came out immediately! I was so shocked. The price was pretty high but the leak was inside the wall so it’s kind of understandable. My repair man was Daniel Adkins and he was phenomenal! So fast, efficient, and also very kind! You could tell he knew what he was doing. The poor guy even brought out a shovel trying to get in the crawl space to try and locate the leak. I’m not sure what he gets paid but it’s probably not enough for that! Great experience!

reviews.author: Mary M
reviews.text: Kevin came out to check on an issue with our Halo whole house water filtration system and I am very happy that he knew right away what needed to be done to correct it. He was very friendly and knowledgable. Thank you Busy Bee for your great service!

reviews.author: Raven S.
reviews.text: Brandon was very nice, helpful and knowledgeable. He took care of my home’s needs, and also informed of some structural issues with my sink that I was completely unaware of. I am glad I was referred to busy bee! I look forward to using their services again in the future!

reviews.author: Elaine Love
reviews.text: Chris was fantastic! He arrived right on time and was professional, courteous,  and clearly knowledgeable.  He quickly assessed the issue with the hot water heater which required to be replaced. He  completed the repair efficiency.  I really appreciated his expertise and the smooth experience from start to finish. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Michael Speight
reviews.text: I had a heat/air unit replacement install this week. Tyler and Dalton were complete pros with the work they did.  They were knowledgeable and answered any questions I had and provided all the details of what they were going to do during the complete course of the install.  They had a tight space to work with and did it with ease and perfection.  They made sure everything about my new unit was working as expected and made sure my duct work was good as well. Highly recommend Busy Bee and the work of these technicians.

plumbers.name: Hill & Company Service, Inc.
plumbers.address: 5125 NW 5th Pl, Oklahoma City, OK 73127, USA

reviews.author: L Crymes
reviews.text: We have been shopping to replace our HVAC system for six months. By far the most professional quote process came from Jeff Holloway. He took the time to inspect each service and return vents to calculate a balance load (turns out we needed an additional 12"12" return vent). Then two days later technicians Ryan & Kasem arrived to install new system. They were polite, hard working, quite efficient, and very respectful of our property. Everyone at Hill&Co were willing to fully answer and explain any questions. Also. the financing terms were quite attractive. We are more than pleased. Eric, the manager of the installation crew, came and preformed a quality assurance inspection of all facets of the work. Have never had this level of service before and are quite happy, especially for such an expensive purchase.

reviews.author: Kathi Black
reviews.text:
Two months ago we had one of our two AC units replaced by another well-known AC company in the local metro area. That experience from start to finish was not good on many levels. I would not recommend that company to anyone.
