So when our second AC unit decided to break last week we decided to call Hill & Company this time. I can positively say that the full experience from Paxton coming out to find the issue, to Jeff coming out later that same day to discuss options if we decided to purchase a new unit instead of a repair, to the next day having Zeus and his team out to do the new AC install - every single interaction was professional, their employees were very knowledgeable and personable, our property was treated with respect, they showed up on time and were done exactly when they said they would be. They cleaned up after themselves. The options of which unit to buy were presented to us in an easy-to-understand way and we felt we really got a lot of value for our money.  Overall, a very good experience with everyone at Hill & Company. I would definitely recommend them to my family, friends and neighbors. Thank you Hill & Company!!!

reviews.author: SkystormChargerVortex
reviews.text:
AC compressor went out. The outside unit was 23 years old, so we decided that we just needed to buy a completely new outside unit. The inside garage closet furnace heating unit was in perfect condition, so there wasn't a need to replace it, plus we didn't have the money to replace both.

Contacted multiple heat and air companies, several came out to give me a price on a new outside unit and a second price just in case the evaporator under the furnace needed to be replaced.

One company in particular, actually gave me a set price to replace both the outside unit and the evaporator under the furnace. That company thought it would be best.

They said the actual price shown was the actual price we would pay. We decided to go with them after they waited on us for 3 weeks while we gathered the amount of money WE ALL agreed upon!

On the day we were making the appointment for them to come out to install the new outside unit/evaporator coil (if it needed it)...The price changed, it had magically jumped up a $1,000!
(Interstate Heat & Air🤬)

I immediately went looking online again.

❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️
I saw Hill & Company (thinking Drabek & Hill at first.🤦‍♂️🤣) so I messaged them. Didn't think about it until after I had already hit send. I'm glad that my brain messed up like that though, because it was a SMART MESS UP!

Nick came out to diagnose. Checked everything out, even crawled up our broken later, into the poorly ventalated (I'll fix that later) heat filled attic to check our installation/vent ducts. He gave me 2 prices after he had finished up.

One for just the outside unit replacement and a second price just in case they needed to replace the evaporator. I liked the pricing, it was the lowest we had received, so I said; Let's do it!

Dalton & Zario came out to replace the outside unit. Everything was going good, they were quick and informative while working. They finished up with the outside unit, unfortunately the PXV valve was freezing up on the old evaporator (which means it's bad) so they had to go ahead and replace the evaporator by pulling out the entire furnace.

They got it out, replaced it and put everything back in.

Sorry again guys that the builders of this house made it so hard for ya'll to get it in/out of the closet.
(Way before we came here!🤣)

They vacuumed out any air/moisture from the system, charged the A/C up, cleaned everything up and within 30 minutes after turning it on, we could feel the cold, that we haven't felt for some time now.

Feels great to be back in it. I know that besides me, that the Wife, Dublin, Butterscotch, Garfield, Katniss and my cousin are all glad to have it back!🥶🥶🥶🥶

Great job boys! And thanks again to you Nick for dropping the price just a little bit more after the job was already finished!

We really appreciated that!

reviews.author: Pat
reviews.text:
Can I just say how *unimpressed* I am with my experience with the Hill & Co. group?!

I had a pair of guys come out & take a half-assed look around, then the older, chubbier journeyman sent the younger, skinnier apprentice under the house to poke around at the plumbing (he forgot his flashlight & had to be handed one).
They tried to convince me that I needed to upsize my whole gas line, "for code."
They even had me convinced & up-sold, until I asked the next 2 plumbers about it...
They were *absolutely* trying to take advantage of someone who didn't know better.

Anyway, they quoted me $9,2k for a simple Tankless Water Heater swap.

I though that was too much, so I called around. An outfit called Yarbrough & Sons sent a technician named Cole Hobson to come out & do an estimate for a Tankless Hot Water Heater swap for me, and not only did he do a *thorough* bathroom, utility closet & crawl-space inspection, he came out of the crawl space (looking like the undead 🧟‍♂️), went looking for a shovel, & then went *back* underneath the house to trench out access to allow him to get where he needed to go, to see what he needed to see! I should add that Cole & I are both bigger guys (like the Hill&Co Journeyman), & I would not have wanted to have to do what he just did. And he did it enthusiastically & professionally, all for just a free estimate! Very impressive!

Unfortunately, a guy from a "2 guys in a truck" outfit came in right behind them & immediately underbid their quote.

But I was so impressed by Cole, that I called Yarbrough & Sons, & I asked if they could match/beat the other offer?
And, guess what, they did!

So, we were pleased to get to book the project with them & are having it installed next Monday (So long as I can get my Electrician to come upgrade the power outlet box over the weekend 😅).

For the record, they beat out Hill & Co.'s (who was Angie.com's 1st recommendation) initial quoted price by >45%, coming in at just

reviews.author: Ahmad Latifzai
reviews.text:
We needed emergency services because our downstairs heat stopped working during the January storm. They were able to send Paxton quickly who was very knowledgeable and very much willing to take the time to explain how the system worked. He was able to get us up and running within an hour.
I highly recommend these guys and will definitely use them again

plumbers.name: Integrated Plumbing Solutions
plumbers.address: 3111 Moon Station Rd Ste B, Kennesaw, GA 30144, USA

reviews.author: Josh Leebow
reviews.text:
Top notch service! Matt and his team including but not limited to DJ, Laura, Todd, and Joe.
You will not be ripped off, scammed, or taken to the bank. I’ve used Matt multiple times to fix other plumbers expensive, mess. Don’t think twice.

reviews.author: Jeff Le Blanc
reviews.text: Cobert was super friendly and explained what   Process and expectations with water and gas cutoff times.  He did great work! It was pricy but in line with other quotes we received.  We used Integrated plumber before with adding a gas line 5 years ago and the did a great job with that.

reviews.author: Carson Smith
reviews.text: Matt and his team with integrated plumbing are awesome! They helped me figure out my problems with my sewer main line and gave me great recommendations of what I need to do to fix it. They are extremely knowledgeable and have all the tools to handle any project. I would highly recommend them to anyone. I will be using them for all my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Richard Graham
reviews.text: Douglas was very professional. He came to provide a quote to replace my leaky hot water heater on a Friday afternoon, and was able to finish the job same day. He explained everything he was doing, ran his pipes perfectly vertical, labeled the valves, offset the tank in the pan so my moisture alarm unit would fit, and left the area clean. I liked that he wore slip-on booties over his boots and even put some on the wheels of the cart to protect my carpet. I also liked that this is a local company.

reviews.author: Christine Cheung
reviews.text: Douglas Dominguez from Integrated Plumbing Solutions is simply excellent. What a great problem solver! He arrived on time, carefully inspected all the areas, prepared 2 solutions for my budget, answered all my questions, and promptly fixed a leak in my bathroom. Throughout his work, he was professional, helpful, and friendly. Most importantly, he paid close attention to details, such as listening to all my concerns, wearing shoe covers, double checking to see if there's any leak, and properly cleaning after the job was done. He was great in explaining technical stuff in simple language, and always thinking a few steps ahead to ensure the process could run smoothly. So glad he worked on this job. Thanks Douglas!

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of The Oakland-Berkeley Area
plumbers.address: 50 Hegenberger Loop, Oakland, CA 94621, USA

reviews.author: Manuel Rivas
reviews.text: Alfredo arrived promptly as scheduled.  He was polite, professional, and efficient.  He cleaned up the job site before leaving and tested the plumbing.  The work comprised of opening the wall and cutting a drain pipe to lower it to proper code and installing new plumbing below the kitchen sink.

reviews.author: Jessica Kim
reviews.text:
Had a very smooth and positive first experience with Mr Rooter, especially with our technician Alfredo!

I called to make an appointment and they had one available the next morning. I received a text 30mins before the appointment to let us know Alfredo was the assigned technician and on his way. He was punctual to the appointment, and after walking him through the issues, he explained the job that needed to be done clearly. The quote and details were pulled up upfront on the iPad, with flat rate pricing that also listed the components that would be replaced.

Alfredo himself was very courteous, knowledgeable, and very helpful. He guided us through the whole process with clear explanations of what he was doing. Besides fixing the immediate problem, he also took some steps to diagnose multiple other possible root causes of the issue. I very much appreciated that he didn't put any pressure or push with going for a larger or broader jobs. When I also shared about some auxiliary concerns, he went above and beyond to provide additional recommendations and information. I was very grateful that he was our assigned technician - thank you!

Mr Rooter came highly recommended by a neighbor - so while I didn't do much as much research on how it compares - I would go with them again in the future again given how positive this experience was.

reviews.author: Kiyomi Yim
reviews.text: Arrived home to a pool of water all over the kitchen floor.  Found we'd sprung a leak in a line under the kitchen sink past the shut off valve.  Thank heavens Alex was able to come out within hours.  He confirmed we'd shut off the water correctly, inspected under the house, explained everything he was doing, and then offered multiple levels of solutions to choose from.  I wasn't in a state of mind to make a big decision and so he offered to come back the next day.  He returned promptly the next day and did the work in a few hours.  There was never any pressure to do more than what we were comfortable with; we'll definitely be calling Mr Rooter and Alex when we're ready to do more work! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Rose Huynh
reviews.text: Mr. Rooter was able to come and fix my sewer backup issue within the same morning. Alfredo was our plumbing technician and he was very professional and friendly. He took the time to explain to me how things work and was able to creatively solve some out of the box hiccups that arose during the service. Their pricing is not the cheapest but you get what you pay for. We would definitely recommend them for your plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Monica Lee
reviews.text: Our technician Alfredo was amazing. He was quick and efficient! Our toilet was clogged and he helped us identify the problem. He also went above and beyond and checked on our plumbing under in the crawl space.

plumbers.name: Service Hero Plumbing & Air
plumbers.address: 24800 Industrial Blvd, Hayward, CA 94545, USA

reviews.author: Jordan Defiesta
reviews.text: Darrion was excellent to work with. He was fast, respectful, and very transparent about the work that needed to be done. He clearly explained the options, pricing, and next steps, which immediately put me at ease. His business and sales acumen made the entire process smooth and pressure-free, and it was genuinely easy to do business with him. I’d absolutely recommend Darrion to anyone looking for a reliable, trustworthy plumber.

reviews.author: J T
reviews.text: Logan was great to work with on our drain issue. He was very courteous and had reached out to let me know what time he'd be there. He was done within 30 minutes of arriving and took care of the backed up drain. He was very conscientious of making sure water did not get all over the place and that was appreciated!

reviews.author: Mike Robinson
reviews.text: Fantastic experience.  Kent was quick to arrive, quick to assess and diagnose, and quick to resolve the issue.  He was polite, personable, and made me feel completely at ease during the whole process - one that was causing me some concern as it was a potential flooding of my garage.  Great work - and would love to work with him again... anytime.

reviews.author: David Paul
reviews.text: I called Rooter Hero on Saturday evening and a technician came over in a hour. Bryan was very professional and handled the plumbing issue in about 30 minutes. This is my 2nd time using rooter hero and would recommend their service.

reviews.author: Manoj varughese
reviews.text: "I had a great experience with Rooter Hero Plumbing when they came out to fix my kitchen sink. The technician, Diego Ruiz, was amazing—he took the time to explain every step of the process so I knew exactly what was being done. The work was finished exactly when promised, and the price was very fair compared to other quotes I received. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for honest, high-quality plumbing work. Thank you, Diego!"

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Abilene
plumbers.address: 2929 S 1st St, Abilene, TX 79605, USA

reviews.author: Bruce Amdal
reviews.text: Grady and Juan did an excellent job!  They were very good about keeping me informed about what was happening.  I would definitely recommend them for your plumbing needs.  Becca in the office was friendly and very helpful as well.

reviews.author: Jen
reviews.text: Grady did a fantastic job today. He arrived very early, which was great. It only took him about 30 minutes to install the new garbage disposal. No more leaks. I appreciate the service.

reviews.author: Maria Rodriguez
reviews.text: I had a very good experience with this company. They were very nice, professional, and didn't take long at all. Price was pretty good too. I've called them before for previous issues and had a good experience with them in then too. Pretty sure mr. rooter is going to be my plumbing go to when I need something fixed.

reviews.author: Gerald V
reviews.text: Anthony did a wonderful job, working on my place. Very knowledgeable and helpful. Older heater was out of code, it was very much needed.

reviews.author: Karen LaBrenz
reviews.text: Grady was excellent at describing the problem and using ingenuity, and problem solving to fix my issues.  He was very kind with my dogs that were too friendly jumping on him.  I will ask for this repair technician by name when using Mr Rooter.  Also the young lady that makes the appointments handled my needs with kindness and respect.  Thank you Mr Rooter for making my experience using my   Warranty Service pain free.

plumbers.name: Expert Services - Plumbing, Heating, Air & Electrical

reviews.author: Gilmar Gatto Filho
reviews.text:
My experience was great from the beginning. In the discovery part, they took the time to review, test, and plan the best option for my situation. I feel like they were on my side, looking for the best that fits my expectations and giving a professional opinion.

The execution of the plan was excellent. In my case, a few things on my front lawn needed to be disturbed, but they did their best to preserve most of it without compromising the service that needed to be done.

Highly recommend, take the time to talk with them and ask all the questions that are needed to make the best decision

reviews.author: Alyxandra Tenario
reviews.text: Chandler was great at servicing our tankless water heater and explaining the very likely consequences of not having a water softener installed alongside the tankless heater. He was quickly able to address all other plumbing concerns, as well as installing the water softener, all of which was unexpected on the initial call. Additionally , he helped to coordinate another specialist to come inspect our drainage system for potential repairs. All in all, I greatly appreciated his thorough response, informative/educational conversation and friendly banter while he worked.

reviews.author: Scott Taylor
reviews.text: Woke up to a leaky water heater, they came the next day, less than 12 hours later. Hunter was AWESOME! He gave us tons of options, shared the pros and cons of each, and wasn't pushy at all on which option we should choose. He took care of everything, was clean, polite, and professional! Would absolutely recommend and will 100% be our first call if we need help again in the future!

reviews.author: Debra Shannon
reviews.text:
The technicians Cort and Hunter did an Awesome job working hard all day. All of your technicians went the extra mile to help with financing and removing and installing the heater. They removed the hot water heater and put it back after the utility room was cleaned. Your company should be proud to have all of them working for you. I will call on your company for future needs and recommend them to friends and co-workers.
Thank you for a job well done.

reviews.author: Tracy George
reviews.text: David from Expert Services found the leak in our utility room and carefully checked our water system, explaining how everything worked and restarting our water softener and filter to make sure everything worked properly. He swapped out our kitchen faucet for a Moen faucet that has been a dream. The garbage disposal he installed has been powerful, but whisper quiet. David did excellent quality work quickly, sourced hard to find parts, and stayed late to finish. Outstanding plumber and just a nice caring person.

plumbers.name: Scott Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: 7734 Madison Blvd STE 119, Huntsville, AL 35806, USA

reviews.author: J Axtell
reviews.text: We were referred to Scott Plumbing by our neighbors and we are so thankful!! We had our 2 kitchen sinks and dishwasher backing up and they sent Brandon the day I called them to fix it!! Brandon was awesome. He knew the exact problem and took care of it quickly and efficiently. He was very thorough/documented the whole repair with photos. From start to finish, thank you Scott’s Plumbing and Brandon for your prompt and excellent service!!

reviews.author: Olda Phillips
reviews.text: Scott Plumbing personnel was very responsive.  We had a busted pipe in our yard.  Bobby and his colleague identified the issue and corrected the problem. They explained everything they would do to identify the issue and also advised of the proposed costs.  The team was friendly, informed and very professional.  The cost was very reasonable. We highly recommend. Will use Scott Plumbing again

reviews.author: Laura Jevitt
reviews.text: I was able to get an appointment right away. Keith and Logan showed up right on time, both very friendly and got right to work. Very knowledgeable and explained/showed me what the problem was and how they fixed it. I thought the price was very reasonable for both jobs, too. Highly, highly recommend and I will definitely use Scott Plumbing in the future!

reviews.author: Scott Lahoda
reviews.text: Called Scott at 11am, had a tech to me by 2, and new hot water heater installed by 5. Absolutely incredible and for a fair price. Best thing was the tech. Smart and a great guy. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Carolyn Figueroa
reviews.text: Brandon came out to my house promptly and was professional and knowledgeable. We made a plan to fix my hose and will be out next week to repair it due to my needing to wait for payday. He was willing to repair it right then, however if I hadn’t needed to wait. The price seemed reasonable-it’s not an easy fix.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 333 W 2230 N Ste 320, Provo, UT 84604, USA

reviews.author: Daniel Walker
reviews.text: Matthew was great.  I was under the impression I’d have to replace my disposal. He was very professional and did a great jo.  Thank you so much.

reviews.author: Eric Smith
reviews.text: We had a leak in our water main and noticed wet carpet. The service team came out, identified the problem and resolved it quickly. They were professional and the customer service was incredible!  Matthew worked well past the end of his normal shift to make sure we were taken care of. I would recommend them to anyone!

reviews.author: Mason Mathis
reviews.text: I called several plumbing companies, and Quick Quality Plumbing was the only one able to get someone out immediately. Jaren arrived promptly and was fantastic from start to finish. His communication was on point—he walked me through the entire process and kept me updated every step of the way. The quality of his work was exceptional, and he made everything easy to understand. I would highly recommend Quick Quality Plumbing to anyone looking for a reliable plumber and will definitely be using them again in the future.

reviews.author: Sierra Wilcox
reviews.text: Our service from Roto Rooter was absolutely amazing! Our toilet broke after hours, and they were quick to respond and temporarily fix our issue, and then come back a week later to install a new toilet. Our plumber, Matthew, was absolutely wonderful and did an amazing, clean job!

reviews.author: JaNae Pyle
reviews.text: We were very thankful that Roto Rooter came to help us with our water pipe leak. Both Matt and Roy took great care of us and stayed until the issue was fixed. Again, very much appreciated!! 💕

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 4641 Montgomery Ave Ste 518, Bethesda, MD 20814, USA

reviews.author: Benito Gomez
reviews.text:
Hosea was the plumber that replaced my water heater. He was really professional, transparent and honest about the work that needed to be done.
He was really generous with the pricing of the service that he performed and communicated everything with me clearly. Hosea definitely went above and beyond with his service in a timely manner.
Excellent service that far surpassed my expectations Roto Rooter plumbing will be my go-to shop now going forward for all my plumbing needs.Thank you for your expertise and service Hosea and Roto Rooter🔧 😁

reviews.author: Gene McCloskey
reviews.text: They were very quick to respond and assess the situation.  When a part needed to be special ordered Eric was very communicative and explained why and what costs would be involved.  The work was done quickly and done well.  I will definitely insist on having Eric do future work on my house.

reviews.author: Tam Nonea
reviews.text: Roto-Rooter was able to assist in a timely manner with an unfortunate plumbing issue I had as a new homeowner. The folks that helped resolve the issue(s) are very informative and weren’t pressuring to make a quick decision/sale. I was always informed of what was happening prior to and no actions were done without my agreeance. Special shout out to Raven, she did her thang replacing a cracked drainage pipe that was nearly 7ft long!!

reviews.author: Tim Furbee
reviews.text: Thank you to Roto-Rooter and their plumber Raven. They were fast, polite and got completed the replacement of our main water shutoff did valve in a total of 4 hours. That include the initial call, dispatching a tech and completing the job. 5/5 will recommend in the future. Raven was also a 5/5 I will for sure request her again.

reviews.author: Cecile Djoumessi
reviews.text:
I would like to sincerely thank Kyle Wesley, Williams and Hannah from Roto-Rooter Restoration Services for their outstanding support during my water damage restoration process.
From the very beginning, they were professional, responsive, and extremely helpful. They promptly removed the wet drywall, handled the necessary water mitigation work, and carefully moved items during the pack-out process to prevent further damage.
What truly stood out was their guidance beyond the basic restoration work. They:

Helped coordinate a professional company for the specialty pack-out of valuable items

Assisted me through the insurance claim process with clarity and patience

Provided advice on how to find qualified contractors for flooring, drywall installation, and other repairs

Answered my questions thoroughly and kept me informed throughout the process

Dealing with water damage can be overwhelming, but Kyle and Hannah made the experience much more manageable. Their professionalism, communication, and genuine concern for doing the job correctly gave me confidence during a very stressful situation.

I highly recommend Roto-Rooter Restoration Services, and especially Kyle, Williams and Hannah, to anyone in need of water restoration services.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1077 W Boylston St Unit 201, Worcester, MA 01606, USA

reviews.author: Raquel Jimenez MUA
reviews.text:
Excellent service!
I had a great experience with Bryan Lawrence. He was punctual, professional, and very knowledgeable. He explained everything clearly, worked efficiently, and made sure everything was spotless before leaving. It’s hard to find someone so reliable and respectful of your time and home. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of plumbing services!

reviews.author: Kira Slisli
reviews.text: Thank you for the great work! Oleksandr completed everything very quickly — after I called the company, he arrived at my home in Springfield in less than an hour. I really appreciate the fast and high-quality service.

reviews.author: Rick Onofrey
reviews.text:
I called Roto Rooter when my plumbing backed up and I could not clear the clog with a toilet snake. They were out within an hour and had to remove the toilet to clear the clog. After snaking it with an industrial sized snake they cleared the clog which was all the way out to the septic tank. They replaced the toilet and left everything nice and neat (and easy for me to bleach).

The initial price was over $1000, but he gave me a discount.

Overall, I am very pleased with the service.

reviews.author: Allie Stoddard
reviews.text: Of course needed emergency services on a Saturday night and Jude came out to problem solve the issue for us at 10pm! He was professional, kind, patient and understanding of a accidental but difficult situation. We really appreciate him getting our plumbing back up and running in a pinch. We had guests staying over so I can't say enough about how much we appreciated the plumbing rescue!! Thanks again.

reviews.author: Lou DiFruscio
reviews.text:
The entire experience  was  seamless. We had an urgent situation , a human picked up the phone when we called and we had Jason at our house within 90 minutes. This was in the evening.  He immediately diagnosed the problem, went  about fixing it,  was courteous and cleaned up before he left
Not surprising these guys have been in business so long with that type of great  service!

plumbers.name: YES! Air Conditioning, Heating, Plumbing and Electric
plumbers.address: 765 S 100 E, Provo, UT 84606, USA

reviews.author: Craig Moore
reviews.text: Our 24 K generator had not been operating properly for at least a year. It wasn’t installed by Yes and the company that I purchased it from was no longer in business. I discovered that Yes is a licensed distributor for Generac generators. We have been a loyal customer of there’s for years for our HVAC. I would never recommend any other company. Our tech Tony was on time, very professional, and very personable. Throughout the service he kept me appraised of every thing he found that needed attention. The service was excellent. The generator runs like new and I’m excited that Yes will be here every year for its annual service.

reviews.author: Dave Henderson
reviews.text:
Great experience with YES! so far. Our furnace went out, they came the next morning (Saturday) and it’s now working great.

I also really appreciated the time that Sawyer spent explaining things to us. Very informative and helpful in helping us make a good decision about what we may need in the future. He was great!

We will use them again.

reviews.author: Frank Tello
reviews.text: Sterling came out to do a tune-up on our HVAC system and did an excellent job. He was friendly, had a great attitude, and took the time to keep me informed throughout the entire process. He explained what he was checking, answered questions clearly, and was professional from start to finish. I’d gladly have him back and would recommend him to anyone needing HVAC service.

reviews.author: Tom Williams
reviews.text: I’m installing a new oven and found that the electrical needs for the new oven exceed what I had available. I called Yes! And had an electrician at my house within the hour. Kayden Dooley, who has done electrical work at my house before, arrived and knew both my needs and the house. He got right to work and he was joined by George Webb. Together, they ran a new electrical line, upgraded my circuits and made quick work of it so there is no delay in my moving quickly ahead with my project. I felt great seeing Kayden again.  It’s like having my own personal electrician on call.

reviews.author: Shauna Mayer
reviews.text: Sterling was professional, kind and informative. He worked fast and was very helpful. He made clear the issues with my furnace and gave me great options. I definitely recommend Yes.

plumbers.name: Admiral Plumbing Heating and Cooling
plumbers.address: 475 E 1000 S #202, Pleasant Grove, UT 84062, USA

reviews.author: Braxton Miller
reviews.text: I had a life changing disaster happen on my property but John was supper awesome and was very personal with me and made it easier for me to swallow they pill. He made sure my property was taken care of and helped me save money wherever we could. He ended up saving me 6,000 over all on the job they did for me. They also did great work and were very fast. Thanks

reviews.author: victor ramirez
reviews.text: Justin Fillmore was a great and informative technician. Admiral was able to get Justin here within a couple hours to help with a fountain we have in the backyard that was broken leaking out water. Justin helped shut off the water and provide useful information on the water system in our home. We appreciate all of the information that Justin provided and the quickness of him getting here/the service.

reviews.author: A.J. Rounds
reviews.text: We love using Admireal at Keyrenter Provo.  They've been a great partner for years.  Thanks for helping out with our HVAC needs.  Prompt, professional, and Economical.   You guys are awesome!

reviews.author: Blake and Laurissa Jones Bills
reviews.text:
We just had Nick come out and fix a water heater that was under warranty. The pilot light went out and it was having issues. He figured it out fast and got it up and running smoothly in no time and the warranty covered it all.
He was so nice and professional and explained their annual service plans. Knowledgeable, professional, and kind. Thank you for getting our hot water back Nick!

reviews.author: Jeffrey J
reviews.text:
Competitive price, good HVAC work. I trust they aren’t trying to over charge.

Gavin installed my new heat pump and furnace. He’s also the guy who comes to service it. This “installer is also servicer” method lets installers see any issues so they can improve their craft. Haven’t had any issues.

plumbers.name: JT Services
plumbers.address: 17311 U.S. Rte 66, Claremore, OK 74017, USA

reviews.author: Tiffany Ridenour
reviews.text: We noticed our septic tank backing up. We called JT services and they sent Keeton out to pump it for us. He was very professional and answered all our questions. He gladly explained how our septic system worked. Highly recommend Keeton at JT services.

reviews.author: Andy Romsa
reviews.text: The folks from JT Services were the best. They dealt with rock, soil and terrain issues. They worked out solutions to each problem and accomplished the job in an exemplary and professional manner. The finished project is great and they went above and beyond to get us back to a fully functional treatment system. Thanks so much, y’all are the best, from the staff at headquarters to the installers in the field.

reviews.author: Eldon Riley
reviews.text:
Had an emergency backup and they were there within hours.  Jake went above and beyond to clear the blockage which turned out to be caused by a previous plumber's broken snake in the line.  Jake used critical thinking and ingenuity in devising a method to retrieve it.
Also a shoutout to Quincy who came and pumped the septic tank during all of this.
Office people were very pleasant to talk to and everyone was professional and friendly.  Thanks for saving the day!!!

reviews.author: Aaron Peters
reviews.text: We are highly impressed with JT services. From the moment we called and spoke to customer services and had an appointment made everything went smoothly. Keaton came to our house. Was extremely thorough and knowledgeable. He gave us multiple options that we can do he helped us out tremendously. I highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Chad Costes
reviews.text: Great company with wonderful staff. Everyone is friendly, professional and knowledgeable. Was very thorough throughout the entire process and explained everything that was going on. Definitely recommended!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 650 E Terra Cotta Ave #110, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Esther O
reviews.text: Jonathan was super helpful with my plumbing issue and made sure there were no leaks after the job was done. He was very kind and worked quickly and professionally. I would recommend him to anyone who needs an understanding plumber.

reviews.author: Mary Hawkins
reviews.text: Bruno & Steve were very helpful not only at talking me through what caused our main line slowness/backup, but also daily preventative measures. We were also able to talk through bigger picture needs down the line. Our home is an investment, and they were easy to talk to about protecting it. Never felt like I was getting upsold.

reviews.author: Epic Battle Reenactments
reviews.text: Roto-Rooter was swift to respond to my request. The technician they sent, Azzi, arrived promptly on site and demonstrated his skill and expertise at handling the fixes and installation required. He was dedicated to completing the task on my behalf and overall was a pleasant interaction. I am very satsified with his work and the experience given!

reviews.author: Eric Ohlrich
reviews.text:
Our house has had issues with roots clogging drainage pipes for years so we have had a few different companies come and resolve the issue, Roto-Rooter was very thorough, Israel and Mike were very professional, kind, and patient. They explained everything they were doing and why, even giving us information about our pipes and issues that could arise later on. Israel and Mike didn’t just stop once the clog was cleared, they went through the pipes multiple times in order to guarantee the pipes were completely clear and told us the further steps to take.

The price was a bit steep, it was around 720$ for them to do this service which hurt, but unfortunately it wasn’t too surprising.

Overall, overpriced, but they were very knowledgeable and took the job seriously and worked through it thoroughly. Will be using Roto-Rooter again, after our wallet recovers 😅

reviews.author: Sagar Mehta
reviews.text: This is from Saturday morning. Bruno, Steven & Kyle came to check in the drainage issue. After going to the root cleaning in the pipeline process they were able to pull the roots and waste. The pipeline has got some real issue that merges into the city sewer. All them tried really hard and put in 5+ hours of work. They are helpful and I recommend them for your services

plumbers.name: Black Plumbing Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 4402 S Danville Dr, Abilene, TX 79605, USA

reviews.author: Missy Pu
reviews.text:
On 4 Dec, my home warranty insurance notified Black Plumbing about a leaky faucet.  Black Plumbing called the same day and made appointment for 5 Dec.  Josh (the attending tech) called to inform me he would be later.  That was GREATLY appreciated, respectful and just good customer service.  Josh came over diagnosed the problem (which had to be rectified the following business day).  Mind you, this faucet was not for daily use so the Monday appt was ok.  Josh discussed the issue and gave me options.  He left but the faucet was leaking , I called Josh and he had to come back to make pipe adjustments.  The leaking was ceased.
He returned Monday to replaced the faucet.
The faucet was pretty much identical to the original one.
I am very satisfied with the service I received from Josh.
He was very professional, courteous and showed no signs of disgust because he had to return.
Thanks Josh

reviews.author: courtney dodd
reviews.text: Black Plumbing Heat & Air has been excellent to work with! Thanks to Chad L., we got our master shower fixed! It was a new construction mistake and our worst nightmare. He knew exactly what we needed and how to get it done! We were so pleased with the service and attention to detail that we hired them for the plumbing (another fix) and mini splint in our mother-in-law addition. Everything has ran smoothly thanks to Chad staying on top of it all! Thanks for the great service! Don’t hesitate to call Black Plumbing Heating and Air!

reviews.author: Cesar Rodriguez jr
reviews.text:
Huge thank you to the team at Black Plumbing for coming out and fixing our drain so quickly and professionally. Everything is running smooth now!

Also, shoutout to the very friendly dispatcher — I believe her name was Lilly she was extremely helpful and made the whole process easy from the start.

We truly appreciate the great service and would highly recommend Black Plumbing to any business needing reliable plumbing work. Thank you again!

reviews.author: Brent Brazell
reviews.text: I’ve been doing business with Black Plumbing in commercial and residential for years, and they’ve consistently gone above and beyond to deliver top-quality work at the exact price they quote—no surprises. Everyone I’ve dealt with there is friendly, personable, and incredibly knowledgeable. I can’t recommend them highly enough. If you’re looking for a reliable plumber who’s fair on pricing, shows up on time as promised, and truly knows their craft, Black Plumbing is the company to call.

reviews.author: Kim New
reviews.text: We've had Black Plumbing out3 different times, the most recent was Friday, February 20th. 1st fix a pipe that was causing my washing machine to overflow(had a different company come out but never told us this was an issue), 2nd- run a camera to check on what was causing toilet to not flush correctly, 3 rd -  fix the issue that was found with toilets. We've always given a quote of the cost of repairs. If they finish the job sooner, the price is adjusted. Amazing young men came each time. Sweet and explained everything to us.

plumbers.name: 615 Plumbing
plumbers.address: 475 Metroplex Dr #108, Nashville, TN 37211, USA

reviews.author: jenny Cruse
reviews.text: We were able to get a quote and same day service. Chris was an awesome technician and ran a whole new water line for our new Refrigerator in just a couple of hours. Excellent work and service. Highly recommend 👌

reviews.author: Candace
reviews.text: 615 Plumbing did a great job for us. They came out quickly, fixed our plumbing issue, and installed a new faucet. The technician was professional, friendly, and made sure everything was working perfectly before leaving. We really appreciated the quick response and quality work. I would definitely recommend them and will call them again if we need plumbing help.

reviews.author: Marina Barisic
reviews.text: Caleb came out to service my home and I am beyond grateful for him! He first started with a full diagnosis of the quality of my pipes which was amazing! I love that now I am fully aware of the integrity of my plumbing system. Next, he got down to the root issue of the call: a clog in my main line! Within an hour, Caleb had resolved the issue. I never once felt like I was being pushed to buy… Caleb showed professionalism and patience with me during the whole process. While I decided what to do, he patiently waited for me and never once pushed me to make a decision. Seriously can not say enough good things about this technician. He could have rushed our appointment as it was his last call of the day but no, he literally addressed every issue with pure knowledge and interest. I am truly shocked at how lucky I got to have Caleb as my tech. Thank you 615 plumbing and Caleb for taking a huge weight off my shoulders.

reviews.author: Tinà Clàrk
reviews.text:
Called because I need a flange for my toilet. They set an appointment that same day. The sent Caleb, he was very informative,  pleasant and very professional. He gave me more than one option of what needed to be done to fix the problem. He answered any question I asked him. He did an excellent. Thank You Caleb!
I would recommend 615 Plumbing!

reviews.author: Mallory Day
reviews.text: We had a great experience with 615 plumbing. We had a leak and were able to get someone to come out the same day, which was amazing! Max was extremely helpful and kind. The service was fast, efficient, and friendly. We would definitely recommend this company, and will use them again.

plumbers.name: Tidy Tank Plumbing, Sewer, and Septic
plumbers.address: 740 McArdle Dr, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Kevin Morrison
reviews.text: Great experience with Tidy Tank Septic! Brad handled my septic pumping and was incredibly helpful. Not only did he get the job done smoothly, but he also took the time to explain my whole setup and what to watch for over time. I left the visit knowing a lot more about my system and confident about when I’ll need service next. I’ll absolutely be calling them again. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Hyung J. Kim, MD
reviews.text: They performed residential septic tank service at my house. They did a wonderful job. They were professional and courteous. I highly recommend Ron's Tidy Septic Tank Service!!

reviews.author: Sabine Vosters
reviews.text: Was contacted by Tidy Tank Septic reminding me that the last service had been almost three years ago, and did I want to schedule a service. Set up an appointment for the very next day. They arrived at the scheduled time and got the job done thoroughly and efficiently. They explained what they were doing and documented everything in pictures and on the invoice. Their prices have gone up quite a bit since our last appointment, but I guess it's on par with every other price increase in the country. A very professional experience all around, I would definitely recommend this business to anyone looking for septic tank maintenance.

reviews.author: Terry A
reviews.text: I called Tidy Tank plumbing because my sump pump line broke. Dan was here within 45 minutes. He looked at the obvious issue but then investigated further to make sure that there were no other related issues such as frozen drain lines, etc. He went through all of the options from doing a simple repair to replace it with a top quality sump pump and backup system. He did not push me in any direction nor try to upsell me. Once the choice was made he had all of the equipment on the truck, completed the work, tested the system, and cleaned up. I've always had very good luck with their septic service and now I can add their plumbing service to that.

reviews.author: angelique archos solhi
reviews.text: TJ was polite and very professional.  He was even better at his job!  He replaced a disposal and faucet as well as reconfiguring the entire pipe system. He explained everything that needed to be done and was quick and efficient.  I will recommend him to my friends and family. I will also use his services in my new home going forward. Excellent!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Drain Service
plumbers.address: 4207 Mike Padgett Hwy Unit A, Augusta, GA 30906, USA

reviews.author: Ryan Burgess
reviews.text:
I want to say how awesome working with Roto-Rooter was. Has a pretty big problem that then turned into a major problem when the 1 collapse in my kitchen drain line became 4....

But the techs they sent to my house, Anthony and Brandon and the other 2s who's names i don't remember were awesome! They answered every silly question I had when I didn't understand what a part was, or the direction we needed to go cause it just seemed like everything wrong in a concrete slab drain pipe went wrong at once.

But working from home and starting a new job I was worried about noise level among other things, but man aside from the tile hammer the first day, could barely hear them! And that isnt a fault in the tile hammer, work was kind enough to give me off that day since we knew it would be loud!

But they really came in clutch and helped me with a massive problem I was having and prevented me from spending a bunch of money just to have the same problem again!

100% the entire team I worked with was fantastic! Can't recommend enough!

PS: before someone says they didn't restore my concrete out front I requested they not as I plan to remove that walk way, makes it easier if its precut!

reviews.author: Tony Graham
reviews.text: Mike Vance from Roto-Rooter did a great job repairing leaking sink. Great response time and quality service. Mike also cleaned up the area after the repair. Thank you!

reviews.author: Janet Broeckel
reviews.text:
Today is Valentine’s Day and I felt bad for calling somebody out for a backed up toilet and shower on this special day. But I called Roto-Rooter and Cullen Sutherland came to my rescue. After assessing the problem, he went straight to work…And what seemed like minutes … he had everything taken care of!
I would definitely recommend Roto-Rooter in Augusta , Georgia who also services my area in Aiken, South Carolina. It started this morning at 8 AM when I talked to Miss Alexis… Who was such a delight on the phone. She actually heard what I was saying and said I will send somebody out there today! (In a very cheerful voice I might add) How wonderful it is that you can call somebody and actually get a real live person on the phone. My whole experience was wonderful! When you are a senior citizen, those little things are the things that mean the most.
Thank you so much for taking such good care of me!
Jan B
Aiken, SC

reviews.author: Brian Ozden
reviews.text: Ruan was amazing!  Went above and beyond to get us back.  Without question,  he made our family a priority and did a great job.  Work quality was also amazing.  Ruan identified (he had to dig really deep and move shrubs to find the issue) and fixed the leak quickly and effectively.  100% satisfied!

reviews.author: Yoda 10
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I couldn’t be more impressed with Roto-Rooter and the amazing job they did on my kitchen replacement and garbage disposal installation. The technician was professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to make sure everything was done correctly and cleanly.

The pricing was very reasonable, and I truly appreciated the military discount, which shows they value their customers. The work quality exceeded my expectations, and everything is functioning perfectly.

I will absolutely use Roto-Rooter again in the future and highly recommend them to anyone needing reliable, high-quality plumbing work. Thank you for a great experience!

plumbers.name: Eric's Plumbing & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 647 S 1800 E, Spanish Fork, UT 84660, USA

reviews.author: Natalie Garrett
reviews.text:
We recently had extensive plumbing repairs done on our home, and I couldn’t be more satisfied with the entire experience. From the initial inspection to the final walkthrough, the team was professional, knowledgeable, and transparent about the scope of work and costs involved.

The quality of workmanship was excellent. Everything was left clean and orderly, and we’ve had no issues since the repairs were completed. It’s a huge relief to know our plumbing system is now reliable and functioning properly.

I highly recommend their services to anyone needing plumbing work, especially larger or more complicated repairs. Their professionalism, expertise, and commitment to customer satisfaction truly set them apart.
Weston went above and beyond to make sure communication was always a priority. I was extremely impressed.

reviews.author: KathiJo Smith
reviews.text: Hunter did an excellent job. He was so easy to work with and was very detailed in what needed to happen.  He not only did a great job, but he eased my nerves of the pressure in hiring a company to do a huge plumbing/sewer job. I would hire back Eric's Plumbing again. I would request Hunter but many  from Eric's actually worked  their tails off at my house, even the owner, Eric.  If I had more plumbing needs, I would take any of them. The office people were detailed and easy to work with as well.  Thanks so much!

reviews.author: Christopher Sanchez
reviews.text:
Hands down the best in the business.
We live in Ogden and Eric's plumbing and drain cleaning still serviced us and provided top notch services all around! We were blessed to work directly with Eric, the owner, to establish the right approach to our plumbing needs. His delivery was over reached and veryuch appreciated! We never expected anyone to go to such leaps and bonds to help us get the direction we needed to go. Without the pressure of going with his company. With such exceptional customer service and garentees on deliverables we just had to go with them. And we couldn't be happier. Our major issues that were going on for a month were handled in less than 8 hours day work! Remarkable work and services!
If you're looking for the best, look no further. Eric's plumbing and drain cleaning is your best stop!
Thanks Eric, Ian our tech and the rest of Eric's plumbing and drain cleaning team!

reviews.author: Kathryn O
reviews.text:
This is the BEST plumbing company. I wish I'd found them years ago. Richie (along with Levi, Ian, Mason) installed a liner in my main sewer line and did several other needed repairs. I also talked with Eric the owner who helped troubleshoot an issue with such kindness and expertise. These guys, along with their office staff (Dee and Angie), are excellent at what they do. Their customer service is second to none. AND, they stand by their work. Finding a trusted plumber is a relief.

I am grateful to be on their annual maintenance plan. Many thanks to Eric's Plumbing & Drain Cleaning!

reviews.author: Retired
reviews.text: Weston came and did a fantastic job. Very nice and even hauled the old items away. He replaced my sink and faucet and garbage disposal. Also switched to one drain from two.

plumbers.name: Elek Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2186 Community Dr, Bath, PA 18014, USA

reviews.author: Erik Derbak
reviews.text: Amazing experience.  Elvis was extremely professional and explained everything that he was doing along the way.  I am amazed that I called at 1:00 today, Elvis was on site by 2:30 and my leaking hot water heater was replaced and running perfectly by 6:00.  You have new customer for life.  Well done.  Thank you.

reviews.author: Mark & Daune Wilson
reviews.text: Outstanding fast,, polite and fair service. 4th I have used Elek Plumbing and they are wonderful.  Orion was my technician today and he was quick but also made sure that the next step that I need done was addressed.

reviews.author: Katelyn McMurtrie
reviews.text: I recently had a frozen pipe burst in my house. I called Elek plumbing and Elvis came out to my house and was extremely professional and friendly. He explained the problem that caused the pipe to break as well as explained everything he was going to do. He replaced all the pipes in the area of the outside hose bib as they were old and likely to fail as did the pipe that already burst. As well as installing a new shut off valve and frost free pressure releasing hose faucet to help prevent this from happening again. Once he was done, he did a walk through with me of all the work he completed as well as show me the piping that he took out of the wall and showed me exactly where all the faulty solder joints were. He even called me after he left to ensure that I had a space heater set up to ensure that the pipe didn’t freeze again while I waited for my wall and insulation to be repaired. He was fast, efficient and, friendly. I am super appreciative of Elvis and Elek as they helped me during this time and will definitively be using them in the future. I recommend Elek to anyone that needs emergency or non-emergency plumbing work.

reviews.author: Erin Goga
reviews.text:
I’ll try to keep this review short although I could easily write pages of positivity and accolades. I’m currently at a friend’s home recovering from a serious femur fracture.  My house sitter called to let me know that all drains in the house were clogging and the toilet would not flush.  I called Elek (now my “go to” plumbing company)and they promptly sent Jody to check out the issues.  She found the problems and while on FaceTime, clearly explained everything to me along with solutions.  Some relatively simple fixes and others a bit more time consuming.  Both the toilet, bathroom sink and kitchen sink have had off and on problems for at least 18 years with quick fixes by other companies that did not last.  Finally Jody solved the mystery!  Knowing my situation (needing to use a walker and cane)she suggested a comfort height toilet (which I’ve never heard of), and to replace my non-working garbage disposal which was a big reason my kitchen sink drain never fully drained.  Jody was patient with me and helped me to choose the toilet and disposal from afar.  Within days she was back to install the toilet (it arrived from a big box store cracked) so she took care of that calmly and went and got another toilet from Elek’s warehouse with the same specs the same day! All sinks and a new toilet running well!  Talk about above and beyond!!! Her kindness, knowledge, ability to think on her feet, and patience were a gift during a difficult time in my life.  Thank you Jody and the staff at Elek as well.
Erin Goga

reviews.author: Mysterioso77
reviews.text:
I recently spent time with Jody and orion while they were here to do a plumbing job and installed a new toilet.
They were very prompt, polite and extremely efficient.
This was my first experience with Elek Plumbing and I would definitely recommend them for any plumbing job.
Excellent Job!!      Thank you!

plumbers.name: Champion Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2350 S Midwest Blvd Suite 4, Midwest City, OK 73110, USA

reviews.author: Harry Xie
reviews.text: The quote estimated is reasonable, honest and professional. Most importance is sent all the plumbers are professional, responsible, friendly and enthusiastic. As your customer  I am very satisfied you plumbers job. They are all excellent. I’m going to count on your company as our plumbing doctor forever for all my properties. Besides, I definitely will refer you Champion Plumbing to all my friends whenever they have plumbing problems. Thanks again for all the jobs Thomas, Steve and Eric did for me.

reviews.author: Shawni Williams
reviews.text: Thomas was respectful, and very diligent! You rarely see that anymore! Reminded me of older men in my family, not afraid of hard work, never complained and was very quiet and quick! I was sick, and they got the work done, quietly, efficiently and quick so I could rest, also, i was comfortable leaving Thomas to deal with it, I actually fell asleep! It felt like family, comfortable. Im very peticular, and can be very critical, i also value quality and customer service, greatly. If someone is even a little rude, im not using that company again. But Thomas was great, I'm a champion customer for life!

reviews.author: Adam G
reviews.text: Champion Plumbing has been great. We initially had them out to fix a running roilet, and ended up using them to fix our water pressure issue and clean our tankless heater as well. Thomas is friendly and kept me in the loop on what was being done as he did it. We'll continue working with these guys in the future.

reviews.author: Matthew Puckett
reviews.text: It's never fun to have a plumbing leak. Thankfully, Thomas with Champion Plumbing was my technician. He was prompt, courteous, and extremely experienced. My problem arose from the rushed work of a previous company/ individual. Thomas diagnosed the problem quickly and effectively. He took the time to educate me and explain his work. Thomas went above and beyond, where others failed.  Thank you for your professionalism and character Thomas. Have a blessed day. Sincerely Matthew.

reviews.author: Michael McFarland
reviews.text:
Thomas came out and got us all taken care of!  We had a shower that wasn’t getting hot and a main boiler that was leaking so much water our walls were soaking it up.

I called Champion Plumbing and they were out the next day.  They might not be the least expensive but the service, professionalism and guarantee they provide definitely makes me feel better.

plumbers.name: Fly Plumbing & HVAC
plumbers.address: 584 Chaddick Dr, Wheeling, IL 60090, USA

reviews.author: Catherine Ortiz
reviews.text:
Great service. Respectful to our property and cleaned up after work was completed.
We needed an outdoor spigot replaced and they recommended an anti-freeze spigot which I had no idea was an option.
They send us pics of the completed job and accommodated a service latch.
Shawn did a great job. This is our second time using their services and they do not disappoint. I recommend Fly Plumbing.

reviews.author: Michael Hansen
reviews.text: A very positive experience with Fly Plumbing. The company is always very responsive and goes above & beyond. I had a back up in my basement on a Sunday evening. I was able to easily reach them and set up a next day appointment (they had offered same day service, but the water had gone down). I requested Adrian (he had been out before) and they accommodated my request without issue. Adrian and Ben came out and addressed the issue. They were communicative, knowledgeable, kind and attentive. They remedied my issue & left my home clean. I highly recommend Adrian, Ben & Fly Plumbing!

reviews.author: Courtney Biewald
reviews.text: Miguel and Adrian were amazing. They really helped explain the process of everything they did and tips for the future. I will 100% be a returning customer and will be recommending them to everyone in the area! Thank you again! Excellent service.

reviews.author: yaakov sugarman
reviews.text: Adrian was amazing! He was very thorough and a pleasure to work with. He explained everything clearly, and I would definitely use him again.

reviews.author: Manny Arenivas
reviews.text: Got some work done on a few drains in my basement that were overflowing. Mikhail and Mickey did a great job getting everything sealed and cleaned. Very polite, friendly, and efficient. I will only go with this crew for any job moving forward. 5 stars.

plumbers.name: Agentis Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2678 Butztown Rd, Bethlehem, PA 18017, USA

reviews.author: Austin Kobordo
reviews.text: Tyler and Zach did a phenomenal job at my place. Very knowledgable.  I called around 12 PM on a Friday and they were at my door within an hour. I had two clogs one in my main line and one in my drain leaving the kitchen. They came in with a camera and a snake and got it done in just a few hours. They even refitted my trap under my laundry sink that had a minor leak. And replaced a plug on my sewer for easy access.  It was also a very reasonable price. Thank you Agentis for the great service!

reviews.author: Judith Malitsch
reviews.text:
Agentis plumbers are always courteous, pleasant, professional and respectful! Jake and Norbert this time, (and Jack last visit), were patient with all my questions  and    were great at explaining thoroughly what was being done. And Jake immediately emailed the bill to me so I didn't have to call.
Great clean-up, too! Nothing left behind!

Always a pleasure dealing with Agentis plumbing, a most reliable business!

reviews.author: Alan Allegra
reviews.text: Our appointment was for late afternoon or the next day, but Patrick showed up not long after we called, to unclog our tub drain. He worked hard but had to call in their drain expert, and they were able to clear an extremely stubborn clog that even chemicals could not clear. They were very polite, professional, and careful to keep our home clean and sanitary. We have been trusting Agentis for decades. They give you an estimate up front and prices are reasonable, including appropriate discounts.

reviews.author: Patricia Mangiaruga
reviews.text: We had Joseph and his partner come to our son’s house at 2819 Willow St. yesterday to replace a toilet. It wasn’t an easy job as it was built on concrete with a metal plate put on top. They did a phenomenal job putting the toilet in and made sure it was a secure fit. We are extremely happy with them and their work. They were very professional and friendly. From this experience, I will be using Agentis for all our plumbing needs. They are a great asset to the company!

reviews.author: Chris V
reviews.text: We had issues with a backup from our kitchen sink leading to a clog in our basement sink. Our technician Luke was extremely knowledgeable and was able to fix the problem immediately. Luke and the Agentis team were very reassuring and responsive. Highly recommend!

plumbers.name: Heil Plumbing & HVAC
plumbers.address: 1162 Taft St, Rockville, MD 20850, USA

reviews.author: Troy Wheeler
reviews.text: Otto and his crew were very professional, respectful, timely, and efficient. Otto explained the entire main waterline replacement before they started and stuck to that process. Their process was very minimally invasive with only needing to dig a single hole to replace 30 feet plus of copper water line. It took them a single day for the entire process and the following day was the City of Rockville's inspection. These guys are great!

reviews.author: Mr. Wang
reviews.text: As a GC building my own house, I’ve worked with many contractors, and the technicians from Heil Plumbing are among the best I’ve seen. The lead technician, John, demonstrated extensive knowledge and was very patient in answering all of my questions. I will definitely use Heil Plumbing again in the future and highly recommend them to anyone needing plumbing services.

reviews.author: Phil Sandick
reviews.text: Erik Young did an expert job at replacing our water heater. The job was done carefully and quickly, and he went through our options and answered all of our questions prior to purchase and install. Same-day service, and the new water heater has been working perfectly for the last few months. Highly recommend Erik and would definitely call Heil Plumbing again.

reviews.author: Eugene Kovin
reviews.text: We had great experience with Heil Plumbing . We were dealing with a major sewage backup that other plumbers simply couldn’t fix. Damontae Tuck from Heil Plumbing diagnosed the issue perfectly. He went above and beyond, cleaning pipes in areas the previous companies completely overlooked. The problem is finally solved! After finishing the job, Damontae took the time to explain which maintenance chemicals to use to prevent this from happening again. We definitely recommend Heil Plumbing for their expertise and thoroughness.

reviews.author: Yashar Norhashemi
reviews.text: I was smelling gas under my stove and my water heater was not working. Israel answered my call and helped get a technician out right away all while being polite and professional. Jeffrey showed up first thing in the morning of the scheduled service day with a smile and eagerness to fix the issues. He took the time to explain the issues I was having while pointing out some other possible issues I might have in the future and to keep an eye on them. He was professional, courteous, knowledgeable, and genuinely nice person. I appreciate Heil Plumbing & HVAC dedication and expertise all the way from the initial phone call through the service with the tech. I highly recommend this company and their hardworking team.

plumbers.name: Amped Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning and Security
plumbers.address: 4205 N MacArthur Blvd, Warr Acres, OK 73122, USA

reviews.author: Deborah
reviews.text: They are very professional.  Their work is exemplary and they have great customer service with constant communication during the process.  They pay close attention to every detail to ensure the work is exceptional!  We had new water lines installed, broken pipe repaired, and new drain line to sewer line. It was completed in a timely manner and again exceptional work!  On a personal note, i have 2 adult children with challenges that live at home with me.  My son wants to be very involved and has many questions.  Ashton Norton, Joshua Smith and every other employee, including the owner, Joe Norton that came to work at our home was very accommodating, answering questions, staying engaged and made him feel very important in the process.  I’m very grateful!!  Highly recommend Amped!!

reviews.author: Alex Hofbauer
reviews.text: I had Korey come over to give a quote on 3 cameras and a video doorbell.  The price was in line with what I was expecting and less expensive than the other two quotes I received.  Overall, the installation was relatively easy, except for one camera that Korey was determined to hardwire to avoid using a WiFi camera.  He got the job done and the install was clean with the more reliable wired camera. I appreciated his hard work and would recommend Amped to others looking for security systems.

reviews.author: Ashley Burns
reviews.text:
Thank you to Amped pluming for all of their help. Thank you to Zeke for coming out and giving us an accurate estimate that Amped stuck to. Thank you to Dakota Elmore and Dakota Boyd for coming and doing the work. They worked very clean and did minimal damage to our walls to get in and repair the leak. They also were very polite and explained everything that was going on as they did the fix.
When Zeke gave us our quote he also gave us a quote for getting our whole house plumbing done and once we get to a point that we can do that. We will definitely be going with them for that process.

reviews.author: Alan Wattenbarger
reviews.text: The crew at AMPED replaced my old cast iron sewer lines with PVC. They replaced the main sewer line under the slab and did a kitchen and laundry drain reroute. They did an amazing job!  They were very careful and methodical through the whole process!  It was a lengthy repair and pretty invasive to say the least but there is no way around that.  If you have cast iron sewer pipes, do not take shortcuts that other companies offer.  DO NOT do CIP pipe lining!  Just do old fashioned replacement.  You will sleep better at night knowing you have brand new sewer pipes and not a bandaid.  AMPED did a very pfofessional job and I am very happy with the work they did.  They are honest and dependable.  They keep you in the loop the entire way and the financing options they offer make the repair less scary.  Take a bow AMPED, you guys are awesome!

reviews.author: Joe Meyer
reviews.text:
Totally recommend this company! They had a technician at my house within 30 minutes after my initial call. Technician Byron is the best! He is so respectful and knowledgeable.  Byron diagnosed the problems quickly and fixed it right the first time. Not only did he fix our problems, but he also took the time to walk me through preventative measures for the future.

The service was professional, courteous, and transparent regarding pricing. If you want great work done right, call this company!

plumbers.name: Black Diamond Experts, Electric, Plumbing, HVAC
plumbers.address: 1525 W 400 S, Orem, UT 84058, USA

reviews.author: Bob McCann
reviews.text:
Great experience all around. The initial technician they sent out was outstanding. Your the best, Jose!

He not only diagnosed our immediate issue, he also advised us about the condition/potential issues with all of the components (it's an old furnace).

He took the time to lay out several repair options, from just fixing our immediate problem through several different price options to repair/replace some or all of the other issues.

We ultimately decided to have Black Diamond install a whole new furnace due to age/overall condition, but the detailed breakdown of *all* of the options and their (very reasonable) prices was very much appreciated in helping us make the best decision for our home.

reviews.author: Melanie Christensen
reviews.text:
Bryan and Zack came over first and evaluated our problem with many plugs in the attic area that needed a safer solution. They returned two days later with extra safety plug in areas with GFI.  They also gave it their own master switch in the box.
Thx guy!! Y’all are awesome!
Melanie C

reviews.author: William Martin
reviews.text:
We have had a great experience from Kris who came out to clean out backed up line then Alan who came back with Kris to run ecamera and show us the problem and quote what it would take cost and time wise to our Lead installer with Matt and Riley as his helpers. Mike keep us informed and their scheduler keep us informed and we got the job done in 3 days. Just waiting for asphalt to be patched and we will be done. Great job Black Diamond, we used them on an electrical project before and everything went just as smooth
Thanks Bill Martin

reviews.author: Michael Johnson
reviews.text: Todd and Joe repaired a shorted neutral and added a 220v circuit in our garage. They were thorough, careful, and kept me in the loop throughout the work. Joe did the diagnostic work on the fist visit, and Todd and Joe wrapped everything up in an afternoon just a few days after my first call.

reviews.author: Carissa Dib
reviews.text: This company has the best employees!  Brad was on time, professional, kind, answered my questions, explained everything well, and gave price quotes for possible changes.  The membership is well worth it.

plumbers.name: Bowers Plumbing Co Inc
plumbers.address: 2265 Carters Gin Rd, Toney, AL 35773, USA

reviews.author: Martin Carey
reviews.text: I called them at the recommendation of a friend that’s used them for years. They responded promptly and communicated everything very well. They were courteous and completed the job quickly and professionally. This water heater was in a terrible spot and replaced a 30 year old poorly maintained water heater. Thanks!

reviews.author: Bertha
reviews.text: I was pleasantly surprised at how quickly I was scheduled (the next morning). The young man was here right on time, was friendly, polite, efficient, and patient, answering my many questions without hesitation. Very efficient. Done installing a new water heater, and two additional parts in under three hours. Everything working great! Thanks!

reviews.author: Bobby Mathis
reviews.text: I am so happy to have found a great plumber! Nick Frost is an expert and handles himself with the utmost courtesy and professionalism! He evaluated my plumbing problem quickly and made the repair with ease. Some other plumbers would have had me remove flooring and areas of a wall and still not found the problem. I am so thankful that Mr. Frost was the expert that came to my house. Whenever I need any type of plumbing done, I’m going to call Bowers Plumbing and request Mr. Frost!!!!

reviews.author: Lynn Quann
reviews.text: Finally, a plumber with knowledge and confidence.  Thank you Preston for your honest assessment as we walked through the scenario. And thanks to Chris for talking me off the ledge the night before thinking I needed emergency service when clearly I did not.  He walked me through a system check and assured me ai would be fine until the next day.  Bowers will always be my go to from now on.

reviews.author: Julie Williams
reviews.text: We had a stopped up drain and a leaking pipe under another sink. Bowers got us fixed up in a couple of hours and did great work. The technician was very nice and if we ever need plumbing work again we will definitely be using them again. Thanks for the great service!

plumbers.name: Big Apple Plumbing LLC - Westminster, CO
plumbers.address: 8872 Meade St, Westminster, CO 80031, USA

reviews.author: Kyra Silbernagel
reviews.text: We used Big Apple Plumbing to do our sewer line replacement and we were very happy with the work that was done. Jason was very quick to respond to our initial request for a 2nd opinion and sewer scope. He talked us through all of our options and patiently answered all of our questions. The actual work to replace the sewer line was completed extremely quickly and with super minimal impact to our yard, which we really appreciated!

reviews.author: Kelly McDowell
reviews.text: Sewer Line Replacement: Jason and his team were professional, excellent with communications keeping me in the loop every step of the process. This was a huge job replacing the entire sewer line from inside the house to the main line at the city sewer. I was so impressed by their professionalism, their work, the knowledge, taking the time to help me understand the job, communicating when they would be here, the status of the project and their clean-up. I would HIGHLY RECOMMEND them for any of your needs from the really large, extensive projects like mine, to any smaller projects. What a great company and crew! Thank you guys so much. I am very happy with your work and will recommend you anytime someone is looking!

reviews.author: Alexis McKinley
reviews.text: Jason and his team are amazing! We had a leak for who knows how long because we are very rarely in the basement and I called about 20 minutes before closing on a Sunday. Monday morning Jason came and assessed the situation which was drastic enough to be a 2 day job and from start to finish Jason was super professional and made sure to educate us the whole way through. The team made sure to lay down protective things for our floor and they were very efficient. I am very pleased with the outcome and am showing before, during and after photos. I would recommend this company anytime you need anything plumbing. Jason knows what he is talking about and exactly how to fix it right the first time. He made sure our clean out was placed in a proper place for future problems if plumbing is ever needed again. I am very thankful I called Big Apple Plumbing LLC!

reviews.author: Kevin Frame
reviews.text: Jason and Disraeli are amazing master plumbers. With the two of them working together, the new plumbing additions and replacement of old pipes went very quickly. They were able to meet every request I had and kept me informed throughout the entire job. They added a new washer box in the garage, new plumbing for a basement remodel including a new full kitchen, full bathroom, and washer/dryer. They also installed the new tub/shower, and frost free hose faucets leading outside. I will be using Big Apple Plumbing for all my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Robert Sipe
reviews.text: I would like to express my gratitude to Big Apple Plumbing for sending Disraeli to resolve our clogged drain issue. Disraeli was extremely patient and clearly explained the entire repair process. We were very impressed with his professionalism and attention to detail. I highly recommend Big Apple Plumbing for any plumbing related needs.

plumbers.name: Drain Doctor
plumbers.address: 1277 N 15th St, San Jose, CA 95112, USA

reviews.author: Melodie Wille
reviews.text:
On Sunday, I needed immediate service so I started going down the list of plumbers near me that are open 24/7.
Four different businesses didn’t answer the phone and one said they only take appointments…. What???
Drain Doctor Fremont was next and I was assured someone would be at my home within the hour. The technician was here within 30 minutes and just as quickly he had cleared the drain from the street.
Both the office and the technician were very courteous and wanted to make sure I was satisfied.
The task was completed, but I will tell you service makes all the difference!
Job well done, and it let me get back to my weekend quickly!

reviews.author: Carrie King
reviews.text: I’ve worked with Drain Doctors Plumbing on many residential and commercial projects, and they consistently deliver exceptional results. Their professionalism, attention to detail, and commitment to doing the job right the first time make them my top choice for plumbing work. They’re punctual, communicative, and always maintain a clean, safe worksites. Whether it’s new construction, remodels, or emergency repairs, Drain Doctors brings a level of expertise and reliability. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a skilled and dependable plumber.

reviews.author: John Al-Samarrie
reviews.text:
OK, this is overdue.  Last month I noticed water on the garage cement floor and thought it was just moisture.  After careful review I noticed that the water heater was leaking.  I called four different plumbers to get estimates with Drain Doctor being the first one I called.  A little history of my previous water heater is in order.  in 2019 I was overseas, and the heater broke and leaked all over the garage damaging some important personal items.  My girlfriend at the time called a plumber who installed a new heater and what a mess it was.  That plumber used galvanized steel for the inlet and outlet of the heater lines.  Routed the pressure relief pipe into the water heater pan rather than outside of the pan and installed my recirculating pump facing the side wall where I could not gain access.  Additionally, the gas line reservoir was installed by the water heater rather than near the gas line valve coming out of the wall.  There were no 2x4 boards in the back of the heater for earth quake bracing and the water lines were not earth grounded, all of which are city compliance requirement.  To say the least it was a cluster F.  When Bobby from Drain doctor showed up, he immediately pointed out the nonconformance of the water heater and gave me a bottom-line price from his standard pricing book which no other plumbers could beat.  Some quotes were almost double and after negotiating with those plumbers they got close to Bobby's price which didn't sit well with me.  So, I decided to go with Bobby and that proved to be fortuitist based on his efficient and compliant work.  Bobby is a plethora of plumbing information or more like a Wikipedia of plumbing.  He does have a laid back and straight forward attitude but don't let that fool you.  He's the top gun in his industry.
