There were many changes to the system requirements based on updated HVAC code, which Trevor explained. In general, the overall reworking of the system was done smoothly and with hardly any change to our home system, except of course, the whole furnace and outdoor unit. Amy has done many upgrades to our home and my Wife and I are very pleased with the work that was done in the past as well as this particular upgrade.

plumbers.name: Tom's Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 130 Tefft Ave, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Rudy Galfi
reviews.text: Tom’s Plumbing did an absolutely amazing job relocating my water heater, adding a hot water recirculating pipe and motor, and installing a Moen Flo water protection system. The quality of workmanship was excellent—efficient, clean, and clearly skilled. Best of all, the estimate was very reasonable for the scope of work performed. Highly recommend Tom’s Plumbing for anyone looking for quality and reliability!

reviews.author: Diana
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Tom’s Plumbing. Bob kept a clean, organized workspace throughout the entire job. During the inspection, Bob was patient and took the time to thoroughly explain each concern I had, making sure I fully understood the work that needed to be done. I’m very pleased with the quality of service and the work completed at my home, and I would not hesitate to recommend him.

reviews.author: Joe Bayer
reviews.text: Bob from Tom’s plumbing helped replace galvanized pipe coming from my main that was starting rust and drip. Bob went above and beyond on the job, was quick, and was very respectful. The estimate from Tom’s plumbing was by far the best out of the 5 plumbers I asked estimates for. I will definitely contact them again in the future when I need something done.

reviews.author: Patricia Davis
reviews.text:
I have used Tom's Plumbing for three different jobs. I live in an older townhome and thigs are starting to wear out.
They are professional, dependable, qualified and each job has been done
within a good time frame, attention to detail including to my home. I am more than pleased with their work, pricing and dependability. This time they replaced the Ejector Pump and the Hot Water Heater.
I can confidentially give this great review because several years I had work done by another company and it was a terrible experience.
Tom's is the BEST!!!!

reviews.author: Joseph Bajek
reviews.text: Tom's Plumbing sent out a professional to install my toilet within a few days. Bob was very professional and did a great job. Total time was about 2 hours. Would recommend service.

plumbers.name: Modern Heating & Plumbing Co.
plumbers.address: 1949 Swanson Ct, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: David Galbo
reviews.text: Albert and Casey just finished installing the new Trane furnace and A/C unit that we purchased from Modern.  They both worked very hard to complete the job, were very professional, friendly and pleasant to work with.  They did a great job, cleaned up after themselves, and were considerate of our home and yard during the entire process. Great job guys and thank you Modern Heating & Plumbing!

reviews.author: Lois Hamann
reviews.text: Fast response to our needs, from the first call. Setting up schedule, having the technicians come out and assess the damages. They had to install a complete new boiler system, and hot water heater, (due to frozen pipes and flooded basement the old system was unable to be repaired.) It was a pleasure to do business with this entire group of employees and service staff. They made a difficult situation have a positive outcome.  Thankyou.

reviews.author: Ellen Lindal
reviews.text: Modern Heating came to my home within two hours of my initial call. Gela, the serviceman was terrific. He diagnosed the problem quickly. He provided a temporary fix while he went and got the needed replacement part. Part installed, he went on to provide maintenance for the furnace. Great service-I’ll be using them in the future.

reviews.author: Kathy Keating
reviews.text:
Herman is an outstanding technician. We had a service call because our air conditioner unit was blowing air but not cooling the house. After a thorough inspection of our 24-year-old unit he explained, in layman's terms, that it would take at least a $1,000, if not more, to repair it. He explained the life cycle of the unit and the continued expense it will take to maintain it. He gave us options to replace the unit and explained the differences in brands and gave his personal experience with these units.
We decided to buy a new A/C with Modern Heating and Plumbing. Herman returned to our house with a portable air conditioner to use while we wait for installation, which will be during the holiday weekend.
We cannot say enough wonderful and thoughtful things about Herman. He is truly an asset to this company.

reviews.author: Chris Lynch
reviews.text: Great experience from start to finish. I had an issue with the ignitor on my tankless water heater. Contacted Monday morning and received a fast response. Technician was scheduled to be my house between 12-4. Tech got to the house at 1220. The tech identified the problem in less than 15 min, and had it fixed in another 15 min. Fantastic service, would work with again.

plumbers.name: Nearby Plumbing
plumbers.address: 8204 Wilson St, Midvale, UT 84047, USA

reviews.author: Nichole L.S.
reviews.text: Outstanding customer service! Kris and Joe were absolutely phenomenal. They truly went above and beyond for our family, and it’s so rare to feel genuinely cared for these days. After doing a lot of research, we found their pricing to be extremely fair and affordable. We are so grateful we found them—they truly feel like family. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Steve Phillips
reviews.text: Nearby Plumbing provided excellent service when fixing my water heater. Khris, and the rest of the team who helped me out were professional, knowledgeable, and got the job done quickly. They also helped me navigate the manufacturer's warranty, making the entire replacement process smooth and stress-free. I highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Ronak Chauhan
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with Joey from Nearby Plumbing. My water heater failed right before Christmas, and I was worried about being without hot water for the holidays. Joey prioritized my job and managed to install a brand-new tankless water heater in a single day. Not only was he incredibly fast and professional, but he also gave me a very fair and competitive rate. It’s rare to find such reliable service during the busy holiday season. Highly recommend Joey for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Cristian Torres
reviews.text: Kris and Joe did a great job with the installation! Happy with the new water heater, way overdo! Highly suggest to enter their water heater giveaway. Will be reaching out to Nearby plumbing for any other plumbing issues I run into. Thanks again for your service!

reviews.author: Bryce Webb
reviews.text: Kris, from nearby plumbing, was extremely professional. He was the one that came out for my estimate, and was very thorough and easy to discuss things with. When he came back out for the service, he did an excellent job and I was very happy with his work.

plumbers.name: Doctor Drips Plumbing - Nashville
plumbers.address: 1101 Davidson St, Nashville, TN 37206, USA

reviews.author: Korry Rahn
reviews.text:
Excellent Service from Doctor Drips – Highly Recommend!

Doctor Drips (Jance) did an outstanding job replacing my hot water heater. From start to finish, he was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly courteous. He quickly provided a fair and clear quote, offered great recommendations, and showed up right on time. The installation was done efficiently and with great attention to detail. It’s refreshing to work with someone who takes pride in their work and truly cares about customer satisfaction.

I highly recommend Jance and Doctor Drips for any plumbing needs – you won’t be disappointed!

reviews.author: Amos Maley
reviews.text: When a 30 minute consultation and shower repair job turned into a 9.5 hour tankless water heater and gas line replacement job, Jance and his team kept us informed every step of the way and just kept working until the project was done.  I'll trust them to do all of our plumbing and related work from now on.  They were so easy to work with too!

reviews.author: Anna A Clinton
reviews.text:
We cannot say enough good things about everyone at Doctor Drips — especially Ronnie and Wyatt. Working on a historic home built in 1920 requires experience, patience, and problem-solving skills, and they brought all of that and more.

Ronnie was incredibly knowledgeable, punctual, and respectful of our home throughout our bathroom addition and bedroom renovation. The whole team took the challenging aspects of plumbing in an older house and navigated all of the quirks with confidence and care.

What really stood out, though, was how kind and thoughtful they were — always friendly to our family (and our dog!) and meticulous in their work. It’s rare to find tradespeople who combine technical expertise with such a great attitude. We felt completely confident having them in our home and would recommend Doctor Drips without hesitation.

reviews.author: Marty Yurjevich
reviews.text: Dr Drips (Jance and Robbie and Wyatt) did a great job fixing our toilet and Replumbing our entire house.  We had defective PEX by Nibco and they removed it with all new PEX-A.   They did an excellent job and worked to minute damage to our home.  They cleaned up very well and respected our home.  Jance and Robbie are outstanding plumbers.  Highly recommend if you have plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Valerie Cleaves
reviews.text:
Dr Drips provided excellent, efficient, and educational service! Robbie came prepared with shoe covers and took them off when he needed to go back and forth from inside to out.

Issue resolved in a transparent and non-complicated communication style.

I recommend Dr Drips to anyone needing efficient, thorough, and educational service! Refreshing!

plumbers.name: JCB Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 1099 Brown St STE 201, Wauconda, IL 60084, USA

reviews.author: Judy Billings
reviews.text: Roger Tinajero made sure everything was working well—and gave us next steps, if there is more trouble with the sewer backup, and for peace of mind.  Great work.  He is thorough and personable.

reviews.author: Michael Dahlgren
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with JCB Plumbing. Our water heater went out, and they handled the replacement quickly and professionally.

Roger did an awesome job! He was efficient, knowledgeable, and made sure everything was running perfectly before he left.

reviews.author: Jennifer Gallien
reviews.text: Outstanding service from JCB Plumbing! I was super nervous calling a plumber for a sudden leak coming from our guest bathroom and falling through our kitchen ceiling.  I called JCB plumbing because of the many positive reviews that I found on Facebook and Google.  What a great decision! This company answered right away and scheduled a call within two hours that same day. Our service technician, Jake, was extremely knowledgeable, honest, and professional. Jake explained everything in detail so that I understood what was broken and what needed to be fixed.  He was truly kind and honest.  I felt that he was there to help, rather than worrying about being taken advantage of with quotes of unnecessary work.  Thank you, Jake!! Fair pricing and high-quality work. Highly recommend to anyone needing a reliable plumber! Thank you, JCB Plumbing.  We will make sure to spread the word!!!

reviews.author: Abigail Cornish
reviews.text: I greatly appreciated JCB Plumbing’s same day service.  The plumber was professional, thorough and friendly.  He took his time to explain everything before and after.  The hot water heater was fixed quickly with no disruptions, and the service charge was reasonable. I recommend them for their expertise, friendliness and quick response time.

reviews.author: Samantha Turzynski
reviews.text:
JCB Plumbing really did a quality job and they are totally a reputable company!  I had a problem with my plumbing not draining and Kyle spent hours assessing the issue.  It was unfortunately an outdoor drainage issue!  The entire team was respectful of my home, my landscaping and me!  I never felt uncomfortable or like I was being gouged.  I added the replacement of the water heater while they were there for the sewer and everything was done at the same time, by different plumbers!  The entire crew worked to finish the jobs, a real testament to the team work!  No detail was too small for the crew members to help each other with, including the resolution!

Thank you to the entire team for doing a fantastic job and for being so respectful of my home!

plumbers.name: Greer Plumbing & Water Heater Repair
plumbers.address: 3017 Mountain Rd, Pasadena, MD 21122, USA

reviews.author: Eric Armer
reviews.text: Alex and his team maintained a professional work relationship regardless of the obstacles they encountered during the entire Job. Them members were respectful during the entire job. Alex made sure that we always knew exactly what the goals for the day was. The team represented Greer Water works at all times. They went out of their way to do everything they could to minimize the impact of the work at hand especially safety first. Their tenacity paid off. The job was completed in a masterful professional way. We appreciate you arranging for the rebar and concrete pour.   Thank you for a grate repair.

reviews.author: Jeana Osborne
reviews.text: Dominic & the team at Greer were great! We were working with another contractor to finish our basement on a strict timeline and Dominic completed the plumbing for the bathroom so efficiently. We were able to tell him exactly where we wanted things to go and he delivered. Once the contractors were finished drywall, he came back to set the toilet & sink. We love the final look and are happy with the services provided by Greer!

reviews.author: Ron Schreiber
reviews.text: This is a review for the second job Greer plumbing and waterworks has done for me. This was a complicated, challenging project for a residential home. My cast steel main line drain ran directly under the mudroom floor. Which happened to be concrete.. Matt and his crews were very professional. The camera guy came and they scoped and checked the pipe to make sure it needed replacing. They also traced the pipe so they knew exactly were the pipe was. It took a 4 person crew 2 days to replace the old cast pipe which was about 5’ underground. They cleaned up when they were done, the price was reasonable, and the follow up was great. We found out one of the old connections had started leaking a few days after the job was completed. Matt had a technician here the following morning to fix that. I would say that if you have a plumbing issue, no matter how big or how small it is. Give Greer plumbing a call for a quote. Because of how great they handled 2 plumbing issues for me, I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Dustin Richardson
reviews.text:
Greer Water Works — Always Here for You
Imagine putting in the work day after day, but the calls never stop — and that’s okay, because helping our community is what they’re about. Today’s goal: get this family’s heater back up and running with no leaks and peace of mind restored. At Greer Water Works, we’re there for your needs anytime, any day — even if it means getting up at 6:30 on a Saturday. That’s what dedication looks like.Justin & Brian where the most professional trades  I work with in a while make sure they had carpet covered with hard cardboard, roll out paper and plastic not a drip of water got on our carpet Had water within two hours could not be more happier about our experience at Greer waterworks thanks to Justin and Brian!!

reviews.author: cha scott
reviews.text:
Horrible service. Came out to repair a toilet clog, which was not repaired. When I called them back to come back to fix it, they scheduled an appointment. They cancelled on the day of after advising a text would be there. We waited for almost 5 hours with zero communication. Keep in mind they sent me a $375 bill which I would pay, if the issue was corrected. Someone named Sean who refused to give me his last name, pretty much told me if they come out again, they are going to charge me again. Yes, I will be notifying BBB because who says the work is not under warranty when the issue comes back 2 days later? I could go on but I just had surgery on my heart and it’s not worth risking  my health.

Yes I told SEAN this info but he was extremely RUDE.

plumbers.name: A&W Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1420 E Algonquin Rd Box 385, Algonquin, IL 60102, USA

reviews.author: Tyler Sullivan
reviews.text: I highly recommend A&W Plumbing! Matt did a great job from start to finish! We were in need of a water softener and installation and Matt was able to come out on very short notice to help us determine the best solution for our home. With the limited space we had available, it was determined that our best option was to install the unit in the crawl space. He helped us choose a unit - making sure that it wouldn't be too tall while also fitting within our crawl space access point. Matt's attention to detail and craftsmanship was exactly what the job called for. I am extremely pleased with the results and look forward to working with him again for any and all of my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: J Schmidt
reviews.text:
Called Matt on Saturday, found my water heater was leaking pretty bad.  He swung bye on Sunday and confirmed the tank was compromised and that we'd need to wait until Monday to replace.

Gave me a call at 7:30 am first thing with a quote, price was amazing, well under quotes I got from other larger plumbing companies.  He showed up around 10:30am with the new water heater and  left shortly after 1pm.

Matt is a great guy, great service, and even corrected issues the previous plumber had done like over tight fittings.  Matt does an amazing job, this is my second time having him over, the previous effort was to repair my Ejector pump that failed.

A++ job, Five stars all the way.

reviews.author: Sean Patrick
reviews.text: A&W is FANTASTIC AND Matt is great reliable owner. Very friendly and professional and at a very reasonable price. Takes pride in his work as he is the owner. Always on time, and communication is fantastic. He has replaced my water heater, replaced whole house shut off valve, as well as other plumbing issues. A&W is the only plumber I call these days. Great business.

reviews.author: Marie Beusse
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Matt he was very quick to respond to my call. He arrived on time and immediately diagnosed my problem. The repair was done efficiently and at a very fair price. It is hard to find such an honest and dependable service these days. I will definitely call him again for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Brendan Gillespie
reviews.text: I needed to have some shower/tub fixtures replaced so Matt from A&W came out to work on it. The new set looks good and works good with no leaks. He also inspected some of the other plumbing features of the house and took care of a pipe on the water heater that was not positioned right. Overall I am satisfied with the work. Thank you!

plumbers.name: Champion Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1221 S Holly Ave, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Chyloe Koch
reviews.text: Had a clogged pressure reducing valve. I was fearful that my pipes were frozen or busted as that is what the City of OKC kept telling me for a week. Thomas with Champion Plumbing came to my home and instantly put my mind at ease, he was informative about every step and started with the most logical and cost effective solution. Luckily, it was the exact issue and he was able to get it fixed in no time! No runaround or trying to squeeze me for every dollar in my bank account, just pure genuineness and professionalism. I cannot recommend enough. While he was here, I asked if he could flush the tankless water heater as well; not a problem!!! Just the best plumbing company by far! Not to mention Melissa who answered the phone when I called to set the appt. She was able to get Thomas out quickly so we could get water and answers, great teamwork! THANK YOU!

reviews.author: Rizz Adamz
reviews.text:
RAUL VASQUEZ serviced my plumbing issue. Unclogged my drain, fished a camera, and performed a plumbing inspection in our new home. His customer service and knowledge of the trade was impeccable. I will request him for all service calls in the future. Also the lady who took my call was so sweet and professional. She said "we are a real company" lol  I was sold.
Thank you guys!

reviews.author: Robert Keeley
reviews.text: Brian is my new super hero. He managed to dead lift the heavy tank into position and saved the cabinets from being pulled out. The entire team is great. Champion (Ethan, also super nice) came out on a Sunday to start working on it and had it fixed Monday morning. Everyone was friendly and worked quickly to replace my hot water tank.  Very pleased with the reasonable cost too. Thanks Champion and thanks again Brian.

reviews.author: Jerry Sinard
reviews.text: Bought our home new 30 years ago. Unfortunately, got a leak. Chase came out, checked, advised leaking near the meter. Would send a crew out in 2 days to repair. Right on time Dominique and Brian arrived. The repair was made. I even bought their lunch. Brian is a dog guy, treated my Fred like good dog people do. Dominique gave him some attention as well. Probably our FORTH time over the years to use Champion. One more thing. Brittney that took care of my calls was wonderful as well as Melissa who transferred me.  Thanks Champion, our yard will not be a swimming pool for Christmas.

reviews.author: Ryan Kizer
reviews.text: Had a washer drain that was bad and Steve and Eric came out and Repaired it . They were easy to work with explained everything  from the cause to the Repair. Will not find better people to repairs plumbing issues

plumbers.name: ASAP Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1258 N Rose Farm Rd Unit 1, Woodstock, IL 60098, USA

reviews.author: Kevin Crown
reviews.text: The technician showed up within the time window ASAP advised. He was courteous and ready to work. He stayed until the entire job was complete and knowledgeable, he answered all of our questions. We had a tankless water heater installed, a whole house sediment filtration system installed, shut off valve replaced, and reverse osmosis drinking water system installed.

reviews.author: Gitlin Law Firm
reviews.text: We have been very happy with ASAP Plumbing for all of our needs. We’ve used them for both general repairs and plumbing issues, and they have consistently delivered excellent service. They are always prompt, professional, and pleasant to deal with. We truly appreciate their reliability and highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Steven McCarty
reviews.text: Lucas was very professional and installed the water heater within a couple of hours. He went over the install details and how long it would take. When finished with the install, he explained maintenance and warranty. He cleaned up everything including disposal of the old unit. His work was very clean and demonstrated there were no gas leaks to set me at ease. I am very happy with the process and the price. I highly recommend ASAP Plumbing.

reviews.author: Nicole Leconte
reviews.text:
ASAP has been wonderful to work with! From Alex, who I initially  cumminicated with regarding my hot water heater, getting a quote, and scheduling a plumber, Olivia after hours, and finally Max who installed the water heater. They were very efficient and got everything handled in a very short turnaround time (next day).
In addition, Max is extremely knowledgeable, helpful, and professional. I am pleased with the removal and installation he performed and he patiently answered all of my questions. Overall, they ALL are very friendly and empathetic which truly helps when dealing with plumbing emergencies that always seem to happen at the worst times. I would not hesitate to use them again. I
strongly recommend their services!

reviews.author: Bethany Bellavia
reviews.text: Jon came out and gave me an estimate and explained everything to me. He was accessible and personable through the entire process. Keifer & Bryce are the plumbers that completed the work and they did phenomenal! We had a transitional hot water heater replaced with a tankless in addition to repiping and moving our water softener. They did it all and were at my house ALL day. They were professional, kind, and answered my questions. I highly recommend ASAP!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 133 Portage Trail Suite 102, Cuyahoga Falls, OH 44221, USA

reviews.author: Angie Best
reviews.text: My representative was Matt and he was wonderful!! He was quick and efficient and left everything clean and the way it was. He was a life saver! We had water backed up thru the whole house for a week straight. Thank you so much Matt!

reviews.author: Denis Carter
reviews.text: This company has outstanding technicians and equipment at a fair price.Our toilets were not flushing at all. The water was filling the bowl. Cory and Dante from Roto Rooter used a camera in our sewer line and discovered a blockage directly under a large pin oak in the middle of our front yard. They attempted jetting it with a super high psi jet head, but the blockage was due to large roots that had infiltrated the sewer pipe at the joints. Undaunted, they pulled that machine out and brought out a root cutter unit which did the job. They jetted it once more and it was perfect. These two technicians, Cory and Dante, were amazing. They knew exactly how to tackle a serious problem and were polite, hard working, and consummate professionals. I will use Roto-Rooter for all my plumbing needs from now on.

reviews.author: Lisa Rene' DeBenedictis
reviews.text: I called and left a message and they returned my call promptly.  I had water backing up in my basement and they sent Jesse to the rescue within an hour.  He was very responsive and respectful and explained every step of the process.  He cleaned everything up and fixed the issue with ease ( tree roots). I highly recommend this establishment.

reviews.author: Ryan Strauss
reviews.text:
I had a badly clogged kitchen sink and called this Roto-Rooter for help. Nick showed up on time, explained what was causing the blockage, and cleared it out quickly without any hassle. Super professional, reasonably priced, and made sure everything was running perfectly before leaving.
Highly recommend if you need someone reliable and skilled!

reviews.author: Valencia Walters
reviews.text: Roto Rooter provided an overall good experience. Quick scheduling appointments. The plumber James provided great customer service and quality work. I had a clogged toilet from a dislodged toy. James was knowledgeable about plumbing, provided details explaining the different options and process, and openly disclosed pricing. He work diligently and eventually was able to unclogged the toilet by removing the toilet and extracting the object. He was professional and worked efficiently. He cleaned up his work area when finished which was a plus.  I would recommend roto rooter and will definitely be using their services in the future.

plumbers.name: Buddy’s Plumbing Excellence
plumbers.address: 1501 S Cleveland Massillon Rd, Akron, OH 44321, USA

reviews.author: Joshua Richardson
reviews.text: I had an outstanding experience with this plumber. They arrived on time, diagnosed the issue quickly, and explained everything clearly. The work was done efficiently, professionally, and with great attention to detail. You can tell they take pride in their craft—no shortcuts, no upselling, just honest, high‑quality service. My plumbing is working perfectly now, and the area was left spotless. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for reliable, top‑tier workmanship.

reviews.author: Neil Oates
reviews.text: I am very impressed with the job Buddy's did for us. John did our hot water tank and recirculation pump replacement and was prompt, thorough, tidy and just overall very professional. I needed a service call a couple of weeks later and Ryan came out and addressed the problem and everything is working perfectly now. Highly recommend Buddy's.

reviews.author: Rick Rissmiller
reviews.text: In today’s world where good customer service is very hard to come by and no longer the expectation Plumbing Excellence excels! From the moment I reached out to them communication was exceptional. I reached out on a Sunday night online and by 8:45am the next day Kevin was at my house.I knew I needed at least one of the two water heaters replaced. Kevin showed me and explained how both  had failed. He took a very short time to put together an estimate which I knew  was competitive based on my experience as an Engineer. He explained the steps they would take and after my approval began work. The work took most of the day and the quality was excellent. They gave suggestions for maintenance that would help extend the life of the water heaters. I highly recommend Plumbing excellence.

reviews.author: David Campanale
reviews.text:
Called for an emergency appointment once our main drain backed up in our basement laundry room again. Jen was able to schedule a tech the same day. Matthew (Matt) was prompt and timely after communicating his drive time.
I knew I needed the pipes jetted from past situations.

I have to give Matt a huge shout-out cause he worked his butt off on the main drain for nearly three hours. He made multiple jet and camera passes to clear the clogged line and our water flows freely now.

He was very knowledgeable and offered us great advice. He was respectful and cleaned up well.

Thanks Matt for a job well done!

reviews.author: Joy Nixon
reviews.text: Amazingly quick service for a failed sump pump. They came the next day. Kevin was very informative and very nice.  I’d recommend Plumbing Excellence for their superior, friendly service!

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 200 S Main St Suite 3, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Steve Johnson
reviews.text:
We opened up our finished basement to do some remodeling, and found the main gas line on the floor, badly corroded, as a result of continuous water intrusion. (You can see the corroded gas line in the first photo-basically a ticking time bomb!)

Shane from J Blanton came out, worked with us on the quote, and Edwin and Peter were scheduled within two days. It was a tricky route for the new pipe - tying into an offset T, moving the new pipe up higher (obviously), avoiding PVC drains, sump pump discharges, and electrical conduit.  They were friendly, efficient, and did great work - photos of the finished product below.

reviews.author: Laxman Jitarwal
reviews.text: Alex Cruz from J. Blanton Plumbing did an excellent job i specifically requested an early appointment and he arrived right on time around 8:30 AM, which I really appreciated he worked very hard for almost 4 to 5 hours straight and handled everything professionally. My water wasn’t running at all, and Alex stayed focused until he fully fixed the issue and got the water running again in my house he was knowledgeable, and clearly cared about doing the job right. You can tell he puts real effort into his work. I’m very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend Alex Cruz and J. Blanton Plumbing to anyone

reviews.author: Joan Ralph
reviews.text:
If I could have given this company ZERO stars or negative stars that would have been my rating.  NEVER do business with this company!!!!!!!!!  They lie repeatedly about their service calls and are EXTREMELY expensive for what they do!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  I have NEVER dealt with a worse company in my life!!!!!!
I just needed a valve replacement under my sink for a new dishwasher to be installed.  I talked to J. Blanton Plumbing and scheduled the work to be done the following week on a Tuesday.  The dishwasher was being installed the next day.  On Tuesday, a plumber wearing a "pretty" J. Blanton sweatshirt shows up NOT to do the work but to upsell me on having more plumbing work done!!!!  I told him he just needs to get the valve replaced as I was promised and he responds that he just drives a shell of a truck and has no repair equipment!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  And that they would send a plumber out the next day which is when the dishwasher is coming!!!!!!!!!!!  After I pointed that out, I was promised a plumber at 8:00 a.m. Wednesday morning and got my delivery pushed back as much as they could on Wednesday.  The pretty sweatshirt knew that the work requirements were and I was promised the plumber would be here.  I even called 3x later on Tuesday to ensure they would stand behind their commitment.  Well, it's now Wednesday and no plumber showed at 8.  I called again at 8:50 and was told they would send someone over right away.  I called at 9:30 as no plumber yet and was told I was someone's next stop but they couldn't tell me when that would be!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  My dishwasher delivery window is 10 - 2!!!!!  And this worthless, lying company knew this.
BOTTOM LINE:  Do not do business with them as it will be greater headaches that your current plumbing issues.  There are many good, reliable plumbers out there - J. Blanton is NOT ONE OF THEM!!!!!!!

reviews.author: irish
reviews.text: Cameron our plumber was just Awesome!! He worked like a machine and was very organized in how he went about the repairs.(I’m a Union Carpenter so I can relate!)He also KNEW HIS STUFF! And he was very personable and polite! I’d use him again for sure!👍👍

reviews.author: Charlie Benson
reviews.text: Ronnie came to take a detailed look and give me estimates on preventative maintenance. He was polite and thorough, shared his observations, explained options, and answered questions. They have great service tech, and the whole process was quick and seamless.

plumbers.name: 1-Tom-Plumber
plumbers.address: 9200 Pyott Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Cordell Walker
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience with 1-Tom-Plumber from start to finish. They answered my call right away after I discovered my old water heater was leaking, which honestly caught me off guard since it was only about 8 years old. I had a big bulky 75-gallon Richmond power-vent water heater, and by the time I noticed the issue, water was leaking throughout my basement.

To make matters worse, some of my existing plumbing lines were already corroded and beginning to leak as well. I went a full week without hot water while trying to figure out the best long term solution, which was incredibly stressful.

When 1-Tom-Plumber came out, they were professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain all of my replacement options without pressure. After talking it through, I decided to upgrade to a tankless “endless hot water” system. I’m so glad I did.

The new system works amazingly well. I never run out of hot water, and unlike traditional systems, it doesn’t require a specific hard-water softener, so I didn’t have to invest in an additional water softening system. It also doesn’t require costly yearly flushes, which was a huge plus for me.

On top of that, the system comes with a 15-year manufacturer warranty and is made right here in America, which gave me even more confidence in my decision. The workmanship was truly top-notch, the installation was clean, and everything was explained clearly along the way.

I’m extremely happy with my experience and the upgrade. If you’re dealing with water heater issues or considering going tankless, I highly recommend 1-Tom-Plumber. They made a stressful situation so much easier and delivered excellent results.

reviews.author: Cy Nick
reviews.text: What I thought was a simple laundry clog turned out to be a much larger sewer job. Even though Justin was slotted for what was probably a fast job, he was still able to quickly adapt thanks to being incredibly prepared and having everything he could need in his truck, didn't have to run out for parts or tools even once. Got me back up and running quickly and expertly, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kristina
reviews.text: I would absolutely recommend this company and its valuable employee Eric!  He was here within 2 hours (Sunday am at 7) for a leak in the garage ceiling.  Eric was professional and patient in answering our questions and very knowledgeable….for a cubs fan 😂.  He fixed the issue! I would absolutely recommend this company again

reviews.author: jose lopez
reviews.text: The place to call for sure , came home and my ceiling was about to cave in, called them and  they were here in the blink of an eye. Justin did an excellent job and was done in less than 20 minutes. Super friendly and professional.

reviews.author: Peter Bilik
reviews.text: Our tankless water heater froze during the recent subzero temperatures, causing the system to burst and we completely lost hot water. We have a 10 month old baby at home and it was a really tough spot to be in. 1-Tom-Plumber was recommended to us through a local community page and we gave them a shot. Eric was an absolute delight to work with, straightforward, and gave us multiple options not just equipment types but ways to pay. Moises, the owner was also very accommodating and they were all able to get us our hot water back in no time. The install looks clean and professional. They saved us during this big freeze. Thank you Eric!

plumbers.name: North Alabama Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 2918 Meridian St N Suite B, Huntsville, AL 35811, USA

reviews.author: Allen Viggins
reviews.text: I called with an urgent matter while they were booked. Chris made some calls and Bryan was able to come and see me next day. The quoted price was stood by. The work was above expectations. Done quickly and professionally I was highly satisfied and recommend this company to anyone looking for a trust worth reputable company.

reviews.author: Josh Evans
reviews.text: Brian and crew are professional, courteous, prompt, and offer the best price we were quoted! Would definitely recommend North Alabama Plumbing for all your plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Brianna Ogle
reviews.text:
Fast, honest, affordable!!!!
We called on a Sunday afternoon upon finding a wet spot in our ceiling from an upstairs bathroom. They immediately found room where they could on their schedule, and even got here earlier than anticipated!! They communicated very well about arrival time, price, and repairs. No sticker shock and a beautiful working tub faucet with no leaks!! I would give 10 stars if I could! We have always loved working with North Alabama Plumbing!

reviews.author: Beck McDowell
reviews.text:
Can’t recommend these folks highly enough. Chris worked us in on a busy day when we had no kitchen sink, Matthew went under the house multiple times trying to unclog the sink line, and Brian came to the rescue when no one else could
figure out the problem. He came up with a creative solution to the headache that Five Points plumbing is known for. And their price was very reasonable after all the extra work. We appreciate them so much.

reviews.author: Vicki Copeland
reviews.text: I've used North Alabama Plumbing a few times now and they have always gone above and beyond my expectations while charging less than other companies.  I could go on and on, but I"ll just say that their service is without par.  I recommended them to my elderly dad.  Not only did the technician fix his leaking toilet, he checked the whole house and tightened some loose connections.  That peace of mind was priceless.  This is the only plumbing company I have had such positive experiences with and I've used several in the area in previous years.  They're the best!

plumbers.name: Pike Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4341 Stilesboro Ln NW, Kennesaw, GA 30152, USA

reviews.author: Donald richardson
reviews.text: Pike Plumbing did a repiping of my home on November 25th due to a second slab leak since August that I experienced a week earlier. Zack had come out the previous Tuesday, Nov 18th, to give me a quote. That next Monday, Glen, who was coordinating everything, came out to check things out and to leave the supplies since the next day was going to be rainy. Glen was waiting outside when I woke up the next morning. The job started promptly around 9:30, and they finished around 3:30 that same day. The guys did a great job, and I was very satisfied with the outcome. I had contacted two other companies for a quote, and they missed the mark by a long shot. One of them even had me removing the vanity in the master bath. Pike was by far the best price. The price Zack quoted was the price I paid. A week later, I heard a strange thumping sound while using the hot water in the sink in the master bathroom, and they sent someone out to check it out and took care of it right away. I couldn't be happier with the job they did.

reviews.author: Kelly Busch
reviews.text: It is 3 days before Thanksgiving, I have elderly relatives arriving in a few hours, and our water pipe broke in the front yard right before the foundation. I explained my situation and he could hear the panic in my voice. This amazing company had a plumbing technician in my driveway within 2 hours. Thank you Pike Plumbing!! You saved the day and my entire holiday week.

reviews.author: Suzanne Purcell
reviews.text: This company can highly recommended to me and now I know why. I was able to get an appointment quickly and my service Technician Carson Weaver was fantastic and very knowledgeable. I know several people who have used this company for a variety of reasons and they have all been extremely satisfied with the service.

reviews.author: SRav
reviews.text: The entire experience working with the Pike team has been best in class! From my initial conversation where I was educated on all of my water heater options to the quick turn around in scheduling service and then the  exceptionally professional installation was by far a better experience on any/all services I have had on any repair in my house. Thank you Pike team

reviews.author: Alexis Shmookler
reviews.text: Had a great experience with Pike Plumbing today. They came recommended by several folks in my neighborhood. I called for some help to replace my tub drain and they were able to come out the very next day. Josh was extremely knowledgeable, friendly and honest. The price was reasonable - I will definitely be calling Pike again for any future plumbing needs. Thanks all!

plumbers.name: Service Force Plumbing
plumbers.address: 9300 Colesville Rd, Silver Spring, MD 20901, USA

reviews.author: Ryan Rosenfeld
reviews.text: Service Force replaced my boiler and hot water heater and we couldn’t be happier.  It was a tricky job with our older house and awkward setup, but they performed the install and an initial repair quickly and efficiently.

reviews.author: Liz Hutter
reviews.text:
.. We experienced several issues related to timing, and the scope of work shifted significantly from the beginning to the end of the project. Overall, this was not the level of experience we have typically had with your company.

We have had many positive experiences working with you in the past, so I am hopeful this was an isolated situation. That said, I would appreciate the opportunity to speak with someone directly to review the specifics, as I believe there is some important feedback to share

reviews.author: Ian Bates
reviews.text: Joe and Tyler were fantastic. Called them for a pre-purchase inspection for our home. I’m incredibly happy I did! They were fast, professional, and, at the risk of being cliche, professional. I would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jeff Davis
reviews.text: Excellent Service. Tyler showed up on time(was even early) and diagnosed and resolved the issue in less then 30 minutes. Highly recommended and they are my go to for any plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Edward Tanner
reviews.text: Tyler did a great job identifying the problem quickly and finding a solution. The whole process was very simple and easy. Hopefully I don’t need their services again anytime soon, but if I did, I would definitely use service force plumbing in the future.

plumbers.name: Mr. Twister Plumbing & Septic
plumbers.address: 3101 Church St, Hellertown, PA 18055, USA

reviews.author: Mark Morales
reviews.text: Took the time to explain my issue and the cause as well as the solution. Mr Twister went above and beyond exceptional service. My service tech was a well mannered professional who really knew his stuff. If ever needed, no hesitation to have Mr Twister back in my home.

reviews.author: Cydni Ticktin
reviews.text: Mr Twister was able to get us in same day for an emergent issue. Our Technician Mark was absolutely amazing. He took his time to explain and educate us with all of our options and helped create a plan to fix our issue. He was personable, understanding and incredibly helpful. Could not have asked for a better experience.

reviews.author: Linda Smith
reviews.text:
Fantastic work!! This was our first time using Mr. Twister and we are very pleased with their work. After Freddy came out and gave us an estimate on 2 options with reasonable prices we decided to have our 2 (50 yr old) bathrooms redone. Bob K, Bob, Steve, Rob and Jacob K are the guys that worked on the project. They were always on time and cleaned up each day. When it was completed we were extremely happy with our new bathrooms!!  We will definitely refer Mr. Twister to our friends and family. Thank you all for a job well done!
Attached before and after pictures

reviews.author: Matt Keretz
reviews.text: Great job by Luke and the Twister company! Super friendly, talked me through my options, and was super knowledgeable about what was being done. Also, let me know of things to look out for down the road! Thank you again!

reviews.author: Royā Retreat
reviews.text: Mr. Twister has been handling various jobs at my property over the past year, and I can’t recommend them highly enough. They and their team are consistently professional, clear in their communication, and always show up on time. Their pricing is fair, and most importantly, they’re extremely trustworthy — which is rare to find. Every project has been completed with care and attention to detail. It’s a huge relief knowing I can rely on Mr. Twister. Highly recommended.

plumbers.name: Capelli Plumbing
plumbers.address: 536 Lewelling Blvd Suite F, San Leandro, CA 94579, USA

reviews.author: Laura Stamme
reviews.text: Capelli Plumbing has been my go to for years. Recently, I needed a new garbage disposal and was having electrical problems with the old unit.  James promptly scheduled the job for the next day even though it was not an emergency. Edward did an efficient job installing the unit. My house has older wiring issues and they had one of their members (Alex) come and help rewire the unit to fix the electrical issue. They were able to quickly purchase the needed parts and accomplish the job in under an hour. Great work, quick communication and friendly service!

reviews.author: Rick Olivero
reviews.text:
The 2nd time I have used this company and both times the service was excellent. They were efficient and personable the 1st time and exactly the same this 2nd time.
Our tech was Jessie who took his time and was very thorough.  He didn’t leave until the job was complete.  CAPELLI Plumbing better hang on to this young man👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.author: Jolie Enos
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience with Capelli Plumbing.  From the call I had with sonya in the office, to the meeting with plumbing tech, Preston Morales, I felt very confident with moving forward with securing them for my home plumbing job.  Preston was very knowledgeable and helped me understand the issues and why it was happening.  The education he took time to do put my mind at ease, which allowed me to feel confident in moving forward with my home plumbing project.

reviews.author: Rob Capozzi
reviews.text: Amazing work. Wasn’t sold. Acted like a consultant. Explained everything.  Highly recommend would use again. Reasonable prices. Found my plumber!

reviews.author: jerry wong
reviews.text: Capelli Plumbing takes all the stars. Very good communication and also on time. The technician has a lot of experience under his belt and he is very knowledgeable and provided his professional service. He was able to unclog my shower drain and he went one step further to make sure there were no other problems. Thumbs up. Highly recommend Capelli for plumbing services

plumbers.name: PLUMB GENIUS
plumbers.address: 25 N Fretz Ave, Edmond, OK 73003, USA

reviews.author: Michael Stewart
reviews.text:
I hired Plumb Genius/Trophy Plumbing to replace two sets of leaking shower valves on July 22nd, 2025. Simplest job ever. One shower valve set they replaced started leaking again on September 9th. I called them back to see if they would return and rectify the situation. They have a 30-day warranty on their work, but I was 17 days out of that window. These are shower valves...like I said, simplest job ever. Shower valves, in my experience, should last years (the ones they replaced were at least 10 years old...probably closer to 20). They were going to charge me $130 just to show up again. I would have happily paid them for the hourly work, but not a fee to show up (again) to fix (again) what they already proposed to have fixed, and what I paid over $500 to have them fix.

When they informed me the fee would apply in my case as I was out of their warranty window, I informed them I may as well pay someone else a service fee if Plumb Genius/Trophy Plumbing won't stand behind their work. But, they chose to let me move on to another vendor. Really bad business practice and questionable competence at basic plumbing work if you ask me. I will not use them again.

Integrity and character count for something in my opinion, and I can't support a business that doesn't stand behind their work. Especially only 47 days after they charged me $517 for basic, simple services.

reviews.author: Katie Tolbert
reviews.text: AHS sent this company out for a broken hot water tank. They wanted us to pay $1425 out of pocket. My husband took the hot water tank to Home Depot and got it exchanged for free and spent $18 on a new water line.  Total scam. Now called Trophy Plumbing. I’m guessing they changed the name due to terrible reviews.

reviews.author: Miranda Andrews
reviews.text: Jerred and Eric installed a new water heater after ours crapped out. They were 5 minutes early!  Amazing! They gave us a beautiful upgrade and were polite, detailed and professional. I would recommend them take care of you if you want things don’t correctly and up to code. Good job guys and thanks again for coming out on a Saturday.

reviews.author: Jack Washmon
reviews.text:
These people absolutely destroyed my girlfriend's yard, fixed the pipe, ripped up all her grass, and her bushes from the yard and just left them all laying there.
Use someone else, they don't care about the damage they do to your property.

reviews.author: Philip W
reviews.text:
I would give negative 5 stars if I could. Neither plumb, nor genius to be found. They came, "fixed" our water heater, which didn't make it 48 hours. We then initiate replacement through our home warranty.

Ask for an itemized estimate, if you dare, and it will be intentionally vague and riddled with charges that are inexplicable by their staff. I waited a full day for a call from a plumber to explain the items on the estimate and their alleged code violations. Never received a call.

As their supposed customer service representative said, "you can Google it" with regard to their alleged code violations. I did Google it and then got a second opinion. Turns out they coded the water heater to the wrong city, so the entire estimate was wrong. Still wondering what a $600 charge for "Water Modification" meant.

I call the home warranty company to initiate a correction of the incorrect estimate, and Plumb Genius' operations manager says the earliest they can call to correct the issue is Tuesday because of the holiday (it is Friday and we initiated the first service call the previous Friday).

So if you want a company that will do less than the bare minimum to fix their own mistakes, without the slightest sense of urgency, Plumb Genius will get it especially wrong for you. I got my money for the service call back from the home warranty company, and am going with the second opinion, whose estimate was correct the first time, and who thoroughly explained the work.

After this experience, I wouldn't trust them to work in my house, even if they were to correct the errors and perform decent customer service.

plumbers.name: Spicewood Plumbing
plumbers.address: 337 Red Bluff Rd, Spicewood, TX 78669, USA

reviews.author: John Miller
reviews.text: Josh and Trevor were great. Respectful and great communication. Doing a total master bath renovation with moving shower, toilet and vanities. Prompt and thorough. Very satisfied with Spicewood Plumbing.

reviews.author: jackie english
reviews.text: Exceptional courteous service. Showed up on time and quickly resolved our issue. Zeke is a great technician; we love working with him. Spicewood is always our first phone call when we need help with plumbing services.

reviews.author: Kayla Hoffman
reviews.text:
You never want to hear “sorry your tankless water heaters (plural) did not withstand the low temps experienced by HSB”  I even had water collecting in the electrical outlets.  I had to replace two heaters … my builder put the tankless heaters on the exterior of my home and they are not built to withstand freezing temps.  I felt very confident listening and learning from Josh Savage with Spicewood Plumbing. He carefully walked me through the process. New Navien tankless hot water heaters were installed with meticulous precision. It was a lengthy install and no steps were missed.
I am grateful to Josh for the tutorial for winterizing exterior tankless water heaters and now I feel more confident to follow his recommendations. It was a long day but I was so grateful that Spicewood had certified plumbing technicians to install new Naviens. I had a tutorial how to prevent future freezing of water lines within the tankless and Josh knows his business!!  I am 100% satisfied and they are my “go to” plumbers for help!!
Thanks again Spicewood.

reviews.author: Shaun Winn
reviews.text: Spicewood Plumbing did a phenomenal job helping us unclog a very stubborn drain. Josh was professional, knowledgeable, and easy to work with from start to finish. He explained what was going on, took care of the issue efficiently, and the pricing was very fair. The customer service alone sets them apart. If you have any plumbing needs, I highly recommend Spicewood Plumbing. And if you can get Josh, even better!

reviews.author: Donna Gagnon
reviews.text: Josh did amazing work and quick! He was honest and made suggestions for work that should be completed the right way. They also arrive on time and are available to service quickly when needed! I’d highly recommend Spicewood Plumbing! The best company we have used for our plumbing needs since we moved here 9 years ago!

plumbers.name: C. Lee Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 4315 Hudson Dr, Stow, OH 44224, USA

reviews.author: Jessica Rodriguez
reviews.text:
We had an outstanding experience with Jon and Jonny from C. Lee! They were incredibly professional, kind and committed to getting the job done right. Our natural gas pipes needed serious attention, and they worked tirelessly to make sure everything was fixed safely and efficiently. Their clear communication and friendly attitude made the whole process so much easier. We truly appreciate their hard work and dedication
- highly recommend Jon, Jonny, and the entire team at C. Lee!

reviews.author: Terri Brown
reviews.text: C Lee has been my go-to for plumbing in all the 23 years I’ve been in Stow.  Always great service from scheduling, to install, to clean-up…reliably fantastic.  They today replaced my 24 year-old water heater in a few hours on very short notice.  Easy to work with, fair prices, rock-solid workmanship.  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Hannah Betsinger
reviews.text: Tim was great! Very professional, knowledgeable, and he did a fantastic job installing a new gas line and repairing a pipe. I would highly recommend them and look forward to using them for future projects.

reviews.author: Martin Frantz
reviews.text: John was knowledgeable, personable and patient. He answered all my questions and explained everything. I couldn’t be happier with the installation of my water softener system.

reviews.author: Marsha Olesky
reviews.text: Tim was very Experienced, explained what he was doing and why. Very appreciative of his knowledge and work would recommend him for another job and we definitely call if I have any more plumbing issues.

plumbers.name: Mr McGee Plumbing
plumbers.address: 509 W Beam Ave, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Anya Mashaney
reviews.text: Robbie is like if I had a cool uncle that is also a plumber! I've had to call Mr. McGee Plumbing out to my house for various repairs from fixing a toilet to finding (and replacing!) a crushed and corroded copper pipe. Robbie gives me the options, explains the logic, and gets it done. On top of that, scheduling is easy, his pricing is fair, and his disposition is comforting. He navigates my house with kids and dogs and mess with courtesy and kindness. He and his office are so friendly, communicative, and kind. Couldn't ask for a better plumber. Thanks, Robbie & Mr. McGee!!

reviews.author: Lauren Palmer
reviews.text: My parents are elderly and needed taller toilets because of mobility issues. Mr McGee Plumbing was efficient and made things work even in a tight space. He took care of their needs quickly and at a reasonable cost. Would definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Elizabeth Whaley
reviews.text: Great customer service from the beginning of my phone call for booking an appointment to the end of getting my hot water tank installed.  Service was on time and I was impressed with how efficient he was. I will keep his number handy and highly recommend this company. We would give 10 stars if we could.

reviews.author: tracie c
reviews.text: Mr McGee plumbing has been our plumber for several years. Always a pleasure to talk to and he is truthful about issues he may come across.  He does an A-1 job and his prices  are very reasonable. We have never had to call him back for work he has done for us. I recommend Mr. McGee plumbing for all plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Laura Schuman
reviews.text: We've used Mr. McGee twice now and both times have been great! First time was a couple of months ago with new sink install. They redid the pipes under the sink. Today, they snaked the line. Fast, efficient, professional. Highly recommend.

plumbers.name: Domination Plumbing and Heating
plumbers.address: 3A Clement St #1, Worcester, MA 01603, USA

reviews.author: Carolyn Emberley
reviews.text: Domination Plumbing was able to replace my water heater in Auburn, MA as fast as possible and were able to get it replaced under Home Depot warranty where it was purchased! The owner is very responsive and quick to help out clients, very appreciative to have a plumbing company who shows up, communicates, and takes care in the work they do! Thank you again!

reviews.author: Brian Misner
reviews.text:
I’m 60 years old, I had no heat, and my granddaughter was coming over on Friday and this was Tuesday on Wednesday two plumbers showed up they were very courteous, very kind, found where my heating problem was, replaced the pipes in an area of my house that I won’t even let an animal go, even in a crawlspace under my kitchen, I wasn’t worried about the bill, the owner of the company told me that we would figure something out and the next day I woke up and I had heat in the house and it’s absolutely wonderful.

I would not only recommend Domination Plumbing for everything, But when I redo my house, I plan on only using them from now on!!!!!!

reviews.author: John Giery
reviews.text: Great work and extremely professional crew. We lost heat and hot water during a very cold week with a 1 year old baby at home. They arrived first thing in the morning once the parts arrived,  installed a completely new system and did not leave until 12:30am when the job was done.

reviews.author: Jason Maleski
reviews.text:
I recently hired Domination Plumbing based on a referral from a friend to convert a replacement oven from natural gas to propane and install it in my kitchen.

Before choosing them, I called two other plumbing companies. Domination’s pricing was a bit on the higher side, but the others were booked out 2–4 weeks. Domination was able to fit me in that same week, which made hiring them well worth it. Their large crew gave me peace of mind, knowing they have the staff to keep projects on schedule with minimal waiting.

Two employees came to do the work, and they were outstanding. They were very personal to talk to. They also arrived early—which I really appreciated, as most contractors tend to be late—and immediately assessed what was needed before getting right to work. They handled everything efficiently, from removing the old stove to bringing in the new one from the garage, discarding the old unit, and even cleaning up the packaging. Their attention to detail and consideration showed they truly care about their customers.

The installation went smoothly, and the stove worked perfectly. When it came time for inspection, one of their lead plumbers arrived early to meet the inspector, ensuring everything was in order. The inspector was completely satisfied, and the process couldn’t have gone better.

Overall, you get what you pay for. Domination Plumbing delivered professional, timely service with a flexible schedule and a crew that clearly takes pride in their work. I would 100% recommend them to anyone in need of plumbing services.

reviews.author: Audrey MacLean
reviews.text: Dominic and his team came highly recommended in our area from Facebook. When we contacted his business for an hvac concern, they came out within 24 hours! Dominic and his team were very friendly, helpful and answered all of my questions and addressed additional concerns I had with my old plumbing. Domination fixed all of hvac and plumbing issues at an affordable/reasonable price. Would use again.

plumbers.name: Crystal Clear Plumbing
plumbers.address: 820 McArdle Dr, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Joe How
reviews.text:
Pedro arrived within 1 hour on a Monday morning after I called for a leak investigation. He is very knowledgeable and thoughtful during the troubleshooting process, and quickly identified the source of the leak. Despite it's in a very tight location between walls, Pedro demonstrated his skill and experience by adapting to the situation and fixing the leak. His work is very neat and he kept the site very clean.

Such a good experience with Crystal Clear, and their pricing is reasonable. Will call them again for my future plumbing need.

reviews.author: B McG
reviews.text:
We once again hired Crystal Clear Plumbing when our water heater failed us. Jared and Sonny did a wonderful job! I'm glad we found a plumber that we can trust. They do a great job at a fair price and are very respectful of our home. They also installed our kitchen sink and faucet when we installed new counters, as well as a utility sink in our basement. (See review below) Jared takes time to explain everything he and his crew are doing. We really appreciate him! We love Crystal Clear Plumbing!

We hired Crystal Clear Plumbing to install a kitchen sink and faucet after having countertops installed in our kitchen, as well as a utility sink in our basement. Jared came out to give us an estimate. Crystal Clear's pricing was fair, as we received two other estimates for the work. We liked Jared best right from the start. He explained everything that needed to be done. He showed up when he promised and he treated our home as if it was his. We are so grateful we found Crystal Clear Plumbing. If we ever need anything done with our plumbing I will always call Crystal Clear. And I will definitely request Jared! He has wonderful work ethics. I did meet other members of his team who also seemed nice...Pedro, Scott, and another gentleman, but I can't remember his name. All were very kind. Thank you Jared!

reviews.author: Austin Voeller
reviews.text: Scott & Sonny were great! Came out next day to replace our water heater. We’re quick, efficient and clean. Would recommend Crystal Clear Plumbing!

reviews.author: Kevin Ciganek
reviews.text: Scott did an outstanding job running the new plumbing drain for my kitchen sink. His work is very neat, clean and looks great. He was very efficient with his time and explained everything very well.  He also provided some guidance and advice on a couple other projects that I am looking to do, so that is always nice as well. Pricing was reasonable and I'll definitely use this company again for any gas line or plumbing projects in the future.

reviews.author: Eric B
reviews.text: Great experience with Crystal Clear Plumbing. They replaced our water heater quickly and did a professional job. Efficient and easy to work with and I really appreciated their straightforward, transparent pricing

plumbers.name: Affordable Plumbing and Heat
plumbers.address: 9275 N Elm Ct, Federal Heights, CO 80260, USA

reviews.author: Jake Korus
reviews.text: Quick, friendly, honest service. David M was our tech, came to my house when it was just my wife and kids and she said he was very polite and got things in working order quickly. Courtesy is very communicative with their scheduling and I would definitely hire them again!

reviews.author: Ian Alvarado
reviews.text: Had a leaking pipe behind my kitchen sink, and Alec did an amazing job coming to the rescue. Alec had great transparent communication throughout the entire process, and was able to troubleshoot/complete the repairs all in one visit. Would absolutely do business with Alec/Courtesy Plumbing again.

reviews.author: Ned Deakins
reviews.text: I highly recommend Courtesy Plumbing and Heating. Eddie and Drew helped us get back up and running after our furnace and hot water tank reached the end. They were efficient, timely, and the price was more than competitive. Great work. Really appreciate it.

reviews.author: Dillon Huselton
reviews.text: Had a plumbing issue on the 3rd of July and they sent someone out the next day. Dylan was very friendly and knowledgeable about his job. My bathroom has better flow than when we got the place. A must use for anyone with plumbing problems.

reviews.author: cee gee
reviews.text:
Awesome team!
From the start respectful and understanding not just another customer. We got cut off the same person called me back, as we were setting up the appointment my battery died.. Hour later I called back got someone in the springs he found my info and the previous person had saved my scheduled visit confirmed and waiting to get that last bit of info. Their service tech took the time to be personable.. because let's face it we're all careful when it comes to hiring a company to work on our homes. What I appreciated from start of of the appointment was that they took the time to do it right! Not just quote me and go, if something is important it shouldn't be rushed. Call around make sure you not getting ...., I did and I will call on this honest and respectable company for any future needs!
Affordable, a name that means what it says!
Thanks again to all of your staff.

plumbers.name: Plumbing Masters LLC
plumbers.address: 5300 N Meridian Ave Suite 7, Oklahoma City, OK 73112, USA

reviews.author: Detailz Barbershop
reviews.text: I had an emergency DIY repair underneath my sink this morning and I couldn't get it to stop leaking. I found this company on Google they came right out within an hour or so fix the issue and also replaced another valve I was intending to work on and did it at a real decent rate! Now I have them on the schedule to come back Monday to replace my main water line valve inside my house! I was definitely pleased with my first experience with this company! I wish I knew the guy's name they told me he was the general manager that did the job! He deserves a raise 😊! These are pictures of before and after and of the main water valve that will be replaced Monday.

reviews.author: Greyson
reviews.text: Will and Malcolm were excellent. Quick response time and diligent service. Repair was completed the same day. 10/10, will contact Plumbing Masters LLC for my future needs.

reviews.author: Dylan Smith
reviews.text: Plumbing Masters LLC was able to squeeze me in earlier than expected! Malcum was punctual, friendly and knowledgeable. The price was reasonable and they gave me a 10% teacher discount. It's hard to beat local businesses supporting our educators like that! Highly recommend Plumbing Masters LLC for anyone, but especially teachers!

reviews.author: Robert Lee
reviews.text:
I had a clogged drain and Plumbing Masters was my first call. Immediately from the first call
I was in good hands, Jasmine was so sweet and understanding. I got scheduled and had Chiconas out quickly. Not only were Malcom and Troy professional, they were courteous! They had me taken care of and even cleaned up after themselves. It’s hard to find an honest reliable company but this place hits the mark. Thanks Plumbing masters for doing quality work!

reviews.author: Indira Cannon
reviews.text:
The best. I had a nightmare leak and they seriously worked through it like champs. Made sure that cabinets didn’t have to be torn out (which other companies immediately wanted to do) and just very patient. Shout out to Malcom. I’m sorry I turned the water on and you ended up getting soaked. Steve and Alfredo!
Recommend this company 100/100

plumbers.name: Titan Plumbing & Drain Services
plumbers.address: 1830 Wallace Ave STE 217, St. Charles, IL 60174, USA

reviews.author: Jessie Zepeda
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful we are happy with Titan. We were pretty much in a jam not only one clog. We had three clogs in our master bedroom and our kitchen and in our laundry room. I know nothing about Plumbing or how to find somebody so I went on the Internet. I found about 10 plumbers and I checked for reviews, after talking to a few plumbers some of them absolutely were scared to work at my home so that terrified me and my wife we didn’t think we’re gonna find any Plumber since we had an old home, wow when I got to tighten I told him I need somebody very experience they sent out Dave, not only did he make us feel calm and cool. He said will be able to do the job. He didn’t turn it down. He actually went over everything with the Plumbing with us and sat down with us and told us what it was our option we said let’s just get it all done so he came on a Saturday not only did he fix one room, but he was able to fix all three rooms my laundry room, my master bedroom and my kitchen. Our plumbing is running great better than before and trust me. Our pipes were really bad so I wanna take Titan and Dave especially for helping us out when we really need them not only do I recommend them. They’re the only people we’re gonna use for our Plumbing trust me if I can give them 10 stars I will let me tell you this they’re pricing was unbelievable. We can afford it. Me and my wife are on a budget. Tighten worked with us. He went over every job and how much it was gonna be. I appreciate that.

reviews.author: Michael Trejo
reviews.text: Out of the 4 places I called this morning they were the only ones that had a person actually pick up the phone. Schedule a service call for the afternoon but I was able to finally unclog my toilet. I called the cancel and it was smooth with no pressure for them to still come out. If I ever have a plumbing issue I will be coming to Titan.

reviews.author: Timo Lyons
reviews.text: Titan always delivers. I went down to my basement New Year’s Eve and found my hot water heater leaking. A quick call to Titan and they had a plumber out to my place within 2 hours and a new water heater installed shortly after. They were professional, tidy and skilled. I highly recommend these guy!!

reviews.author: matt trinidad
reviews.text: Worked with titan plumbing since we moved into the house and they have been amazing. Recently added a clean out since out house didn’t have one and it’s made fixing any plumbing problems a breeze. david was on site doing amazing work and thoroughly explained the issue and what the options are. Pam was great at coordinating any updates that would come up and wanted to make sure that my plumbing problems were no more. highly recommend.

reviews.author: Janice Holland
reviews.text: Titan came out quickly when our sump pump went out. Lou was very professional and answered all our questions. He gave us all our options and the prices so we could choose the sump pump we wanted. Many plumbers just give one option, and that’s what they install. That is what our old plumber did. Lou patiently trained an apprentice plumber that day, even though they were very busy. Lou came back again to install a new backup pump and used a special camera to check our drain tile which also needs work. It was backing up during the heavy rain. This is a really good plumbing company. I would definitely use them again. The company we always used told us to get someone else because they were too busy that day due to heavy rains. Titan is so helpful and cares about the quality of service they provide to their customers.

plumbers.name: Spartan Plumbing
plumbers.address: 5440 Marshall St, Arvada, CO 80002, USA

reviews.author: Henk M
reviews.text:
One morning we discovered our water heater was leaking badly. Through Yelp we came into contact with Spartan Plumbing and they told us they could send a technician within hours.
They sent José. José was very knowledgeable and pleasant to be around. He explained exactly what was going on and gave us a list with options on how he could fix things, together with price quotes. Again, he explained exactly what everything meant. After we made our choice he went out to buy materials and fixed up the place. After the work was done he told us how to best maintain the new stuff.
I feel comfortable to recommend Spartan Plumbing after this good experience.

reviews.author: Gary Fuller
reviews.text: Spartan (Christian with Abel) tackled and solved a large project at our home, which required expertise and skill (jackhammering, correcting improper connections, etc.). They arrived when they said, worked hard and politely kept me informed during the five days. They cleaned up the large mess remarkably well. I hope not to have future problems, but if I do, I'll call Spartan first.

reviews.author: Miracle Holloway
reviews.text: Vaughn did a great job on our water heater replacement. He showed up on time, was respectful in our home, and walked us through different options without pushing us in one direction. That stood out to us because a couple other plumbing companies we spoke with were more focused on selling than actually helping. The install came out clean and everything is working great

reviews.author: George Hatfield
reviews.text: Christian replaced our water heater and made the whole experience way easier than expected. He was professional, explained our options clearly, and never once made us feel pressured into spending more than we needed to. We had already talked to other companies and it honestly felt like they were trying to take advantage of the situation. Spartan Plumbing was the complete opposite. Very thankful for Christian and the work he did.

reviews.author: Eric Sheffey
reviews.text: Great experience working with Christian and Vaughn. They replaced a whole house water softener system for us, and added a hose bib to our outdoor gardening area. Vaughn worked hard all day to finish the project for us, and we are very happy with the work. We will definitely be keeping Spartan's number on hand for future plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Morning Noon Night Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 8557 44th St, Lyons, IL 60534, USA

reviews.author: Kara Lyons
reviews.text: Marco came out to help with a leak we had from our primarily bathroom going through to our living room. He was super informative about his time of arrival, the issues we were having, and helped us walk through next steps with a mold remediation company. Marco was super mindful of cost and collaborative with our other contractors. His expertise and empathy were very much appreciated during this stressful time.

reviews.author: Londell Thomas
reviews.text: We've been dealing with a clogged kitchen sink in our garden apartment for years. We contacted morning noon and night for a permanent solution and Christian and Marco had one. The service was great as was the attention to detail. I recommend this company to anyone!

reviews.author: Joe Mark
reviews.text:
Christian came out for an emergency call at 9:00 pm for a sink that was backing up from a main line in our condo building.
He rodded out the drain line and fixed some other small repairs. We were happy with his work and would recommend him to anyone looking for a good plumber.

reviews.author: Stefvanni Steans
reviews.text: Excellent service! They came out so fast and were very knowledgeable! Marco and Christian were very professional and didn’t mind when my dad wanted to help out! If you’re ever in a pinch give them a call! Very transparent with pricing and extremely helpful!

reviews.author: Wayne S
reviews.text:
Second time I’ve used them in the last year. Can’t say enough about the professionalism and good service. TJ came out to hone me an estimate on what I thought I needed, and me gave me some better options through diagnosing before doing the big job I thought I needed.
He spent time explaining his process and the reasoning for it. I went with his suggestions and it generally fixed my issues without going for the big $ project. Strongly appreciate his explanations, professionalism and work he did. And he saved me money in the long run. Definitely recommend Morning Noon and Night plumbing.

plumbers.name: Air Man Heating, Cooling & Plumbing (Air Management Services Inc)
plumbers.address: 1030 Greenlee St, Marengo, IL 60152, USA

reviews.author: Robert Koehler
reviews.text:
I had a fantastic experience with the team for my new AC and whole-home humidifier installation. They also installed a smart thermostat for me and took the time to make sure I was comfortable using it before they left. From the initial booking to the completion of the project, the entire process was seamless.
The crew was professional, arrived right on schedule, and did an incredible job cleaning up, you wouldn’t even have known they were there. It’s rare to find such high-quality service, technical expertise, and genuine attention to detail. I am thrilled with how the new system is running and would highly recommend them to anyone in the Woodstock, IL area looking for high-quality HVAC work.
