reviews.author: Crystal Levy
reviews.text: I recently had some home improvements done, including a new water heater in the bathroom vent/light installation and I couldn’t be happier with the experience from start to finish. The team was outstanding Rosa who scheduled everything was incredibly helpful, kind and flexible. She made the whole process, smooth and stress-free. Every crew member who came to my home was professional, courteous, and respectful. They worked efficiently answered all my questions and made sure everything was done right the quality of the work exceeded my expectations and I felt completely comfortable having them in my home.  The entire crew was fantastic! I Highly recommend this group to anyone looking for reliable high-quality home service they made the process easy and the results speak for themselves

reviews.author: Areil Eckardt
reviews.text:
Amazing. 10 out of 10!!
Bought a new water heater and had it installed today. Andy and Asa showed up just after 8:30 am and were done by 11:15am.
Let me tell you, I was dealt the dream team! They were so professional, friendly and personable.
We just bought our townhouse and only rented prior so I guess you could say this was my first rodeo "Adulting". I didn't know what to expect and they made the whole process feel so seamless. I highly recommend this company and these techs for all your heating, cooling, and plumbing needs.
Its inevitable that I will need their services again in the future. I will 1000% be calling them first!

reviews.author: Philip Smith
reviews.text: We use AirMan because their team is knowledgeable and professional. They maintain both our ac and baseboard heat/boiler.  Most recently they addressed an issue with our high efficiency heater was whistling. The team stayed highly engaged while resolving the issue and kept us informed. I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Luna Moon
reviews.text: Joe and Jose did a lovely job! Quick, courteous, and professional. Rosa in the office is so nice! An absolutely pleasant experience to set up an appointment. These vents were so gross but after Airman cleaned them, I'm confident my allergies and health will improve dramatically! 10/10 will hire again.

plumbers.name: Thomas E Clark Inc
plumbers.address: 2412 Linden Ln, Silver Spring, MD 20910, USA

reviews.author: Parker Goodfellow
reviews.text:
Thank you Thomas E Clark and DCDOE and their Lead Pipe Replacement Assistance Program (LPRAP).

With funding through DDOE LPRAP program we were finally able to get the last piece of lead out of our incoming water system.

Thomas E Clark answered our request for service promptly, sent out a project manager to confirm that we were in fact eligible for the LPRAP, received approval from DDOE to perform the work, applied for and received all permits, and performed the water line replacement all within the span of 3 weeks. From initial call to the water line being replaced.

Their crew was on time, courteous, and explain the process in exacting detail, giving us milestones for when we could expect the water to be turned off and turn back on as the line was replaced. Their house call Pro scheduling app made it very easy to communicate with the project manager as well as the technicians, and provided real-time tracking of their location and eta through the house call Pro app.

I'm very thankful to Thomas E Clark and the LPRAP program for providing this service to the District of Columbia residents.

I remember a time in DC when Department of Health came to houses that had young children and tested them for lead, I was one of those kids.

The water may taste a little less sweet after today! But at least my kids won't have to deal with this lead problem in the future. What a wonderful program.

reviews.author: Danial Mcghie
reviews.text:
Thomas Clark did a fantastic job on site. They were respectful, quick, cleaned up after their work, amd talked me through both the problem and the solution. They completed a lead service line replacement flawlessly, and changed a long section of galvanized pipe. They were affordable and quick.

Ill definitely be returning to this team with any future plumbing issues.

Best

reviews.author: Helen Epps
reviews.text:
I was very pleased with almost all of my interactions with Thomas E. Clark. They were personable and prompt ., and thorough in return contacts and on the day of the service, kept me well apprised of their arrival time which was right in the middle of the range that had been set.
The service lead, Timothy, diagnosed the problem near the shower headand then fixed it. He also suggested another possible fix for the other faucet and gave me two alternatives: the super one for $250 and the McIyver for free. I took the second and am very happy with it.
I will likely turn to this company first with plumbing issues in the future.

reviews.author: Verna Clayborne
reviews.text: On November 18 & 19, 2025 workers David, Ezekiel and IBrahim with Thomas E. Clark replaced the lead pipe from the city line to inside my home with a copper pipe. The work was grueling but they did a tremendous job. They were professional, careful of the inside of the house and they restored everything back as it was ( hole covered, straw put down, patio walkway lites put back). They even installed a new water filter on the faucet of my kitchen sink because I knew I couldn't figure it out. The cost (with a special lead replacement program in DC was '0' to me.  I recommend this company highely and kudos to these three workers.

reviews.author: Robert Braunohler
reviews.text: We have used Thomas E Clark for plumbing as well as HVAC services for over two years. We find their service to be of excellent quality, prompt and fairly priced. For emergency repairs, they can usually respond within the same day.

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing of Oklahoma City
plumbers.address: 2839 S Portland Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73108, USA

reviews.author: John Hassell
reviews.text:
Garrett came out and did an amazing job ! Got everything I needed done today handled and quoted some work for me that will be done in the future. Great service and a more than reasonable price! 100% recommend. Thanks for the great work Garrett it is truly appreciated.

I had Gus come out to do some work today. Another great experience. He did an amazing job. He was able to make my kitchen sink faucet area look great when I thought there was no chance. He had his work cut out for him with the projects here. He more than excelled. Oh ! And that mustache is even better  than Garrett’s outstanding stache.

reviews.author: Harold Ochs
reviews.text: Chris and Gus did a great job on all the repairs I had done. They were friendly and very knowledgeable.  Did good job of cleaning up and explained all the work they did. Very satisfied.

reviews.author: Sally Dixon
reviews.text: Chris throughly assessed and explained my most pressing plumbing needs and helped me come up with a plan. He and Gus were friendly and efficient.

reviews.author: Brian
reviews.text:
Arren and Chris did great job. They listened to my description of the issue and my concerns. They seemed to be very thorough in their review and gave me a clear assessment of what they found and recommendations for moving forward.

When delivering the quote they gave me options, which was much appreciated. They completed the job the same day, and at the quoted price. They were professional, courteous, friendly, and competent. I couldn’t ask for better. I would highly recommend the company and those two especially

reviews.author: Gang Gang
reviews.text: Gus was amazing and was very understanding to the issue. Listened and gave reassurance. The price was also amazing!!!!! I will always use them for my plumbing repairs.

plumbers.name: ABC Plumbing, Sewer, Heating, Cooling & Electric
plumbers.address: 828 Davis St UNIT 205, Evanston, IL 60201, USA

reviews.author: anamebanana
reviews.text: Do not trust them they lie do a poor job and leave you hanging on snowstorm days. Monday Nov 10, 2025 - call them for a leak two people came spend the entire day charged 600 dlls now I have more leaks that when I started. Call them again with multiple leaks on Saturday they said they couldn’t bring someone until Monday the same technician calls me and says he will be here Sunday 10 am he LIED to me!!! He never showed up … it is after a snowstorm spend the night worried about my property and myself…couldn’t sleep worried about the leaks …horrible..Monday my property has multiple leaks it is being damaged as we speak..I called again and now waiting for someone to come… I don’t trust them any longer.

reviews.author: Meredith Goodspeed
reviews.text: Juan did an incredible job helping us with our furnace. He was so detailed, provided thorough assessment and ultimately a fix. While waiting for the right part he kept in contact to assure us he was working to locate the part… he personally made me feel confident we were in the best hands. On top of his expertise, he was so kind and lovely. He provided a wonderful customer experience during a time when our furnace went out (usually a high stress moment). I will now have abc as our first call whenever we have a need because of how great this experience was. Thank you Juan!

reviews.author: Robert Feldman
reviews.text:
Tim Leary was the best HVAC tech I have ever dealt with in the over 35 years of home ownership!  He was friendly, knowledgeable, professional, and supportive to me as a homeowner and long time customer.    He diagnosed a major problem with our furnace and immediately took action to have it taken care of ASAP....from ordering the correct parts, to the logistics of the service people who will do the major repair.

I highly recommend Tim Leary!  He makes me happy I am an ABC customer and I will request him to continue to service our furnace and A/C from now on!

reviews.author: Patrick Motherway
reviews.text:
Had a great experience today with Andrey, who not only fixed my HVAC unit , but offered a hand helping me move something. This original review was a 1 star review from an issue a year ago. I was happy to change it and receive the great service I did today.

I will also add that Melissa in the office was very helpful in getting me fast and great service.

reviews.author: Kate Murray
reviews.text: I was so grateful that my unexpected appt need (had 16 hrs b4 I had to leave state) happened and Ronan came eve. Tho it was crazy late - he had a smile, friendly but earnest demeanor- assured me that heating units were fine for me to leave state!  Thanks so much Ronan!!🙏🏻❤️

plumbers.name: Smooth Saling Plumbing & Water Heater Replacement
plumbers.address: 3511 Gallatin Pike Office 318, Nashville, TN 37216, USA

reviews.author: Eric Fox
reviews.text: Finally decided to upgrade to a tankless water heater so I reached out to Smooth Saling. Connor’s team did an amazing job on the install and educating my wife and me on how it works. I’m very impressed with the performance of the unit. We can now run a full bath and not worry about the water becoming luke warm. An added bonus is the extra space we gained. We’ve had a closet that was dedicated to a huge water tank ever since we’ve lived in our house. Now that we have the tankless heater, we have a full closet that can be used for storage! I couldn’t be happier with the service.

reviews.author: Kathy Massingale
reviews.text: Conor and Colin were outstanding! Very professional and knowledgeable, but also super friendly. Trustworthy , too. Price was great! I highly recommend SmoothSaling Plumbing!

reviews.author: Mark Newcomb
reviews.text: Everything was truly smooth sailing with Smooth Sailing Plumbing! From the moment I reached out, they were able to come out and fix my plumbing issue the very same day. Communication was excellent throughout the process, pricing was reasonable, and they took the time to clearly explain what they found and how they fixed it. The team was professional, approachable, and easy to work with. I would absolutely use their services again and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them to friends.

reviews.author: Gyasi Kellam
reviews.text: Had a great experience with Smooth Saling. They were super responsive, quick to get back to me, and very upfront about pricing. Communication was excellent and the work was done efficiently and professionally. I’d definitely recommend them and would use them again.

reviews.author: Jessica B
reviews.text: Reverse Osmosis installation was easy breezy!!! Alex arrived exactly on schedule and explained the process and helped me determine the best location for the RO system and the air switch. He completed the job swiftly and explained how everything worked once it was installed. He was respectful of our home, cleaned everything up and placed everything back where it was before the install. His service was excellent and professional! Thanks guys! Will absolutely have you back out for future needs .

plumbers.name: My Plumber LLC
plumbers.address: 113 Hickory Brook Ln, Acworth, GA 30101, USA

reviews.author: Eric Dreffin
reviews.text: Tim and the team did a great job. I had started a plumbing project changing out a shower tub combo and decided to call My Plumber LLC and let the pros handle it. Tim arrived and told me what was needed to finish it and gave me a great quote. He ordered the correct parts and the next day arrived and finished the project. He came during the schedule window and communication both via text and phone was great. Couldn’t be happier with the quality of work and professionalism. Would use again and highly recommend.

reviews.author: kimberly george
reviews.text: My plumber was a lifesaver! I called them at 9:00 on a Sunday morning and Tim showed up at 12:00 to fix the frozen pipe issue. He had back up and running in an hour. Thank you so much my plumber for your timely service and professionalism.

reviews.author: Scott Burklow
reviews.text: Very thankful for the quality service and quick response I received from My Plumber.  Tim provided a thorough explanation of the issue and completed the work promptly.  I highly recommend their services.

reviews.author: Julian Tychanski
reviews.text: Really happy with the quality of work and outstanding service by Tim from My Plumber! Would definitely recommend and am thrilled with the great results of our new water line installed. Enormous Thanks!

reviews.author: Charles Menifee
reviews.text: Huge thank you to our plumber who came to the rescue early on a Sunday morning. We woke up to a mess and he showed up fast, figured out the problem right away, and had everything fixed before breakfast. Super friendly, super dependable, and really knows his stuff. Couldn’t ask for better service. Highly recommend!

plumbers.name: Tim Whistler Plumbing, Gas Fitting, HVAC, and Electrical
plumbers.address: 2345 Distribution Cir, Silver Spring, MD 20910, USA

reviews.author: Darwin J Feuerstein
reviews.text:
We have used Tim Whistler Plumbing on numerous projects in our home, from plumbing upgrades to repairs. Our recent experience with them capping a gas line to our range was exceptional service as usual. (We upgraded to an induction range) Chris arrived on time and explained the work as he was completing it. Very knowledgable and professional. We appreciated the high level of customer service provided and the quick response from the office in setting up an appointment to accommodate our schedule.
We definitely use them again

reviews.author: Steven Denmark
reviews.text: We have been very happy with all Tim Whistler plumbing work at our house. Each technician is competent, and they know when to call for additional help. We had Kevin answer the plumber call. We quickly learned he is a very good plumbing technician. He has a positive attitude. A challenge does not throw him "off-game". He is calm & mature. We like him as our plumber.

reviews.author: Thi
reviews.text: They were quick to schedule and send a technician, which I appreciated. I do wish the $145 diagnostic fee had been mentioned when booking, and the quote felt higher than expected for the shower valve and trim replacement. I moved forward with another reputable company that charged about half the price.

reviews.author: Joseph Rogers
reviews.text:
We needed help with two different gas fireplaces.  Saul from Tim Whistler plumbing was huge help.  He was prompt, quickly analyzed the issues we had….and in one case we did not have.  Then explained more about how these things work and the basic T hi ings needed to insure both workability and safety.  He then cleaned and tested for gas leaks (none!) and was promptly on his way.  I recommend Saul for your fireplace needs be they gas or wood burning.

Well I am back posting again for the good work from Tim Whistler Plumbing.  This time by Steven who was quickly able to discern an issue with our garbage disposal and correct it immediately.  And at a reasonable cost.  Then upon my request he looked at our hot water heater in our basement.  I told him it was a bit over ten years old and though it will ultimately need replacing, he turned and noticed some warning cards on some of our pipes.  They indicated they needed service and adjustment every five years.  Yipes!  Suffice it to say that will happen soon but what I appreciate is the proactive manner he took with our home and not just ton”up sell” us, but rather to protect us.  Thanks!

reviews.author: Janice Fain Dean
reviews.text: Chris from Tim Whistler Plumbing did a great job.  He went out of his way to get the right parts for our specific toilet and diagnosed & fixed our kitchen leak quickly and efficiently.  He told me the price ahead of time and was friendly and cordial.  Thanks so much for a job well done!

plumbers.name: Legendary Service Inc.
plumbers.address: 25741 Hillview Ct, Mundelein, IL 60060, USA

reviews.author: Kimberly Gumino
reviews.text:
We had an emergency this week when our older boiler stopped working and the house dropped to 45°F during sub-zero temperatures. Legendary Heating Plumbing and Cooling took our call at 6:30am and had us connected with Sean within minutes.

Sean arrived within hours, diagnosed the issue quickly, and explained the best solutions in a clear and honest way. His pricing was excellent and straightforward. As new owners of an older home, we truly appreciated how he took the time to walk us through our system and explain what we have and how it works.

We were so impressed that we signed up for Legendary’s ongoing maintenance plan, which costs less than what we pay monthly for some apps.

The most incredible part: out of all the companies we called, when Sean arrived we realized he was the last person who had worked on our actual system over 10 years ago. His name was still on the service sticker.

Legendary is exactly the right name for this company. They are now our go-to HVAC specialists moving forward.

– Palak Family

reviews.author: Riya George
reviews.text:
We had an issue with our sewage pump, and Frank W. was fantastic from start to finish. He quickly diagnosed what was going on with our old pump, walked us through the fix, and replaced it with a new one without any hassle. On top of that, he took the time to answer a bunch of general plumbing and HVAC questions we had, and never made us feel rushed.

Frank is incredibly patient, friendly, and professional. His work is methodical, clean, and very tidy. He clearly takes pride in doing things the right way. We genuinely felt taken care of, and we’d absolutely call him again and recommend him / Legendsry Service to anyone needing plumbing help.

We also signed up for the membership!

reviews.author: pushpendu pal
reviews.text:
Legendary service is a great company. Both Joe and Frank who I have interacted several times are customer focused, try to understand your need and provide services accordingly. Frank came to install the ejector pump and prop implemented the water heater tank and did a great job. Clean and professional.

Thank you

reviews.author: Jessica Federico
reviews.text: Frank came out for a service call today for a slow shower drain. His service, communication, knowledge, and friendliness all go way above and beyond- truly exemplary! Our shower drain and sink drain both had a buildup of gunk which Frank cleaned while he was running a flow test on our shower- again, absolutely above and beyond! Before leaving he also offered to take a look at anything else I had questions about- I’ve never had such thorough service. I am so appreciative of Frank and we plan to utilize him for any and all future plumbing needs! Thank you Frank!

reviews.author: Halena Hutnyk
reviews.text: Ben and Dylan installed our new water heater and softener, and fixed our badly installed water pipes. They were tidy and professional, and helped us understand the new equipment and how to take care of it. Overall a great experience and highly recommend them! Looking forward to working with Legendary on all our plumbing and HVAC needs.

plumbers.name: Journeymen Plumbing and Sewer LLC
plumbers.address: 30W270 Butterfield Rd Unit 117, Warrenville, IL 60555, USA

reviews.author: Michael Snyder
reviews.text: I called Journeymen plumbing out for some dishwasher and tub leaking issues, both of which they were able to accurately diagnose and troubleshoot, resulting in both issues being fixed. Over the phone I talked with Caleb who was very pleasant and professional to talk with, and then Noah was the technician that arrived to the house. Noah was also very pleasant, communicative, and easy to talk with. He walked through all the steps of the repair with us before doing it, and very nicely showed us the problems and what needed to be fixed. Overall, I was very happy with our experience with the company!

reviews.author: Barone's
reviews.text: The plumber we have had servicing us for years recently retired.  Journeyman Plumbing was suggested to us, and we have had them out several times within the last month to help with a few plumbing issues.  Caleb the owner has been wonderful to work with. We have received call backs promptly and the work they have done has been clean and efficient.  Happy we have found another great plumber to call for our needs.  Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Lilah Rabe
reviews.text: Our sewer had backed up. Caleb came out quickly, cleared the problem, and provided us with a great video of our pipes all the way to the connection with the city sewer. Great service at a very reasonable price. We have our new plumber for any future plumbing work!

reviews.author: K M
reviews.text: We contacted Journeymen Plumbing and received a call back from Caleb the same day.  He was very professional and friendly and booked an appointment for the following day. Kyle unclogged the kitchen sink drain and fixed a low pressure faucet. He was very knowledgeable, professional and listened. He covered the floor before setting his equipment down, which I really appreciated. His work was high quality at a very fair price. I will definitely use their service again.

reviews.author: Lisa Miller
reviews.text:
Excellent service!  Noah was very knowledgeable.  He not only explained what was wrong but how it would be fixed.  He also gave me some very important information on our water heater pipes (we have 2 water heaters) that could affect our health due to new EPA changes.  He was here for over 2 hrs. the cost was $650.
We will definitely call to have him come again & will also use them for plumbing issues at our business.

Thankyou for the prompt, informative, & reasonable cost to resolve to our issues.

Lisa M.

plumbers.name: Eagle Heat, Air and Plumbing; Septic and Shelters
plumbers.address: 1409 Industrial Village Rd, Ardmore, OK 73401, USA

reviews.author: Lane Paul
reviews.text: Not all heroes wear capes. Some wear company t-shirts and drive a van with American flag flames! I called Eagle at 8:17 and they had Cameron and Grant out by 9:00. They quickly diagnosed my AC problem, had the needed parts in their van, and completed the motor replacement in under 2 hours! Fantastic job, reasonable price, and great crew of guys!

reviews.author: Judy Ott
reviews.text: Eagle is the absolute Best company!! I thought I had a small problem, but it was a Big problem! Eagle stayed all day and worked hard on my plumbing and got it all fixed!! I would highly recommend them!! They were very knowledgeable and explained everything to me before they did it. I am so very grateful to those hard working guys!! They charged me a very reasonable price!! Very satisfied customer!! Thank you so very much!!

reviews.author: Sofia Garcia
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 5-Star Review for Eagle Plumbing

I had an excellent experience with Eagle Plumbing! They were super efficient, friendly, and very respectful. The technicians even wore shoe covers, which I really appreciated. I was having trouble with my toilet not flushing properly, and they were able to diagnose and fix the issue in less than 30 minutes. Fast, professional service from start to finish. Highly recommend Eagle for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Kara Idleman
reviews.text: Eagle HVAC & Plumbing, & septic recently completed the rough-in plumbing for our new home build. Overall, we’ve had a very positive experience. We met Cody, the owner and 2 team members that were all professional and friendly.  We look forward to working with them through the completion phase. 😊

reviews.author: Glen Brownlee
reviews.text: We appreciate their fast response to our problem. They always were here when they said they would and sent messages before coming. All of them were very respectful and very hard working to get our sewer line installed in a timely manner. We definitely recommend this company. Thanks again to Cody, Michael and crew.

plumbers.name: Paramount Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2131 Moon Station Dr NW, Kennesaw, GA 30144, USA

reviews.author: Stephanie G.
reviews.text:
I wanted to take the time to send a shout out to the guys at Paramount Plumbing. We purchased our home when it was stripped down to the studs. While some plumbing was still in place, it was old black pipe with visible cracks, past leaks, and multiple patch repairs from prior owners. We received several estimates and ultimately chose Paramount Plumbing — and we’re so happy we did.

Paramount completely re-plumbed our entire home with 100% new plumbing. They also installed sinks, showers, drains, toilets, vanities, hose spickets...everything. We had changed the floor plan significantly, added multiple bathrooms, an additional kitchen, a pantry with a sink, a main-floor laundry room, and ended up with five bathrooms total. They also jetted our main sewer line, which helped us avoid having to jackhammer the slab — a huge win.

They recommended and replaced our water heater, repaired and replaced gas lines as needed, and even ran new gas lines to our 60-year-old fireplace. Their recommendations were greatly appreciated, and the quality of work was excellent. They also reccomended ways we could save on cost which is a really big deal when you have to do that much remodeling.

Out of every contractor involved in our remodel, Paramount Plumbing was the only one who showed up every day, on time, and completed their work efficiently, timely and correctly. They took the time to do things the right way, and it genuinely felt like they cared about the quality and long-term reliability of their work.

We built a large custom shower with four independent fixtures, and they executed it perfectly. I sleep better at night knowing the plumbing was done right.

They were also the only contractor on our entire project who passed county inspection quickly and without issues. After the challenges we faced with other trades, Eric, Aiden, and Ferman from Paramount were the best part of our remodel experience.

Highly recommend the guys at Paramount.

reviews.author: Jenna Baadshaug
reviews.text:
I am the property manager of a Condominium Association in Atlanta. About a year ago, the association determined that a change was needed regarding the building plumber. A Board Member and I initially met with Nick to tour the building and review its complex plumbing system. Since that time, Nick has served as the primary building plumber, and I truly cannot say enough positive things about him.

Nick is consistently prompt, professional, and clear in his communication. He always takes the extra time—often an additional 5–10 minutes—to thoroughly explain issues and solutions in a way that is easy to understand, which is incredibly valuable when working with Boards and homeowners.

Most recently, the association experienced a significant pipe burst. I immediately contacted Paramount Plumbing, and Nick was on-site within an hour. Upon arriving around 9:00 PM, he quickly assessed the situation and took immediate action. He worked diligently until nearly 5:00 AM, without complaint, ensuring the repairs were completed properly.

Throughout the entire process, Nick kept both me and the Board President fully informed. His calm demeanor, professionalism, and exceptional communication were instrumental in managing a very stressful situation.
I highly recommend Nick and Paramount Plumbing and am extremely grateful for the level of service, dedication, and reliability they consistently provide.

reviews.author: Ashley Kwon
reviews.text:
Nick and Aiden from Paramount Plumbing were great to work with. They quickly figured out the potential causes of my washer drain pipe overflowing in my high-rise condo in Midtown and fixed the issue efficiently. Both were friendly, professional, and took the time to explain what was going on and how to prevent future problems.

I really appreciated the small details too — they wore shoe coverings and gave helpful tips for safely leaving a condo unattended. Highly recommend Paramount Plumbing!

reviews.author: Teresa Green
reviews.text: Called them to come and give me an estimate for replacing my water heater.  Their price was the best. Sosa and Landon arrived on time and went right to work.  Everything was finished and cleared away in just over 3 hours.  Both were professional and very personable.  I would definitely recommend Paramount for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Laura Thompson
reviews.text:
HIGHLY RECOMMEND - Overdue review as I've used this company for over 1.5yrs -  it's a hard world of "who can you trust" yet Paramount Plumbing is the best. I've been extremely pleased by their professionalism, expertise and overall kindness in handling one emergency, and a few service issues.

Fermin uncovered and fixed an HVAC blockage that SLAM Plumbing recommended I spend $1000 and go into the wall to "fix" but wasn't sure if would fix it or not. Unreal.

Fermin and Jason deserve special shout out and recognition for their overall knowledge, expertise and how they helped in the various situations.

Thank you all for being easy to schedule with, quick to action (at least in my experience), great to work with, trustworthy, and overall fantastic company!

plumbers.name: Daniel & Donna Plumbing Service, Inc - Broomfield, CO
plumbers.address: 2191 W 156th Ave, Broomfield, CO 80023, USA

reviews.author: Kaye Albano
reviews.text: Daniel worked at my home and made multiple repairs including a faucet repair, and installing a double shower head. Upfront and honest with affordable pricing. Definitely recommend and will use them again. 👍

reviews.author: Ben Martinez
reviews.text:
Daniel, his two sons, Daniel and Nico, did a great job of replacing a 4 foot length of line a toilet drain that had a 1/16th x 1/4th inch opening. I chose them as their site mentioned they also do the demo and repair as a result of the repair of plumbing.
Also, all three were very personable including me in all plans.

reviews.author: Antonia Pappas
reviews.text: This is the second time having them to the house for plumbing repair work, this time it was to replace my water heater that was living on borrowed time.  They checked thoroughly to make sure it couldn’t be repaired.  Then walked me through the process and provided a quote with options.  Super friendly, worked quickly and efficiently and left the work area cleaner than they found it!

reviews.author: Morning Glory Cafe
reviews.text: Daniel and Daniel unclogged our restaurant's sewer and fixed a leak on one of our faucets. They got there on time and fixed the problem right away. Definitely will hire them again soon. Their prices are also more competitive than our previous Plumber. Thank you, Daniel and Donna, for plumbing!

reviews.author: Phillip McSween
reviews.text: Great family-owned business with amazing service. Seriously, these guys are top-notch and reasonably price with common sense fixes that won’t cost you thousands like other places. Customer service is extremely personable. These guys are great across the board!

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 2390 Esplanade Dr #200f, Algonquin, IL 60102, USA

reviews.author: Amanda J P Dunakin
reviews.text: Edgar (main plumber and contact), Johnny and Colten (excavators), and the team who installed the pipe lining for us (Liam and Richard) were all amazing! We had an emergency sewer overflow with a hole in our pipe and a blockage. They fixed it, helped us understand what was happening and why, and were able to help us navigate some additional preventative sewer lining to save us from a much bigger disaster down the road. They were friendly, and when offering services they didn't put pressure on us to say yes. We would definitely recommend the team at J. Blanton!

reviews.author: Jerome Austriaco
reviews.text: Scott was great with educating me on possible sewage issues - fortunately, none - and found that we needed other maintenance that he was able to help with. Their “unclogs for dogs” program illustrates the character of this company…

reviews.author: Alexis Black
reviews.text: I recently had a great experience with J Blanton! I called to have them check out a possible small gas leak (not an emergency). They were able to send someone that week. My inspector, Jacob, was very friendly and knowledgeable and presented different options as we made a service plan for the following day. My technician who performed the work, Welhem (Will), was awesome. He did great work, explained everything, and answered all of my questions. This is the first time I have worked with the company, and based on my experience I highly recommend them. Thank you!

reviews.author: Alexis Farrar
reviews.text: Lou is such a great worker. Found the problem with my shower and went great lengths to make sure everything was perfect/fixed and to my satisfaction before leaving. Lou is very knowledgeable and such a pleasant person. I am grateful he was able to fix my shower. Ask for Lou if you need any work done from this company.

reviews.author: Sandra Shore
reviews.text: Scott evaluated all our plumbing repair needs and provided a cost estimate. He did a good job explaining why the repairs are important and necessary. Scott was friendly and easy to work with answering all our questions.

plumbers.name: The Neighborly Plumber
plumbers.address: 3655 James Rd Suite 100, Acworth, GA 30102, USA

reviews.author: Nanc Aget
reviews.text:
I was very pleased wirh James and his team  His knowledge and commitment to help me and my family get through this hurdle was more than a blessing. Not only did he go over and beyond . The circumstances were not easy for all, despite the stress, freezing weather conditions and time constraints, he showed up on time and fixed our urgent issue! From the beginning James and Jessica really helped me and I will never forget it.
I will definitely continue to call him and cant refer him enough! Thanks so much for your careful knowledge 🙏
Im not sure if we overpaid but they were tg3 only ones that came out and repaired and replaced in a timely manner.

reviews.author: Vicky Supon
reviews.text: I’ve had a great experience with this company. James previously replaced a large section of piping and repaired my water heater, and more recently Dustin provided diagnostics. Both were honest, knowledgeable, reasonably priced, and never tried to oversell. Jessica in the office is amazing—friendly, responsive, and always made sure someone was on-site within the same day. I’ll continue to use them and highly recommend them to anyone looking for a reliable plumber.

reviews.author: Arthur Southwick
reviews.text: My first time using Angi to find anybody, and I was very pleased with my choice of plumbers.  Despite the young age of the plumbers, I was impressed with their knowledge, skills, and customer service, which is a big concern of mine.  They granted a 15% senior discount, which is always appreciated, and they didn't mind my looking over their shoulder and asking questions, which is also appreciated.  Price?  I don't know if I overpaid or not because they were the only contractor I talked to, so there's no one else to compare with.  Would I recommend this contractor?  Yes, with no doubt about the recommendation.

reviews.author: Latisse Taylor
reviews.text:
Awesome experience! A new water heater was well over due, but we were holding on until the wheels fell off. Well, they fell off and The Neighborly Plumber (James and Nephew) was there to assist. Received a total of seven quotes and this company won the bid... reasonable pricing, amazing customer service, and very down to earth. An added plus for us is this is a family-owned company... so we were not being sold on things we did not need.

Install had a very quick turn-around... same day. Now, we have hot water and do not have to wait 5 minutes; 26 year old water heaters take a while to heat the water...LOL.  We'll utilize this company in the future due to this awesome experience. 👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽

reviews.author: Elizabeth Kenney
reviews.text: Dustin went above and beyond! I appreciate the time and care he took to walk me through rough in heights to make sure it’s perfectly functional for us! Amazing suggestions, on time, clean and organized! 10 stars!

plumbers.name: Alexander Plumbing Services Inc.
plumbers.address: 3214 Cedar Church Rd, Darlington, MD 21034, USA

reviews.author: Lisa Burke
reviews.text: Wes installed tankless water heaters for us and helped clear up an issue with our tub.  He was very personable, punctual and logical in problem solving.  And the office staff was pleasant to deal with.  I would definitely use Alexander Plumbing for any future plumbing issues that arise.

reviews.author: Kevin Dolinar
reviews.text:
Alexander Plumbing is the absolute best in the Harford/Cecil county area.
Quick response. Reasonable prices.
Best plumbers.

reviews.author: Rich Peschek
reviews.text: Excellent communication and fast response. Mike quickly diagnosed the issue and replaced my well pump (now I have water again). Mike was polite, friendly, professional and knowledgeable. It's Alexander Plumbing for all my future plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Laurie Pratt
reviews.text: So happy with Alexander Plumbing services. They were very professional and great prices. I would highly recommend them for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Bernard cox
reviews.text: Needed a new water heater. Technician Mike was on time and very nice to me and my family. Replaced  the water heater after giving me the option to have it repaired. Price was cheaper than any other company I had come out for an estimate. Definitely will be using this company for all my plumbing needs in the future.

plumbers.name: Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air of San Lorenzo
plumbers.address: 16440 Ashland Ave, San Lorenzo, CA 94580, USA

reviews.author: Julie Jackson
reviews.text: Came the next day, cleared  pipes, used a camara to find out our 67 year old pipes were full of holes. Estimate given and scheduled  2 days later to repipe. All done in one day. Inspected and paid for a few days later. Nice workers. Cleaned up after themselves. Decent price. Happy customers.

reviews.author: Elise Straub
reviews.text:
My elderly mother called this company for a clogged kitchen sink and mentioned that her garbage disposal was leaking. They replaced the disposal and pipes under the sink and charged her $1,700.

They attempted to snake the line for only a few minutes before saying it could not be cleared. Another worker went under the house and told her the pipes needed to be replaced and gave an estimate of $10,000.

I advised my mother to cancel that work. The next day, we hired a different plumber who snaked the same line for about three hours and fully cleared the clog for $225.

Based on this experience and the huge difference in diagnosis and price, I would not recommend this business to anyone.

reviews.author: Kris-Shawn Robinson
reviews.text: David Sanchez was professional, polite, and thorough. Very satisfied!

reviews.author: Don Serva
reviews.text: Very responsive, great communication via phone, text, & email - always knew of status.  Angel Ramirez was courteous and professional, quickly cleared drain and explained warranty and follow up process if needed.  Great price for same day service.  Overall - highly recommend!

reviews.author: yvette hills
reviews.text: We called them for a clogged drain.  Not only did they not fix it (still charged us $50), but they told us our pipes were corroded, which would cost 15K to de-scale and line with epoxy (though they kept dropping the price if we wanted to get started the next day)!  We were wary and ended up calling another plumber.  They snaked our drain in less than 10 minutes and said nothing about our pipes being corroded.  Would not recommend.

plumbers.name: Serv'All Plumbing & Rooter Service
plumbers.address: 4400 Pecan Ln SE, Acworth, GA 30102, USA

reviews.author: Kristen Papageorge
reviews.text: Anthony Birch was wonderful! It took very good care of us and our home. We totally trusted his recommendations and his work was top notch. He also gave us some good followup advice on warranties and how best to talk to our water authority about negotiating the increased water usage due to the leak we had in order to help us get our bill prorated retroactively. We have used ServeAll for several years now when we need plumbing help. They always come through with great folks working for them.

reviews.author: H J
reviews.text:
Serv'all's Plumbing Technician, Brandon, arrived at our home promptly and professionally, on a Saturday evening when we experienced a failed water pressure valve. He was patient, took all aspects of the issue into account, including safety, and then formulated a plan for resolution. His work was executed thoroughly and with precision.
Serv'all was recommended to us by a neighbor and has an excellent rating with the Better Business Bureau.
We experienced Serv'all's first rate work, professionalism, and diligence to complete each job to the highest standard, thanks to Brandon.
Thank you Serv'all!

reviews.author: Jason Frost
reviews.text: One star! Needed a 3ft piece of PVC going to my septic tank. Got a $1200 quote. Told plumber no thanks and he left. I dug out the pipe and repaired it in less than 3 hours and $20 of pipe.

reviews.author: Zak Chehab
reviews.text: Highly recommend Serv’All Plumbing. Brandon and Chris were professional, thorough, and communicated clearly throughout the entire process. They showed up on time, explained everything in a way that made sense, and did quality work without cutting corners. Both were a pleasure to work with, and I wouldn’t hesitate to use them again.  I highly recommend them to anyone looking for quality work at a good price.

reviews.author: Melissa Brock
reviews.text:
Standards Professionalism & Integrity!!!
Prompt service next day!
Informational on all completed work & product detail.

- Your Employee saved my entire Home Structure on the response of his actions, as I wouldn't have a House to call Home as of date.
God Bless this young man and his actions to respond to the Fire on my Property as he was working/installation of Service.
100% with Complete Service
Upfront from start to finish!
Highly recommend!

Bless Your Company Service & the Employee whom saved my Structure on my Property upon completion of the service I requested

plumbers.name: Flotek Plumbing
plumbers.address: 608 S 1st St, St. Charles, IL 60174, USA

reviews.author: Betsy Wassilak
reviews.text: This review is long overdue. We have used Flotek for a couple years now and in a couple houses. They are always very responsive. Of course things always seem to happen over the weekend. No problem with Flotek. They always respond and will even let you know if it is urgent or can wait. They have replaced an ejector pump, removed an old battery back up and replaced our toilet fill valve and flapper. They seem reasonably priced but I am a believer in sometimes you get what you pay for! Professional and friendly service every time! Thanks Henry and Gabriel!

reviews.author: Cheryl Taylor
reviews.text: A backup in the sewage pipes at my place of business left my customers without a bathroom. I called Flotek at 9:00 a.m., the problem was cleared up by noon the same day! They were happy to speak with my septic guy to gather all info beforehand and find the best solution to my problem. Prices were given ahead of time. Very nice guys, will use again- but hopefully not too soon ;)

reviews.author: Joe Kuryla
reviews.text: I just had a water softener replaced, and about a year ago I had a water heater replaced in the winter around the holidays.  High quality work, easy to get scheduled, great products, and reasonable prices.  Flotek has become my go-to company for plumbing work.

reviews.author: J Matthews
reviews.text: We hired Flotek Plumbing to replace a hot water heater, install a garbage disposal, run a new water line for our refrigerator, and install a new primary sump pump along with a battery backup.  Flotek was very professional and responsive from the initial meeting for the estimate through the completion of the project.  They were prompt and came prepared.  They completed all the work in one day.  Once the installations were complete, Gabriel spent some time going over everything with me.  I have to say, the quality of their sump pumps is fantastic, they are very quiet.  All in all I highly recommend Flotek for any plumbing needs you may have.

reviews.author: victor Vukovich
reviews.text:
Our toilet would not drain properly.
Upon arrival, Gabriel quickly confirmed the main line was clogged.
Wrote up a proposal and explained in detail what was wrong and what needed to be done. No BS. No extraneous explanation.

Yes, an expensive repair but the pricing was fair and the tech was HIGHLY professional and thorough. Plus, per our request, Flotek arrived within less than an hour after we called.

plumbers.name: Hansen Heating, Plumbing & Air
plumbers.address: 11910 Smith Ct, Huntley, IL 60142, USA

reviews.author: mark cichy
reviews.text:
The Hansen technician, Bruce, called ahead and arrived on time to replace old water heater. They were very careful of home walls, etc... in swapping out the old and bringing in the new heater to basement. I had some additional shut off valves put in for fridge and furnace humidifier. They did a great job per my final inspection. Both gentlemen were very polite and eager to answer all my questions. We plan to use them again come fall of 2026 to replace our basement ejector pump.
Mark & Deb C. Hampshire, IL

reviews.author: Jim Bockmier
reviews.text: They were just the best ever. Our furnace was emitting a weird smell. Secondary heating exchange failed. We were extremely lucky that Hansen’s was so thorough in their diagnostic skills. Gave us multiple options, explained what had gone wrong and showed us, cleaned up after themselves and were very pleasant. They stayed until 8:45 to complete the job. Everything was done expertly at a fair price and major repair completed in one day so that we did not go without heat on a cold winter night

reviews.author: Suzy Q
reviews.text: You can always count on Hansen Heating & Plumbing for quality work and fair pricing. I’ve been their customer for over 10 years and fully trust what they diagnose as the problem. They provide complete estimates, quick response, and have kept my 50-year old home safe from water damage that can lead to even more costly repairs.

reviews.author: Geoff Yu
reviews.text:
Horrible business. Expensive and don't back their own work. Had a backup and they were supposed to address the issues permanently. The exact issue happened again about 40 days later and they told us they only warranty their work for 30 days. A waste $715. The gentlemen on the phone was also rude and impatient when we called back.

The techs were not through, skilled, and definitely not professional. Even paid extra for the useless inspection camera and they were unable to locate the clog or issue.

Hansen should be ashamed of themselves. Don't spend your hard earned money on this company. Plenty of decent plumbers out there.

reviews.author: Richard Hane
reviews.text: Super clogged toilet.  We tried everything including using Dawn soap method.  Nothing worked.  Called Hansen, they were here in  less than an hour.  Brought in the auger and fixed our problem in less than an hour.  Great work.  I would highly recommend them to anyone.

plumbers.name: 100 Percent Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3200 West End Ave #500, Nashville, TN 37203, USA

reviews.author: Claudia Peralta
reviews.text: Matt and Tyree were great throughout the process of changing my old pipes from the house to the street. They were quick to respond, friendly and professional! There was a leak even after and they took responsibility and came out to re-do the entire piping, which we very much appreciated and shows their integrity as a company. I would absolutely recommend them!

reviews.author: Chris Quinn
reviews.text: What a lifesaver!! I contacted 100 Percent Plumbing after not getting responses from other companies.  They not only responded (I am one of the unlucky ones still without power) after the ice storm to help me turn off water that I couldn’t reach, they came early!!  SO NICE too.  Price was reasonable—no gouging during the storm emergency.  When I asked if it would be easy for me to get the water back on once power was restored he said, you have my number, just give me a call.  For the first time in days, looking for hotel rooms, flashlights, sand for the ice, etc. to have such a positive experience was wonderful.

reviews.author: Katherine Pfohl
reviews.text: I called on Monday (a holiday) and Matt came out the next day.  My disposal would not run, just hummed.  Matt suggested a few remedies to save me a plumbing call, but they didn’t work.  So, he came, gave me an estimate to replace (motor was shot), and worked hard to work with my unusual plumbing configuration.  He was kind, respectful, knowledgeable, and patient with my questions.  He worked hard and explained the problems he encountered.  I can’t say enough what a positive experience this was, even with all the difficulties he had working with my plumbing.  He never lost his cool with me or the task at hand.  Thank you Matt!  And thank you 100% Plumbing!

reviews.author: Karen Goodheart
reviews.text: Matt and Nick at 100 Percent Plumbing are the best in the business! They are incredibly responsive (I usually get a response within minutes of contacting them) and attentive, and have worked on a couple of projects at my house, on short notice. They are timely and professional and I can’t recommend them more.

reviews.author: Emily Syler
reviews.text: I had a great experience with 100 Percent Plumbing. They were able to come out within 48 hours, were very communicative throughout the process, and worked quickly while making sure everything was fully taken care of. One of the plumbers even drove to Lowe’s to grab a cartridge for my shower so it could be fixed immediately, which I really appreciated. I’d definitely recommend them and will absolutely use them again in the future.

plumbers.name: Ability Septic
plumbers.address: 801 N Raddant Rd, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Cindy Rohde
reviews.text: I highly recommend Ability Septic. They did a great job. They were timely, polite, and knowledgeable. They even came out to shorten a sewage pipe that was too close to an electrical box w/o any charge. Prices are comparable if not a slight but less than other companies. They are family -owned and have been serving our area for at least 30 years (which is as long as we have used them).

reviews.author: Dennis Wacker
reviews.text:
Just put a call into Ability and they are running 100% for answering the phone with a speaking, helpful human being.
IMAGINE THAT!
Ability installed a new system for us last fall, upgraded the tank size and discharge piping (an old tech pipe material was near failure..good catch by them) and I needed to get a bead on the first pump out timing.
Turns out the larger 1500g tank was a great idea, as LIFE happened with the birth of a new citizen last May making for a much busier household.
You can find larger companies and enjoy their robotic phone systems or you can call Ability and work with folks who show their pride and professionalism in the conduct of business.
So rewarding to find a supplier that TRIES to work with you and satisfy needs in an informed dialogue instead getting bounced around searching for the right person.
No matter who picked up the phone...pertinent answers were the result.  Ability folks know their business well and care about it, but more importantly, they CARE ABOUT their customers!!

reviews.author: Noe Lopez
reviews.text: Ive been using them for years , their employees very respectful and courteous of your property. Had 2 guys come out today to clean my septic. Professional and on-time ill recommend to family and friends  10/10

reviews.author: Bob Runge
reviews.text: We use Ability every two or three years.  Very courteous staff, answer all our questions and suggest proper maintenance.  Fair prices and prompt scheduling.  5 stars for over 35 years at our location.

reviews.author: Kurt Breitlander
reviews.text: Missed our request for service over July 4th, but made up for it by getting us on the schedule asap without charging an emergency fee. Did great work, and applied a discount code without us requesting. Would recommend using them if you have any septic issues.

plumbers.name: Lieber Mechanical: Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 1105 1st Pl Blvd, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Terrie Munsey
reviews.text: Lieber Mechanical is now my GO TO COMPANY for HVAC and Plumbing. I was absolutely impressed by Lieber Mechanical's employees. They were honest, hard working and never gave up. Scott worked very hard to get my tankless water heater going. He had to replace the primary heat exchanger and several other parts. He had to order the heat exchanger from Navien which took a couple of days. The first day it took 3 hours, but they only charged a 1 time service fee of $99. I upgraded to a 1 year service contract. The service contract included the service fee, 15% off of services + flushing my tank again in the next 6 to 12 months. It paid for it self on this one repair and I still get a no cost tank flush. Scott returned 2 days later as soon as the recieved the primary heat exchanger. He removed & replaced it, but said he still needed an igniter. Unfortunately, it stopped working again before he could make it back out. I didn't have hot water for several days because of Thanksgiving holidays. No problem though I have a shower in my barn. So, I didn't call them to request an emergency visit. Scott returned for the 3rd time monday morning with the igniiter. It only took a few minutes, but it still would not ignite. After, Scott spent a long time diagnosing why it still would not ignite. He found a tube was blocked by a cap he accidently left in. He was very honest told me what happened. Immediately called his supervisor and told them what happend. He was so apologetic and asked what he could do the make things right. I told him I was just happy he fixed it. He was ready to go above and beyond to make up for a minor mistake. Unlike others who would have tried to cover up their mistake and probably added mored charges to my bill. There were no additional charges. His honesty was was surprising, but wonderful in a world where prices are high and honestly is not very forth coming. I also want to give a shout out to his assistants Brock and Stephen 2 super nice guys. And I want to thank Hillary who took my calls and quickly dispatched Scott the same day I called both times. Everyone I spoke with was super friendly and helpful. I highly recommend Lieber Mechanical.

reviews.author: Crystal K. Stearns
reviews.text: Lieber Mechanical is a wonderful company with good, hard working people. A friend recommended them to me after having her sewer worked on. I chose them to put in my water heater,  which needed to be brought up to code and have modifications to the closet because it was super narrow. They made all the necessary changes for a very reasonable price. Then I had them come out to fix a bunch of little plumbing things and then later my garbage disposal.  Scott Gonzales came out for those jobs and was excellent! He was very sweet and professional. He gave me a range of options for each thing that I needed done so I could choose based on my needs and financial situation.  The work was done quickly, cleanly and without any problems or complaints.  I highly recommend Scott and Lieber for your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Marie Nunley
reviews.text:
These guys have been just great 👍
Going full blast, not quitting until the problem was found,  discussing options and scheduling for repair.. and then putting the yard back like it was before... I would not hesitate to recommend them or have them out again if needed... they had to replace the old clay sewer line in our backyard from 1951 going to the main city drain....

reviews.author: tu pac
reviews.text: Cody came by today to take care of a water heater leak. He was very friendly and professional good guy. He took care of our issue thanks to him I feel like I can recommend your company.

reviews.author: Lauran Cobalt
reviews.text: My husband and I have been working with this company for a while whenever we need repairs for our rentals and they are amazing. Cody and Steven helped us and they always go above and beyond every time we see them. Their prices are always reasonable and their employees are always so helpful. If there is a problem with something that they fixed they always make it right by us. I definitely recommend working with them.

plumbers.name: Bay Area Plumbing BAP Inc.
plumbers.address: 2648 Richard Ave, Concord, CA 94520, USA

reviews.author: Riley Polek-Davis
reviews.text: Friends recommended me to Bay Area Plumbing and I just used them to diagnose and fix a hot water issue in my shower, as well as flush 2 tankless water heaters. Ron was amazing! He was able to make it out quickly and was super punctual, friendly and took great care of my house in the process! I will definitely call them again when I need a plumber!

reviews.author: Rodney Villa
reviews.text:
Dec 4, 2025
Woke up yesterday, Dec 3, 2025, to a toilet leak and wet floor mats.  Called BAP Bay Area Plumbing and was able to arrange for repairs the next day.  Ron contacted me the day of, to inform me of his arrival time and kept me well informed of his arrival and what repairs needed. I HIGHLY recommend BAP Bay Area Plumbing and Ron Lem.  GREAT customer service as he did more work than I expected, without additional cost.  Very happy with results. Thanks for a job well done, BAP Bay Area Plumbing and Ron.

reviews.author: Rizalene Briggs
reviews.text: As a real estate agent I work with many vendors and I can say that Ron is highly competent, efficient, communicative and just top tier. He did a sewer lateral inspection for my clients and was extremely thorough and takes pride in his work . I will use his services again and refer him to all of my colleagues! 10/10 recommend for all plumbing needs!

reviews.author: kelli m
reviews.text:
Ron came to my mom’s house late on a Saturday.  He cleared the blockage with the snake from the roof.  He is amazing! Great prices too!  My mom is having him replace the hot water heater tomorrow!  I will recommend BAP to anyone who needs an expert plumber.
Thanks Ron!

reviews.author: Al Hagedorn
reviews.text:
Was leaving phone message with their firm and immediately received a text from Ron advising a simple fix. It worked. I am most impressed with their immediate contact and solution advice that avoided a service call. Never have experienced such a professional plumbing service.
I highly recommend Bay Area Plumbing

plumbers.name: Maryland Sewer & Plumbing Service Inc
plumbers.address: 104 Dale Rd, Pasadena, MD 21122, USA

reviews.author: Scott Davis
reviews.text:
I spent a good amount of time researching and reading reviews before reaching out to this company. We originally believed we had a failed septic system, but later discovered it was just a drain pipe blockage. Brandon came out the same day.

He’s personable, honest, and genuinely seems to enjoy his job and working for this company. I work in underwriting for construction financing, so I have a pretty good sense of when something feels off. He didn’t come close to giving me that impression.

Good people. I’m honestly disappointed I’ve lived out here for five years and am only now discovering them. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: L Harris
reviews.text: Great experience. Came out and gave a free estimate to replace a bad ejector pump, both with them providing a new pump and if I supplied one. Easy to get on the schedule for the job, showed up on time, did the work quickly, and cleaned up after. Brandon was efficient and friendly, did a great job. Very reasonable prices as well. Will definitely use this company again.

reviews.author: Darcell Gholson
reviews.text:
I've used Maryland Sewer & Plumbing when I managed Weinberg Place so I'm very firmiliar with the professional service.  When Ronnie called I knew my repair would be corrected in a timely manner. He shared with my son the part needed for my tub and shared some important information with us as well.

Ronnie provided professional plumbing and customer service. I will share your contact information with others if and when needed.

Thank you,
Darcell

reviews.author: Amy Shlemon
reviews.text: I received excellent consideration and service from office, to field, to replace a sewer line. I highly recommend this company. They identified the problem quickly and demonstrated skill and knowledge for quick resolution. The price was below competition and the service was far above. Thank you to everyone at Maryland Sewer Repair for responding to my emergency with professional empathy and excellent service.

reviews.author: diana ashburn
reviews.text:
Ronnie is an asset to your company
He is polite, does professional work,
answered all of my questions.
He left me with the impression that he was honest
and that your company is honest.
Honesty, integrity mean a lot to me
He made sure everything worked before he left
I will use your Maryland Sewer and Plumbing and
Ronnie should I have any more problems .
Put new faucet in tub and cleared the main drain
I have peace of mind that these 2 things were
taken care of.
Thank you

plumbers.name: Command Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 1 O'Plaine Rd Unit 8197, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: Taylor Neill
reviews.text: Dan, Joe and his staff are great to work with.  We recently had a water heater and toilet replaced and highly recommend Command Plumbing.  Joe went over options, was super friendly and professional and did a great job. Their pricing seems very fair and it’s great to work with a local family owned company.  We would certainly recommend them and have them out again.

reviews.author: David Lornson
reviews.text: Since 2018, Command Plumbing has been our source for plumbing repairs.  I appreciate that we have always received excellent, fast, and reliable service.   I contacted them by email recently, and within two minutes Dan responded with an appointment.  Rich came out to clear our kitchen sink drain - and we were good to go.  These guys are the best!

reviews.author: Joel Hughes
reviews.text: Dan and Joe are the best. Absolute pros and very good people. They are fast, clean, and highly skilled. I've dealt with a lot of trades and I very much recommend Command Plumbing.

reviews.author: Jennifer Lach
reviews.text: Highly recommend Command Plumbing.  Joe replaced a hot water heater and hose bib in just a few hours.  The craftsmanship was excellent and you could see the attention to detail.  He was also very courteous and made sure everything was neat and tidy.  He took the extra step to clean up the surrounding area so it was much cleaner than when he arrived!  It has been a few months now, and everything is working great, no issues.  Would have them back in an instant for any further plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Greg S
reviews.text: Command Plumbing did a great job with the rough-in for my bathroom renovation. The work included a tub / drain install, reconfiguration of shower valve, and changing from a single to dual sink. All interactions were highly professional. A quote was provided on the spot, and service was completed in short order. Their quote was slightly favorable to another local plumber. I highly recommend and would use them again without hesitation.

plumbers.name: Helton Plumbing Hero
plumbers.address: 1217 Blackhawk Ave, McHenry, IL 60051, USA

reviews.author: Ben Isaacs
reviews.text:
We were in the process of having a bathroom remodeled, and just our luck, our water heater goes out. I was recommended to contact Helton Plumbing by our contractors. I spoke with the owner, Jeremy, who was very helpful in my time of panic. Jeremy was able to give me the information about upgrading to different types of water heaters: tankless, tanked and power vent. What I appreciated was the upfront tasks required to install each one, as well as the pros and cons of each unit. We ended up going with the Navian tankless water heater. I've included pictures of the before and after.

Carey was my technician for the project. I cannot say enough about how magnificent Carey was. Answered all my questions, explained the process, gave me insight on the new product (including gas use, electrical use, rebate possibilities, etc). Additionally, Carey completed this entire task by himself, wasting no time to get the project going - it was an all day task. Carey even recommended a type of recirculation valve in the primary bathroom that will help to heat the primary bathroom faster (it is the furthest away from the water heater, so historically the shower took 60+ seconds to get hot). The recirculation valve and new water heater have the primary bathroom hot in under 10 seconds. It is sorcery.

I am very pleased with the service. Words can't explain how much we are enjoying the new water heater and the constant hot water. Also, the floor space that it opened up is monumental too. I will say that to go from a tank to tankless, it is an investment. It is expensive to make the change. It is definitely worth it - high efficient appliance, lower gas bill and constant hot water. We have young children and always worried about those 'hot pockets' of water in a tank water heater burning one of our kids. The tankless is so consistent I wish our Chicago Bears would take note. Overall, couldn't be happier with how it turned out. If you are on the market for a new water heater, consider Helton Plumbing. They fixed my issue entirely in one day!

reviews.author: Georgia Kelly
reviews.text: I came home from vacation to a leaking pipe and puddle of water on the floor. Helton was able to come within a couple of hours. Carey immediately put my mind at ease. He diagnosed the problem and explained it to me with a photo. He gave me an estimate before he began the work. He had everything he needed to replace the cracked piece of pipe and worked efficiently and professionally. He was friendly and courteous. This was the second time I’ve used Helton and have been 100% satisfied. Julie who took my call was great also.

reviews.author: Robert
reviews.text:
We have used Helton plumbing many times over the years for various issues (water heater and other pipe related problems)
They always do an excellent job. Yesterday they replaced three toilets in our house. Their tech arrived on time and looked over our problems and gave me two options to solve it. One- to rebuild the toilet ( new parts) or two- to replace the entire fixture. We opted for replacement. He had to pick up the fixtures an hour away and then come back to begin. One man on his own and he removed and replaced all three units in three hours. After removing one of the toilets he found a broken flange that needed replacing. And he was equipped for that too.
He removed the toilets and wrapped each one in plastic so nothing dropped on our floors.
He arrived on time and did the job quickly and cleanly. He took the old toilets and all of the cartons and garbage left over from the install to dispose of. If I could give them more than five stars I would.

reviews.author: Bill Spelman
reviews.text: We are relatively new to the area and found ourselves in need of a plumber. I like to shop local and found Helton Plumbing had a lot of happy customers. Unfortunately we now live in a time of horrible customer service, however, Helton is the exception. They are extremely knowledgeable, polite, prompt, affordable and the finished job was done to perfection. I will not hesitate to use them again. Thank You Helton for supplying good old fashion customer service

reviews.author: Kevin
reviews.text: Have used Helton for a while for jobs ranging from hot water heater repair, frozen pipes, and one off needs. They give straight forward honest quotes and do great work. Would highly recommend.

plumbers.name: Alexander Plumbing
plumbers.address: 221 E Chicago St #9, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Isidro Perez (Sid Perez)
reviews.text: Had them come out and repair a water washer inlet hose that had rusted together. They came out the same day I called, and repaired the issue in less than and hour. They were cheap and affordable and I would highly recommend Alexanders Plumbing for any of you plumbing needs. I've used them several times thru out the years and they never disappoint. The are professional, courteous, and very affordable in their prices.

reviews.author: Alicia Smith
reviews.text: The speedy response and work was amazing. Neil did an amazing job of explaining the work he was doing as well as explaining prevention of future issues. He kept his work area clean. I’m so happy I called them. I believe I found a lifetime plumber for my forever home.

reviews.author: Greg Bowman
reviews.text: We had a sewer back up into our laundry room. I called Alexander Plumbing and they were at our home within the hour! They had the line rodded out and were all done in two hours. AND, they cleaned the floor in the laundry room. Looked like nothing ever happened, all resolved by 11am. I am super thrilled with their work, their character and the decent people they are! Absolutely will call them again - and highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Scott Hanssler
reviews.text: Pat is the man, he really came through for me when moving into my new home and had an immediate issue with the hot water heater. Went out of his way to help me over the phone and with a part out of kindness. Not many people/places nowadays would take the time to do this. If I ever have a plumbing issue in the future I’ll only call here.

reviews.author: Marty McGovern
reviews.text: They did a great job; handled all phases of the repair. Explained everything in detail and were prompt  and thorough. We would highly recommend them !

plumbers.name: HT STRENGER Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 28915 N Herky Dr #101, Lake Bluff, IL 60044, USA

reviews.author: David Zelken
reviews.text:
We went with HT Strenger to install a new water heater and couldn’t be happier with the work or their competitive pricing. They showed up on time, completed the job efficiently, and left no mess behind. There’s a reason they’ve been around so long and continue to earn excellent reviews.
Friendly, knowledgeable, and professional service—you really can’t go wrong. They’ll definitely be the first call I make the next time we need something done.

reviews.author: Janice Bautista Sassin
reviews.text: We had a very last minute job that needed attention and Brad was there to save the day! We were hosting a large dinner party later in the evening and the HT Strenger team was able to fit us in between jobs. Every company in the area charged ridiculous amount for same day service and their staff wasn't nearly as kind as the folks at HTS. Needless to say, great service, very accommodating folks and professional job well done (all within 25 minutes!). We like problem solvers with service with a smile!

reviews.author: Kevin Cullum
reviews.text: Brad was awesome. He's been to our house multiple times and always handles business well and efficiently. Most recently, he also took a look at our water heater (he was not there to look at it originally) and made a few quick adjustments which were huge. HT Strenger didn't even install the water heater, but Brad went above and beyond to help us out. Really appreciate it and would recommend HT Strenger to anyone.

reviews.author: Arif Ali
reviews.text:
We have used this company for over a decade and I’ve been thoroughly impressed by their service.
I recently had an issue after hours. I received a call back from one of the technicians, Brad within a few minutes of calling the operator. He was able to troubleshoot my FloLogic water shutoff device with just a few questions.  Thanks HT Strenger!

reviews.author: Randi Carlson
reviews.text: I was referred by Cahill since I needed someone out quickly and they were fully booked. When another company refers you that says a lot. HT got someone out super quick, they fixed the issue quickly and my panic was gone quickly!  I definitely recommend HT Strenger and if the needs arises again, I'll definitely use them!

plumbers.name: U.S. Allied Plumbing & HVAC
plumbers.address: 191 Poplar Pl, North Aurora, IL 60542, USA

reviews.author: Sam Chase
reviews.text:
Quickly fixed a problem behind my shower faucet that a different company cut holes in my ceiling and quoted me 3k needlessly for.
So grateful for Howard and Zach coming out and swiftly and honestly fixing the problem.

reviews.author: Jason Lehner
reviews.text:
We had a significant leak coming from the main in the basement Howard from US Allied came out with an hour to help.  He was able to band aid fix the leak until the correct part can be ordered so it can be replaced properly.  We are super thankful for his friendly, honest professional service we would highly recommend.

Follow up: US Allied came back out Monday morning as promised to replace the valve where the main comes into the house.  Kyle did an amazing job he was informative, fast and super funny.  Kyle is super friendly type of guy he is the kinda guy you wanna go and crack open a beer with after work just a great attitude. He explained everything he was going to do in detail so there wouldn't be any surprises.  He even took the time to replace a spigot for me while he was here.  Amazing job I stick by my statement I would highly recommend

reviews.author: Matthew Pronger
reviews.text:
Knowledgeable and professional, the plumber, first of all, brought his own boot covers to protect my home. Next, he performed a timely assessment and provided me with the issue and the repair cost before he did anything else. He also provided me with a replacement option.
During the replacement, he was respectful of my home, my budget and my dog. (My dog loved the attention) The work was clean,  time efficient and cost effective.
Thank you, US Allied. We've never had so much hot water. I will definitely use you again.

reviews.author: Mr. MKETHPN Hills
reviews.text: Kyle did an excellent job and provided a thorough overview of what needed to be repaired. More importantly, he provided a competitive price that exceeded my expectations. I will definitely keep US Allied Plumbing and HVAC stored for future repairs and consultation.

reviews.author: Steven Zink
reviews.text: Alex did an excellent job!  Positioned the new water heater so that the controls would be accessible, added vertical run in the vent line for improved draft, added an expansion tank, explained very clearly what routine maintenance is recommended.  Looking forward to the next project with US Allied!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1070 Marina Village Pkwy UNIT 202, Alameda, CA 94501, USA

reviews.author: N S
reviews.text:
AMAZING SERVICE! Had a random emergency issue in my home today (renter) and after contacting the company, a team of 3 arrived in less than an hour.

It was a big job - but the three workers came, listened, assessed thoroughly, and got right to work.

In the process, two toilets had to be taken out, sewage/water that flooded into two of the showers had to be vacuumed out, lines/pipes had to be cleared out, and all effected areas needed to the be cleaned up afterwards (which was a lot to clean up).

They worked their butts off for hours until everything was done, no complaints or breaks (even though I could tell it was very tiring).

They worked together without issue, communicated throughout (with me and my landlord both/they worked out payment etc with him over the phone for me) and were all super friendly and down to earth as well, which made the whole experience way less stressful.

The company will also be sending another team member out in a couple days to inspect and mar a plan to fix any potential damage as a result of today’s issue if needed.

****TERRENCE, AMAD, and MATT were the 3 workers who did the job today****
Y’all rock!

Thanks again!!

P.S - I do have one small suggestion for management though.

For emergency issues that happen to fall on weekends and that might require someone to come out and inspect for damage AFTER a situation like mine (from water damage) -

Having whatever general documents your company requires the customer/owner to sign before someone can be sent out to do a post inspection - readily available somewhere for them to access and get signed as soon as possible without having to wait until a weekday/when office opens again would be really helpful and avoid any delays.

In my case it’s Saturday, so I’ll wait until Monday, but would have liked that to be done today. It’s not a huge deal, Monday is okay too! But just a suggestion!

Again thank you for the amazing service!!!

reviews.author: ma c
reviews.text:
Rich, from Roto-Rooter, just cleaned out our main drain in the front yard. What a nice gentleman. He did a wonderful job, cleaned up the mess that the plugged-up drain left behind. He was conscientious, professional and made sure that the drain was completely unclogged. I am very satisfied and glad that I chose Roto-Rooter.

Roto-Rooter also sent a second person, Jason, to run a camera down the drain to make sure that the drain was cleared to my satisfaction; it was.

Finally, Roto-Rooter had a $100.00 coupon that I could use, making the job very affordable. I will definitely use Roto-Rooter again.

reviews.author: Heather Johnson
