reviews.text: Rich saved the day when our shower was backing up and found the culprit in a massive hair ball! He was patient, customer service oriented and very courteous as he releived us of our bezoar burden. He answered all of our questions and spent the necessary time ensuring the job was done right. We consulted a couple of other companies first and ultimately we are so glad we went with Rich and Roto Rooter because the service and price were impeccable. Thanks Rich, you rock!

reviews.author: PD Wanjari
reviews.text:
We had an emergency kitchen sink drain problem, and on a friend's recommendation, decided to call Roto Rooter. Within the next 2 hours they were at my place working.

The work was prompt and to satisfaction. Apart from that, Richard, out technician, shared several tips to ensure longevity of pipes. Overall, when it's plumbing, I think I need not see elsewhere, but Roto Rooter.

Highly recommend the company, and Richard, in specific.

reviews.author: Sam Goldhaber
reviews.text:
Richard service technician 7280 from Roto-Rooter's team made the experience of getting plumbing done at my home painless.
Additionally he spent the extra effort and time to explain the service he provided.

Roto-Rooter isn't the cheapest option in the Bay area but the service quality provided by this individual made it worth the investment and he worked with me to find a price that I could agree on.

I hope someone at his company is able to read this review because it was absolutely his work and professionalism that made me decide to say yes to the service as well as satisfied upon its completion.

plumbers.name: High Priority Plumbing and Services, Inc.
plumbers.address: 317 Northpoint Pkwy, Acworth, GA 30102, USA

reviews.author: Michelle Newman
reviews.text: My experience with High Priority Plumbing was excellent!  Aaron was very courteous,  knowledgeable and professional.  He explained what was happening with my hot water heater and recommended for it to be replaced.  Upon his return to install my new hot water heater, he explained exactly what he would be doing during the installation.  I am very pleased with this company! Aaron is the best!!  American Home Shield got one right!!

reviews.author: Bravo Charlie
reviews.text:
Highly professional and thorough service.

Steven communicated when he would be here and arrived on time, punctuality is huge plus.

At each step in the investigation and repair of our leak, Steven asked if we had questions. He talked us through the "how" and "why" of each step in the process.

The thorough review of our plumbing and attention to detail, highlighted another issue that we will be working with High Priority plumbing to fix. Again, he displayed high levels of communication and professionalism.

We ended with a clear plan for the next step to correct our plumbing problems. I would highly recommend High Priority Plumbing and specifically Steven for future use.

reviews.author: Marcel Myers
reviews.text: Steven was very knowledgeable and beyond helpful. Walked me through every step of the way on what he was doing and more importantly extremely honest. I highly recommend this company and asking for Steven for all your plumbing needs! Thanks again!

reviews.author: Lisa Castillo
reviews.text: Highly recommend High Priority Plumbing! Their technician, Steven had the utmost professionalism. Incredibly knowledgeable with our situation and even suggested little tips for moving forward. It was a great experience from the first interaction with the office staff. They made working with our home warranty policy incredibly easy.  Hopefully I'll never need a plumber again if I do they will be my first call:

reviews.author: Mike B
reviews.text:
I’ve been in the construction industry for 26 years and am a licensed General Contractor, so I don’t give praise lightly.

Steven was outstanding—professional, knowledgeable, and clear in explaining the issues and solutions. He quickly identified what needed to be done and helped move the repairs forward. Based on my experience, he’s easily in the top 1% of vendors I’ve worked with.

Highly recommend this company.

plumbers.name: Five Star Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 2018 Mountain Rd, Joppatowne, MD 21085, USA

reviews.author: Yungjin Kim
reviews.text:
We recently completed two projects with Five Star, including the replacement of the water line between the main shutoff valve and the house. The cost and quality of their service for that work were excellent, and we had no complaints. Based on that experience, I would recommend Five Star for main waterline leak repairs.

During the water line replacement, I also asked Chris about repairing a leaking bathtub faucet. He said they could send another technician the next day to replace the diverter cartridge. The following morning, the technician arrived and, after a quick inspection, provided an estimate of $471 for the repair. He explained that the work required replacing the shower diverter cartridge, consistent with what Chris had mentioned. Although the estimate was higher than I expected, I approved it, assuming the repair might be complex and because the technician was ready to proceed.

After I shut off the main water for him, I took a short break to have a cup of coffee. Before I even finished it, he had completed the replacement and asked me to turn the water back on for a leak test. The technician was very professional, and the repair was completed within about 20 minutes with good results.

However, I felt that $471 was excessive for the level of labor and complexity involved. I later checked the price of the T809206 shower diverter cartridge and found it sells for about $57 at Home Depot, meaning roughly $410 was charged for about 30 minutes of labor. Because Five Star had previously provided fair pricing and excellent service for the main waterline repair, I did not obtain multiple estimates for the bathtub repair—I relied on my loyalty and trust in them. Afterward, I checked with other plumbers and learned that comparable repairs typically range from $250 to $350, including parts.

This experience was a lesson learned: relying on a single provider, even one with whom you have had good experiences, may not always result in fair pricing. It is always best to obtain multiple estimates before making a decision, regardless of prior loyalty.

reviews.author: James Conley
reviews.text: I don’t write post often but feel compelled to share my experience with Five Star Plumbing.     I had a water line leak originating from the outside and leaking into my basement. Unfortunately, my home warranty company nor home owners insurance company covered the repair. This turned out to be a significant out of pocket expense. I called several big named companies and was met with broken promises and quotes between $7,300.00 and $8,300.00 being the highest. Something inside of me told me to keep looking for a better deal. I ran across Five Star Pluming online and gave them a call. It was a Sunday morning. I spoke with Chris who said they could repair my leaking line on Tuesday morning. I appreciated the honesty. The big companies said they could do the job the same day, only to come up with excuses. I reluctantly asked Chris how much the job will cost. The quote Chris gave me was thousands less. The quote included replacing all plumbing leading to the county meter inside. No other company offered this as part of their quote. Five Star Plumbing arrived on time and did an awesome job as promised for thousands of dollars less. Did I mention Five Star guaranteed the water line for 10 years? If you want a job done right, honesty upfront and a fair price, chose Five Star Plumbing.

reviews.author: Mal Baker
reviews.text: We discovered water leak from the main pipe , which needed to be replaced . After few estimates we went with Five Star Plumbing which turned out to be the best decision! Brian showed up on time , extremely knowledgeable and professional. Explained everything they were going to do and did just that . We had a tree with huge roots on their way but Brian and his team worked hard to dig out all they needed and repair what was necessary. Would definitely recommend them to anyone !

reviews.author: Heather Sarno
reviews.text: I highly recommend Five Star Plumbing!  They solved my plumbing and water pressure issues when no one was able to. They have the expertise to get to the real problem and do it right the first time. I am so grateful my friend recommended them! They did all the work for providing water from the public hook up to my house and the internal water hook up. I have used them for general plumbing issues as well and highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jon Chapman
reviews.text: 250 dollars an hour and won't give you a quote or estimate of any kind without charging 89 bucks to come out. Replacing a P-trap on a kitchen sink shouldn't cost 580 dollars. Edit: updaing from one-star. Their customer service rep saw my review and called to make it right. The tech overestimated the time needed to complete the job. I respect them following up and making things right.

plumbers.name: Emergency Plumbing service
plumbers.address: 449 Lakeside Pl, Highland Park, IL 60035, USA

reviews.author: Paul Tsupin
reviews.text: I’ve had an excellent experience with this plumbing company across my home and multiple other properties. Their service is always prompt, honest, and professional. The team is extremely knowledgeable, takes the time to answer all questions clearly, and consistently resolves issues the right way the first time. Communication is outstanding from start to finish, which is rare and very much appreciated. Reliable, transparent, and high-quality work every time. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Orlando
reviews.text: Konstantin reached out and was able to squeeze me in last minute to provide assistance and repair a copper pipe that was damaged during a remodel project. That speed in which he replied and showed up for the repair, the professionalism, the knowledge, and the efficiency he displayed during the short, quick visit was phenomenal. Well worth the price of service.

reviews.author: Ziyad Nazem
reviews.text: I’ve used this plumbing service several times, and every experience has been excellent. They are always prompt, reliable, and available when needed, and their rates are very reasonable. The quality of work has consistently been great, and I’ve never had an issue. Konstantin, in particular, does a fantastic job—professional, courteous, and efficient. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Aaron
reviews.text:
$35,000 DISASTER FROM A SIMPLE CLOGGED TOILET!!!

We called "Emergency Plumbing" with a clogged toilet in August 2024. After their plumber visited us, we ended up with THREE ROOMS DESTROYED BY WATER AND SEWAGE, costing $35,000 IN REPAIRS that took SEVERAL MONTHS, and then later getting dropped by our brand new homeowners insurance due to the claim!

"Emergency Plumbing" happily took my several hundred dollars in payment for "clearing the clogged toilet". They have offered no recompense for causing our massive loss. But, to their credit, they did say "sorry" a couple times.

THE FULL, DISGUSTING, DANGEROUS, SAD STORY:

In August 2024 I called about a clogged toilet I couldn't plunge clear. They were able to schedule a plumber for early in the morning.

He tried an auger to clear the clog, to no avail. So, he asked to see the sewer cleanout. We went to the basement, where things were about to go DANGEROUSLY BAD.

He opened up the cleanout and A FIRE HOSE RIVER OF SEWAGE immediately began to spray out onto him and our finished basement. He panicked and asked for garbage cans / bags to catch the sewage river.

My wife brought down some large utility garbage bags. The plumber and I held up and filled about 3-4 large bags of sewage over our heads during the next several minutes before the flow finally stopped and he could cap off the cleanout. He reassured me by saying, "sometimes stuff like this happens". We were both drenched in sewage from head to toe. Some had splashed in my eyes and mouth.

He started to hand mop up the large sewage puddle with some paper towels. I told him "don't bother, this all will need a mitigation company". He replied, "all you really need is some soap and water". Ummm no.

We dried off, shedded clothes and went back upstairs. The toilet still wouldn't drain, so he said he'd drive back to get the larger auger. He asked if I had any toilets upstairs, and I replied yes. He said "OK, you can use your upstairs toilet and shower, just don't use the clogged one down here". He left and I started to shower.

After showering I came back down to the main floor to discover that SHOWER WATER WAS GUSHING OUT OF THE TOILET INTO OUR BATHROOM AND HALLWAY!!! More fun!

In the second panic of the day, I tried my best to dam up the NEW RIVER OF WATER now FLOODING my main level hardwood floors. I ran downstairs to see even more water now soaking many ceiling tiles and raining onto the sauna and floor.

I called the plumber and the head plumber agreed to come join the fun. He arrived, I explain the scene, and he said "Oh no, he should never have told you to use the fixtures upstairs". Oh no!

The first plumber later returned with the larger auger. They managed to clear the clog with it. They did some hand mopping up of the now destroyed first floor powder room, hallway, hall closet, and living room. They asked for a check for several hundred dollars, said sorry for the problems, took my check and left.

The next day we opted for a water & sewage mitigation company, rather than the plumber's recommendation of "soap and water". We then watched much of our house get ripped apart and endured days of loud fans a dehumidifiers.

The insurance claim process and reconstruction took place over the next couple months. We had to cancel our Thanksgiving party, as we were still wrapping up the rebuild by then.In the weeks after the plumbing adventure, I texted and called the plumber, hoping to get some recompense for this disaster, maybe cover my insurance deductible, maybe even my money back? We talked on the phone once and I made my case. He didn't offer anything at all. Haven't heard from them since.

0 STARS - CANNOT RECOMMEND FOR ANY PLUMBING WORK. Maybe the head plumber is good? But whatever junior plumber they sent to unclog my toilet basically destroyed much of my new house. They were arrived on time and were friendly to talk to, though, tiny bonus points for that. ONE QUARTER OF A STAR

reviews.author: Igor Khaletskiy
reviews.text: I hired Emergency Plumbing to install a new water heater and was very impressed. Konstantin, the master technician, explained everything clearly and did an excellent job. The work was done quickly, professionally, and at a fair price. I’m very satisfied and would recommend them to anyone.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 964 N McLean Blvd, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Hershel Perlmutter
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with Edgar as he replaced our kitchen sink drain system. He was thorough and patient with me, as he explained what the issue was and how was going to solve the problem. He even walked me through the repair/installation at key points during the process. I'd highly recommend Edgar and J. Blanton for any of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Logan Cook
reviews.text: Greg was very professional and knowledgeable. He made quick work of our toilet repair and was willing to double check the plumbing underneath to ensure we didn’t have any other connected problems. Would recommend.

reviews.author: Christopher C.
reviews.text: Dominic ran into some very large build up during the cleaning, but was able to modify his approach to make sure the job was done perfectly. Very thankful for his expertise and service.

reviews.author: Bill Keller
reviews.text: Cameron showed up in time, was super knowledgeable, friendly and paid attention to detail.  He offered advice, conscious about the property and building shut off time frame.  He made sure that all water sources in my condo were working when finished.   Well worth the time and money spent.

reviews.author: Carmen Bello
reviews.text: Zach Staar was the technician we had out to our building to help diagnose some plumbing issues. He is a great guy to work with and is very thorough and up front and explains everything in detail. You can tell he's a guy who cares about the work he does and wants to do the right thing for the home owner. It's increasingly rare to find people like that these days so it was a breath of fresh air working with him.

plumbers.name: 1-800-PLUMBER +AIR
plumbers.address: 351 E Main St, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Rivera
reviews.text: My experience was as good as it gets. In 2017 my sewer and gas lines were replaced to the main. Unfortunately I didn’t have the right plumbing company. They only did the bare minimum.  Now in 2025 my drains weren’t draining so 1800 plumber of Yukon+ air assessed my situation and thank the lord I had coverage from HomeServe who covered me for 1500 of my bill . The plumbing team was awesome, courteous and professional. My job took one day to complete and they removed cast iron and lead pipes from 1951 and put pvc everywhere drains were needed for my home. They up sold me a back flow preventer which if I ever need it will definitely be worth it.

reviews.author: TERRY JOHNSON
reviews.text: Floor drain was backed up, the technician (Travis) who came out was completely awesome. His whole goal was to make sure I was satisfied. This comment is truly not about the service but the great work that he did, to get the drain unclogged. He was professional, determined and most of all honest! his work ethics are impeccable and you don't find many like that these days. Great Job Travis and continue to serve your customers the way you do!

reviews.author: eugene McCarrell
reviews.text: Excellent work! Travis and his helper came to do repair on my dripping shower. They came courtesy of my home warranty company and they were very respectful, as I had another person in my home at the same time. They did a first class job. I have to replace the drywall but it is great knowing that the drip has stopped.  I now have full access to my shower. Thank you.

reviews.author: Freda Yamah
reviews.text: Owner is extremely rude. He yelled at me so bad because I called to get clarification as to why my garage disposal is no longer sitting in my sink aligned well like it was prior to them removing it to perform the job. He told me to meet him at the unit the next day so he could show me exactly but the way he yelled at me on the phone no way I was going to meet him in person. No way he should feel comfortable speaking to anyone like that it was absurd!!

reviews.author: Yohana Sheridan
reviews.text:
This company was assigned to me through my home warranty. The representative who came out to do the inspection was absolutely amazing, professional, friendly, and thorough. However, the person handling the finances, Vince, was extremely disappointing. I was overcharged by hundreds of dollars. After shopping around, I easily found a much cheaper quote.

I even called back because I wanted the original rep, who was so kind and helpful, to have the job. Instead, Vince told me to find someone else. So I did, and my new water heater is now being installed for hundreds of dollars less.

plumbers.name: Dean Plumbing Company Inc.
plumbers.address: 3100 B Leeman Ferry Rd SW, Huntsville, AL 35801, USA

reviews.author: Kris R
reviews.text: Called Sunday morning for a busted hot water heater. Evan was quick to respond to the dispatch call and showed right up. He assessed the problem, described what was wrong, explained the situation and solution. Then he wasted no time getting started. The whole situation took a lot less time than I expected. He was very polite and personable. His work was great. I have used Dean Plumbing in the past and they will always be my first choice. Happy I do not have to spend the weekend without hot water.

reviews.author: Steven Nelson
reviews.text: I appreciate the quick response of Dean Plumbing. Braxton did a great job. He communicated what he was going to do and kept me updated on his progress and on costs.  Both gentlemen were professional and courteous. And he accomplished the task which was unclogging my daughter's pipes and making sure there were no backups. Good work

reviews.author: Shayne Howell
reviews.text: Rusty and crew did a whole house supply side replacement as well as a small bit of waste side replacement ('60s house with mostly original plumbing).  They did an excellent (and thorough) job, especially dealing with the oddities of plumbing that old.  All the work was completed in the 2 and a half days they quoted and it's so wonderful to have actual water flow again!  I couldn't ask for a more professional, responsive, and friendly experience.

reviews.author: Amy Harvey
reviews.text: This was my first time using Dean Plumbing. I called them and Evan showed up to my house within 30 minutes. He was professional and completed the job in a timely manner. I will definitely use them again for future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Denise Patterson
reviews.text: Evan was very professional, repaired leak at gas meter then verified fire pit and gas logs worked correctly after repair. Efficient work, fair price, came to repair the problem very quickly.  I am very thankful to have everything working safely again especially with a snow and ice storm of significant potential coming this weekend. Bonus was instruction on how to prevent damage to pipes correctly with extreme cold temps coming this weekend! Will definitely call Dean’s anytime I need plumbing / gas repairs!

plumbers.name: J. Henry Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 5518 Old Railroad Bed Rd, Toney, AL 35773, USA

reviews.author: Edward Brothers
reviews.text:
The young man had arrived to put on our expansion tank and bring us up to coat was great in every way
He did an excellent job, nice and neat and precise and cleaned up after himself. He leaked checked all of the fittings before he departed and very happy with the results.

reviews.author: Nathan Henry
reviews.text: J. Henry Plumbing did a great job. I had a shower replaced by New Bath today and when they came to install the new shower pan, but the drain and water stubs were not in the wall, blocking the new installation. All water lines and drains had to relocated by busting the floor up. This large job was done correctly and at a price that was reasonable considering I received a quote from another company that was $2500 more than what I paid. Would recommend!

reviews.author: Jim Stanco
reviews.text: Mr. Conner Troup was very nice and professional. He listened to my concerns about Huntsville utilities recent repairs to a water main in front our house that possibly causing a surge in water pressure causing our T&P valve to pop! . He was honest and said our hot water heater is fine after inspection. He suggested a new T&P replacement as a precautionary measure. He also replaced the drain valve with a ball valve to ease in the suggested drain of our tank a few times a year to prolong the hot water heaters life. I have your number so when it’s time to replace the hot water heater I’m going lot call J. Henry Plumbing. Thanks again Conner.

reviews.author: Donna Bartlett
reviews.text: Dustin did a great job and knew what he was doing. He took the time to find the issue we were having unlike previous plumbers and fixed it. The price was a little high but was in line with other plumbers. Bottom line great service, job well done, average price. I would recommend this plumber.

reviews.author: Scott Haas
reviews.text: I have used J. Henry several times including having them replace a well pump on a rainy cold night!  Excellent service!  Always very responsive and never had to call them back to redo anything.  Every tech I have had was respectful and competent.  I have several rental properties and my own house and will always use them for plumbing issues.

plumbers.name: Beehive Plumbing Orem
plumbers.address: 1145 S 800 E Suite 213, Orem, UT 84097, USA

reviews.author: Sharon Montoya
reviews.text:
Josh was very nice and professional.  Did quick work to get my hot water back on. So maybe I take back what I said within an hour of fixing it we still don't have hot water and it's doing the exact same thing I called for that he fixed! It's been 6 hrs since he left , 5hours since I called and told them it's not working,  said he would call me to walk me through a couple things . Still haven't heard from him . I paid over $500 today and still don't have hot water!!
I don't recommend them.

reviews.author: Selma Griffith
reviews.text: All plumbers that worked on our building today were great. Very transparent, friendly, went above & beyond. It was a long day, they did great.

reviews.author: sharee wilson
reviews.text: Tristen was Awesome! He communicated through the whole process. He was very detailed in everything that he worked on, our house is under contract and these are items that the inspector called out.  We were able to get  Behive Plumbing out there the next day to get everything fixed and get our report back to the buyers, that everything had been taken care of! We are very grateful for Tristen and Behive Plumbing. Would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Cameron Elder
reviews.text:
Jordan Ostler was prompt, professional
, and knowledgeable. He quickly addressed the problem and offered solutions. He also offered preventative measures to ensure the issue was a one time issue. Beyond being a professional, he was also sympathetic. Fantastic customer service all around from the initial set up to the actual service itself.

reviews.author: Natalie Bradshaw
reviews.text: Beehive plumbing was very responsive when I reached out and they were able to come same day within an hour or two. We had Benjamin and Maverick come to our house and they were very kind and professional. They were great with my kids who wanted to see what they were doing and “help.” Thank you!

plumbers.name: Duvall Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 312 S Coltrane Rd, Edmond, OK 73034, USA

reviews.author: Todd Dobberstein
reviews.text: Rip off. Had a leak that needed to be repaired quickly. I had already removed all the drywall and done the work to find the leak. They were able to come out and fix quickly but charged $650 for 30 minutes of work, about 4 ft of pex, and a couple connectors. Definitely took advantage of me and my situation. Won’t use them again.

reviews.author: Eli Glass
reviews.text: I had an outdoor faucet that wouldn't stop leaking and needed replaced. A lovely receptionist answered my call on a Saturday (Easter weekend at that) and had me scheduled for Monday. 2 professional and easy to talk to guys, Cayde and Rob had an earlier opening on Monday and where able to come out earlier and replace the faucet. This wasn't an average repair as they had to remove a tile in the shower to get to the back of the wall where the outdoor faucet was located and then had to fix the janky work that was previously done 40 years ago. The guys had no problem doing some problem solving and handled the curve ball efficiently and like it was nothing. They got it all taken care of for a reasonable price (Around $400) and my dripping outdoor faucet is no more.

reviews.author: Ginny Schiefer
reviews.text: I would give zero stars if I could. They repaired a slab leak at my house two years ago, and their work was so shoddy that I had to spend another $1700 today to have it repaired. I have attached photos so you can see their mess. Save yourself money and use another company.

reviews.author: Cooper Cadle
reviews.text: I've heard it said you can only pick two of these three, "fast, cheap, good". If it's good and cheap, it won't be fast. If it's fast and cheap, it won't be good. If it's good and fast, it won't be cheap. Duvall is the first company I have worked with that is all three. You will not regret working with them.

reviews.author: Brianna McAlvain
reviews.text: Duvall doesn’t even exist. They were bought out by Airco. This is false advertising and a scheme to dupe customers into thinking they’re using one company, and then another actually shows up. Shady.

plumbers.name: Frecka Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1770 Newberry St, Cuyahoga Falls, OH 44221, USA

reviews.author: Jeff O'Brien
reviews.text:
We had a fantastic experience with Frecka Plumbing! Matt came out to install a Toto bidet toilet seat for us, and from start to finish, everything was top-notch. He arrived right on time, which we really appreciated, and his friendly, professional attitude made the whole experience a pleasure.

What stood out most was how thoroughly Matt explained everything, from the installation process to how to get the most out of the new seat. You could tell he genuinely cared about doing the job right and making sure we were completely comfortable and satisfied before he left.

It’s rare to find a company that combines quality workmanship with such outstanding customer service. Frecka Plumbing has earned a customer for life. If you’re looking for a plumber you can trust, look no further. Ask for Matt, you won’t be disappointed!

reviews.author: Paul Anderson
reviews.text:
Frecka Plumbing did a great job replacing our main shutoff valve at a reasonable price. Tim, our plumber, did wonderful work, coordinating everything with the water department and replacing the faulty valve. He also coached me in draining and flushing our water heater without any extra charge!
The job was done on time, the area was left clean, and the bill was less than estimated. Cannot recommend them more highly.

reviews.author: John MacWherter
reviews.text:
Tim was great!!  We had several jobs lined up for him--replace a  shower head, fix a leaky faucet, tighten a sink handle--and he did them all in an hour and a half and did them well.  We have been working with Frecka for more than 20 years and they have always been great to work with and reasonably priced.
A quality operation!

John MacWherter

reviews.author: Michele Messina
reviews.text: I love Frecka plumbing..we have used them multiple  times and they are amazing!  Tim the plumber also known as "Jim " per his business card  is absolutely  amazing!  His knowledge  is fantastic...he is friendly and so helpful!  I look forward to seeing him. I know thst he will find and fix the problems every time!  Thank you to Tim and Frecka for another  wonderful  experience!!!! You guys are amazing!!!!!  Same day service!  Absolutely amazing!!!!

reviews.author: Rachel Davis
reviews.text:
I will never let any other plumbing company work on my house! Tim swapped out a shower valve for me, very efficiently and cleaned up after. Five star service AND pricing. I was figuring it would be way, way more expensive and the possibility of extra holes for access.
Thank you guys for being so reliable and knowledgeable! Frecka is permanently on my speed dial when issues arise.

plumbers.name: City Wide Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4200 Industrial Center Ln NW #100, Acworth, GA 30101, USA

reviews.author: Brendan Franke
reviews.text: Willie was awesome, one man unit got the job done fast and efficiently. Had a water heater pretty much flood our laundry room, got him out with an emergency call. He replaced the 40 gallon heater, in and out. Highly recommend him!!!

reviews.author: Reese Anderson
reviews.text: Bryce and Nick were absolutely amazing! They were polite, informative, quick with top notch service and got the job done correctly the first time! I recommend them for any drain or plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Hope Mullins
reviews.text: Josh is excellent at what he does! He came on time, went right to the leak and fixed it in a timely manner. Very professional and highly recommend this company for all your plumbing needs. We thank you for coming out to Space Shop Self Storage- Duluth.

reviews.author: Law Smith
reviews.text: Great professionalism. Nick is Very knowledgeable about the job and has a skill set that allows him to get the job done right the first time meaning he's fast! I highly recommend this company!

reviews.author: InTown Suites YMG
reviews.text:
We are definitely pleased with the work that Citywide Plumbing provides at our Roswellrd location. Special shout out to Nick. We sent out an email to have one of our rooms that was leaking fixed and He was there less than 10mins after the email was sent. He fixed the problem right away and now we can sell that room. Thank you Nick for your timely services.
Tina
General Manager

plumbers.name: JMJ Plumbing
plumbers.address: 212 Northridge Dr, Acworth, GA 30101, USA

reviews.author: Melanie Arvanites
reviews.text: JMJ Plumbing is fantastic! I’ve had them come out several times now, and they’ve been consistently reliable every time. Even on a holiday, their response was fast and professional. The technicians are punctual, clean, and respectful of my home. Pricing is very reasonable for the quality and speed of service. It’s hard to find dependable plumbers—especially during holidays—but JMJ Plumbing always delivers. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Abbie Miller
reviews.text: Derek did an outstanding job fixing an issue we had with our guest bathroom tub! He was punctual, thorough, and incredibly friendly throughout the entire process. His professionalism and expertise really stood out. I highly recommend JMJ for anyone in need of plumbing services. Exceptional service all around!

reviews.author: Karen Jeffrey
reviews.text: Greg explained everything he needed to do and showed us the problem areas that needed to be repaired.  He explained different options we could do to repair leaks and gave us the pricing options up front.  He was courteous, kept in touch about his arrival time and cleaned everything up as he worked. We will use Greg again if we need a plumber.

reviews.author: Tony Martin
reviews.text: Referred to JMJ by a trusted friend and neighbor. BINGO!...this trusted friend nailed it. Greg was extremely courteous and genuine from the moment he stepped up to our front stoop. He skillfully and promptly identified our problem and gave me the option to pursue a simple repair on my own (I mentioned doing a bit of DIY work) as a way of saving some money.  Very impressed  with this priority on what's best for the customer...says a lot about Greg and the company.  Happy to say we've got a new 'go-to' plumber to use and to recommend!

reviews.author: Juan Castilla
reviews.text:
Thank you Brent, for saving the day.
Quick response and professional service.
Appreciate the attention to detail and the line of communication, in real time and the use of PPE's to maintain a sanitary process..
5 Star service, 👍👍👍👍👍

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing of Harford County
plumbers.address: 16A Bel Air S Pkwy Suite 300, Bel Air, MD 21015, USA

reviews.author: Kunal Teeda
reviews.text:
A completely unnecessary upsell — get a second opinion before using this company

I called Benjamin Franklin Plumbing to diagnose a leaking faucet. The technician took a quick look and immediately quoted me over $700 to replace the entire faucet. No real explanation, no attempt to troubleshoot, and not a single alternative option offered.

What actually fixed it? A $20 cartridge replacement. I confirmed the issue myself and repaired it in minutes. No full replacement needed. No $700 bill. Just a basic part the technician never bothered to check.

This wasn’t just a high quote. It was a wrong diagnosis that would’ve cost me hundreds of dollars for work that wasn’t necessary. That’s a serious trust problem.

If I hadn’t stopped to verify the issue on my own, I would’ve been charged more than 30 times the cost of the real fix.

I won’t be calling this company again, and I strongly recommend anyone reading this to always get a second opinion. A plumbing company should solve your problem—not create an expensive one.

reviews.author: Ryan James
reviews.text: Highly recommended company and services from my experience using Benjamin Franklin  plumbing.  If you are lucky enough to get the technician I had, his name is Ira Miller, then you can feel comfortable and confident that you are in good hands.  Thanks again for the  services provided.

reviews.author: Adam Holmwood
reviews.text:
It takes a lot for me to be compelled to write a poor review. We hired Benjamin Franklin Plumbing (Columbia, MD) on August 29, 2025 to clear a clog in our kitchen sink. The technician was here for about 40 minutes and used a standard Snake K-60 machine (the type you can rent at Home Depot for ~$75/day). The total bill was $650, which was shocking compared to the $350–$400 range that we later learned other reputable companies typically charge for the same service and labor.

I called Benjamin Franklin Plumbing's office three separate times (Aug. 30, Sept. 3, and Sept. 5) asking to please speak with a manager or owner about the invoice. Each time I was promised a call back within 48–72 business hours. No one ever returned my calls. On my third attempt, the receptionist became argumentative instead of assuring me I would receive a call back.

In my opinion, this company overcharged us and then refused to provide any accountability or even a courtesy call back from management. Based on my experience, I cannot recommend this company and would advise others to shop around before calling them.

reviews.author: Shawn Taylor
reviews.text: Between the time I called and my leak was fixed was less than two hours! Jerry was great. Thank you!

reviews.author: Deborah Schlehr
reviews.text: Highly recommend this company! Ira was amazing and a pleasure to interact with. He fixed our emergency and had our water restored in under 2 hours for 1/4 of the cost we were quoted to have it fixed 2 days from now with a different company. So knowledgeable and took time to explain all of the options and possible outcomes. Truly an answer to our prayers. Thank you!!

plumbers.name: Garabedian Plumbing & Heating Inc.
plumbers.address: 208 Austin St, Worcester, MA 01609, USA

reviews.author: Benny (benny_fresh)
reviews.text: First-time homeowner. Never had to hire a plumber before but the drain in our basement bathroom sink was clogged pretty bad so I called Garabedian based on internet reviews. The woman who took our call was very polite. She explained their pricing & fees before booking the service call for us. No unexpected up-charges or surprise fees. They couldn't guarantee same-day service (for non-emergencies) but we got lucky and Sean was able to get to us within two hours of calling. Sean was very professional & friendly. He diagnosed the problem quickly, drilled into the drain pipe, snaked the clog, and patched it back up. Will call them again if I ever need a service plumber.

reviews.author: Henry John Kerr
reviews.text: These guys are outstanding. Al (Alec) arrived precisely on time, looking sharp in his Garabedian shirt. He immediately conveyed a sense of confidence that he knew what he was doing -- and he just got everything done quickly, efficiently, properly. And then some: there actually were two other jobs we hadn't originally had on the call order, and he took care of those effortlessly too. He was a superb communicator -- letting us know what he was doing and what he was going to do. And he left the place super-clean and tidy. Five out of five stars! Ten out of ten stars!

reviews.author: Paul Conner
reviews.text: Called Garabedian plumbing when our hot water heater began to leak.  They came out immediately and diagnosed the problem and returned shortly thereafter and installed a new heater.  Conscientious staff completed the work and cleaned the area in just a few hours.  Very happy with the result.  I highly recommend!!!

reviews.author: Betsy Cullen
reviews.text: Garabedian to the rescue! Can't give enough praise to Caleb! He was able to take care of a few big issues for us, while being polite, knowledgeable and cleaned up the area before he left!  10/10

reviews.author: Jeffrey Arnholt
reviews.text: We hired Garabedian two weeks ago to prepare for a dishwasher installation. We decided to get more plumbing work done which included replacing 5 old shutoff valves, removing the garbage disposal and putting in new drain/waste pvc, a new sink flange, and two new union traps. Rick was our technician, and was great to work with! He was very professional, polite, and gave us a ton of good advice. He answered all our questions and didn't try to upsell us on anything. The work was stellar and done in a short period of time. We felt the quote was fair and reasonably priced, and would highly recommend Rick and Garabedian to others.

plumbers.name: GK Plumbing
plumbers.address: 350 W 114th Ave, Northglenn, CO 80234, USA

reviews.author: Larry Scherbarth
reviews.text: Definitely recommend GK Plumbing.  Had a water leak and toilet that needed to be resecured.  After being overcharged and not too good of customer service from a previous company I looked in Google and found GK Plumbing with good reviews and local company.  Good communication from 1st call all the way through the repair and billing.   Estimate was very fair and reasonable and did not try to upsell things. Will be using them for all future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Curk Colbert
reviews.text: George made time to come by the house the Sunday after Thanksgiving, our water heater wasn't working and it was early afternoon.  GK plumbing had a new water heater at our house in just a few hours and an installation was arranged for the next morning so we were only without hot water for a short time. Installation was professionally done. Highly recommend GK Plumbing!

reviews.author: Richard
reviews.text: My wife and I won't be taking cold showers in the midst of winter thanks to GK Plumbing installing a new hot water heater.  They were totally professional and offered their services at a fair price.  Totally delighted I selected them over all the other competition.

reviews.author: Irene Vasquez
reviews.text: George is great in his profession, does a clean job and everything he has worked on is great and never any issues. He's prompt and courteous. Worth every penny. His prices are reasonable!

reviews.author: Stephanie Sidebottom
reviews.text: I highly recommend GK Plumbing! Our HOA urgently needed plumbing inspections to be completed to identify and find a big leak on our property. We called GK Plumbing and they were able to get out quickly and were very professional. Our community will continue to use this company as much as we can. It's hard to find vendors we love, can trust, and can accomodate us when we have urgent needs. Thank you GK!

plumbers.name: Plumb It Best, LLC
plumbers.address: 83 Hankes Ave, Aurora, IL 60505, USA

reviews.author: Andrew M
reviews.text: We had two toilets replaced on our second floor one included a bidet. They were actually able to come the day after I requested the service which was fantastic! Both toilets were installed with precision and look great. The guys cleaned up everything and even carried our old toilets outside for us. This is the second job we’ve had Plumb-It do and we’ve continued to have a wonderful experience. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: June McHale
reviews.text: James and Alex did a great job installing 3 bathroom faucets and new shower fixture.  They were very respectful of our home. They patiently answered our questions.  They did the job in a timely manner and cleaned up after themselves.  We would definitely call them again.

reviews.author: Christopher Yarborough
reviews.text: I've done business with Plumb It several times over the past 12+ years. Always customer focused, quick, direct, and with fair pricing. Support Scott and his team of trademen. A local small business that you can trust. I wish I could say that about any of the other smaller outfits I use for other needs.

reviews.author: Jody Bruce
reviews.text: Plumb It  Best did a great job at my house. I needed 2 new faucets installed. They showed up on time and had it fixed very quickly. If you need plumbing work, you have to call Plumb It Best!

reviews.author: Tory Tribuzio
reviews.text: They are the  BEST! My old waterheater was removed and a New Highest Quality Bradford- White 40 gallon waterheater was installed PROFESSIONALLY in 2 hours! Thank You PLUMB-IT BEST!

plumbers.name: Cherokee Plumbing Heat and Air LLC
plumbers.address: 13766 N Lincoln Blvd, Edmond, OK 73013, USA

reviews.author: Benny Chance
reviews.text: Great service and great help with everything. Ty and Rudy were fantastic. They were able to diagnose the issue and help explain to me what was going on. They made sure that everything was working and in good condition before leaving. Very exceptional service and will definitely be using again if I ever have any other issues.

reviews.author: Stacey Riffell
reviews.text: We have had Cherokee Plumbing out twice within the past week.  Once for some burst pipes at our business, and today for a broken and leaking hot water heater at our home.   In both instances they arrived quickly and were able to get things replaced and running again at a reasonable price.  We had two different tech teams for each visit and both were great!  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Elizabeth Stepp
reviews.text: Rudy and Ty were quick to provide a quote and even completed the plumbing job the same day! They were efficient with time and reasonably priced + offer a membership to help with the cost of future plumbing maintenance/repairs. 10/10 recommend!

reviews.author: Chambers Clark
reviews.text: Cherokee Plumbing did an excellent job with our plumbing needs. They were professional, on time, and communicated clearly throughout the entire process. The quality of their plumbing work was outstanding and everything was completed efficiently and cleanly. I would highly recommend Cherokee Plumbing to anyone looking for reliable plumbing services.

reviews.author: Eva Fancher
reviews.text: I called Cherokee Plumbing at 9 am and Rudy and Steven came out that afternoon. They were really nice, respectful guys and diagnosed the issue with my hot water heater within 15 minutes and repaired it within the hour. They went to Locke Supply and got me a $300 part under warranty so all I was out was for the labor itself, and the price was reasonable. Do not leave plumbing work to handymen who may seem cheaper! Prior to this I had a “plumber” come out who claimed my hot water tank needed to be replaced. Use this company for quick effective results.

plumbers.name: Plumbtastic Solutions LLC
plumbers.address: 3825 NW 166th St Suite A12, Edmond, OK 73012, USA

reviews.author: Deryl Gotcher
reviews.text: I needed a kitchen faucet replaced. A friend recommended Plumbtastic Solutions. I left a message and they called back immediately. We made an appointment and they came out when scheduled and did an excellent job installing the new faucet at a reasonable price. Laura and Zach know their business and are very nice people. We will definitely call them in the future for plumbing jobs.

reviews.author: Clyde
reviews.text: I had a plumber come out 3 years ago to replace my outside leaking faucet. It worked fine for 2 years before starting to leak. The same company sent someone else out, who messed with it and was able to get it to stop leaking. He said that if it leaked again, they were going to have to do the work from the inside, meaning, cutting out the drywall that I would have to repair. A year later, I noticed it leaking after not being used for a period. I decided to use Plumbtastic Solutions, who was recommended to me by a friend. Zack examined the issue and determined that it was a cheap brand that was damaged during installation. He was able to replace the faucet and redo the mortar in a timely manner. I will use him again.

reviews.author: bassguitarman s
reviews.text:
This was my first experience with Zachary and Laura after having read several very positive recommendations on Facebook groups.  Very nice people to work with and no huge upsell pressure about replacement.  Zachary explained the problem and repaired it after making a trip for parts.  The price was fair and reasonable.

I have a few other jobs on other houses that I will call them for.  For now, I have found my new plumbing company to use.

reviews.author: Stephanie Davis
reviews.text: This company is the best! We I am in need of a plumber, I call Plumbtastic Solutions LLC! They came out quick and were very helpful, courteous, honest and reasonable. I wouldn’t hesitate to call them again when I need. Thank you Zach & Laura!

reviews.author: Natalie Cooper
reviews.text: We had the most wonderful experience dealing with Zach and Laura with Plumbtastic Solutions!!  They were so professional, timely, communicative, and efficient!!  Before they entered our home they put on footies and Laura’s exact statement was, “we want to treat your home as if it was our own” and they did that exactly, which is a top level of customer service that I completely appreciated as a homeowner and it’s those kind of things that make them stand out from many!! They were so friendly and personable while executing the job efficiently!   I would recommend them to everyone, they were great!!!!

plumbers.name: Amped Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning and Security
plumbers.address: 3209 S Broadway Suite 229, Edmond, OK 73034, USA

reviews.author: Blake Menefee
reviews.text: could not get anyone to give me a range of how much it cost to change a sprinkler head.  While , I understand you want to send a technician out to assess what is a simple task,  Respectfully were  not saving lives or putting people in the moon here.

reviews.author: Bradley “B-radzilla” Vaillancourt
reviews.text:
Waited 4 hrs at a vacant house to be called after there time slot had passed and asked if they could reschedule the next day. Sorry, I just gave up a half day of work for a no show.

Update: Had a good conversation with the owner. He responded head on with humility and has committed to making it right. I respect his approach and think a lot of service providers can learn from him. I will be updating to a 5 star rating and will be recommending him.

reviews.author: Tim Miller
reviews.text: This is a derilic company. Stay clear! Three visits in one month, almost a thousand dollars later, to fix an ac unit? The owner, joe, was combative when i talked to him, just to finally get an ac repair done right. Do yourself a favor and call a qualified company. Joe told me i was out of their service range, after sending a technician the first time bc "they had some down time" he did offer to pay back the first two visits, like the check is in the mail type of deal. Last visit was a total accumulation of lies. Supposedly it was my downstairs unit that was affecting my upstairs unit. Downstairs unit was running perfectly. But the shady stuff happened when the tech lied about that,then passed me off to the money collector. After i gave my card number, he hung up abruptly. This company does not need to be allowed to do repairs in Oklahoma! Best of luck joe .edit, still waiting on that refund that you said two week ago.

reviews.author: John Biggs
reviews.text: Wes was super courteous and didn’t waste any time getting right to the job at hand, he gave excellent advice on how to keep my drains clean and hopefully problem free. He was done in just under an hour and left zero clean up for me the customer which I really appreciate. I highly recommend Amped and Wesley Norton. Thanks so much for your efficient work Wes!

reviews.author: Carla Seymour
reviews.text: Very good technician maintain his word as he stated.  Would refer Chris to anyone .  Thank you for your service .    Very through install.

plumbers.name: Trinity Services
plumbers.address: 2209 9th St, Marble Falls, TX 78654, USA

reviews.author: Graham Heck
reviews.text: John Fest is the best. Such a nice guy, and very knowledgeable. Highly recommend for any HVAC service! Trinity took good care of me on a Friday before a holiday weekend came right out, and even came back Friday evening with the part to finish. Lifesaver!

reviews.author: Dan Freeland
reviews.text: Trinity got our HVAC service scheduled the next morning and didn't overcharge for things we didn't need.  Cleaned coils and it's working good as new! Will use them again for yearly cleaning etc.

reviews.author: Cindy Guzman
reviews.text:
Sarah was quick to respond to our text messages sent over the holiday weekend and scheduled a service appointment the next day after the holiday.  Thank you Sarah!
John always services our units.  He is always prompt and friendly.  We trust his ability and honesty to provide us quality service.  Thank you John!
At this servicing, I have requested review of the service time as we feel the time was closer to 1 hour rather than the 1.75 that was billed.  I requested that review a week ago via an email reply to the invoices email address.  I have not heard back from anyone.  I will submit another review request now, again via email.

reviews.author: David Gaskill
reviews.text: When it rains it pours, we had to have John back out as our unit was leaking. He was quick to get here, we called Saturday night late and he was here Sunday noon. Fixed our problem and explained everything very well. Highly suggest Trinity Service, especially John. Thanks for the great service at a very reasonable price!

reviews.author: Jake Koziel
reviews.text: The technicians showed up on time, diagnosed the problem, explained what was required to be repaired and replaced (and why), and had the work completed in no time at all. They could not have been any nicer. Highly recommend Trinity Services for all of your Electrical, Plumbing, and HVAC needs.

plumbers.name: Restoration Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 703 Millview Dr, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Donna Bode
reviews.text: The team at Restoration Plumbing are excellent. Brandon and Aden were the technicians who worked at my house today and they were one-time, communicative, and ensured I understood what they were doing and that I was happy with the results of their work. From Derek, the owner, to every team member of this company you will experience their in-depth knowledgeable, their kindness, and professionalism. There is no other plumbing company I would have out to my home. I am a Realtor and if a client is in need of plumbing services, Derek and his team at Restoration Plumbing is the number I share. A+++ plumbing service and a very easy referral for me to make!

reviews.author: Billy Vigliotti
reviews.text:
Derek was very responsive from first contact and easy to work with.  Brandon and his son were great on the job.  They supplied and installed a new ejector pump and replaced 2 outdoor faucets. The team was very professional and thorough.
Highly recommended and will definitely call for any future needs!

reviews.author: Rebecca Gorski
reviews.text: The individual that installed our shelves drilled into a waste pipe thinking it was a stud, and we didn’t find out until the following evening after using our shower. We called Restoration first thing the next morning and they were able to send someone out that afternoon. Our plumber, Brandon, was incredibly knowledgeable and rolled with all the punches that came from communication with our shelf installer (as it turns out, he had drilled TWO holes into the same pipe). Brandon took the time to be sure the job was done right and answered all of our questions thoroughly and with kindness (and as new homeowners, we had quite a few!). We are so appreciative to have found plumbers we can absolutely trust and they will be our go-to from here on out!

reviews.author: Steve Beach
reviews.text: Brandon & Aiden did a great job! They were on time, friendly and affordable! They repaired a small leak we had and were very honest. They only replaced what needed it and did a very professional and clean job! Would definitely recommend!👍🏻🪠

reviews.author: Peter Heald
reviews.text: The team at Restoration plumbing did a great job replacing our water heater. They explained everything, gave a fair quote, and worked quickly and cleanly. We trust them for all our plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: T And T Sons Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 990 N Delany Rd, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: David Brodsky
reviews.text: Highly recommended.  I was getting ready to travel and noticed a leak just before I was leaving.  I tried calling others I found online but nobody was available.  Luckily, I found T & T Plumbing.  I called and they were at my house within the hour.  They were quick and professional and got the job done right.  Tom Jr. is a great guy and very knowledgeable.  Next time they will be my first call.

reviews.author: Debra Chidester
reviews.text: I had a plumbing issue that turned out to be major and costly. My sewer system needed to be replaced from my foundation to some 30 feet down to the village system. I had used TandT in the past so was very confident in the diagnosis of my problem, not to mention witnessing these old pipes when they were dug up and exposed. The pipe in the foundation had literally sheered off. This was an huge job. Every one of the tradesmen were respectful of our property and  kept our inconvenience to a minimum,. There was great communication and they kept within the estimate. It’s very comforting to know a job like this was done by the highest standards in the industry.  We lost one sidewalk square but they were all 34 years old so we opted to go ahead and replace the sidewalk not just the one square. Tom gave us a referral of who could do this work and as you can see they also did a great job. Thank you TandT.

reviews.author: Jessie Graham
reviews.text: HIGHLY recommend T&T. We needed an urgent repair at 10pm on a Saturday night and they came over without hesitation and fixed it quickly and for a reasonable price. Tom was so friendly, helpful, and quick. We are so appreciative of him for coming out to help!

reviews.author: Chris Wagner
reviews.text: T and T plumbing were absolutely awesome. They were available within a matter of hours. They troubleshot the issue and had it corrected in less than an hour. Pricing is extremely fair. All around good people and great company. I will not be calling anyone else. Thank you for the help.

reviews.author: Paul DeBoer
reviews.text: I'm grateful for the awesome service by Tom (son).  He was very professional and kept things tidy.  Tom fixed my slow draining bathroom sink and a water leak.  Not at simple task as my house is 73 years old.   He also replaced my kitchen faucet.  I am extremely happy with T and T plumbing and I highly recommend them.  Great service at fair prices.  Thanks again Tom!

plumbers.name: Stake Plumbing and Heating
plumbers.address: 145 Sewall St, Boylston, MA 01505, USA

reviews.author: Mark B
reviews.text: Stake Plumbing is fantastic!!  They recently installed all the plumbing in my new 3 car garage & work shop, which included a new complex water filtration system, hot water, sinks, rerouting well lines, and irrigation feeds and external spigots. All their work was to high standards, on time, and competitively priced.  They also stand behind their work.... when a well pump check valve started acting up, they came out immediately and replaced at no charge.   Curtis Jr. is a knowledgeable and  hardworking professional, and a pleasure to work with.  Highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Mukund Lingineni
reviews.text: Curtis Jr. helped replace our water heater and handle a few other tasks. It is very hard to find someone who is customer-friendly, a true small business, and really great at their job. Curtis checks all the boxes. Most of all, he is honest and reliable. I highly recommend him.

reviews.author: Tom Taylor
reviews.text: I hired Stake Plumbing for some work as part of my kitchen remodel, including installing new water lines and disconnecting/reconnecting the dishwasher and sink with a new faucet. Curtis’ communication was excellent throughout the entire process, and the work was completed efficiently and with great attention to detail. I highly recommend Curtis for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: John Freeman
reviews.text: Curt installed a new on-demand gas water heater to replace our old tank type. Job went smoothly. I'm very impressed by the communication and effort to getting the job done. There were no surprises.

reviews.author: Troy Kasper
reviews.text: Curtis is well versed in his profession.  Several times during remodeling of our bathroom/walk in shower that he was here, he was continually working.  Advised on several things during that time that became beneficial and more sensible to the layout.  Always cleaned areas where work was completed every time.  Very respectful.   Would be first call if a plumbing issue was to arise.

plumbers.name: Gregory's Plumbing
plumbers.address: 322 E Main St #4600, Batavia, OH 45103, USA

reviews.author: Shelley Summers
reviews.text: Jacob is hands down the best plumber I have ever worked with! He installed a new whole house water filtration system and softener for us, and the quality of the installation was top-notch—everything looked neat and professional. I’ve lived in different places with similar systems, and this was by far the best plumbing job I’ve seen. Jacob also replaced our kitchen water filter, serviced our on-demand water heater, and took the time to teach us about all the plumbing features in our new Batavia home, without charging extra for his advice. I am extremely impressed and truly grateful for such excellent service from Gregory's Plumbing.

reviews.author: Tanya Bullock
reviews.text: The plumber was able to schedule my appointment quickly and showed up on time. Donovan came out to replace my old shower valve and ended up updating all the pipes leading to the shower head as well. He made sure everything was nice and secure, so nothing wobbles anymore. Since my house is pretty old, he even raised the shower head to a more comfortable height. The work was done really well and didn’t take long at all. The price matched what I expected, with no hidden costs or surprises. Overall, I’m happy with the service and would recommend them to anyone needing plumbing work.

reviews.author: lydia chavez
reviews.text: I'm really glad I went with my gut and chose Gregory's Plumbing for my plumbing needs. When I called, the office staff was friendly and respectful, picking up right away and making me feel comfortable. Even though my issue wasn't an emergency, they were able to schedule an appointment quickly—just two days later. I appreciated getting a confirmation call when the plumber was on the way, so I knew exactly when to expect them. Jacob was the plumber who came out, and he was fantastic. He had a great sense of humor, which made the whole experience easier, and he knew exactly how to fix my slow-draining sinks. Everything was explained clearly, with upfront estimates and honest communication about what to expect. If you're looking for a reliable plumber who does quality work and treats you right, I highly recommend reaching out to this company.

reviews.author: Clara Kirk
reviews.text: We woke up to find our basement flooded because our water heater had cracked overnight. We called a local plumbing company right away, and they responded quickly and acted very professionally. Donovan came out to inspect the water heater, explained everything clearly, and gave us a fair price for the replacement. He was friendly and made us feel comfortable throughout the whole process. Jacob, who was helping him, was also very polite and respectful when he introduced himself. Both of them took great care to protect our home while working. We were so glad to have hot water restored the same day. We will definitely call this plumbing team again if we need help in the future.

reviews.author: Veronica F
reviews.text: Gregory's Plumbing provided top-notch service when I needed several plumbing updates after moving into my new home in Batavia. I reached out based on their great reviews, and I’m glad I did. Jacob and Donovan came out to help finish a plumbing project I had started myself but ran into trouble with. They showed up right on time, which I really appreciated. Both Jacob and Donovan were very friendly and took the time to explain each step of the work so I understood what was happening. They replaced my kitchen sink, installed new shutoff valves, hooked up the dishwasher, and swapped out my garbage disposal. They also took care of the shutoff valves for both toilets and even fixed a small leak on the main water line. Everything was completed quickly and looked perfect when they finished. The price for all the work was fair, and I felt like I was getting honest advice the whole time. Later, I scheduled another appointment because I was having issues with my hot water tank. Jacob said he’d try to repair it first to save me money. When the water heater suddenly failed and started leaking everywhere, I called for help right away. The office was very understanding about the emergency and had Jacob and Donovan at my house with a new tank in less than half an hour. Once again, the work was done fast and professionally. I highly recommend them for any plumbing needs in Batavia. The prices are reasonable, the plumbers are trustworthy, and they don’t try to upsell you on things you don’t need. Overall, I am very happy with the service and the results!

plumbers.name: Accurate Air Solutions, LLC
plumbers.address: 6737 E Hwy 80, Abilene, TX 79601, USA

reviews.author: Jennifer Rogers
reviews.text: My pipes froze from this last storm and I had Accurate Air Plumbing came out to fix it.  Thank you Jay S and Dillon F for their awesome service! They showed up  quickly and immediately got to work fixing it. They actually took the time to talk to me and explain what the problem was, how they were fixing it and what I can do to prevent it from happening again. Most services come in, do whatever and want their money.  NOT THESE GUYS! They were so polite and even offered to take off their boots so they didn't track snow and mud through my home. AND, they did not drain my bank account! I want them to know how much I truly appreciate everything they did. If you want service where someone comes into your home and treats you like a human being and not just money in their pockets, I promise you will truly appreciate and actually enjoy Accurate Air Plumbing come to your home. Thank you from the bottom of my heart and keep up the awesome work!

reviews.author: Becca Coleman
reviews.text: Walter from Accurate Air is consistently professional, incredibly knowledgeable, and always willing to go above and beyond. Even with a completely full schedule, he still made time to come out and take care of an issue that had everyone in a bit of panic. His dedication, reliability, and genuine willingness to help made all the difference. Thank you, Walter you’re a phenomenal plumber and truly a bad*** asset to the team. We also experienced an emergency lateral drain line issue in military housing that resulted in two families being displaced. After scheduling and coordinating with Walter, he promptly sent out Duran and Trey, and they were absolutely AMAZING. Both were highly professional and went above and beyond, even working past normal hours to ensure the job was completed properly. They carefully cautioned off the area until work could resume and restored the site as if it had never been touched. This is truly a remarkable team, and I would HIGHLY recommend Duran and Trey for ANY job and will definitely be using Accurate Air again in the future.

reviews.author: Donna Mcadams
reviews.text:
I am very pleased with the customer service from Accurate Air Solutions. Ricky was knowledgeable and professional. And prompt!
I have made arrangements for additional work to be scheduled next week.
It seems that these guys can take care of a multitude of problems. They are just what we’ve been searching for and I’m appreciative of their expertise.

reviews.author: Melissa Lara
reviews.text: We’ve had nothing but great experiences with the plumbing department at Accurate Air Solutions. Walter and his team are extremely professional, dependable, and always receptive to our needs. Walter consistently goes above and beyond to make sure the job is done right. Their pricing is fair, and they’ve earned our trust—this is the only plumbing company we work with.

reviews.author: Jason Skinner
reviews.text: Brandon Whitley will be the ONLY tech I will ever request.  He is professional, honest and technically savvy.  I called for a possible thermostat issue.  Brandon showed up promptly when he said he would, he listened to my concerns carefully and without hesitation dove right in to diagnose my issue.  He did not pressure me at all, did not hurry me and did not try to guide me into a needless purchase.  he was honest and went above and beyond when checking to make sure everything is perfect with my system.  Great tech, keep him on your staff at all costs!!!!!

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer and Drain
plumbers.address: 115 Campbell St #201C, Geneva, IL 60134, USA

reviews.author: Bobby L
reviews.text: Mike was very professional and did a great job. They showed up the very next day after my initial estimate and jetting of my drains and they even finished the job by 2:00 with me only having to miss a very small part of my work day to let them. Like I said before they were professional friendly and I had no issues trusting them to be in my home while I went back to work and they definitely proved me to be right by doing a phenomenal job and I would definitely recommend them to friends and family so in my opinion they definitely deserve a free lunch, now wish I would of thought of it cause to be honest they probably deserve 2 free lunches

reviews.author: Mark Anderson
reviews.text:
Jovany did a great job explaining the entire process of Hydro Jetting my sewer lines. He cleaned out our entire line from our interior clean out all the way out to the street. We watched the camera back before and after the cleaning. Great to see how much cleaner the lines were after he was done. The equipment was all like new. Jovany was very clean when bringing the jet washing lines and camera into and out of our house.
Hopefully this is the first and last time I'll need this done.

reviews.author: RAY IVES
reviews.text:
J Blanton Plumbing and Plumber, Peter Carrillo, did an outstanding job on a very difficult plumbing project at my home. Peter was professional, punctual, and extremely detailed from start to finish. The job required additional parts and unexpected adjustments, and Peter made multiple trips to get the right supplies without hesitation to ensure everything was done properly.

He was courteous, polite, and treated my home with the highest level of respect. He communicated clearly, worked efficiently, and did not cut corners. It is rare to find someone who combines technical skill with this level of professionalism and integrity.

I highly recommend J Blanton Plumbing and Peter Carrillo to anyone looking for a dependable and highly capable plumber.

Ray Ives

reviews.author: Sue Lannin
reviews.text: Blanton plumbing technician Thomas Maloney discovered the street parking in my neighborhood can be quite challenging but kept a good sense of humor & commitment to service, which I appreciated. He was thorough & diligent in making the needed installations of new sink & toilet water shutoff valves in Apt B, replacing the badly leaking bathroom sink faucet & its worn out piping, unclogging Apt A’s bathroom tub drain, ensuring that faucets & drains in our tenants‘ bathrooms are now working properly. He communicated clearly what his labor would entail, acquired the necessary parts, cleaned up both work areas, and answered questions to my satisfaction. I highly recommend him as a capable, reliable tradesman who understood the work required. Alex Ybarra from Blanton was the sales rep & cost estimator for the project, so Alex & Tom had communicated about the job, with Tom having seen notes & photos Alex provided, saving me time (no explanations needed!) & giving me confidence in Blanton‘s teamwork & professionalism.

reviews.author: Alexis Black
reviews.text: J. Blanton did a sewer liner project for me. Everyone did a great job of communicating what they would be doing and answering my many questions. All of the technicians were courteous and respectful. The work was of high quality and they completed it quickly. Dominic did the jetting on day one, and Colton, Nick and Peter were the team on day two. They were all wonderful to work with and did an excellent job. Thank you!

plumbers.name: A.C.T. Plumbing & Property Management, Inc.
plumbers.address: 2660 Hennig Rd, Hampshire, IL 60140, USA

reviews.author: Linda Kleckner
reviews.text: Our water heater broke late in the day. Ron walked me through shutting off the gas and the water and then directed me on how to drain it before he got there. It minimized the damage and he was able to install a new water heater the next day. Ron is always quick to respond and offers great service at a fair price. We have been using his company for over 10 years for a reason. He and his company are terrific!

reviews.author: Dawn Nowakowski
reviews.text: If I could leave a review for more than 5 STARS I would. In all aspects of business this Company is top notch!! I will definitely be using Ron and Tristan again and again and most likely again! I'm new to the area, and I am so thankful for the referral I was given to use them for all my plumbing needs.How does one achieve and more importantly , Maintain a 5 star status? By excelling in every aspect of the plumbing business!

reviews.author: Anthony Cerrito
reviews.text: Ron responded quickly, was out fast & I didn't have to do a thing. He got me a better water heater for the same price installed as some cheap one I almost bought with half the warranty. He picked up the water heater for me, brought to me and took the old one away. Made it stupid simple for me & removed all the stress from the situation.

reviews.author: Petey Urukalo
reviews.text:
We had a plumbing issue with low water pressure and called A.C.T Plumbing and spoke with the owner Ron and he came out the next morning and got the kitchen sink that was clogged working again. It literally took him two minutes and the pressure was back good again and we were so excited. We asked Ron how much we owe him for his work and he said nothing. It only took a couple of minutes and he didn’t charge us for anything and in this day and age you don’t see that too often so kudos to Ron for being honest and willing to spend his time helping people he just met. We stored his number for future plumbing jobs and plan on passing along his information to anyone that needs a plumber. We Highly recommend Ron and A.C.T. Plumbing to everyone.
Thank you Ron for your Help!

reviews.author: Dolores Alex
reviews.text:
I called A.C.T because I had a problem with a brand new hose for my sump pump that wasn't connected right.

Water was shooting out from the base of the hose. I did ask my landscaper if he could install this brand new hose for me because i was in a pinch and he said yes.  He said he would charge me $60 for a very simple job.

However...i needed this done so i paid him $60 to do this. A couple days later when we had some bad rain i was outside and noticed the  hose was shooting out water of the base of the hose.  The same thing that happened to my old hose that i needed to replace with the new hose.The only difference was the old hose actually had a split in the hose (because it was old) so I needed to buy a new hose.

When A.C.T. came out he told me right away the landscaper didn't tighten the hose in a couple spots leaving water to shoot out from the base of the hose.

Prior to all this i did called the landscaper to tell him what happened he told me it wasn't an emergency and it could wait.  That didn't make me very happy because i paid him $60 to do the job right and when i told him what happened he didn't at all seem alarmed and couldn't be at my house for about 3 days. I was shocked.

Thats when i talked to my neighbor and they recommended A.C.T. and i can see why... he was excellent, and charge me a trip charge which I felt was very fair. He came out on a Sunday and he fixed the problem, and above all done it right the first time.

The purpose of this review is to solely let people know that there are good trusting, reputable companies that truly care about their customers.

A.C.T. the owner Ron did not hesitate to come to my aid to help me out
ASAP and fix the problem.

Easy fix...however, the problem was the landscaper he did not tighten the hoses.

Next time ill go with the professionals.

Thanks to Ron for all his help it meant the world to me.  Now I can sleep knowing the job was done right the first time.

plumbers.name: Pro Services Plumbing, Drains, Sewer Lining
plumbers.address: 318 N Lincolnway St, North Aurora, IL 60542, USA

reviews.author: mark gamble
reviews.text:
I can't say enough good things about Pat and Evan who are the owners of Pro Services! From start to finish, the experience was fantastic. They were incredibly fast and dependable, showing up right on time and getting the job done quickly without cutting any corners.

What really stood out was their honest and hard-working ethic. It was clear they weren't just trying to get the job done; they genuinely wanted to fix the issue the right way. They explained what was wrong, what the repair would involve, and gave me a fair price upfront. No surprises, no pressure, just clear communication and great work.

If you're looking for a plumber who is both skilled and trustworthy, look no further. I'll definitely be calling them again for any future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Kenneth Simpson
reviews.text:
Called Pro Services to fix a toilet problem I had. After explaining it to Anthony at Pro services, he arranged to have a plumber take care of it on a day and time convenient for me. This was an easy call to make as I had an earlier excellent experience with Joseph from Pro Services.
This time, Michael was the plumber who did an outstanding job playing “Macguyvier” to craft a unique solution to a not typical multi pronged problem. I once did my own  plumbing repairs, but I am too old to even try doing them now. Michael was also personable, professional, knowledgable, informative and the cost was more than reasonable and fair. I do not often make recommendations for anybody or anything, But I wholeheartedly recommend Pro Services for any plumbing work you may need. They are just what people call “Good people.” Pro Services will have all my future business when I need a plumber.

reviews.author: Jacob Smith
reviews.text:
I recently experienced a plumbing emergency, and I can't express how grateful I am for Anthony’s exceptional assistance. From the moment I reached out, he was incredibly responsive and understanding of the urgency of my situation.

Anthony coordinated his plumbing crew to arrive promptly, ensuring minimal disruption to my home. The team was professional, knowledgeable, and efficient, quickly diagnosing the issue and providing a solution. They took the time to explain what was happening and answered all my questions, which put me at ease during a stressful time.

reviews.author: Karen Kehl-Rose
