Tyler’s skilled recovery of the metal tool lodged in the pipes saved us time and thousands of dollars from additional damage the metal tool may have caused if it moved further down the drain. His repairs and enhancements took into consideration the dexterity and safety of the older adults in the home. The solutions addressed existing problems, as well as anticipating future needs, such as availability of replacement parts.  Thanks to Tyler, our 55 year old home now has shut oﬀ valves and a clean out that did not exist before. All the work was neatly done, and the work spaces were left clean and in order.

The results with Tyler and Service Force Plumbing exceeded our expectations, and we will share our positive experience with others
requiring plumbing work.

reviews.author: Christopher Georgatsos
reviews.text: The Service Force Plumbing team ONCE AGAIN KNOCKED it out of the park!! A GRAND SLAM! True plumbing professionals, in fact INCREDIBLE PLUMBING PROFESSIONALS- the very best in the business! I have always been treated as a valued customer by Service Force Plumbing. As a veteran realtor, I give them my highest recommendation and confidently and without hesitation refer them to all my own clients. Roy, Hendrik and their team have never let me or my clients down. I just had an emergency plumbing situation in my own home, in which Roy and his team responded immediately, identifying and resolving the problem in record time. Tyler, the technician showed up before the schedule time, was exceptionally personable, knowledgeable, efficient, meticulously clean and well organized. Mission accomplished! The front office scheduling manager, Joe is a true credit to their operation. These men are the best in the business! Without any hesitation, I wholeheartedly recommend this company!

reviews.author: Janet Allen
reviews.text: Tyler came to our house after we called about water in the basement.  He added the visit at the end of his already long day and stayed for almost two hours.  He sent us detailed photos and videos so we could see the issues.  He gave us a reasonable quote before starting work.  At the end, he explained the situation clearly and gave us recommendations for next steps.  He was polite and kind.  Such an excellent experience.  He’s a gem.

plumbers.name: Unique Plumbing & Drain, Inc.
plumbers.address: 899 Moe Dr #16, Akron, OH 44310, USA

reviews.author: Katelyn Nicolosi
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Unique Plumbing.  I called on a Thursday and they had availability next day!  When they came out, they were able to get my job done much quicker than I had thought possible.  The cost was also incredibly reasonable.  I had some piping replaced and was pleasantly surprised at the clean look of the job.  They also left the space spotless when they left.  The whole process was professional and exceeded my expectations from start to finish.  Thank you!!

reviews.author: Brook Riddick
reviews.text:
Greg and Robb were excellent and did a fantastic job replacing our water heater. They made sure that our dog didn't get out and were very polite and considerate of my WFH status so I barely knew they were here.
I 100% recommend them and Unique plumbing for everything you need.
I've already got plans to call them again for additional work.

reviews.author: KKno Norris
reviews.text: I highly recommend Unique Plumbing - Greg!  From the first call to the final fix, Greg was professional, responsive, and honest.  Arrived on time, clearly explained everything, and completed the work efficiently with great attention to detail.  It's hard to find a Plumbing Company you can truly trust, but Unique Plumbing has earned mine.  Highly recommend to anyone looking for reliable, top-notch service.

reviews.author: Now Loading247
reviews.text: Rob was a great plumber, he was informative, personable, and wonderful to talk with. My wife thought he had the most pleasing attitude, she almost wishes for something else to break so he can come back and fix it. We will highly recommend him to other people we know. He was detailed as to what our problem was and he quikly and efficiently repaired our valve. Rob is one in a million, please never let him go.

reviews.author: Sarrah Magan
reviews.text: Unique is my go to company for all plumbing needs in Akron. They are prompt, easy to schedule with and have a wealth of knowledge.  Robb did a great job. He was courteous, he took the time to explain to me what was going wrong and what he was going to do to fix it and when he left it looked better than when he came in. 12/10 will schedule again!

plumbers.name: Fox Valley Plumbing & Backflow
plumbers.address: 953 1/2 Grace St, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Rick Siefken
reviews.text: Matt and Corey came out same day.  Sump pump routing was leaking and poorly installed by me.  Also fixed copper leak and installed new pump.  The work was above expectations and I didn't feel cheated like I have with corporate plumbers.  I cannot recommend more highly.  Before and after photos attached.

reviews.author: Moses Kane
reviews.text:
Matt from Fox Valley is extremely knowledgeable and is the only plumber who thinks outside of the box unlike many other plumbers who stick to the basics and unable to figure out any issues. Matt helped us diagnose issues that we never knew we had. Him and his team are top notch professionals that will deliver a clean and excellent job. Highly recommended for all plumbing related work!

Matt was available to talk and give us advice at all times and we highly appreciate his help!

reviews.author: Cheryl Mackin
reviews.text: Fox Valley Plumbing worked with me to assess and amend a frozen pipe.  They were friendly, listened to my concerns, and recommended solutions that worked.

reviews.author: Nico L
reviews.text: Matt came right over to inspect our home and to see what was going on with our sump pump. He gave me two quotes and didn't push any of them on me. I did opt for the more expensive unit since I'd rather play it safe than sorry. Cody came the next day after they even ordered the unit before I made my final decision. They installed it and were very customer oriented. It's hard to find folks that care, I got a follow up call later that night checking how everything went. I seriously cannot recommend them more. It's an experience you won't find with larger run businesses and I will definitely call them in the future.

reviews.author: Lee Petit
reviews.text: Matt provided an excellent solution to an ongoing issue. His team came in and executed that plan in a prompt professional manner. It’s very appreciated!

plumbers.name: Ernie Peterson Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 2421 N Delany Rd, Waukegan, IL 60087, USA

reviews.author: Lewis R
reviews.text: Great service and the Specialist informed of items I need to repair. Communication was the key for me. I appreciate everything you did for us. On time for service and fixed another item on site with not one issue with me asking. Pricing was and service outstanding.  Thank you. The Specialist told me his name but it slipped my thoughts.  Hats out to him!!!

reviews.author: Sally Sandine
reviews.text: We have always had good experiences with Ernie Peterson service calls.  This time was a particularly good experience, Keith managed to not only make the repair, but also diagnosed why it is happening more than it should, so the repair should keep things working well with less service call needs.  Appreciate him going the extra mile, and he also kept everything very clean and neat while working.  In addition, he is very pleasant and communicates well to keep me aware of what is going on...and he works fast and efficiently, too!  A pleasure, would ask for him again when the need arises!

reviews.author: arthur amelio
reviews.text: They arrived on time and did a great job including extras that were required to make it a top quality job. Their employees were friendly and very respectful of us and our home. They are my go to plumber.

reviews.author: David
reviews.text: We hired Ernie Peterson to install a new bathroom sink and they did a great job! Clean, showed up on time and accomplished everything quickly.

reviews.author: Chris
reviews.text: Kieth was so great. I called ABC plumbing and they wanted $3000. For the great customer service call Ernie Peterson Plumbing!

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 839 N Winchester Ave #2r, Chicago, IL 60622, USA

reviews.author: Mike Schlechtweg
reviews.text: Great service. I had an issue with my shower and Rescue Plumbing came out promptly and helped me get things working again. Would certainly recommend to anyone!

reviews.author: Lorraine Freund
reviews.text: A big shout out to Rescue Plumbing. They certainly came to my rescue. My shower wouldn't turn off completely and I needed a quick fix. They arrived within two hours. Victor Cruz was polite and efficient and got my shower working properly again in no time!

reviews.author: Rajatha Priyadarshini
reviews.text: Pete and his team were awesome. Our dishwasher wouldn't run, except for one hour quick wash. Three different people gave three different diagnosis. Pete was the only one who caught a pinched copper pipe under kitchen sink. He assured that it was the only problem and dishwasher will run fine after the fix, that's exactly what happened. Easy appointment, free estimate, honest diagnosis and quick fix. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Lisa Spengler
reviews.text: Pete arrived quickly and assessed the situation -- my old toilet needed to be replaced. He and Noah were back early the next day with a replacement that was installed in no time. Not only were they fast, but they were thorough and friendly. After the successful install, Pete cleared up all the materials and the old toilet and left the space clean. I highly recommend Rescue Plumbing. They'll take great care of you!

reviews.author: Subgeta
reviews.text: Called to get a leaking boiler pipe fixed. Fast response, got a quote, and my boiler was not only fixed, but brought to code. Excellent job by Freddy and Carlos whom were very professional, knowledgeable, and informed me what needed fixing/replaced. Excellent! Will call them when I need pluming repairs in the future. As well as recommend them to others!

plumbers.name: Told Plumbing
plumbers.address: 501 S Main St, Pleasant Grove, UT 84062, USA

reviews.author: Jacob Hansen (Jake)
reviews.text: Amazing guys they installed a new water heater in our duplex the technician was super chill and they do really high quality work, not many people go the extra length to use both pipe tape and pipe dope to seal things they seriously do high quality work and the new water heater works great.

reviews.author: Mindy Young
reviews.text: Told Plumbing is an honest company! I had problems with my sump pump in the basement and had another plumbing company out and without really looking at it too much they told me I needed a new one and quoted me super high. I talked to Jon at Told Plumbing and he said he would have Kelly come out and look at it and if it needed to be replaced they quoted me way lower than the estimate from the other company.  Kelly came out and took a look and told me it was just backed up and he cleaned it out and got it back to working condition.  If i have any other plumbing problems I'm going back to Told! Kelly and Jon are awesome!

reviews.author: Julio César Acosta
reviews.text: Fast and quality service from my initial call to the end of service. Kelly  came to our house today and as scheduled and did a fantastic job. Helping us with the dishwasher, the master shower, the water filter and a toilet. He knew how to solve every issue and was very professional.  Very happy either way the service.

reviews.author: Chad Clayson
reviews.text:
Update!
After my original review told plumbing reached out and apologize and said that it was a training error and they wanted to make things right so they did refund me back to the original amount discussed on the phone. Took a lot for them to do this, which is why I went from one star to three.

Completely dishonest! Scheduled to have them come and jet out the main sewer line. Was given pricing per hour and was told I would have a 15 minute heads up call before they showed up. Came home from work to see them already in front of the house before our scheduled time just standing there and they started working when I showed up. Within 35 minutes, they were done and had left so I thought everything was great. When I got the bill, not only was the hourly price higher than what I was told on the phone, they also charged me for 2 hours plus a loading fee. When I called in they said it’s because the truck gps clocked in for one hour and one minute at our house so we had to pay for a second hour. I told them I have doorbell camera footage of the guys just sitting in front of the house and not even working more than 30 minutes so I’m not paying for that time. After going back-and-forth, she called me back later and said they would only charge for one hour of work but I still had to pay for the guys to load the truck before they came to our house (which I was never quoted or told about) and the higher hourly rate (which they misquoted on the phone). Obviously, they don’t care about being trustworthy or honest, they’re just trying to get as much money for each job as they can. Look elsewhere and don’t trust them, in my opinion.

reviews.author: Shea Conroy
reviews.text: The service at Told Plumbing was great! Everyone that I interacted with was kind and helpful. I recommend them to my friends and neighbors all the time because I was very impressed with their work.

plumbers.name: Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp
plumbers.address: 3185 Longview Dr, Yorkville, IL 60560, USA

reviews.author: David Shin
reviews.text: He's a truly professional technician. I was so happy he arrived promptly, fully equipped with all the necessary equipment. He diligently cleaned the drain for two hours, which was truly admirable. Furthermore, he successfully completed the entire job and paid me a very satisfactory fee. I recommend this company to everyone I know.

reviews.author: B Lehnen
reviews.text:
Rafael did an amazing job. He really took his time and explained everything he was doing
I had another company prior who told me it would cost thousands to fix.
He was very professional and honest. His recommendation was yearly cleaning.
Price was very affordable.
I would highly recommend Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp.

reviews.author: Tyler Quintana
reviews.text: Called them in need of a quick turnaround to help me rod out my main line. They were able to send a technician, Jose, out to me in less than 2 hours. Jose was very professional and cleared out roots that were backing up my line. Prices were exactly as quoted for me. At no point was pushed to try to buy more services. I will for sure be using Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp again in the future if needed.

reviews.author: Jeanette Ortiz
reviews.text: We had a sewer backup emergency and received exceptional service. Rafael was on time. identified the issue right away, and worked efficiently to resolve the problem. He was professional, knowledgeable, and kept me informed throughout the entire process. We truly appreciated the fast response and quality work during a very stressful situation. Highly recommend their service!

reviews.author: Jacklyn BB
reviews.text: I highly recommend Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp. I have been dealing with an issue for 2 years now. Everytime I washed, water would drain back to my tub making it impossible to wash on a weekly basis. Once they came out, they listened to my issue and made sure they took their time resolving it. He put in a camera, and saw many roots. He went over it about 4 times making sure he cleaned it out as much as possible. I was shocked at how much he was able to remove. Very professional and he drove about 35 minutes from his home. I will continue having them over and keep up the maintenance every year. They offer a great price as well.

plumbers.name: Turner Plumbing
plumbers.address: 818 Stone Creek Cir, Genoa, IL 60135, USA

reviews.author: Schulenburg Realty, Inc.
reviews.text: Dylan and Mark are extremely professional, honest, courteous and competent. Showed up 5 minutes early and texted 30 minutes before to confirm. Replaced a toilet and a kitchen faucet. Cleaned up afterwards. Left no mess. Highly recommended. Will use again as needed.

reviews.author: Austin Welte
reviews.text: 110% satisfied! Dylan is knowledgeable, timely, professional and clean. He absolutely blows the other plumbers I’ve used out of the water. Based on what I’ve paid for smaller jobs, I feel that Turner Plumbings pricing is fair and competitive. This is the only company I’ll call from now on. I originally reached out directly through Google and got a response almost immediately. From there, Dylan took over with phone calls and texts which was perfect. He delt with the city directly and coordinated with them for repairs on our mains and I didn’t have to lift a finger. I would give 10 stars if I could.

reviews.author: Alicia Kellogg
reviews.text: These people are amazing! Every time they come I am wayyyy more than satisfied. Great thorough job, and very great prices. I only call Turner Plumb when I have an issue. I trust them 💯

reviews.author: GORDON AKEY
reviews.text: I have nothing but great things to say about Turner Plumbing. I had a toilet that was leaking and had to be replaced. Dylan came over almost immediately gave me a price for the whole project. He removed my old toilet and replace it with a new one the very next day. Turner Plumbing did an excellent job for a fair price.

reviews.author: leea herriman
reviews.text: To say Turner Plumbing did an outstanding job is an understatement but no other words completely describe the wonderful work  they did; which included multiple  jobs from my bathroom to kitchen and even the outside and I can say honestly everything was done beautifully. Trust if I have any other plumbing issues they will be the first people I call.

plumbers.name: Eric's Plumbing and Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 2139 N 220 E St, Provo, UT 84604, USA

reviews.author: Todd Densley
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Eric’s Plumbing. I called Eric after discovering my hot water heater was leaking, and he immediately jumped into action. Within 45 minutes, he drove from Spanish Fork to American Fork with all the necessary supplies—no delays, no excuses.

Even more impressive, Eric and his crew had the entire hot water heater replaced in under an hour. Professional, efficient, and incredibly knowledgeable from start to finish.

Amazing service, best price in town—hands down, and an all-around great experience. If you need a plumber you can trust, Eric and his team are the best there is. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Melinda Bridenstine
reviews.text: Eric's Plumbing is fantastic! They are skilled, professional and give great service at a fair price. They saved us thousands over the other two plumbing companies for our water main replacement a couple months ago. We called Eric's Plumbing again for a low water pressure issue.  Dillion was great! He was very thorough in his assessment and addressed a couple other issues. He explained the issues and possible repair options. We needed to replace the kitchen faucet.  Dillion had one on the truck and repaired it right then. He did a beautiful job and we love the new faucet which was very reasonably priced. We enjoyed chatting with Dillion while he worked.  After completing the work he went the extra mile and made sure everything was spotlessly clean which I really appreciated.   Awesome company! Awesome plumbers! Give them a call for your plumbing issues. You won't be disappointed.

reviews.author: Megan Dunnigan
reviews.text: Richie came to replace my kitchen sink, disposal, and faucet along with updating the piping from my kitchen to the basement. He'd previously done other work on my house, and I appreciated having him come again because I trust him and knows he does good work. Everything was installed correctly. His work was clean and professional. He made sure I liked how everything turned out, and I do!

reviews.author: Terra Nicole Hansen Franco
reviews.text:
Rickie (or was is Richie) was absolutely fantastic. He was very helpful, kind, and polite, and he communicated clearly with us the entire time. We originally called him out for an issue with our shower, but he also took the time to check our water heater and inspect all the plumbing throughout the house, including the bathroom and kitchen sinks. He kept us informed of any potential issues he noticed along the way.
What really stood out was how well he explained his process. Since the exact issue wasn’t immediately clear, he walked us through the order in which he planned to try different fixes—starting with the least invasive and least expensive options first. He was upfront about the likelihood of needing a more costly repair and made sure to get our approval before moving on to the next step if something didn’t work. We never felt rushed or pressured.
He also made sure we felt satisfied before leaving, was great with our dog, and wore shoe covers to protect our floors, which we really appreciated. Overall, Rochi was extremely professional, friendly, and clearly very capable. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience.

reviews.author: Sandman Marketing
reviews.text:
Eric’s Plumbing is the real deal. I had a nightmare main sewer line issue and got a bunch of quotes—Eric’s was easily the best price, and the quality didn't suffer for it. They drove all the way out to Ogden and just knocked it out.

They even helped me out with a few extra things while they were on-site, which I really appreciated. No stress, no hidden fees, just great work. If you’re looking for someone honest who won't overcharge you, these are your guys.

plumbers.name: JC Plumbing & Rooter
plumbers.address: 19264 Medford Ct, Hayward, CA 94541, USA

reviews.author: jonathan tan
reviews.text: Highly recommend JC Plumbing for tankless water heater installs! He arrived promptly and gave me accurate ETAs prior to arrival on day of installation. No hidden costs or additional costs came up. Fair price for excellent work. Very professional with explaining my options and what suited my house needs for a tankless system. He came back a week later to patch up part of the area he worked on and checked if everything was working as advertised. A+++

reviews.author: Dorian Young
reviews.text: Would absolutely recommend Jose and JC, Plumbing & Rooter. We did a big remodel 23 years ago and at this point all of our plumbing needed servicing.- toilets, showers, kitchen, sink, and hot water heater. Jose was able to take care of it all. Super nice guy, professional, and very trustworthy. He was recommended by our neighbor. So happy we went with him!

reviews.author: John Flanagan
reviews.text: I received a recommendation from a friend for this plumber.  I was so glad that I called. I texted Jose the owner yesterday  about my toilet running water. He replied and came today to my home. He looked at the toilet and recommended a new valve for my toilet.  He gave me a quote and I accepted and he went right to work. The work was done within thirty minutes and I was completely satisfied with the work. I will definitely call again for future plumbing work.

reviews.author: Marmar Goat Lady
reviews.text: VERY GOOD experience. You don't want a mediocre or bad experience with a plumber. My Navien tankless water heater suddenly had something wrong with the heating cycle. I looked at the Navien website for authorized repairs and installers and called 3 in the area.  2 never replied, Jose at JC was very prompt. He was here within a day, diagnosed the problem with Navien tech-support, the problem was a Check valve that needed to be replaced. He ordered the part locally and came back installed it. His final bill for services was $100 less than his initial quote. He kept his workspace tidy, cleaned  everything up before he left. He reminded me his services include Repairing and installing all sorts of Hot water systems, including tankless, and any plumbing problems including rooter service.  He can repair or replace your toilet and faucets. I will definitely use Jose again, and have recommended him to family and friends. I do not think you will be disappointed.

reviews.author: Rheddy Setgo
reviews.text:
Jose was very thorough with his work. Highly recommended! He worked on our Noritz for 4 hours to descale, clean filter and troubleshoot the problem that cropped up in between. The previous company that installed our Noritz didn’t install a local shutoff valve, glad Jose recommended we did that. Thank you!
He showed us how to clean and descale ourselves, he said it’ll save $300 per year. Not sure we’ll have time so we will likely get him to do it for us when it’s time. Great communication and very timely. No need to call anyone else, choose JC!

plumbers.name: K.B.I Sewer & Drainage
plumbers.address: 2016 W Indian Ridge Dr, Johnsburg, IL 60051, USA

reviews.author: PermablockTank - FukCal51
reviews.text: Keith and his crew were awesome. They replaced a section of sewer line under my basement floor. Right on time. Super polite. Kept me informed the whole time. Oh, and the work is top notch. Definitely recommend these guys.

reviews.author: Ashleigh Holley
reviews.text: KBI was super respectful and professional when they came to install our new water heater. We had bought our own water heater and had them install it for us. Keith Jr. was so nice and respectful. He did a great job on the installation and even ran out to get a drip pan that we had requested. The price was very reasonable and way less than I expected. We will be using them for all our plumbing needs in the future!

reviews.author: James Kutz
reviews.text:
I had a Sunday afternoon backup of sewage in my basement floor drain. I called and spoke to Keith Jr., who made it by the same day within a couple hours. He talked me through the process and accurately quoted me the cost over the phone. A couple hours later, my sewage line was flowing again. He provided me with some long term solutions and estimates regarding the coming months/years so that I could begin planning for similar issues in the future. He was kind, patient, informative, and diligent considering I needed his services on a Sunday evening. Based on my research, his pricing was very competitive considering the time of the week.

Thank you Keith Jr.!

reviews.author: Jon G
reviews.text: Owner Keith and his team did a wonderful job. Modern equipment , honest, knowledgeable, and great work.  I had drainage issue.  Came out right away for a free estimate.  Access wasn't easy but he showed me using a camera exactly what was going on and offered alternatives.  Keith took care of working with the village and identifying all the lines.  His pricing was good and fair.  The work was done as quickly as possible and was quality work.  Cleaned up everything nicely.  I will use them again and recommend them to everyone.

reviews.author: Jeffrey Bautch
reviews.text: We needed a sewer lateral in our basement repaired and Keith from KBI Plumbing came out immediately to give us a free estimate, which was a great deal more reasonable than the previous contractor had quoted. They were right on time the day the work was scheduled to be done. Their crew was very polite and did a fantastic job. They cleaned everything up, it was left spotless! I would HIGHLY RECOMMEND them! They did an excellent job and were very reasonably priced.

plumbers.name: A&P Grease Trappers, Inc
plumbers.address: 801 N Raddant Rd, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Kyle Stoffers
reviews.text: Highly Recommend A&P Grease Trappers for your business. Our technician, Bruce, was on time for our appointment and was not only extremely knowledgeable and helped us out with cleaning our grease trap, but he was also incredibly nice and personable. Bruce really went above and beyond our expectations and clearly and politely made recommendations for what we should do in the future. We hope to use A&P for our business again in the future.

reviews.author: Dawn Phillips
reviews.text: I have had great experience with this business from start to finish. They were efficient, knowledgeable, and clearly take pride in the work they do. Everything was handled smoothly and professionally, and I always felt like I was in good hands. It’s refreshing to deal with people who know what they’re doing and genuinely care about delivering great service. I’m very happy with the results and wouldn’t hesitate to use them again or recommend them to others!

reviews.author: Collin Dissette
reviews.text: First time using this company for my restaurants , absolutely fantastic experience by everyone I interacted with !!

reviews.author: Cesar Lopez
reviews.text:
Received a $675 bill to clean my grease trap after they were just there 2months ago.
Claimed I needed hydrojetting services, once they opened up the grease trap it showed the unit was only vacuumed out, the walls were left with 2-3” grease layer. After three years or business at $225 a clean out they offered me $125 off my next cleaning.
I’m sorry but that’s not good enough

reviews.author: Justina Pikor
reviews.text: They are always on schedule and do a great job cleaning our Grease Trap!  It is always clean after they leave too

plumbers.name: Redbeard Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 431 Acadia Dr, Joppatowne, MD 21085, USA

reviews.author: RzUp
reviews.text:
I contacted Redbeard Plumbing, LLC to repair an internal water pipe that was leaking and had caused a great deal of damage to my basement. I was in need of getting someone out fairly quickly bc my water had to be turned off to prevent further damage. I spoke with Sam and shortly after I was assigned a plumber who was scheduled to arrive within hour. Donovan arrived and immediately diagnosed the issue. He thoroughly explained and demostrated exactly what needed to be done.  He worked on the pipe inside, as well as changing the hose bib outside (despite having to walk through ice). Within a couple hours my repair was completed and I had running water again!
Donovan also provided information on options for future updates to some of my dated equipment which I appreciated. I highly recommend Redbeard Plumbing, from their customer service to their actual plumbing skill. I would definitely contact them again! Thank you!

reviews.author: j B
reviews.text: It’s hard to find genuine, honest professionals these days. Sam was extremely professional, knowledgeable and transparent about the plumbing needs and what to expect. He provided quality services with excellence and was a pleasure to work with. I highly recommend his services and would use him again.

reviews.author: DB Carey
reviews.text: These guys have a 5 star rating in all of their reviews for a reason.  I had an emergency situation and called Tuesday morning.  Fortunately for me they were finishing up a job nearby and were at my house in about 30 minutes.  They were able to diagnose the problem quickly, quoted me a price and started right away. They explained everything clearly as they were working and made suggestions about other things they noticed  (that didn't need immediate repair) as they went along. Sam & Donovan did great work and they will be the first I call in the future!

reviews.author: Eric Hedges
reviews.text: Had a pipe break for my shower and I called this company at 830am. At 11am they were here and spent 3 hours repairing the leak and making it as good as new. Great company and decent price for repair. Would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Jared Rodriguez
reviews.text: Sam explained the process to me and his employee did a great job as well. Just waiting on the final steps for the permit and everything is good to go. Would recommend and use in the future.

plumbers.name: SPG Plumbing, Drain and Sewer Gurnee
plumbers.address: 3838 Grandview Ave, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: Manuel Rivera
reviews.text: I contacted Sam at SPG to quote a water heater replacement. After getting bids from two big box stores and two independent contractors.  I selected SPG because they provided more new heater options and a very competitive cost. Sam scheduled the installation and secured my selected heater that same day.  The plumbers, Massimo and Kevin, were super professional and did an excellent job of getting the heater up to my condo and installed, without any damage to the new heater or the condo.  I deeply appreciated their service and friendly attitude. Overall, SPG was responsive, professional, and committed to customer service. I hope this review will help others in need of similar services.

reviews.author: Mike Jose
reviews.text:
If you’re looking for Plumbing Drain Sewer services, you need to avoid SPG!
They SPG charge to you before they start to provide service, which means you have to pay full price first even if they don’t get work done properly.
They SPG charged me $1000 but couldn’t not fix my plumbing pipe. They SPG did not refund neither!

reviews.author: Alyse Black
reviews.text: Really great experience! They answered quickly on a Sunday during a snowstorm and came out that morning. Kevin was our guy and he did great work. Even helped clean up after he finished. Super nice, reasonably priced and very prompt!! Would absolutely recommend and use again!

reviews.author: Steve Paul
reviews.text:
Leaking angle valves and faucet needed to be replaced before becoming a big mess.
Massimo did a wonderful job, quick and efficient at a reasonable cost.
Will use SPG plumbing again. Thanks for the help!

reviews.author: Liviu Soneriu
reviews.text:
Excellent Service from SPG Plumbing!
​I recently had an issue with a leaky faucet and called SPG Plumbing based on a recommendation. I'm so glad I did! From the moment I called, they were professional and friendly. They scheduled a technician to come out the very next day, which was a huge relief.
​The technician arrived on time and was incredibly knowledgeable. He quickly diagnosed the problem and explained the repair process to me in a way that was easy to understand. He had all the necessary parts with him and fixed the leak efficiently, leaving the work area spotless.
​I was very impressed with the quality of their work and their excellent customer service. The price was fair and transparent, with no hidden fees. I highly recommend SPG Plumbing for any plumbing needs. They've definitely earned a loyal customer in me!

plumbers.name: Big Smile Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3115 Beaumont Ave, Oakland, CA 94602, USA

reviews.author: Alvin Llaneza
reviews.text:
Rolando was such an amazing worker. He is so nice and so understanding and knowledgeable.
He explained everything into detail with a smile on his face even though he had just came out of the crawl space with dirty hands and hair and always answered all my questions and concerns.
He assured me that the work will get done properly. During the repair, one of the pipes broke and he did not charge me extra for the replacement. When I told him that I did not have the budget to upgrade certain things he helped me stay within my budget. I would highly recommend Rolando and his team for furure plumbing repairs. Thanks again guys!

reviews.author: L XW
reviews.text:
Great pricing, quality install and easy service!

I was in a tight bind when my 20+ year water heater broke Thanksgiving week. After four different plumbing inspections, I chose Big Smile, while each plumber suggested similar plans, Rolando’s quote was reasonable - lower mark up and addressed truly necessary needs.

Rolando and his team were quick, diligent and communicative - easy and patient with follow up and questions. Inspection was thorough with practical suggestions and keeping coding needs in mind. I needed a new water heater and Rolando able to install, brace and replace needed piping in a few hours. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Linda Vu
reviews.text: I called around 6pm to set up an appt for a quote. Rolando was able to come within minutes (just so happened to be nearby), gave me a quote and immediately started work. Kitchen sink faucet replacement so I can attach my portable dishwasher. Rolando was professional, skillful, and stayed through the end to make sure my dishwasher was functioning properly. It took about an hour to finish the job, and Rolando was friendly too. Would recommend and use this company again!

reviews.author: Kevin Ting Chan
reviews.text: I had a positive experience with their same-day service. While the arrival time changed slightly, they were proactive about keeping me updated. Rolando was professional, explained the work clearly, and did a clean job. Pricing was provided in advance and didn't change.  I'd recommend them for anyone looking for reliable and communicative service.

reviews.author: Riana ElNaggar
reviews.text: Rolando is a great guy that is very knowledgeable and honest. When I called him to replace my broken disposal, he instead was able to fix it and gave a fair price. The disposal ended up breaking but appreciated how honest he was and his effort to help save me money. Thank you!

plumbers.name: Oakland Rooter Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1614 Fruitvale Ave, Oakland, CA 94601, USA

reviews.author: Darlene Moore
reviews.text: I hired Oakland Rooter & Plumbing after speaking to several plumbing companies.  I was frustrated with no shows, differing opinions and estimates. Jose Moreno came out and walked me through different options for a big repipe project that needed urgent attention. He explained things so well, was patient to make sure I understood the options and costs he presented.  He expedited the work, was very thorough, kept me well informed and was reasonable in pricing.  After having worked with many contractors, I really appreciate having trustworthy trades that keep their word and have a passion for quality work and happy customers.  As far as I'm concerned there is only one Plumbing company that I will call from now on and that's saying a lot.

reviews.author: Chase BFD
reviews.text: Oakland Rooter is far and away the most trustworthy, thoughtful, and honorable company in the Bay Area.  They have simply reformed my 1946 home including a whole house repipe, new line from the street, new bathtub, bathroom sink, kitchen plumbing, and all the finishes. They complete jobs on time and on budget, take great care to protect your home while the work is being done, and most of all the plumbers are the best people you’ll ever run across (specifically Jose and the owner Ygnacio)! I am a lifetime customer.

reviews.author: Mandy Chiang
reviews.text:
Called this morning at 11am for a clogged sink drain, and Cesar came at 11:45, and he fixed it in an hour!
The previous plumber from a different company that came a couple of hours before him installed a new pipe and caused a new leak, and didn't fix the clog.
Cesar let me know about the mistake and not only fixed the clog, but also corrected the pipe sizing and fixed the leak!
Their pricing is super great as well. I was quoted $400 hourly by another company and $240 from Oakland Rooter. They had a drain special so I ended up only paying $99! I would highly recommend Oakland Rooter for your plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Albert Ok
reviews.text: Odie was a lifesaver here at our restaurant. We had a previous plumber that charged us 1600$ for essentially nothing. He and his coworker came in and solved the problem with ease. It is hard to find honest reliable workers nowadays. Would definitely recommend to my other industry peers. Thanks Odie!

reviews.author: Chelsea Jameson
reviews.text: I called Oakland rooter on a Thursday and they had someone to my house Friday morning (it was not a plumbing emergency). Eddie was on time, courteous, and fixed our leaking sink within 30 minutes. He explained to me in detail what was wrong and what he did to resolve it. I would use this company again and was very happy with Eddie’s service.

plumbers.name: Michael Gardner Plumbing
plumbers.address: 16038 Vía Nueva, San Lorenzo, CA 94580, USA

reviews.author: Nathanael Lima
reviews.text:
We had an emergency issue with our water heater and Michael came out on a call at 8pm, which already showed incredible responsiveness and customer service. He diagnosed the problem quickly and came back the next day to get everything fully fixed.

One thing we really appreciated was that he explained all of our options clearly, from lowest cost to highest cost, and allowed us to choose what worked best for us without any pressure. Super honest and transparent.

Michael was clean, professional, and respectful of our home the entire time.
Great experience, highly recommended!

reviews.author: Rebecca F
reviews.text:
Michael was recommended by another plumber, who didn't have any appointments for at least two days. I had a toilet leak, which fortunately wasn't an overflow. Michael communicated with where he was at with his current job. He was dealing with an emergency repair at another home which took hours.

He arrived the following day and also gave me a discount since I was patient in waiting for him to do the repair. I had a fill valve replacement done. He also explained what situations would warrant more extensive and higher cost repairs as far as the function of the toilet parts.  I would highly recommend Michael Gardner Plumbing.

reviews.author: Honey B
reviews.text:
I find Michael on Google
I left him a voice mail and he called back very quickly. He fixed a leak coming from the water heater....I was stressing over this but he worked his magic and did a FANTASTIC job.
He is from now on my to go plumber
Thank you 😊

reviews.author: VOLBOLDEN
reviews.text:
Had a pipe issue at my home. Sewage was backing up into our yard through out clean out. We tried snaking it ourselves for hours with no success, called a local plumber I knew out and he cleaned it out and he sent a camera down and we saw there was a disconnected pipe or offset from my house’s pipe to the main city pipe which was causing the backup. It needed to be dug up and replaced which obviously was not the news I wanted to hear but it needed to be fixed.   He recommended Michael as he does this type of pipe replacement. Michael came right out and checked the camera view told us what needed to be done and gave us an estimate.

We called Michael out when we got the money together, he came right out, set up everything, walked us through the process, did all the permits, met with and pge to mark all the gas lines and then the next day he and his crew got to work.

Got it fixed up, there was minimal to no disruption to our daily life at all during the repair. He and his crew were very thorough and the job was well done. You can tell when contractors cut corners and there were no corners cut at all, all work was documented and he gave updates. Job as done well and water is flowing and haven’t had issues since. Thanks

reviews.author: Fred W.
reviews.text: Quick responds. a nice guy got the job done professionally. Got a main sewer line clog last night. Found this plumber locally in Google. Called this morning and he came in an hour. After I explained my finding, he confirmed the main sewer line clogged. Did the snake in first cleanout, not working. Then moved and Snake in the cleanout (2nd) closer to the street . It really took some effort. We both started wondering if a big issue underneath the sidewalk thru the city sewer line. Lucky, at the last , the snake went thru, the dirt was drained. Clog was removed. Then we went thru the camera detection together. A pipe connection has issue, as shown. He explained the issue and quoted for future solutions , budget or pricy. Overall, a good and smooth experience.

plumbers.name: JTS Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 629 S 27th St, Easton, PA 18045, USA

reviews.author: Karen Collinge
reviews.text: They did a great job! Our water heater broke. They installed the new one and took the old one all within an hour the same day we called. The price was much less than another place we inquired at. Will keep their number for any future plumbing repairs needed.

reviews.author: Danny Akacki
reviews.text:
I have found my forever crew for my homes plumbing and heating. Some companies have to try to convince and market excellence, for JTS they don’t know how to apply their craft any other way.

From the first phone call, to the visit, to the execution, everything about them screams professional. Anyone can be skilled at a thing, but delighting the customer while you do it takes real work and talent. And that’s where JTS has the market cornered.

reviews.author: Jeffrey Carlton
reviews.text:
JTS was the lowest bid for our AC replacement, but they also came highly recommended. I mentioned a problem that we have had with air flow in the top level and no one was able to offer any suggestions.  However, when Tyler & Connor from JTS were here, they quickly saw the issue and took steps to fix it - at no extra charge.

We were VERY pleased with their service!

reviews.author: Roger Guilfoyle
reviews.text: Called J T plumbing and they scheduled the very next day. They arrived when they said they would .  Alan was very professional and polite. He analyzed the problems and corrected each item quickly.  I highly recommend J T plumbing for any plumbing problems.  Very fair pricing and worked very quickly to take care of the problems.  Everything taken care of in less than an hour.  Great job.

reviews.author: Jessica Autumn
reviews.text:
Professionalism at its best!!!

We had a very large job which completed timely and exceeded our expectations.   The technicians were both knowledgeable and hard working.  They regularly checked in with us regarding installation locations.
I highly recommend JTS for any project!!!!

plumbers.name: Tommy Malozi Jr Sewer, Drain, and Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1960 Troxell St, Allentown, PA 18109, USA

reviews.author: Patrick Turlington
reviews.text: He was able to get to my home really quickly and take care of the sewer line issue. He explained everything as he did the job while answering my questions on how to prevent future issues, etc. I highly recommend him for your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: 72afam (Aamir)
reviews.text: If you want honest, dependable, and skilled plumbers then the Malozi father and son team is the best. They did some kitchen work for me and did not leave till I tested everything and was satisfied. They also offered free advice on things I had questions about. Just really skilled, honest, and fair priced. A rare find in the plumbing world.

reviews.author: Ashish Rai
reviews.text: Tommy and his nephew were very gracious in helping us on a Friday night with our sewage pump in our basement.  The Malozi's were the initial installers of said pump many years ago, Tommy took time out from a family celebration, patiently described how to resolve the problem over the phone and we later completed the task and of course it worked and fixed our issue.  I can't tell you how helpful this was in our situation and the fact that Tommy took the time to explain the solution to us was beyond what we expected.  This company was helpful, knowledgeable and, friendly during our initial install years ago and went the extra mile to help us again with an issue years later.  I highly recommend them since they take care of all their customers in the same way and we truly appreciate their efforts.

reviews.author: Euzkadi Lezako
reviews.text: Tommy & Jimmy were professional, personable, prompt and priced fair. They did a great job and came when promised. The plumbing issue was diagnosed and fixed within less than an hour.  I definitely will call on then when next there is a plumbing issue and recommend them 100% for their services.

reviews.author: anaise morel
reviews.text: Wow !!! Is all I can say. This family operated business was absolutely exceptional. Quick response time , excellent communication and honest. I appreciate the time Jimmy and Tommy took to explain the issues and what they did to fix it because let’s be honest the plumbing jargon can sound like another language haha. They sent pictures of everything!!!  I am very pleased with their  expertise and excellent customer service skills and will recommend them. Look no further … and hire them for your needs.

plumbers.name: Plumbing Masters LLC
plumbers.address: 15712 N Pennsylvania Ave Ste 2, Edmond, OK 73013, USA

reviews.author: Israel Betanzos
reviews.text: In my time of need the Plumbing Masters came to the rescue! Steve was polite, professional, and honchoed the job. I originally called a “franchised” company, and they didn’t make me feel confident in their product. But when I called the Plumbing Masters, they provided me with confidence in their knowledge and expertise. I had a last minute emergency. Steve came and kicked it in the ass. Thank you again to Steve and the Plumbing Masters team! This veteran is satisfied.

reviews.author: Charlotte Kester
reviews.text: My daughter charlotte renee kester sent me to plumbing masters. They had Jesse come out and fix my water heater. He was quick and professional. I'm definitely a fan of plumbing masters! Great pricing and awesome workers!

reviews.author: PapasScarce24
reviews.text: Jesse came out to my house to fix a leak on my toilet. I'm glad that I was able to get somebody with much experience. He had to replace the valve. He was quick to fix it and charged a really good price. I will be using Plumbing Masters from now on!

reviews.author: Sammii Tilley
reviews.text: I called plumbing masters and I was greeted by Jesse and his crew, he came and broke up my concrete and replaced my leaking pipe. He filled the hole back up and cleaned up the mess. Super polite and friendly. I would definitely recommend this company. Amazing workers!!

reviews.author: Irishman4492
reviews.text: How does one even describe this outstanding company!? I had an emergency on my home (busted line in second story) and even at 1:00am Ms. Beatrice answered. The contractor himself showed up with a good attitude and quickly shutoff the water. Not only did they perform a whole house repipe, I am not going through this again, they also were able to patch every hole in drywall made including replacing my wood floor. They worked with my insurance company and got me covered! I hope I never have to use them again (Ha!) but if I ever need a plumber I will only use them. Big thank you to Damon and his team of super plumbers!

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2716 W North Ave Suite 1, Chicago, IL 60647, USA

reviews.author: Julie Pfeffer
reviews.text: Pete helped us with a complicated leak in our 3 flat. He was incredibly communicative, professional, and dedicated to making things right for us. I’d hire him again in a heartbeat!

reviews.author: Olivia Williams
reviews.text: We had a great experience with Rescue Plumbing. Making an appointment is easy because their admin staff are super organized. Both times we were able to get someone to come out within a day. The guys that came and installed our new sump pump were incredibly nice and professional. They emailed us options to fix our problem with price estimates, which made everything really clear and easy. Everybody at Rescue is so friendly! We highly recommend.

reviews.author: Christine Del Priore
reviews.text:
Editing up to a 3 star for now.  The company called and is doing their best to rectify the issue which I appreciate so much!  I will edit the review again once the leak if solved once and for all!

They came promptly which was nice, however the service cost to our bath faucet was over $300 and the sink was leaking again a few hours later worse than before they “fixed it”. There was no guarantee on their work so they would charge the full fee again to check it. I will not be calling them again.

reviews.author: Dean Ramoino
reviews.text: Logan was fantastic to work with. Very responsive, professional, and accommodating. My tenants did not have a working shower and Logan offered to come in on his day off to fix the issue. I would highly recommend Logan and Rescue Plumbing for any plumbing needs. The office staff was very friendly and helpful as well! Thank you again!

reviews.author: Mari
reviews.text: Pete and Noah were amazing! Total professionals. They installed an outdoor spigot on our house in about an hour and a half. Pete was great about explaining everything, and the job was done perfectly! Will definitely be calling them again in the future!

plumbers.name: Michels Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 225 Gale St, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Monica Yvette Venegas
reviews.text: Wonderful Company to rely for any plumbing need. Not only was the price reasonable there plumbers were exceptional.  We had to remove old cast iron sewer lines and add additional drains for new washroom. Leon, Kyle and Brenan were on-site, attentive, courteous, with excellent workmanship. So happy I used them. Overall a wonderful experience. Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Doug Hafer
reviews.text:
Marnie,
Could you please thank everyone, as we truly appreciate you all.  We have been working with Michels for maybe 15 years, and when things go wrong, we do not hesitate to call you all.  Customer service is great, prices are honest, and we have always had an all-around excellent experience.

Kyle was quick to diagnose the problem, looked at other issues that could have caused the issue or could cause future issues, and recommended a solution.  We, of course, took his advice.

Thanks again, we appreciate it!

-Doug & family

reviews.author: Julie Wallin
reviews.text: Brian came out and cleaned out my sewer water line - I was previously told I needed a whole new sewer line $6000 from another company. Brian came out and removed all the mud and roots from the line!!  I appreciate him taking the time and fixing my line!! Great great great great job!

reviews.author: Alan Unnerstall
reviews.text: We have been using Michels Plumbing for over 20 years and they have always provided reliable and efficient plumbing work.  Just had our sump pump replaced and a custom cover installed today.  Looks great!   Kyle the technician did an awesome job, very respectful, responsive and efficient.  Great job!

reviews.author: Leslie Friedrich
reviews.text: Michels is by far the best plumbing service in the Aurora area! Brian did an incredible job with a challenging kitchen disposal installation. He redid piping, and now there's even more room than before in the cabinet under the sink & we now have a disposal! Michels is always right on time & provides updates on exact arrival time. Office staff is extremely helpful providing quotes or estimates via text messages. Prices are excellent! Definitely a 5 star plus company!

plumbers.name: Dave's Plumbing & Repair Service, Inc.
plumbers.address: 732 Tek Dr STE D, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Barbara Boissonnas
reviews.text: Dave's Plumbing was recommended when I needed someone to find and fix a leak downstairs that no one could locate. It was making my ejection pit pump run every 20 minutes, and I was afraid the pump would fail. So many people, including other professionals that I hired, had searched everywhere down there and given up. Colin came the same day, determined to find it and fix it -- and he did! He was totally professional and polite, a pleasure to work with. What a relief to finally have a smart, experienced plumber at a very reasonable cost. I will use Dave's Plumbing from now on and highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Liz Cook (Pomaraptor)
reviews.text: Dave and his crew came to my house and replaced a broken pump. We just purchased a house and had water backing up from the drain.  Dave explained everything, taking his time to make sure I understood all available options.  The pricing was reasonable and the service was outstanding.  We were so happy with Dave and his staff that we had them come back a few days later to replace the sump pump.  Upon completion of each install  I received an explanation of what was installed, how it works, and when I need to contact them if something goes wrong.  The install sight was clean when they left.  We will use Dave for all future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Kurt Waatti
reviews.text:
Dave,
Thank you for going "above and beyond" in the installation of the new garbage disposal, despite the obstacles encountered from the previous installation, which turned a 1 hour job or less into a 3 hour job. You stuck with it until the job was done and didn't raise the price showing conscientious respect for adhering to the deal and respectfulness to your customers.

I highly recommend Dave's Plumbing & Repair Service to anyone who wants an honest plumbing service with integrity.
Kurt J. Waatti

reviews.author: Scot Berndt
reviews.text: Dave's Plumbing came out and repaired issues with two toilets that a previous (licensed) plumbing contractor misdiagnosed. The cost to repair the underlying issue for both toilets was essentially the same price I paid the previous plumber to simply reseat the two toilets. Dave's Plumbing was thorough and their communication was excellent. Pricing was very reasonable. All work was accomplished the same day.

reviews.author: S L Watkins
reviews.text:
3/6/26
Had Dave come out and install new sump and backup pumps. Spring is heat and mine was no longer working. He did a great job, cleaned up, and the work is top notch!

I continue to use Dave’s because he is honest and doesn’t cut corners. I know he is going to do a great job and quality work. Thank you Dave for coming out and installing our water heater.

plumbers.name: JVS Plumbing Co
plumbers.address: 5211 Mann Dr Unit D, Ringwood, IL 60072, USA

reviews.author: catherine peters
reviews.text:
Just had a wonderful experience with Christian from JVS plumbing.  Christian was at my home for a water heater installation.   He arrived right on time, was respectful of my flooring, making sure he covered everything, and took the old tank with him.  He was very personable and finished the job quickly.
Pricing was the best offered out of 7 different local plumbers.  I would highly recommend JVS for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Shar Wade
reviews.text: I called due to a leak with my hot water heater.  I left a message and got a return call within a few minutes.  JVS was able to send someone out in less than an hour! Christian was able to fix the leak quickly.  He was very professional about everything.  I thought the price was reasonable.  I would recommend JVS Plumbing Company to anyone for their plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Tom Zambito
reviews.text: I recently purchased a new home, the appliances, not so new, so I requested a home warranty from the seller. Our 17 yr old hot water heater went out with all the fun stuff, water leaking all over, etc. Dealing with the home warranty co. was exhausting, and said 3-5 days to fix it, plus $1200. Nice. I went on Angi and JVS immediately called to see what was up. Spoke with the tech, explained the issue and I wanted to go tankless, and he told me he would get back to me in 20 minutes. In 15 minutes, a JVS tech was at my fence flagging me down. I showed him the mess, called his supervisor, his exact words were "I am confident about this". I have never heard those words from a tech about anything. The first contact called, sent a quote, it was $1800 more than the cost from the home warranty and their cheap replacement. He told me that they can install it the next day (Saturday). By 8am, the tech was on time, and began working. Done by 3pm, I had hot water. The entire experience at a time of turmoil was breathtaking. Some companies, just want to work to get stuff done, and JVS Plumbing is one that I shall be calling them the next time something goes boom. The overall service was impeccable, the quality of work was well worth every cent. No BS, no hidden fees, just great work and excellent value.

reviews.author: Ryan McReynolds
reviews.text:
Tried to hire before Christmas. They came out in 2 days to give us an estimate, and he recomended getting it done asap. I called that same day to set up the service, and was told that she would talk to the tech who gave the estimate, and he would call me later that day to set up. He texted to ask if we would be home over the holidays, I said yes, then I was not contacted again for 11 days, and after the holiday. I received a call, from a girl in the office, asking if we had a chance to review our estimate, and would we like to set something up?
Absolutely unacceptable way to run a business. Do not try to hire. Not that they would want the job anyway.

reviews.author: Mike and Lane Schlagel
reviews.text: JVS Plumbing did a fantastic job of replacing our water pipe. They were polite, professional, and good at communicating about the process. They also cleaned up everything exceptionally well. We would highly recommend them!

plumbers.name: Gladiator Rooter and Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1752 Timothy Dr, San Leandro, CA 94577, USA

reviews.author: Fernando Rodriguez
reviews.text: Bathroom sink was badly clogged! Needed this issue resolved quickly. I called gladiator around 5 pm. Tech showed up at 7:30 pm & fixed my clogged sink! Really like how fast they were able to show up. Tech was very friendly, detailed as well.

reviews.author: Tom Scovill
reviews.text:
Had a leaky water valve below out bathroom sink.  I called Gladiator on a Saturday afternoon before Christmas.   Gladiator was able to send out a top shelf plumber, Jorge!  within 90 minutes
Jorge quickly fixed the leak and explained what he did and the steps I missed in my home repair attempt.
I ve added them to my home my home repair contracts.

reviews.author: Jennifer Mims
reviews.text:
My landlord contacted Gladiator Plumbing to fix a bathroom sink leak. They came by a total of 3 times. They installed a new faucet to hopefully take care of the leak. After it was installed I saw it was still leaking shortly after he left.

I contacted the installer to tell him it was still leaking. he came by again and said don’t put water on top of the bathroom faucet. He seemed annoyed to come back.
I’m confused because it is impossible to avoid water on or around the faucet (handles or base). The installer said he couldn’t help me and that it was user error. What????? He recorded a video to send to the landlord showing it wasn’t leaking. He said I probably need a more expensive faucet that won’t leak. He said something that costs $500. I said I don’t need an expensive faucet nor do I know what they cost. I need a faucet that functions as it should.

Once the installer sent his recorded test (poring water on the sides of the faucet) -the outcome—-all of few minutes later their was water on the baseboard of the bathroom sink. The installer ran out quickly because he didn’t want to fix the problem. I contacted gladiator to tell them I don’t want the same installer to come back to address the problem. Gladiator is claiming they completed the job. I said you didn’t fix the issue because the bathroom sink is still leaking. Gladiator claims they might need to do more and they need approval from my landlord to tell them what they want to do now. They are trying to get more money and dragging it out. It’s been a week. This is soo frustrating because they didn’t complete a simple job.

reviews.author: Ryan Chow
reviews.text: They quoted me $200 for a toilet install then charged me $450 after installation claiming San Mateo is more expensive and it was a non-standard toilet (seemed normal to me).  The guys did decent work installing the toilet, but the floor was scratched. If they just quoted a price and charged the same price, I’d feel better, but I feel like it’s just bait and switch. Buyer beware.

reviews.author: Faisal Gowani
reviews.text: Call them for our water heater that stopped working and started flooding the garage and they came out in the middle of the night to help us resolve the issue and replace the water heater in the morning and it was a very smooth interaction and I appreciate their professionalism and I think you should call them anytime you have any issues because they are awesome

plumbers.name: A-MAC'S Plumbing & Rooter Services
plumbers.address: 5801 NW 122nd St, Oklahoma City, OK 73142, USA

reviews.author: Lindsay Flesher
reviews.text: They are the best! Amazing people, amazing customer service! Fast, friendly and thorough! They came to our house within an hour to fix one issue and stayed to locate a suspected ongoing leak, didn't stop till they did, and ended up fixing three issues. Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Cody McIntyre
reviews.text: Fast, efficient and friendly! Skylar and Robert made it to us in record time and got right to work. They had our leak fixed up and recommended other plumbing issues for our consideration.

reviews.author: S810 “SF810”
reviews.text: What amazing service, wow. They were at my place within 30 minutes...on a weekend! Very friendly and professional. This will be the only company we use for services like this.

reviews.author: suzanne Murphy
reviews.text: Had a couple of emergencies called Amacs he showed up three different times very late in the evening Awesome service would definitely recommend

reviews.author: Scott Schaeffer
reviews.text:
When both of our toilets clogged at the same time we knew we had a problem that required an immediate solution. My wife called A-MAC's Plumbing based on their 4.8 star rating and 65 year history in OKC. The person who answered the phone was pleasant and asked several clarifying questions so the plumber would know exactly what he was going to be dealing with, and explained the potential issues and possible costs.

The plumbers were immediately dispatched and arrived quickly, assessed the situation, and cleaned out our drain. Fortunately, the only issue they identified was a minor tree root invasion about 25 feet from the house. After clearing the clog they thoroughly explained what they had done and gave us some tips on preventing future issues. All said, it was no more than 45 minutes from finding out we had  a drain issue to waving goodbye to the plumbers.

Thanks, A-MAC's!

plumbers.name: Big Apple Plumbing LLC - Thornton, CO
plumbers.address: 12298 Pennsylvania St Unit 3016, Thornton, CO 80241, USA

reviews.author: Luke Wallace
reviews.text: This plumber did an excellent job with my water heater repair. He clearly explained what was wrong and was very honest about the solution. The repair was done quickly, and everything started working perfectly right away. I’m very happy with the service and would definitely recommend him and the company.

reviews.author: Richard Walton
reviews.text: We used this company for sewer repair, and the service exceeded our expectations. They quickly identified the issue and clearly explained everything before starting the work. The job was completed professionally and with great care. Scheduling was easy, and they arrived on time. I would definitely recommend this company for sewer repair.

reviews.author: Thomas Estabrook
reviews.text: We had a clogged sewer line, and Big Apple Plumbing took care of it quickly and efficiently. They even ran a camera through the pipe to check everything, which we really appreciated. The cost was reasonable, and the team was professional ans easy to work with. I’d definitely call them again and recommend them to others.

reviews.author: Scott Baldwin
reviews.text: Can't recommend Big Apple Plumbing LLC enough! Jason (the owner) took my call on a Sunday for an emergency double water heater replacement; he was at our house about 2 hours later and the replacement took about 3 hours. Jason and Disraeli (hope I'm spelling that right!) were fantastic -- professional, personable, quick to explain everything, and efficient. They were really careful on cleanup and ensuring we understood all the work they did, how it matched code, etc.

reviews.author: James Brown
reviews.text: Big Apple Plumbing provided excellent service at our property. Our sewer line clogged, and they fixed the issue quickly and even used a camera to inspect the pipe condition. The service charge was reasonable, and they were very professional throughout the process. I would definitely use their service again and recommend them to others.

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3409 N Paulina St, Chicago, IL 60657, USA

reviews.author: Evelyn Hannagan
reviews.text: Javier did an exceptional job fixing my very old bathroom and making it into a modern brand new bathroom. I highly recommend rescue plumbing. Thank you so much for the beautiful new bathroom

reviews.author: aimee houck
reviews.text: I called Rescue Plumbing Tuesday afternoon for a clogged water pipe and they were able to send Loga & Alan over the next day. The team was early, walked me through the issue and were able to snake the problem out in under an hour.

reviews.author: Bridget Hussey
reviews.text: Javier did incredible work for us today! When we noticed our toilet was leaking, he came to assess the issue. He advocated for us as renters and educated the owners of the property on the proper repairs that were needed to fully fix the problem. He installed a brand new toilet so quickly and did it with such professionalism, respect and kindness. His assistant Jimmy was also great. I truly enjoyed my experience with Rescue Plumbing and would recommend them to anyone!

reviews.author: Vanda Berman
reviews.text: Rescue Plumbing was amazing. We thought we had a leak in the building and they came out right away. Logan took the time to listen and talk us through all the possibilities and options available to us. He was very knowledgeable and respectful of our space.

reviews.author: Cat Amaro
reviews.text: We noticed a leak super late at night. I sent a request for service before bed and received a response before I woke up. They were quick to give us same day window frame and work around our schedule. The two guys (did not get their names as my husband was the main point of communication) were so kind, professional, fast, and efficient. Thank you!

plumbers.name: Rooter Man
plumbers.address: 1110 Putman Dr NW, Huntsville, AL 35816, USA

reviews.author: Jeanne Steadman
reviews.text: I can highly recommend Craig at Rooterman! We had a serious plumbing issue of a burst  pipe because of the extreme cold and he went above and beyond! to fix everything. He worked so hard and was so professional, knowledgeable and kind! Craig is the best!

reviews.author: Lynne Brown
reviews.text: We have a great plumber who has taken care of our needs so well, but was out of town and no one was available with his group for an evening emergency. He recommended Rooter Man and we are very grateful he did.  Our building, with multiple renters, had 6 commodes stopped up.  Drake spent 2 hours climbing on the roof and unclogging those commodes.  He would not leave until he had flushed each of those commodes multiple times to be certain everything was working perfectly.  His patience, professionalism and determination were amazing and we greatly appreciate him solving our issue before anyone arrived for work this morning.  We highly recommend Rooter Man.

reviews.author: Devin Theobald
reviews.text: Had a leaking hose bib. Couple of appliances on their own field line. We wanted an additional hose bib added to our garden about 60’ from our home. Craig did an amazing job. We could not be happier. He replaced both hose bibs and older no freeze lines. He did an absolutely beautiful job on our hydrant at our garden. I know it’s just a hose pole, but it really adds to the farm/garden aesthetic of our small family farms Craig’s idea. And he was right. It’s better  in a freeze, and it looks and performs great. My little daughters love opening it up to weather the garden and chickens. Craig got the sink drain and clothes washer off their own field lines and tied to our septic. If it rained heavy, we could not run the dishwasher or clothes washer. Now we can. Craig always had a smile on his face. Was informed, confident, honest, and I felt like he really wanted to do a good job for us. Highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: M.G. Sturm
reviews.text: I love this company, keep their number on speed dial, when plumbing needs arise. Be it for outside faucet needs, water lines to be extended for garden irrigation or inside when toilets leak, not flush or one needs help with new installation. They are wonderful, knowledgeable, quick, professional, and their rates are reasonable.

reviews.author: Lee Nall
reviews.text: Rooter Man provides exceptional service. Vickilyn is always spot on  when she answers the phone and assigns as plumber and provides the estimated arrival time both during and after hours.  I highly recommend them for your plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Charge Construction & Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: 100 S Williams St Unit 4, Thornton, IL 60476, USA

reviews.author: Michael Young
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of doing business with this company on my first full rehab.  Very knowledgeable, understanding, and respectful.  And might I add there work is very clean.  On my next one I will definitely use this company again.  Thanks for an awesome job well done

reviews.author: Amanda Carreon
reviews.text: Paid over 6k to have my plumbing redone. Had pex installed and new PVC drain tubes. I will let the pictures do the talking.

reviews.author: Evan Deranja
reviews.text: Hi. Marcus came out to fix our flooded basement in a Saturday (of course it had to be a weekend).  We live in an old house and have had many pipe issues over the years. He was fantastic! He’s by far the best plumber to come out to help us at our house to date (and we've had several). He took the time to make sure he completely diagnosed and solved our problem thoroughly; and for the first time in a long time, I feel like the problem has been truly solved. And furthermore, he taught me a lot about how the plumbing works on these old houses, and I feel much more confident in how to prevent and manage problems like these in the future. I highly recommend Marcus at Charge Plumbing and definitely plan on using his services again in the future - although hopefully I will be calling for just maintenance and preventive work rather than for an actual basement flood.

reviews.author: Karlyn Boens
reviews.text: You do not have to look anywhere else! You can trust Charge Construction and Plumbing with your needs. After the pipes on my sump pump disconnected, Don was able to quickly diagnose the problem, talk to me about all solutions—temporary and long-term and fixed it within one hour. Extremely professional! As a parent, I needed this fixed ASAP and was grateful that Charge Construction and Plumbing was working evening hours to meet my needs. I also needed someone trustworthy and knowledgable. I even talked to a few other plumbers afterwards who agreed that Don’s pricing was fair and his technique was top notch!

reviews.author: Carissa Zavala
reviews.text: Marcus was professional, knowledgeable, and provided great service! Came out same-day to fix our toilet and the entire process from start to finish went smoothly. Highly recommend Charge Construction & Plumbing!

plumbers.name: Dundee Services Inc
plumbers.address: 9 Michigan Ave, East Dundee, IL 60118, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Tumilty
reviews.text: Peter fixed our main plumbing leak issue, and knocked out a gas hookup while he was here. Great service and the price was more than fair. Would use his services again and would recommend to family and friends in a heartbeat. Thank you!

reviews.author: Jim Proudfoot
reviews.text: Peter was very good at installing my AC and furnace. He also fixed my boiler. Would highly recommend!

reviews.author: marie borck
reviews.text: I am very happy with Dundee Services. Peter was awesome. He resolved the poor drainage issues in my yard by extending drain tile further away from the house. Also by putting river rock around the foundation. He made the entire process smooth and at an affordable price.

reviews.author: Christi Melhorn
reviews.text: Great experience with Dundee Services! Peter was quick to respond to our heat issue on a -7 degree day. He was  knowledgeable and communicative and gave us an incredibly fair price. He assessed the repair and made sure everything was in safe, working order before he left. Definitely recommend and we will be returning customers.

reviews.author: m bendi
reviews.text: I’ve used Dundee Services three times now, and Peter has been awesome to work with every single time. He helped me out with installing a new dishwasher, fixing some leaky pipes in my basement, and took care of an HVAC issue I couldn't solve myself. He's dependable and reasonably priced with no hidden costs or upselling. If you need some work done, residential or commercial.. this is your guy. Highly recommend!

plumbers.name: Complete Care Plumbing Electric & AC
plumbers.address: 2205 Warehouse Cir ste 101, Marble Falls, TX 78654, USA

reviews.author: Michelle Doerr
reviews.text:
These guys are the best.  they did all my new plumbing when I remodeled  and then today when I got up to my lake house, I had no water due to a busted pipe.  Complete care came right out at 5 o’clock on a Friday and fixed it immediately and the price wasn’t bad. As a 33 yr Realtor Who’s dealt with lots of contractors in that time and a homeowner I highly recommend them.
It’s  great to have good contractors at your disposal. It’s hard to find in Kingsland. If you want a good plumber that gets the job done right go to Complete Care.

reviews.author: Christian Amaro
reviews.text: Fantastic service! Clint and his guys were able to perform a clean and efficient water softener install at our home! Strongly recommend them!

reviews.author: Highland Lakes Boat Rentals Meadows
reviews.text: Ramona Meadows- long/time customer. I want to say Complete Care Plumbing is a fantastic company; has amazing service men, so knowledgeable and efficient.  Every time they have had to come out they’ve been friendly, cleaned up after themselves, professional. Also Christian-run, caring people.

reviews.author: Michael Landry
reviews.text:
We purchased a house in Burnet in June 2020 and moved from Austin to burnet in 2022. Shortly after our purchase, we needed an indoor fan motor replaced and was told by neighbors and friends to contact James at Complete Care Plumbing and A/C. They were not wrong, James came out and repaired same day.
Since that time, we have needed plumbing and HVAC services from repairs to installation of a bathroom and HVAC to our shop we built.
Recently, we had an emergency gas line repair at my inlaws house that was needed over a holiday weekend and thanks to Johnny, James, and Clint, the inlaws were back online quickly.
I highly recommend Complete Care for your future Plumbing and HVAC needs.

reviews.author: Carolyn Larsen
reviews.text:
Complete Care Plumbing,  Electric, and A/C removed two standard flush toilets and installed two Toto Bidet Neorest toilets in their place. The job included installing GFCI electric outlets to supply power to the Toto toilets. Clint took great care of us, sending two plumbing professionals to our home promptly the following morning to ensure everything was working properly with the new Toto toilets.
